name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Democrats are gaining momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, _We have bad news:__it looks like the Democrats are gaining steam in the race for the Senate.__****_

**Just last week the Left held a conference to strategize how to take down Florida - and when they brought up Joe Biden’s name, everyone chanted “FOUR MORE YEARS!”**

It’s almost like the Democrats __enjoy_ _the suffering and chaos that Joe Biden has brought to this country.

_**[Right now, our future is in danger. If we lose Florida, we’ll lose ANY chance of a GOP Senate Majority. Can you join other Republicans and donate to help keep FLORIDA RED IN 2024?](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=b449399e9db14d41a7df61ac2cb738c8&_e=oaVnMqftrkL5g9LwgLrVH5Rj5jAZLaSPoiiOsk0jhixUNvWWWLMUKowy1pXSbCD-0fFQgV3K9ieV4C2GYvyx8J0IZjdzoZixosOIGCleH6DpaJmmhcis-2vYsSdM1Y-UJSlx67AA2mkIvDXnoMgYex6Ue2NnCos0_usYrXwGihaZbxfnCMn2gcb7aUeSdut5ifTU9o6kVpLzNwSIQ6h_7Vdf_mmpPg5PMKhOb7cICdi6a62KKR7duiA4K7z10b8d2tkd9LU1nCi5l4ZN68awRMaq0nzALhS3HU-ilMnWJ-dWzNVLx2AkxckXlraVqp5KMQhnlNEjlPfGw9C0eq7qSIdoJFOPWHMoyMcN4qYUtT5euScd1o6fawP5oDYjgpjR)**_

We need a leader that stands for the people of Florida, not blind loyalty to career and broken politicians.

_**[Floridians are counting on grassroots patriots like you to step up and help us defend our state. Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

clean_body: | | | | Peter, Congratulations to the Texas Rangers for their outstanding victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks to win their FIRST ever World Series! Their dedication, hard work, and unwavering spirit have made the great state of Texas incredibly proud. I’ll always be grateful that I got to catch a game earlier this year, and see our Champs play in person! I am excited to share that we're not only victorious on the baseball diamond, but we're also gearing up for a successful 2024 election. With your continued support, we can achieve even greater victories for Texas. If you believe in our mission to represent the Lone Star State and uphold the values we hold dear, please consider contributing to our campaign. Your support makes all the difference, and together, we can keep winning for Texas. | | | | Once again, congratulations to the Texas Rangers on this remarkable triumph. I look forward to celebrating many more victories with you all in the future. Sincerely, Rep. Roger Williams TX-25 | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ ROGER WILLIAMS FOR U.S. CONGRESS 10 N. CADDO ST. PMB #174 CLEBURNE, TX 76031 Stay connected with our campaign and be part of the movement. Follow Roger on social media for updates, volunteer to support the cause, or reach out to him directly. By joining Team Williams, you will make a difference in your community. | A Note For You, From Roger My commitment to our great state and country is unwavering, and I am grateful to have my wife Patty, our two daughters, and YOU standing beside me on this journey. | Roger W. 10 N. Caddo St, PMB #174, Celburne, TX

clean_body: Democrats have been preparing all cycle to win in Virginia, and the last thing to do now is give our candidates one final push across the finish line. | | | | | ---|--- This is the last time we’ll email you about our triple-match extension. There are only four hours left to claim your 3X match and help fuel our candidates to victory on Tuesday. Here’s why we’re counting on you to step up now: ➡ Gov. Youngkin’s MAGA donors have poured over $27 million into Virginia’s legislative races. ➡ These elections are shaping up to be the most watched races in the country – and the results will have implications for 2024. ➡ This Tuesday marks the first time Virginians are voting for a full legislature since Roe v. Wade was overturned – so abortion access, voting rights, and much more are at stake. We have been preparing all cycle to win in Virginia, and the last thing to do now is give our candidates one final push across the finish line. With only four days left until Election Day and four hours left until our 3X-match offer expires, don’t let this opportunity to support Democrats nationwide go to waste. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Let’s keep our momentum strong! body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/davidkimforca/aapi-house-party?e=fee98d637f)
---
| | [ ](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=c69afd961e&e=fee98d637f)

---
| Dear Friend:
**🎉**** AAPI HOUSE PARTY****🎉** **I am so excited to announce that Mia Livas Porter, Moms Demand Gun Sense activist and former candidate for Assembly District 52 will be hosting a AAPI house party this weekend featuring myself and two other inspiring, progressive and clean-money candidates Ysabel Jurado for LA City Council District 14 and John Yi for Assembly District 54!** I am honored to stand alongside two other amazing candidates who are challenging establishment status quo politicians, with the goal of putting political power back into the hands of the people.

**“They’re all running progressive, clean-money, grassroots campaigns and have truly inspired me with their personal stories, their grit, their authentic integrity, and their vision for a better LA and California.”**
-Mia Livas Porter for Assembly District 52

We invite you to come meet with us, share your hopes and concerns, and discuss the issues in our community that matter to you most! We need YOUR support to help us cross the finish line!

**[RSVP at Mialivasporter@gmail.com for address!](mailto:mialivasporter@gmail.com)**
---
|
---
|
**💲****DONATE****💲**
Donating to clean-money campaigns like ours is crucial in bridging the financial gap that often exists between grassroots campaigns and those funded by corporate PACs. **Each dollar contributed plays a pivotal role in supporting our efforts to effectively reach voters.** **[CLICK HERE](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=b59eb0e6ee&e=fee98d637f)** to contribute today! These expenses include the costs associated with running online advertisements, maintaining an active social media presence, organizing community events, and printing campaign materials – **each mailer costs $35,000 to send out! **By donating, people like you directly support the democratic process by enabling grassroots campaigns like ours to connect with voters in our community in a meaningful way.

**We still need 555 more people to donate $34 to meet our goal!**
**[By becoming a monthly donor of $34, we can beat the corporate greed that has taken over the voices in DC and replace it with people-powered politics. Can we count on your support?](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=df8593633d&e=fee98d637f)**

It’s time for us!

I’m trying to send a very strong message to Democrats. I’ll need your help to make sure they get it. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=a02d243cea274cc69e75b064aadb1106&_t=74v9QIFFHRsfHApp2L-Zn8MyUBcoT3cTvcy_w4e7i5wsoP3372lKiMqkCNgsn_0S8t_oesYV-azK0FiwrLuLqWEtIxEcmK2QWklfKV_2Kk0%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=a02d243cea274cc69e75b064aadb1106&_t=74v9QIFFHRsfHApp2L-Zn8MyUBcoT3cTvcy_w4e7i5wsoP3372lKiMqkCNgsn_0S8t_oesYV-azK0FiwrLuLqWEtIxEcmK2QWklfKV_2Kk0%3D)
[ ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a02d243cea274cc69e75b064aadb1106&_e=PNKhy_1n_mlbEMDnveYtMNra859x4bk52nTArYc4ImWpg-uZ6hzaDPeGisnPrcUXw1ZscjT3cEQ5zGktfnal4MRd-Zc3XdiqiJXqSr0_N7GZt04RgfSk6XLX-xs6CynwbxW6io_uwDHfLMjFFQ3PrR_HEzrE46GaviPzTmxA6HPNXDCyY1udkUxz8jK0e75ws-dWkxfl9S6-V0wmkMKCs3tqiRtoduTZz5MZl-D26W-XIcjQcXmYZB2wVKwdQUyjbsGLBaiJ5I8cHCXcwNX22qUwNsQMDtPTuWLjgNLDofsAz-Ul_R39IcbGtxW8fMc7FCd59i53jChgx_W26clmUngkzoRoLPCNbcUTx74jadehWRfxaoR_Mb39HxZDNylvD_AaU71qRnafz5_RjiSlsw%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

It probably comes as no surprise to you that the last ten days have been a blur. Everything transpired so quickly that my own family wasn’t even able to make it to Washington, D.C. to watch me be sworn in as the 56th Speaker of the House.

My team and I – which has grown exponentially in the last week – really have been burning the midnight oil, working around the clock to ensure the people’s House remains OPEN FOR BUSINESS.

In the past week,

1. I’ve sifted through hundreds of resumes.
2. Met with the leaders from the Pentagon, the Senate, and the executive branch.
3. Sat for interviews with Sean Hannity and Larry Kudlow, among others.
4. Met with the campaign staff at the National Republican Congressional Committee to set finance goals for the upcoming year.

I’ve got to be honest with you – with so many competing priorities, [**it’s critical to have the _best_ team by my side.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a02d243cea274cc69e75b064aadb1106&_e=PNKhy_1n_mlbEMDnveYtMNra859x4bk52nTArYc4ImWpg-uZ6hzaDPeGisnPrcUXw1ZscjT3cEQ5zGktfnal4MRd-Zc3XdiqiJXqSr0_N7GZt04RgfSk6XLX-xs6CynwbxW6io_uwDHfLMjFFQ3PrR_HEzrE46GaviPzTmxA6HPNXDCyY1udkUxz8jK0e75ws-dWkxfl9S6-V0wmkMKCs3tqiRtoduTZz5MZl-D26W-XIcjQcXmYZB2wVKwdQUyjnLhLs0d4iuxBoHIastGSBXQXKw8GHLoyeW21Wcbu8V7oV8w46V_QjIltBaDHSzbIKxqTmOeshIcikeKsx5MUaykav8RqM7WVoEtib8Q9saQCF5PstCklaZP_qKt_aAtDHLg7_aKw70BgeFaOzWuYVQ%3D%3D) I’m working to continue filling positions as fast as possible while fulfilling my duties outside of the Capitol.

You see, aside from my official duties as speaker, [**one of my new responsibilities is to be the chief fundraiser for the Republican Party.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a02d243cea274cc69e75b064aadb1106&_e=PNKhy_1n_mlbEMDnveYtMNra859x4bk52nTArYc4ImWpg-uZ6hzaDPeGisnPrcUXw1ZscjT3cEQ5zGktfnal4MRd-Zc3XdiqiJXqSr0_N7GZt04RgfSk6XLX-xs6CynwbxW6io_uwDHfLMjFFQ3PrR_HEzrE46GaviPzTmxA6HPNXDCyY1udkUxz8jK0e75ws-dWkxfl9S6-V0wmkMKCs3tqiRtoduTZz5MZl-D26W-XIcjQcXmYZB2wVKwdQUyjuicMQOKd-__M9G91kB-PfUY-aVqHm04oK5PrONwwVBalABZ-Hr2B_KCuj00LuTttsxwh8EXg92hTOPslYCon_dnSfK4rLeWVy2EqZTQm_85cR6nn-oIc4m7EjHm2slmSxwqAuJOl6dbwpa21568FgQ%3D%3D) That means using this platform to raise money every single day of the year, so we have the necessary funds to defend our five-seat majority in next year’s election.

[**My staff have told me that we’re just short of having raised $1 million online since I was elected speaker last week. In fact, we have just another $134,000 to raise to hit that mark – and we need to do it before Saturday at 11:59 p.m.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a02d243cea274cc69e75b064aadb1106&_e=PNKhy_1n_mlbEMDnveYtMNra859x4bk52nTArYc4ImWpg-uZ6hzaDPeGisnPrcUXw1ZscjT3cEQ5zGktfnal4MRd-Zc3XdiqiJXqSr0_N7GZt04RgfSk6XLX-xs6CynwbxW6io_uwDHfLMjFFQ3PrR_HEzrE46GaviPzTmxA6HPNXDCyY1udkUxz8jK0e75ws-dWkxfl9S6-V0wmkMKCs3tqiRtoduTZz5MZl-D26W-XIcjQcXmYZB2wVKwdQUyj4HzwLuuO9gw0In6NkvURny5rwNYz-HCCQJuP95H4TXDFWzK6lQF3nVbSQV2jXCX6EOrPT_h5EbYaaG4ZL0mjEK5tZJEk4pD0pAl-mX-TO-yY5pXfFC2s5WAe4VRlk48J2qAQx-0_hjMdCTx96EVOVw%3D%3D)

[** CHIP IN $12 **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a02d243cea274cc69e75b064aadb1106&_e=PNKhy_1n_mlbEMDnveYtMNra859x4bk52nTArYc4ImWpg-uZ6hzaDPeGisnPrcUXw1ZscjT3cEQ5zGktfnal4MRd-Zc3XdiqiJXqSr0_N7GZt04RgfSk6XLX-xs6CynwbxW6io_uwDHfLMjFFQ3PrR_HEzrE46GaviPzTmxA6HPNXDCyY1udkUxz8jK0e75ws-dWkxfl9S6-V0wmkMKCs3tqiRtoduTZz5MZl-D26W-XIcjQcXmYZB2wVKwdQUyjw8aUp8TqpgZ-gpruN3jXzTI6uPRc0gG5RMg-Gjv8l8b0WAHIzp6IOwLX0IBIf7RIIAaZEJsFZ0jrUrbxDfDtZ5sW1-wdfhDOy7aGxqXS1RYniPg_gLVCTzrRRLEMSwjHOQRi8Qp47FMujmfZYkWn6w%3D%3D) [** CHIP IN $25 **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a02d243cea274cc69e75b064aadb1106&_e=PNKhy_1n_mlbEMDnveYtMNra859x4bk52nTArYc4ImWpg-uZ6hzaDPeGisnPrcUXw1ZscjT3cEQ5zGktfnal4MRd-Zc3XdiqiJXqSr0_N7GZt04RgfSk6XLX-xs6CynwbxW6io_uwDHfLMjFFQ3PrR_HEzrE46GaviPzTmxA6HPNXDCyY1udkUxz8jK0e75ws-dWkxfl9S6-V0wmkMKCs3tqiRtoduTZz5MZl-D26W-XIcjQcXmYZB2wVKwdQUyjwMkLDa8Pm5uJswqLI1rTfyMh1jQTJopFNXL8ryiixJX0aSl1zWv-kmTCL8p1El2Vm9CfYssFPyi6ElJLMAE-VWzejcL_Ec7GMnQArW00DIiAxn8fx0X1ZYVXXWOOL4BgjK30N5ZITmCD92F7ZnEaiQ%3D%3D) [** CHIP IN $50 **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a02d243cea274cc69e75b064aadb1106&_e=PNKhy_1n_mlbEMDnveYtMNra859x4bk52nTArYc4ImWpg-uZ6hzaDPeGisnPrcUXw1ZscjT3cEQ5zGktfnal4MRd-Zc3XdiqiJXqSr0_N7GZt04RgfSk6XLX-xs6CynwbxW6io_uwDHfLMjFFQ3PrR_HEzrE46GaviPzTmxA6HPNXDCyY1udkUxz8jK0e75ws-dWkxfl9S6-V0wmkMKCs3tqiRtoduTZz5MZl-D26W-XIcjQcXmYZB2wVKwdQUyjwqWwnjxrqspdolm2_m4c7Uj_foCc8HnkH-JNOpC5tLAPkuXWviQm_Y07z363_rzID4WjQ73EOJU6BRXermI2gzIopbc-yLRsaCUWy19P5NOqZKdbSdAn0BPXHfyVaoZzceUD-g7iWmJ7wkEsWmYlsA%3D%3D)
[**Our ability to raise money from grassroots conservatives like you will send a signal to Democrats that we are ready to help reelect a Republican majority in next year’s midterms.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a02d243cea274cc69e75b064aadb1106&_e=PNKhy_1n_mlbEMDnveYtMNra859x4bk52nTArYc4ImWpg-uZ6hzaDPeGisnPrcUXw1ZscjT3cEQ5zGktfnal4MRd-Zc3XdiqiJXqSr0_N7GZt04RgfSk6XLX-xs6CynwbxW6io_uwDHfLMjFFQ3PrR_HEzrE46GaviPzTmxA6HPNXDCyY1udkUxz8jK0e75ws-dWkxfl9S6-V0wmkMKCs3tqiRtoduTZz5MZl-D26W-XIcjQcXmYZB2wVKwdQUyjm473KkzVcX_lWFvfemiKJ-Nelbl4fePWFkgw2PFk0Caxioxx42Mn5BW5MYpyT5xbqKTJ66hR4NstnJ9paLOpUgEvbOKWE0X7Ah7m7nWV02uOIJqSCdCgc6EuqVCyoGowpPyPVl1c-c94hJDtUii6wg%3D%3D)

If we come up short, all bets are off.

I have to get back to interviewing candidates to join my team, but I'll be checking in with my staff frequently over the next few days to see what progress we’ve made toward hitting this critical campaign goal.

Let’s get this done.

For America,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

---
| |
Friend,

As the D.C. Democrats debate whether they are afraid of offending those attacking Israel, the terrorist group Hezbollah is amping up their threats to attack U.S. troops.

**The Hezbollah leader said America must “pay the price.”**

As a former counter-terrorism expert with the FBI, I don’t take any of these threats lightly. But what we don’t need is one party placating terrorist supporters and fueling these types of threats.

_**That’s why my election to Congress is important.**_ We need to be resolved and clear in our voice against these terrorists, as well as our domestic policies, like border security, which will help keep us safe at home.

Join me today with a [$5 contribution](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=2fce3936cf&e=1722d05e10) to my Congressional Campaign, and stand with me for a clear voice for our country against these terrorists.
---
| [$5 FRIDAY](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=9825f0ba35&e=1722d05e10 "$5 FRIDAY")
---
| Thank you in advance.

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| **Michael Maher**
Businessman | Veteran | Republican for Congress
---
|
---
| _**Background** : Michael Maher is a former FBI Special Agent and US Navy Veteran who was raised in the Central Valley. Michael and his wife, Ann, are raising their young family in Fresno County, and he owns and operates an aviation business. Michael was the 2022 nominee for California's 21st Congressional District._

subject: Keep men OUT of our daughters’ locker rooms!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, Today, I’m calling on the NCAA to PROTECT female athletes from biological men in their locker rooms.

When the NCAA President testified before the Senate Judiciary Committee, no matter how hard I pressed him, he REFUSED to state the organization’s policy on the forced inclusion of biological men in women’s locker rooms.

**Enough is enough.**

The Left wants to erase our daughters and REPLACE them with biological men, but I’m not about to let them do it.

As a father, my #1 priority is keeping my daughter safe, and unlike the NCAA, I’m not afraid to offend anyone to do it.

I want to show our country that we stand behind our REAL female athletes, and I need your help.

**[Will you sign my petition today to keep biological men OUT of women’s sports?](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d89e3e721053493bace03375259fede7&_e=VOzbzCrgqo3Xi-2LhlMvPnBzYaeCF7zlz7Vrh6nBhhHRoHRK1zwmwTIgulxyWD-kJwYs5pnW72abRCxU16I6cRUCs1gShYDPtNxe1GU5BA_9SpTgm6kfm7sXhAqTBihPUOVpRFFVvjdS_wElyRiTU6SSMsudtwYXtJZu6O3nERE2SnALqmO4MyYpiT8PSbhn-i5wWgQF-3XFIPaSuzRpbgP3LJllWTXzmSKZc29135g5EiodZbaFrGPswEFawl6YbAMWt2oVu1eDN_8J5mN9k0HdfaFGw4Mpp6LgOcyMqLo3SLHD6GXR6kTj6wIkwt8LyaNiOglbEpmOXlUHuiRz0WosxPsCBPGfNR9lXcSto4S0xl7PVnsz7Zz6OrTAsrod)**

Josh Hawley

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: URGENT: House votes 213-203 to eviscerate environmental protections
body:
Time sensitive

Peter - our Membership Drive deadline is a few days away, and we're reaching out because we haven't heard from you yet (renew your membership here and your contribution will be tripled https://links.messages.lcv. ).

The truth is your membership matters, and it's particularly critical right now.

Here's the situation: Earlier this month, Senator Joe Manchin backed away from a climate deal after months of negotiations, choosing to side with Big Oil and Republicans. It leaves the deal one vote short -- stalling any real action in Congress for now.

In response, we're redoubling our efforts on pushing the White House to act decisively on climate. The Biden administration has massive amounts of power to curb climate pollution - but that will only happen if the environmental movement makes it happen.

Right now, we're facing a critical test: the Biden administration is weighing a plan to block all new oil and gas drilling leases on public waters.

This could be huge -- and a decision is coming. Right now, we're organizing volunteers from all over the country to flood the administration with letters, pressuring Biden to hold to his promises.

Peter -- it's your membership support that makes victory possible here. But we have to do more. A group of donors has put together a fund to triple match every contribution before Sunday's membership deadline:

Can we count on your support? Claim your membership now - it only takes $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.

The ban on new oil and gas leases is the first of many huge environmental decisions, Peter. And right now, we're pushing for serious action on so many fronts -- including:
Setting tight standards for power plants and other major emitters of climate pollution
Placing strict limits on air pollution to safeguard all communities Expediting requirements of 100% tailpipe pollution-free new cars by 2035 and trucks by 2040
Protecting communities from hazardous and super-polluting methane Conserving 30% of our public lands and waters by 2030 Declaring a climate emergency - and so much more. The best way you can help win each and every one of these fights right now is to claim your LCV membership - all it takes is a gift of $5 or more. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/_

Thank you, thank you, thank you, Peter. This is such a critical moment for the environment, and we're so fortunate to have you on the team.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10181790&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg2MDA3NTAzMgS2&spReportId=MTg2MDA3NTAzMgS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10181790&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg2MDA3NTAzMgS2&spReportId=MTg2MDA3NTAzMgS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/k_ https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10181790&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg2MDA3NTAzMgS2&spReportId=MTg2MDA3NTAzMgS2

Some of these races will make or break the future of abortion access for millions of Americans. That’s why it’s so important that we come together as a collection of fifty states and stand up for abortion rights in the ones where MAGA Republicans are working overtime to restrict reproductive freedoms for the women who live there. Fighting for the America I love | Peter,

This survey isn't your standard issue survey or just another form to fill out. Instead, it’s an opportunity for you to voice your concerns about one of the most serious responsibilities of our government.

This is about our national security and your responses will help Senate Republicans guide policy into action. clean_body: Fighting for the America I love | Peter, This survey isn't your standard issue survey or just another form to fill out. Instead, it’s an opportunity for you to voice your concerns about one of the most serious responsibilities of our government. This is about our national security and your responses will help Senate Republicans guide policy into action. 1\. In your view, is America safer today than it was 4 years ago? 2\. Do you think our open borders are a threat to national security? 3\. Do you believe that Mexican drug cartels should be declared a terrorist organization? Alongside President Trump, I helped craft U.S. foreign policy based on our nation’s founding ideals that put America First. America became a force for good in the Middle East with progress for real peace cemented in the Abraham Accords. America is an indispensable nation that should stand for ideals of freedom and strength. We cannot let the Left abandon our national security. America is worth fighting for. Fellow Conservative,

As much as I don’t like writing this note, I hate failing even more. And that’s what happened in October. When my team and I pulled the numbers this morning, we weren’t surprised we didn’t reach our overall October goal but were still deeply disappointed.

I get it, there are a lot of folks asking you to give money right now. But there are only a handful of campaigns that truly need the help - **mine is one of them.**

_**Jon Tester and his Democrat allies have already raised more than $15 million and already spent more than $1 million dragging me through the mud.**_

clean_body: We fell short of our October fundraising goal. I’m asking for you to make an emergency contribution now. | | Fellow Conservative, As much as I don’t like writing this note, I hate failing even more. And that’s what happened in October. When my team and I pulled the numbers this morning, we weren’t surprised we didn’t reach our overall October goal but were still deeply disappointed. I get it, there are a lot of folks asking you to give money right now. But there are only a handful of campaigns that truly need the help - mine is one of them. Jon Tester and his Democrat allies have already raised more than $15 million and already spent more than $1 million dragging me through the mud. I only have one year to get my operation fully funded–practically no time at all. Jon Tester has a 17-year head start on me, plenty of wealthy Democrats on the liberal coasts to pump millions into his campaign, and a huge lead on the small-dollar front, too. name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Baugh?=
subject: Housing Payment Alert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=0d8acbed97&e=8a657725d1)
---
| Peter, Next to rising crime, rampant homelessness, sky-high gas prices, and many of the other reasons folks give for fleeing California in record numbers...

**You’ll find THIS one near the top of the list:** inability to keep up with housing costs that are, for lack of a better term, _going through the roof._

For example, Peter, just take a look at the headline below: **Since the pandemic, a typical homebuyer in California has seen their mortgage payments go up by a whopping _127 percent._ You read that right... in just a few years, they’ve more than DOUBLED!**
---
| [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=b9026f6219&e=8a657725d1)
---
| [FIGHT FOR AN AFFORDABLE CALIFORNIA!](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=69d57fe51d&e=8a657725d1 "FIGHT FOR AN AFFORDABLE CALIFORNIA!")
---
| It’s no wonder why so many families feel they’re unable to even afford a home in the Golden State...

And get this – because payments are so high right now, we haven’t seen home sale activity this low __since the Great Recession.__

**This is a recipe for DISASTER, Peter.**

But Democrat politicians in Washington and Sacramento are so out-of-touch, they seriously expect us to believe the economy is somehow strong right now!

_**It’s insulting.**_ We need conservative leaders who will grow our economy, tackle rising prices, and make life more affordable for Californians and Americans.

**We do NOT need more liberal politicians who raise our taxes, contribute to inflation, and try to sweet talk us into denying reality.**

If you’re with me on this, Peter...

[Help me turn my blue California district RED in November 2024. >>](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=2665893f08&e=8a657725d1)

It’s time for leaders who will take action to make our state more affordable – not just give us empty words.
---
| [FIGHT FOR AN AFFORDABLE CALIFORNIA!](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=9bbacb4085&e=8a657725d1 "FIGHT FOR AN AFFORDABLE CALIFORNIA!")
---
| Thank you,
_Scott Baugh_

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1orolvoqhp6dltokb30m8ctt5lifpnul7shb8n0_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ge2o74clh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmmdfu276cntupa0hrtfrh3ffhtvl27fpggpq0c8_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ge2o74clh2bs).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state—that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6793ki0966db9sv8f7nih6aavkc38994vd1m9b8_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ge2o74clh2bs) [NO](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpp1074hptg311q1dhdpideepm5udgffbskj7vro_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ge2o74clh2bs) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjnbg7a55rnkv494h8b4vk01v71c0vbvie660rbg_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ge2o74clh2bs)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state—that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrejbn4gjfvaqgd8spip03lemujhpih4ta67ub20_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o31c9h2bs) [NO](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7hj61pahd4q8siegr2641km4d8udgvud5524li0_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o31c9h2bs) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0182vgr0qib10lh5sedl0i010794rb13c26s0hg_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o31c9h2bs)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672162%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j2o2220G%2b1xFM9UH0RihQQ&sysid=1). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672163%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RKzUke9UY4EYcJ0bTFhycg&sysid=1) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672164%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kJyYUQPKPWxxvxGi1Tc0DA&sysid=1) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Praying for our country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

|
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmvc8rig73dq28a5fmc5oq1ntrr1deipsm8n1rjg_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o35c3h2bs)
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhrvsbvjqbpgnggjrd30m89essc2r7dj7jcunr80_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o35c3h2bs)

Fellow American - I know God is not done with America yet.

It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government.

The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic.

Like so many American households through the generations, in our house, we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

I know our country is in desperate need of prayer.

[**Today I am asking if you share my faith in God and for the future of our nations, you'll join us.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z90h4rkcalgnu8r5r2haalqq6pekp1i9j06do870_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o35c3h2bs)

[**We cannot allow the radical Left to destroy the ideals our country was founded on. Please join me if you agree that we need to stand up for our Republic.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdl5ujk9fmqm2s9kb06kmqt83atn2knebcl2koj8_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o35c3h2bs)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoma16fahtvpqq52r2f2gv5jvu36us01hl930938_)

God bless,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zioqimvj40dmd2hd8o0j0eb868vajr6qloklkf20_)

---

| PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Moment to talk?
body:
I’m hoping you’ll consider pitching in a generous gift today!

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdmkb1qnv4649sp9bnoa9r5lb3opdqpuevdr4u7o_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o31c9h2bs)
---

Hi Friend,

Whether you've been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you.

Now, I think it's important to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm6u7cpkkfulelu9alvi7bgdkqk6oo0dmvg0asc0_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o31c9h2bs "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zju9ts2lh9v47julq52mfiag26qi95885k12ejt0_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o31c9h2bs)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**
---
| | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze3d3om7hkh49erps6ifkgotnblla0ngb5njlipo_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o31c9h2bs)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znhacqll27dsiffksr8p3uemssel2qmt4rsdjl40_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o31c9h2bs)
---

I launched my campaign for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

Now, I just completed my **SECOND** debate, and I need a **SURGE** of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! **[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8ouok99lvla1oc3l57pn8j3ktdb7kjp6plfji7o_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o31c9h2bs "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will showcase the tremendous momentum we have gained since last quarter!

**I 'm hoping you'll consider pitching in a generous gift today!**

**[Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the power of OUR movement?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr4vhlko856h3r5f2tb1gkjku08etr93hv3vlbdg_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o31c9h2bs "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate. ")**

****
---
| | [CHIP IN $5](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvn8j2q4icuf5egph634vivvtc11aem4eh8iqtig_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o31c9h2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN $25](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo3pl9n10vr3u2ivqqoiafu1ojlh5mr7bm1h3ip8_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o31c9h2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN $50](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq18nrdjh6enqn9shejv49s18cbeg7elmhnq1u7o_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o31c9h2bs)
---

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfdq4lb5ltjpgqeekip4dfcrs4vg410buosnj5pg_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o31c9h2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! # **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrcfn7tj11qt9c4jkoq8a577t2hqt3vh0tv564t0_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o35c3h2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0ipbphnut3chkas4q7uqggdtkljhocbht4n1h58_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o35c3h2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn25qiubon9ebckcctlch1i3he9gsfn7rb0mamh8_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o35c3h2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zapbakce0jfg8g0ng1a9bmpkagj8h7ega26gnv58_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o35c3h2bs)

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zocpeqo7qahfj59dbhb7ahdn9v9v1oaiptc0g8lg_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o35c3h2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zscdrbmjdlokl8q4e2id3u6fba3b88bomllff5b8_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o35c3h2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z41653bt7gvmga15nduljlj4kjb64pateuedlgu0_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie4o35c3h2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

American Action News

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: can you say whether or not you support this?
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

In four days, polls will close and votes will be tallied in the critical 2023 elections.

Planned Parenthood and their pals in the media have been claiming for months now that the outcome in Virginia and Ohio will prove once and for all that the Abortion Lobby has the momentum heading into 2024.

But Pro-Life Friend, we are fighting back.

Thanks to your support, we have deployed our dedicated student activists across the country to knock on doors and make phone calls in key battleground states in the lead up to Election Day.

And these student activists understand this is the most important weekend of this entire 2023 election year.

That’s why I’m coming to you today.

**[Pro-Life Friend, will you please click here to leave a note of encouragement for our student activists to let them know you support them and the tireless work they’re doing to save lives](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjjttud-duchtdja-y/)?**

**[And after you leave a note of encouragement, would you consider making a generous contribution of $200, $100, $50, or $25 to help me buy these brave students a few pizzas](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjjttud-duchtdja-j/)?**

Your support not only helps fuel our student activists during long days on their feet, but it also lets them know that there are good people out there that care.

Our students know they’re going to be heading into a lion’s den as they go door to door this next week.

They know they’re going to be targeted.

**Yet, they persevere.**

Thanks to your help, the _Students for Life Action_ team has:

**>>>** Visited 13+ on the “Abortion Ballot” tour in Ohio;
**>>>** Planned 20 call nights with 70 volunteers mobilized to make the calls. _Students for Life Action_ has already made more calls in opposition to Ohio’s _Issue 1_ than anyone else;
**>>>** Trained nearly 300 pro-life activists, who have distributed tens of thousands of voter registration and absentee ballot request forms to pro-life voters on college campuses and trained dozens more pro-life activists using the tools they were taught by _Students for Life Action_ staff; and
**>>>** Activated our 25 Social Media Captains who have in turn reached over 50,000 people with the TRUTH about _Issue 1_.
**But for everything we’ve already done, the work over the next few days could be even more important.**

That’s why I’m counting on your support.

**[So, please click here to leave a note of encouragement for our student activists letting them know you support them and the important work they’re doing](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjjttud-duchtdja-i/).**

**[After you leave a note, please consider making a generous contribution of $200, $100, $50, or $25 to help me buy these brave students a few pizzas](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjjttud-duchtdja-d/).**

Pro-Life Friend, your words will be an incredible boost to our student activists and the encouragement they need to continue to persevere.

So, please take a moment to send them a **[note of encouragement](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjjttud-duchtdja-h/)** and, if possible, make a generous contribution that will help to buy them a few pizzas during what are sure to be some very long and tiring days.

Thank you for all you do for life.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life Action

**[>>> Send our Student Activists a note letting them know you support them and the important work they’re doing this weekend](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjjttud-duchtdja-k/).**

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

name: GOP Presidential
subject: The Future of Hearing Aids
body:
This powerful secret weapon against hearing loss is crushing the market

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgq8mnmbkjknks3c06dmnrj8uhhf8ha29obppctg_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ieaor4clh2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zah6g37fvt388fbvpifg4r7f7tdb47n2pdi049d8_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ieaor4clh2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they think they are still big and ugly. However, Marco and Paul wanted to change this perception with a **revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers formerly from Siemens.**

But now, a **game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry** , and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's called **Horizon by hear.com.**

And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It's no wonder **Horizon has taken the U.S. by storm since its release in early 2023** , offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zktu92a1mm6hio7r17mi2cp6m00b8s1hisdd8qvg_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ieaor4clh2bs)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsojvksuf5vm0ib4bf11d4vvvf1ebld3prmt424o_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ieaor4clh2bs)
What makes Horizon so special?

It's one of **the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing.**

With Horizon, they can. **Imagine effortless hearing in every situation** --restaurants, weddings, block parties, and beyond. Imagine being able to **understand every word clearly** with a device so small and comfortable, you'll completely forget you're wearing it.

This means that Horizon offers all of the usual benefits of a modern hearing aid--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: it can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

"It's not just about volume," explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what Horizon is designed to optimize."

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don't wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztv4pl1pbf009hpe4mj73q5hqsd0re827vvlffhg_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ieaor4clh2bs)

GOP Presidential

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35059%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=53xREXsqK0Tldcv6QavoZg&sysid=1). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35050%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yc31Qj9nbvo6eHm7mS5ehw&sysid=1) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35051%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wonml1tdzH0UZVPyfqHg5w&sysid=1) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: In desperate need of prayer
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

|
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq2vq2lhv93od25dgm5lksticfhh3h2t2k9s5098_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ieaor4c5h2bs)
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zji4vugjt3q2li6aagli0ovq8e4os15v1ufm0mko_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ieaor4c5h2bs)

Fellow American - I know God is not done with America yet.

It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government.

The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic.

Like so many American households through the generations, in our house, we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

I know our country is in desperate need of prayer.

[**Today I am asking if you share my faith in God and for the future of our nations, you'll join us.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr2h234f21cupuhcbi5k560h5qdq6jp3rjm252r8_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ieaor4c5h2bs)

[**We cannot allow the radical Left to destroy the ideals our country was founded on. Please join me if you agree that we need to stand up for our Republic.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgmavh2l0n8g2k26ij26s28t8d5mbdpoiklm40m0_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ieaor4c5h2bs)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze4gd41g5doqdbhk9f83136nlvhc2ds6aq4k3gb0_)

God bless,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z54a16rv0pmvnuukqdehj6d7pfgea8gab59ej940_)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
Your leadership and knowledge are needed today...

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z35dq35tfnbkogm7qqrb3lffphm3hq8bm10v6cso_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ieaor4clh2bs)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. You are an informed citizen—I believe that wholeheartedly. You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren’t afraid to stand up for America’s founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. _**[Your leadership and knowledge are needed today...](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjbvskc3pqv95o1nupb74e0mr6j7q3485fes21s0_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ieaor4clh2bs)_**

## Do you believe it is important for Americans to have basic knowledge of American history and civics, including knowledge about the Constitution?
[Yes](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z70d961k8mf2e0ffrk53fka44cj0fri9msoo8lv8_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ieaor4clh2bs) [No](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg1sahcac9p9aivk42iq8lo73c3ec2t8letsnbgg_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ieaor4clh2bs) [Not Sure / Don't Know](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7go52sc9fqn695273cq0sdp5i1sbh62mqlio1ho_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ieaor4clh2bs)
We need more citizens like you— _informed citizens_ —because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism. The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can’t let that happen! That’s why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our nationwide initiative—the **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS**. We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand
* WHAT the Constitution says;
* HOW it relates to current issues and events; and
* WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty.

If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed. These are young people that “educators” deliberately deceived or who just haven’t learned about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable.** That’s because we’re seeking _1,000 people_ in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to _10,000,000 Americans_ , and this initiative starts with you—YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what’s best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education** today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email! [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zucarib1b4im97egl89ig3l9mgvl2natn2665af0_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ieaor4clh2bs) For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4lben32u7t78mcg1id2hpkpo858sd8a9d975n0o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p30sjge4or246h22sh2s8i66p74s1ieaor4clh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu1cv9q5ijjqen3qmhpskolgs7hjdu8nuhg1jl7o_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ieaor4clh2bs)_

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Preserve America’s unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms
body:
Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8aq9g2gtadki46qrf7vv095d4j2vgcqt53b71oo_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ieaor4c5h2bs)
---
Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

I’ve written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: _America Is a Christian Nation_. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves. The book is a short read, accompanied by beautiful patriotic photos that I think you’ll appreciate.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvanktibo57dhk3lhtg6mp12akqkmb2obe5pd6f0_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ieaor4c5h2bs)
---
| | I would love for you to read this book and discover the truth about our nation’s Christian heritage. And as a token of our appreciation for a gift to Pathway to Victory, we’ll not only send you this book, but also a brand new CD featuring some of our nation’s most patriotic songs from First Baptist Dallas’ renowned choir and orchestra. [https://secure.ptv.org/america-is-a-christian-nation-generous-kit-2](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziagfbhodjqqgvlbivee5597d4qioic17k2je23g_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ieaor4c5h2bs)

As believers, we must preserve America's unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms. By understanding our nation's Christian roots, we can work to bring our country back to its founding principles. At the end of my book, I provide suggestions for how to do just that.

I hope you'll consider donating to _Pathway to Victory_ and receiving your copy of _America Is a Christian Nation_ so you can know without a doubt that the foundation of our country was solidly established in the principles of the Bible.

Gratefully,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

American Action News

subject: We want your input, friend.

body:

Friend,

When Ron DeSantis goes up on stage again to debate the top issues this country is facing, he wants to fight for what matters most to you. So we're reaching out!

Access the survey here:
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4405784ba271eab5ac7e67b5d9f8d8a64f43c4b13537ba2de065e7cee11074ca1c1dfc60cb7bb23dc8acb498f285cc300b5a1b2d5580afc46a07ed21c03cabb5
