If you're concerned about...

- The Israel <> Hamas war
- Our wide-open southern border
- The radical ideology brainwashing our nation
- Government mandates slipping out of control
... then Ron DeSantis wants to know.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4405784ba271eab5ac7e67b5d9f8d8a64f43c4b13537ba2de065e7cee11074ca1c1dfc60cb7bb23dc8acb498f285cc300b5a1b2d5580afc46a07ed21c03cabb5

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4405784ba271eab5ac7e67b5d9f8d8a64f43c4b13537ba2de065e7cee11074ca1c1dfc60cb7bb23dc8acb498f285cc300b5a1b2d5580afc46a07ed21c03cabb5
Share your opinion!

Before launching this campaign, Governor Ron DeSantis knew that the first step in making real change was listening. Time after time, as a veteran, Congressman, and Governor, he has put the needs of the people he serves above his own. As President, this will never change, but he needs to hear from you.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4405784ba271eab5ac7e67b5d9f8d8a64f43c4b13537ba2de065e7cee11074ca1c1dfc60cb7bb23dc8acb498f285cc300b5a1b2d5580afc46a07ed21c03cabb5
Will you take a second to leave your opinion in our pre-debate listening survey? Your voice matters.

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4405784ba271eab55c8fb92378ea10cee2fc99661de344aa47eaf2d82f24c50a8f5058e3a384285434cc2155dccc34921ccbdc7dccb68120d1ea506e7b38035a

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4405784ba271eab510c5927906016e30586d49f11198fac043df6cb4ca43978e61d64975cd2b69ae714ee288abf15c974c848857f186a4113d6031cdd7cd7959
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4405784ba271eab5a02b705dabb9967e6fffe7157b991de1190f5084108b917259fa7832106c43335703a5e149384805af8b00b8fb457916af511789acd9535e
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4405784ba271eab5ac7e67b5d9f8d8a64f43c4b13537ba2de065e7cee11074ca1c1dfc60cb7bb23dc8acb498f285cc300b5a1b2d5580afc46a07ed21c03cabb5

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4405784ba271eab5ac7e67b5d9f8d8a64f43c4b13537ba2de065e7cee11074ca1c1dfc60cb7bb23dc8acb498f285cc300b5a1b2d5580afc46a07ed21c03cabb5

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

name: ICYMI News
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
Your leadership and knowledge are needed today...

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgvo4k47m72ght3015uc7akaoa0ru5j3dpovvjh8_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie9oj2cdh2bs)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. You are an informed citizen—I believe that wholeheartedly. You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren’t afraid to stand up for America’s founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. _**[Your leadership and knowledge are needed today...](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb94jq1vu7akp8e258dd25d4n2e8lcvjh0f6ft90_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie9oj2cdh2bs)_**

## Do you believe it is important for Americans to have basic knowledge of American history and civics, including knowledge about the Constitution?
[Yes](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn1lnju4pidltn649lsod9ot8jmv9eh6nje9s9d0_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie9oj2cdh2bs) [No](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcbt3kn0mubc639j33qh0950n0ufdb18uvdpne9o_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie9oj2cdh2bs) [Not Sure / Don't Know](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo59a93o2m1tfmujo2ooqmcjah96g3eg8d7uaqi8_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie9oj2cdh2bs)
We need more citizens like you— _informed citizens_ —because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism. The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can’t let that happen! That’s why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our nationwide initiative—the **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS**. We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand
* WHAT the Constitution says;
* HOW it relates to current issues and events; and
* WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty.

If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed. These are young people that “educators” deliberately deceived or who just haven’t learned about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable.** That’s because we’re seeking _1,000 people_ in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to _10,000,000 Americans_ , and this initiative starts with you—YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what’s best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education** today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email! [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ziujtpmsibv2n5vt4h5ahbo6vpcqoevu5l7qm6og_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie9oj2cdh2bs) For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

ICYMI News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1f1fcgdop5r97itf1geeomv6n9nnh55h4334ms8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p30sjie9o7246h22sh2s8i66p74s1ie9oj2cdh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvnfojrfm9vojurpm9mm6fu98jb5tl0ju4d53hmo_rp22sh2s8i66p74s1ie9oj2cdh2bs)_

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmkpbf6i58irql4vpkf89dal7p47straqonk1dn8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or4sjg69p72c9hm49fg)

name: Phil Kerpen
subject: ACTION ALERT: House PASSES bill to BLOCK California's internal combustion vehicle ban
body:
[unsubscribe](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx0zzvWoyAcQPHVaMnhD8ijsJiZTPaBYsJLJEA0uvo5mf7rf8W9ZpRGCZD9MgJXCoAIhXs7wjxj9jAPPEjDYNYYc-Casgk4VzDr3o0EEwqAGQyME4UAiT-YCnEf4O_vG5GKdQzrdSlu1inrVtzWjHbxRPO29nG0reWO_urIvSP3VvQc0E_6a-j9844dvfGrghc1ND6tiZQkjZzIYE0-3FKov-b5CBsJLdgaS327Zb8-zTeb2sllofHFFebHi8SXt-cTdrBlCLtXJL9Fy-rMNaWwpvp5LEORg_B7R_jibEdv4Vplqs3zXFYvJnuJ6vc9nfUl6KSftl9HzgSGgUBfxm9RjK5y0TH8XLWL_8fb-EGVhg1jBFRldCybJhIdi5iyQTZlyXYkfT0leghmKAL_pv8CAAD___FniSI)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

Dear Patriot, Rep. John Joyce from Pennsylvania has introduced H.R. 1435, the Preserving Choice for Vehicle Purchases Act, which would block California's proposed ban on internal combustion vehicles. The bill passed the House last week. [Please click here now to demand the Senate to pass H.R. 1435, the Preserving Choice for Vehicle Purchases Act.](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00Du2nSAUANDRaMniAHKgsEjycufBzwt-kKs8f6PPSvr0u9q-V14jqDb0ILUGYKhpG3spwtANgjHXBYnCMuys4wG8tKC8oG3qGWUcgArohGSaAMFflCO-Ovj984spLRpBzRK25Ewupm5prd6k-SZuXdq5j7WWhv9o2Kthr7oZN5H_6b-Gv646N_wLBsxmXp4nsbJhfo63wcuquw4TD2GLwXpao073pvn3laPdI0CB4xPeUEUO53Qt4xG4zV0qdsjhgY9xwsoT43V0LlF08hNxxexWL4Zwzd24cspB6WjLPbmb7hyOhsmQYsO_pmdRea-jLNsyoo0P7uNx5Hv_ILfmHdullwIpdAzarfflTPOcdomNoO_FpPlfR-0vsvNppZQA14WcYTVMkTOgLZ7EXJQ4iBr3W5EBhecExm_-JwAA___IjY-9) The automobile market is national and the global climate change issue is literally global. California's authority derives from a waiver the Biden administration granted them to set their own vehicle standards – despite the obvious adverse effect on interstate commerce. H.R. 1435 amends federal law to prohibit the use of a Clean Air Act waiver to impose an internal combustion vehicle ban. This is critical for all Americans because the waiver allows California to set de facto standards for the whole country by forcing manufacturers to shift their production to electric vehicles. Congressman Joyce is right to say, "California regulators shouldn't have the power to determine what vehicles are sold to families in Pennsylvania." That goes for every other state too. [Please click here now to demand the Senate pass for H.R. 1435, the Preserving Choice for Vehicle Purchases Act.](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00DG2nCAUANDVaMkBHvqgsEjyM_tAQQFRGeQ7yupzkj79ra4ZpFHIZGsH1ivFGEdFWzfgTKdu5sxI6BUyM4uRWmSTmIUyyE3rB045MEYF60TPFWEEf1FAfHXs988vLpVoBNWbzX7Se9Il-6MY7eNDpmNr4-BKSQ38aPir4a-S9bSS_-m_Bl53iQ18sRl3HbdaPU8Z93otGu9RPmVewdrsli1oM76njwXXR3Hn-4lR9Yj5fU0czL3o0T5qLEUsIdM92HismEoX3LesdUusVkjYKXqgK7dcMI2YDw3rfdXl8Q8E-9j53fDeetfA11o3uZ8l9ClvAUdX8QzXtT_nG2HUi2u3oRdIWcdZmweTPj5Gf_bYCLps2sd_HWW4yQnrQSlhoBL52ENzST4Wx2SI25MUF5HhfCSZURggLHzDnwAAAP__1MuRcg) Thanks for all you do,
Phil Kerpen
President, American Commitment P.S. If you take action today, we'll also sign you up for a FREE subscription to the Committee to Unleash Prosperity's HOTLINE newsletter by famed economist Stephen Moore. Newt Gingrich calls it a "brilliantly done and always informative remarkable achievement."

[Privacy Policy](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00DsWnCAUANDVaMl5PP6FRZLJ7AMFBb8MMDrO6nOSPv2truu0M4rq1ndUGkMpKgNt6JQF20uNo5PovDOjk3TwYpBi6M0AQxs7BGSUAqeCSzSEEvULmFJPQX__fKA2vOFgN5_jYPdka45HdTauNxmOrV27UGtq2I8Gnw0-a7bDQv6n_xr2_NS1YQ_kOL16o3u-CKHcfCWNn7QWpxc7FFiE9qec9X5hwe-t2fTC9_RSad2Ce4WcdhwzHLjeBqZ4cdj8nqft5LsQss8eggNRQwxWZlFHQIAxvr1h57iYg7p62OCdt3z-XP2Ua1bT7Bk_rxJ65fGd7x7B23dJqUHpY2jYY_luei91lilvs-rDV5X5PPe7vBTr7RTarZNcARVI29y5dMV1jUWqhsO02bj-C6vdhxS2HACEMpPI5Q-Lmlxe9cmRsCfNT6LncmsyKu4YofOb_QkAAP__76KbdQ) / [Advertise with us](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00DsWnCAUANDVaMnhJw8KiyST2cdT8AN-EHGUWX1O0qe_1bWttgaYrl3LlDGMcTC0nlrUSuselW0argZuremsQRQSuDGM9vXccsoFY1SyRipuCCPwiwqAd8N-_3xxbWQlKa4uzT1uEXOa92xxXgrp97Ve2innWIkfFX9X_J0T9oH8T_814v3kpRIvxm8xUL-ErehDePrYK61PKNEibuMY-H4ESwH5UXx6cjTCHHxxYGgT_LTOAHm7ehCAt4qjPLoY-6HxH-OCHJ99h8TkWZzdmzE5Lq4t5_NG2xWMS9-5nLorPEGUIRl8umkbgxpPHcIkj0vDzXxifcWVm6dKvMJ31duZvYpp9dBNXzj957OV8wDR4TjVa6skUNZwVqfWxntelvlUUEk6rjgv_6py-5BThJ1SwoSJ5HY7ck1uB120ZNqilh-i_Vk0GUBaQZi_xJ8AAAD__-hgmsE)

name: Your America
subject: The Future of Hearing Aids
body:
This powerful secret weapon against hearing loss is crushing the market

| [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35067%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BSfz1gZF5RtNurOd6EgwuA&sysid=1)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35068%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=G%2fsqtDql9VXTMPJnQzL3YA&sysid=1)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they think they are still big and ugly. However, Marco and Paul wanted to change this perception with a **revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers formerly from Siemens.**

But now, a **game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry** , and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they’ve seen in over a decade.

It’s called **Horizon by hear.com.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **Horizon has taken the U.S. by storm since its release in early 2023** , offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35069%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KPJOLC79GdXpuI5buvQ58A&sysid=1)

What makes Horizon so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

With Horizon, they can. **Imagine effortless hearing in every situation** --restaurants, weddings, block parties, and beyond. Imagine being able to **understand every word clearly** with a device so small and comfortable, you’ll completely forget you’re wearing it.

This means that Horizon offers all of the usual benefits of a modern hearing aid--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: it can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It’s not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It’s about speech clarity. And that’s precisely what Horizon is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

clean_body: This powerful secret weapon against hearing loss is crushing the market | | Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result. Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they think they are still big and ugly. However, Marco and Paul wanted to change this perception with a revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers formerly from Siemens. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry , and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they’ve seen in over a decade. It’s called Horizon by hear.com. And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It’s no wonder Horizon has taken the U.S. by storm since its release in early 2023 , offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes Horizon so special? subject: Join the prayer chain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

|
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbj4p919gmstrcv5427gk1bqnn5jcv7gnk4ns9eg_rp22sh2s8i66p74shg64o74cdh2bs)
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbpg6l27r17sb4v0hulcnr3g09makc8lambmep40_rp22sh2s8i66p74shg64o74cdh2bs)

Fellow American - I know God is not done with America yet.

It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government.

The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic.

Like so many American households through the generations, in our house, we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

I know our country is in desperate need of prayer.

[**Today I am asking if you share my faith in God and for the future of our nations, you'll join us.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbn314a29c6b191kbkusv06c7vvhs5od59kkmdt8_rp22sh2s8i66p74shg64o74cdh2bs)

[**We cannot allow the radical Left to destroy the ideals our country was founded on. Please join me if you agree that we need to stand up for our Republic.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zanq54lkrnb7sp1ridnmp2lpedgs1lkar8bfjbdg_rp22sh2s8i66p74shg64o74cdh2bs)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr7o7ki35kpvhi53rpkn6l2ghqbscqsh92c7or5o_)

God bless,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z02r9790agjo4rndiqp785mg97p9dl6t4qt6nmbg_)

---

| PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA

| 3 Days To Go!
---
| Friends,
Everything we care about is on the line next Tuesday, November 7. Please ignore all the distractions going on in the media, rather right now let's focus on the mission at hand. The last day to vote early in person is today Saturday November 4. Please pray for Virginia, please get friends to the polls, and please vote before the polls close 7pm, November 7.
---
| Youngkin's Closing Message (Video)

| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cNc26H6z__jg6dkB7HElq8ZGXy5oRbp4VZL-p5HNaIndK10cawg7lORNga5CnVb7P_zp5Q9U1jQEAJS2A29cLfKdidXpv2yroBIQUJeOT1W3nMl7iHe-MKCINB78ThtTKBbTr7IdQb8RzUqR1h7qgaIekSbjKTpbkmOiz-N_gFLgB0J1payLhg==&c=negUmNnm1On534MGMwOscDKEZDRJ7JgS_8vsR8hRpqu1SEp-QGnuTQ==&ch=JPquTGNfhEu40tO3r7kTF9W40yFzxg9M0LLeHDzNUPYhE8sWwfX9rQ==)

| Governor Youngkin is our quarterback and he, like so many others, is working hard to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. [Click here for Governor Glenn Youngkin's closing message.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cNc26H6z__jg6dkB7HElq8ZGXy5oRbp4VZL-p5HNaIndK10cawg7lORNga5CnVb7P_zp5Q9U1jQEAJS2A29cLfKdidXpv2yroBIQUJeOT1W3nMl7iHe-MKCINB78ThtTKBbTr7IdQb8RzUqR1h7qgaIekSbjKTpbkmOiz-N_gFLgB0J1payLhg==&c=negUmNnm1On534MGMwOscDKEZDRJ7JgS_8vsR8hRpqu1SEp-QGnuTQ==&ch=JPquTGNfhEu40tO3r7kTF9W40yFzxg9M0LLeHDzNUPYhE8sWwfX9rQ==)

| My Interview Jeff Katz Show
---

---
| Please ask friends to vote Republican by 7pm on Tuesday November 7. Thank you Jeff Katz for having me on your show yesterday to encourage folks to Get Out The Vote! [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cNc26H6z__jg6dkB7HElq8ZGXy5oRbp4VZL-p5HNaIndK10cawg7lORNga5CnVb7FmOoSDJvUDRjLRdgz_rdqZlUF8G4YxKNe4-fgd23GK_rcV9R9CcNY9tIcL39GY_CrcfIn6TVCXzDmRfXjw_kCg==&c=negUmNnm1On534MGMwOscDKEZDRJ7JgS_8vsR8hRpqu1SEp-QGnuTQ==&ch=JPquTGNfhEu40tO3r7kTF9W40yFzxg9M0LLeHDzNUPYhE8sWwfX9rQ==)
---
| Henrico Get Out The Vote Rally Sunday, November 5
---
|
---
| Join us in Henrico for the Get Out the Vote Rally with Governor Glenn Youngkin tomorrow Sunday, November 5th with Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears, Congressman Rob Wittman, Senator Siobhan Dunnavant, David Owens for Delegate, Riley Shaia for Delegate and others. This event starts 11am. Please spread the word. RSVP to [GlennYoungkin.org/events](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cNc26H6z__jg6dkB7HElq8ZGXy5oRbp4VZL-p5HNaIndK10cawg7lORNga5CnVb7y2ne_E8QOy7ROFwEBL__SevAXDkpmf1hDB4Md5KsazYTkkW0GQDrjE3NVmsckT7O60P-fwAmLRxvCxi5ghjL2e-b4txJhRnG&c=negUmNnm1On534MGMwOscDKEZDRJ7JgS_8vsR8hRpqu1SEp-QGnuTQ==&ch=JPquTGNfhEu40tO3r7kTF9W40yFzxg9M0LLeHDzNUPYhE8sWwfX9rQ==)
---
|
While campaigning all over the place, I am keeping my ears open and listening to your ideas on how we can improve Virginia. The following is some of what is on my mind and what we have been up to:
---
| Brothers
---
|
---
| Proud to serve: This is a photo with me and some of my fellow Navy SEAL brothers at an event where we helped folks with the basics of rifle, pistol, shotgun, axe throwing, knife throwing, crossbows, sniper rifles, and more for a veteran charity. To all my fellow veterans, thank you for your service to our country. Don't forget freedom isn't free and don't forget Veterans Day is coming up soon and will be celebrated on Saturday, November 11th, 2023 at 11am. Major hostilities of World War I were formally ended at the 11th hour of the 11th day of the 11th month of 1918 when the Armistice with Germany went into effect. [Click here for more](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cNc26H6z__jg6dkB7HElq8ZGXy5oRbp4VZL-p5HNaIndK10cawg7lORNga5CnVb76LSsAOBM2NekQzOhnf1tuBtGzDZ0MPTDw1VFdiNU1U2IKa4GaZ3ycvqXPa6-RXuRo-kQpIvG_MroMH_fObfsPF5iBK-o3YDjuXmWPK9R2Dk=&c=negUmNnm1On534MGMwOscDKEZDRJ7JgS_8vsR8hRpqu1SEp-QGnuTQ==&ch=JPquTGNfhEu40tO3r7kTF9W40yFzxg9M0LLeHDzNUPYhE8sWwfX9rQ==)

| Deadly Overdose Epidemic (Chinese Poison)
---
|
---
| We have an overdose epidemic in our Commonwealth and across our country. Sadly, I have knocked on several doors where parents cried while telling me stories of their son or daughter dying of an overdose. This fentanyl (Chinese poison) is coming across our southern border and making every state a border state. Thankfully [my bill to allow school nurses in Virginia to store and administer Narcan or naloxone](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cNc26H6z__jg6dkB7HElq8ZGXy5oRbp4VZL-p5HNaIndK10cawg7lORNga5CnVb7PeLGzLNLyST_YXWaaS2yZclmdVOiJrt3DrKJsav16C_4MO9WQ-peTYz51rHAnYZRmsnOwnqN5-e0j3nrkRQ0IbVAzMHxZFwCn2Dfpqr2Z_8NXKHOvt1r0HCQn7eFW4g5YYHnocHKqI52czk_1jxDu5YNapsfaegnDGvPGjtwSEf1vX0Z2Zw56qS40tygozTDxJrvGwAFLbqxQe027S8pb7FsGba9U8AIqeXdjMm9xlhVc0RRUCdejPbdRj_CLlGGWHG7DDgyvsjj1RwtfbbxQiiAS3f7lOND91xt0oAtpcMZZPGqwlTc0ioHpWtTPhxhcYyX5yGxUk-1lFjueSJ1IKOzjYPDRLkVXnEIUDtMlTaB3L2exp3d-A==&c=negUmNnm1On534MGMwOscDKEZDRJ7JgS_8vsR8hRpqu1SEp-QGnuTQ==&ch=JPquTGNfhEu40tO3r7kTF9W40yFzxg9M0LLeHDzNUPYhE8sWwfX9rQ==) became law with the help of many fellow legislators and a Goochland teacher Jennifer Waggener in 2019 and has been saving lives across Virginia ever since. Sadly another one of my bills, a bill to charge drug dealers with felony homicide has failed in the House three times due to Democrats caring more about criminals than victims.
The Loudoun County Sheriff's Office reported Tuesday that nine students at Park View High school in Sterling overdosed, and four of those overdoses happened inside the school. Eight of those overdoses occurred in the last three weeks. Again, in Loudoun County, there was a failure to inform parents when their children were harmed.
Thank you Governor Youngkin for issuing an Executive Order related to the nine student overdoses in Loudoun County. School divisions must now notify parents within 24 hours of a school-connected student overdose incident. We will continue the fight. Please ignore all the distractions going on in the media, rather right now let's focus on the mission at hand. The last day to vote early in person is today Saturday November 4. Please pray for Virginia, please get friends to the polls, and please vote before the polls close 7pm, November 7. | Youngkin's Closing Message (Video) | == | Governor Youngkin is our quarterback and he, like so many others, is working hard to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. == | My Interview Jeff Katz Show | == | Please ask friends to vote Republican by 7pm on Tuesday November 7. Thank you Jeff Katz for having me on your show yesterday to encourage folks to Get Out The Vote! == | Henrico Get Out The Vote Rally Sunday, November 5 | | Join us in Henrico for the Get Out the Vote Rally with Governor Glenn Youngkin tomorrow Sunday, November 5th with Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears, Congressman Rob Wittman, Senator Siobhan Dunnavant, David Owens for Delegate, Riley Shaia for Delegate and others. This event starts 11am. Please spread the word. RSVP to == | While campaigning all over the place, I am keeping my ears open and listening to your ideas on how we can improve Virginia. The following is some of what is on my mind and what we have been up to: | Brothers | | Proud to serve: This is a photo with me and some of my fellow Navy SEAL brothers at an event where we helped folks with the basics of rifle, pistol, shotgun, axe throwing, knife throwing, crossbows, sniper rifles, and more for a veteran charity. To all my fellow veterans, thank you for your service to our country. Don't forget freedom isn't free and don't forget Veterans Day is coming up soon and will be celebrated on Saturday, November 11th, 2023 at 11am. Major hostilities of World War I were formally ended at the 11th hour of the 11th day of the 11th month of 1918 when the Armistice with Germany went into effect. == | Song of the Day, Norman Greenbaum - Spirit In The Sky (1970) | == | Governor Youngkin's Song! For a little inspiration, ==. | Deadly Overdose Epidemic (Chinese Poison) | | We have an overdose epidemic in our Commonwealth and across our country. Sadly, I have knocked on several doors where parents cried while telling me stories of their son or daughter dying of an overdose. This fentanyl (Chinese poison) is coming across our southern border and making every state a border state. Thankfully == became law with the help of many fellow legislators and a Goochland teacher Jennifer Waggener in 2019 and has been saving lives across Virginia ever since. Sadly another one of my bills, a bill to charge drug dealers with felony homicide has failed in the House three times due to Democrats caring more about criminals than victims. The Loudoun County Sheriff's Office reported Tuesday that nine students at Park View High school in Sterling overdosed, and four of those overdoses happened inside the school. Eight of those overdoses occurred in the last three weeks. Again, in Loudoun County, there was a failure to inform parents when their children were harmed. Thank you Governor Youngkin for issuing an Executive Order related to the nine student overdoses in Loudoun County. School divisions must now notify parents within 24 hours of a school-connected student overdose incident. We will continue the fight. ==. | God's Children are Not For Sale | == | Human Trafficking is modern day slavery. My bill to stiffen felony penalties for those who participate in trafficking humans and especially children was killed by the Democrats. Human Trafficking is a 150 billion dollar a year business. The United States is among the largest consumers of the unbelievable evil of child sex. There are more humans trapped in slavery today than any other time in history - including when slavery was legal. Millions of these slaves are children. We will continue the fight.== | Bibi says "No Cease Fire Until Hostages Returned" | | Israel is fighting for her survival after the terrorist organization, Hamas, committed unspeakable acts of evil during a surprise attack in Israel on October 7. Just like the United States has a right to defend our people, Israel has a right to defend her people. Bibi says there will be no cease fire until all hostages are returned. I absolutely agree with this. | Hanover! | | Date Night at the Goochland vs Louisa Fooball Game | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | After a busy week on the campaign trail, my best friend and I did football, a dinner, and a movie! It was great seeing so many friends at the game. I am looking forward to continuing to represent Goochland County and Louisa County! | Vote to Re-elect Angela Allen Goochland School Board! | | We Love Our Farmers! | | Yesterday was a fun day, meeting with constituents all over the district. I met this farmer in Hanover County yesterday and I thanked him for voting Republican! Thank you to our farmers for all you do to keep us fed. This is the most agricultural and forest impactful district in Virginia! | Appomattox County | | Captain Howard Gregory Retired, VA State Police Division Commander, Appomattox County. Thank you for your service and thank you for your endorsement Sir! | | Always great to see our friends at Granny Bee's American Restaurant in Appomattox County! | | | Yesterday I got an early start to the day by waving at cars in Appomattox County. name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: What is at stake
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
When Kelly and I dreamed of our future, we certainly didn’t envision co-parenting with the government. As parents and patriots, we must make a change.

|
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6qg89ia45nbrohl9a4htsgki2m8tn0ptnpkln68_rp22sh2s8i66p74shg64o72cdh2bs)
---
Fellow American,

When people ask Kelly and me why we keep going, and why we are still compelled to serve in public office, no matter how difficult the days, our answer is simple: _“This is for our children. For ALL of our children and grandchildren.”_

There is a very real question right now whether they will be able to enjoy the same liberty, security, and opportunity that we have. **Freedom is imperiled today and there is a crisis at every turn.**

Kelly and I have four amazing kids, and we give our all--_every day_ --to try to ensure that we can pass along the blessings of liberty to Hannah, Abby, Jack, and Will, and everyone in the generation of Americans that follow us. I am certain that you share that same conviction.

**_I believe that God is not done with America yet._**

**I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great – but I am bullish about the future of America.**

I believe in the law – I’m a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law.

**I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world – _but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us._**

[**Last November, the American people put their faith in House Republicans and gave us a majority. We’ve been charged with holding Democrats accountable for their failure to get our country out of the malaise of their own making. To deliver on the promises we made, we need you on our team TODAY.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvtesl5gmnlg7go2pqql2ju2s5kn8q567188el7o_rp22sh2s8i66p74shg64o72cdh2bs)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER MIKE > **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp7998oflvct2rt1an3bs0c62tie5q8495v1pgrg_rp22sh2s8i66p74shg64o72cdh2bs)

Fellow American, I know it takes time to build trust; you’re getting to know me and I’m navigating this new role – but we must act – and quickly. We need a full course correction,**otherwise, I’m not sure what version of America we’ll hand down to the next generation.**

[**So, I’m asking you today – please commit to a donation of any amount. We will use your gift to help defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgjl2ifgc2g6t1r7hdotmnn65p007keun1mr1vco_rp22sh2s8i66p74shg64o72cdh2bs)

**_-STEP FORWARD TODAY-_** [** DONATE > **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbknk1g6v4ep64udr4ssf5eur10bsm006u4if74o_rp22sh2s8i66p74shg64o72cdh2bs)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and I intend to keep that promise. [**Stand with me today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1k117j1bb6crggb0906b99pndul9mlfihg7v6bo_rp22sh2s8i66p74shg64o72cdh2bs)

God bless,

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z08ner09oajd0popf0mlh6971gfvm0gopikj8ig8_rp22sh2s8i66p74shg64o72cdh2bs)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zippnbj1m3lqil2k21jshqnsnv6cmu9058cshk18_)

---

| PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
---

American Action News
---

_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zre97qalesbpn5laotp02mttdvtd07erip8p54ao_rp22sh2s8i66p74shg64o72cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp34cjg60oj3c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdi1dvlhgbs5jdcv70j2fqaob0a037031mslmpmo_rp22sh2s8i66p74shg64o72cdh2bs)_

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Share your thoughts on Big Tech
body:
Over the past few months, the extremism of the political Left's agenda has become clear

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7832e307fdc64763ae20cb8274d85b22&_e=69cYNCBA80saXm0-5UGbBEo6Ll2IdZf-279zDBbNI6i0Ltrit4dGsC5EZXtfJwqaby6f4Rdysmlz9OZLfK_E9TVFI7HmcFN-NqPX1ZnoojtfmGWTvDKMu8-PbU0MXJW4pS3vNd_9Z50OhKNVQm8jSToOtDlBarEa6Ljzpne4_R1FgCTMB3nTsFU7R9_fGZ3XfnUt06E0joFMcgN7V8Dm-MC___aDCLq_uS-sv7R0q5IhxWWUTmTk8E0UMExT4FOUVdVgvWt1rYJruRvaSYYUSKdbxJEUuafwzUo4r7addfgca3Je7dGb-FR_s5SWgMQpNEOft9scZtGkJkG2CR4mP-T-kNT61uS9RI-spimsXqMYKBe_3Xm_ddyisjkVBNwb) Dear Fellow American, Over the past few months, the extremism of the political Left's agenda has become clear through the actions of the mainstream media and Big Tech companies like X, formerly known as Twitter, and Amazon. Together, these forces are working to**suppress conservative speech and political activity** , denying First Amendment rights to their political opponents--and denying access to conservative opinion and important news stories to the American people. Conservatives (including the former President of the United States) are increasingly being "de-platformed" by companies like X. Amazon is refusing to sell books questioning the transgender revolution--it even took down an award-winning documentary video on the life of Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas! A major publishing company, Simon and Schuster, bowed to pressure and canceled plans to publish a book on the danger of Big Tech by U.S. Senator Josh Hawley. **We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America.** **That's why I am asking you to take a Hillsdale College NATIONAL SURVEY ON THE THREAT OF BIG TECH.**

## How concerned are you about Big Tech's ability to censor content, "deplatform" users, and push a false and dishonest narrative about what's happening in America today?
[Not concerned at all](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7832e307fdc64763ae20cb8274d85b22&_e=69cYNCBA80saXm0-5UGbBEo6Ll2IdZf-279zDBbNI6i0Ltrit4dGsC5EZXtfJwqaby6f4Rdysmlz9OZLfK_E9TVFI7HmcFN-NqPX1ZnoojtfmGWTvDKMu8-PbU0MXJW4pS3vNd_9Z50OhKNVQm8jSToOtDlBarEa6Ljzpne4_R1FgCTMB3nTsFU7R9_fGZ3XfnUt06E0joFMcgN7V8Dm-MC___aDCLq_uS-sv7R0q5JrnP8vOJJffDqmeeWEYeNcBKlR4OdchLHKldfOChM_kluvSAEl_qe4Wmgh6NupGqaXvVx8jBqVWI3x7DZz4_VZwqfn8JR6O935g92WuPjBQLQPyTiiqgRYCBehtufOvi9ILf6D4BQjXHZEO35ODxnj) [Somewhat concerned](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7832e307fdc64763ae20cb8274d85b22&_e=69cYNCBA80saXm0-5UGbBEo6Ll2IdZf-279zDBbNI6i0Ltrit4dGsC5EZXtfJwqaby6f4Rdysmlz9OZLfK_E9TVFI7HmcFN-NqPX1ZnoojtfmGWTvDKMu8-PbU0MXJW4pS3vNd_9Z50OhKNVQm8jSToOtDlBarEa6Ljzpne4_R1FgCTMB3nTsFU7R9_fGZ3XfnUt06E0joFMcgN7V8Dm-MC___aDCLq_uS-sv7R0q5JZY96aaoncCjXVdlrzjxXIEsyl2dJf92TjdlBQjAVD8WKvscjc-FiSIabzwxVCzrdrs9lkRFloIyKfCey7kDomtkiFObXGw1mw71B-zDxHxGdadnQ3ztlKyW3xTB3XW7b_LdCVV2W896iWfdpEaQtc) [Very concerned](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7832e307fdc64763ae20cb8274d85b22&_e=69cYNCBA80saXm0-5UGbBEo6Ll2IdZf-279zDBbNI6i0Ltrit4dGsC5EZXtfJwqaby6f4Rdysmlz9OZLfK_E9TVFI7HmcFN-NqPX1ZnoojtfmGWTvDKMu8-PbU0MXJW4pS3vNd_9Z50OhKNVQm8jSToOtDlBarEa6Ljzpne4_R1FgCTMB3nTsFU7R9_fGZ3XfnUt06E0joFMcgN7V8Dm-MC___aDCLq_uS-sv7R0q5LGR_zQbuFVSG8-XBVolIZjZx0X-pjT70tjfUwMG9HWpMWrLzg506s_kWzVdsFHZz2l9m8tvEQZ5p6tCnBY54rTXCqU8WLUrx5VRdUoeRPTRUeFIzjtGAwxxi-fEVKkIe4oQVqdjTJ8t-xvljYTsKpr) By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans on this critical issue--information that will strengthen Hillsdale's nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty...efforts we will continue to expand despite the opposition of Big Tech. Fellow American, you can complete the NATIONAL SURVEY ON THE THREAT OF BIG TECH by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-tech-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7832e307fdc64763ae20cb8274d85b22&_e=69cYNCBA80saXm0-5UGbBEo6Ll2IdZf-279zDBbNI6i0Ltrit4dGsC5EZXtfJwqaby6f4Rdysmlz9OZLfK_E9TVFI7HmcFN-NqPX1ZnoojtfmGWTvDKMu8-PbU0MXJW4pS3vNd_9Z50OhKNVQm8jSToOtDlBarEa6Ljzpne4_R1FgCTMB3nTsFU7R9_fGZ3XfnUt06E0joFMcgN7V8Dm-MC___aDCLq_uS-sv7R0q5J88I1LfLnWRTXujcLbXgqOESjH0lOieuC1WVpmVM7j9ola5urracq-JiOdR_HM8uNvXgkj8e2ifZp-6Dzaf07T_-W-Fxcvl4uVJa17LzX3lQm-wEZvAHoKwAQYzZuclWu2EIzGKf394bE5rlSXUFCJ)** In the late 1960s, radicals who scorned America and its founding principles began moving into our colleges and universities. It took them several decades to cement their dominance, but we see the fruits of their labors today: we see it in the media, and we see it in Silicon Valley. We also see it in professional sports, in corporate America--much of which is now capitulating to far-Left demands--and increasingly, we see it in K-12 education. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I always tell people there is a way to fight this threat, despite how uphill the fight may seem.** A vital part of the fight--and one in which Hillsdale College is uniquely able to lead--is to **reach** and **teach** additional millions of citizens with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty.** ** As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulation. But it also means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **NATIONAL SURVEY ON THE THREAT OF BIG TECH** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-tech-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7832e307fdc64763ae20cb8274d85b22&_e=69cYNCBA80saXm0-5UGbBEo6Ll2IdZf-279zDBbNI6i0Ltrit4dGsC5EZXtfJwqaby6f4Rdysmlz9OZLfK_E9TVFI7HmcFN-NqPX1ZnoojtfmGWTvDKMu8-PbU0MXJW4pS3vNd_9Z50OhKNVQm8jSToOtDlBarEa6Ljzpne4_R1FgCTMB3nTsFU7R9_fGZ3XfnUt06E0joFMcgN7V8Dm-MC___aDCLq_uS-sv7R0q5LSymOZ0mEtIB7W6tw9t84H_8NjQ5DY8M_cURAbT4p-nda_qqYEohw5AXclGTY-aalIpvwABU5_I6l28vn-nGULHpwkiLwm-FUenzvReRb8ywP9oh_ByHiKNQUvvmzPJR3Rpoe5ZBc-cULdsh2Rm0RY)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I deeply appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. clean_body: Over the past few months, the extremism of the political Left's agenda has become clear This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Over the past few months, the extremism of the political Left's agenda has become clear through the actions of the mainstream media and Big Tech companies like X, formerly known as Twitter, and Amazon. Together, these forces are working tosuppress conservative speech and political activity , denying First Amendment rights to their political opponents--and denying access to conservative opinion and important news stories to the American people. Conservatives (including the former President of the United States) are increasingly being "de-platformed" by companies like X. Amazon is refusing to sell books questioning the transgender revolution--it even took down an award-winning documentary video on the life of Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas! A major publishing company, Simon and Schuster, bowed to pressure and canceled plans to publish a book on the danger of Big Tech by U.S. Senator Josh Hawley. We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America. That's why I am asking you to take a Hillsdale College NATIONAL SURVEY ON THE THREAT OF BIG TECH. How concerned are you about Big Tech's ability to censor content, "deplatform" users, and push a false and dishonest narrative about what's happening in America today? By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans on this critical issue--information that will strengthen Hillsdale's nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty...efforts we will continue to expand despite the opposition of Big Tech. Fellow American, you can complete the NATIONAL SURVEY ON THE THREAT OF BIG TECH by using the link below: In the late 1960s, radicals who scorned America and its founding principles began moving into our colleges and universities. It took them several decades to cement their dominance, but we see the fruits of their labors today: we see it in the media, and we see it in Silicon Valley. We also see it in professional sports, in corporate America--much of which is now capitulating to far-Left demands--and increasingly, we see it in K-12 education. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I always tell people there is a way to fight this threat, despite how uphill the fight may seem. A vital part of the fight--and one in which Hillsdale College is uniquely able to lead--is to reach and teach additional millions of citizens with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulation. But it also means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached NATIONAL SURVEY ON THE THREAT OF BIG TECH , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I deeply appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. name: Mike Johnson
subject: How I lead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life.

|
[ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9ceb3cbf0b6417a8d1a0194f03f45c2&_e=6AZjz9b_w8q6qrJmeiMA3tSlD5J6bSimhoWW6SeD9ZJ55GtAAULOb_brVQS2h4L21zhnnhsQVz2xa_DT7I5N0nlG_w5fKZGM7ZJePj8zsq0MkX6m9MZRMQ7v10DmzIIXd5Nc-L06FNJ6z3WOWBcR6Yc9S4cY7H9cWkhd0wbslLDMc1yWLLtRNN6UiTISkRrYZ7S_grBLTwTlq-d-nPijeJRatNUCUtHLdzXL4KHhiIfwpT_a_gDu-7sp48P8x_7JSVOXmHDty_6aQFgXrIFgUhujh8ikv1CBp7dslHzUTC2HZBTEMLOHRTIqeZiDJfXagubFWmNrrLbU6euE_6fRNyx5VCoIspk3x_pqPFp4ozGiPS6JTd1LObtshqZTMurS)
---
Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I've devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9ceb3cbf0b6417a8d1a0194f03f45c2&_e=6AZjz9b_w8q6qrJmeiMA3tSlD5J6bSimhoWW6SeD9ZJ55GtAAULOb_brVQS2h4L21zhnnhsQVz2xa_DT7I5N0nlG_w5fKZGM7ZJePj8zsq0MkX6m9MZRMQ7v10DmzIIXd5Nc-L06FNJ6z3WOWBcR6Yc9S4cY7H9cWkhd0wbslLDMc1yWLLtRNN6UiTISkRrYZ7S_grBLTwTlq-d-nPijeJRatNUCUtHLdzXL4KHhiIcQvv9SvE8O9OYxBbS1WwTtHidxnInOyLtQleACHyo3cJ27yGs_20o60j4xGiFkzwOXPUBUUl6PZ3EvydD90-vYKd2fPfnFHxeeM0d_paeY15sCVPdhJw-vxLmYMJDuNnEs19vrRkbCzPK332i816Fd) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9ceb3cbf0b6417a8d1a0194f03f45c2&_e=6AZjz9b_w8q6qrJmeiMA3tSlD5J6bSimhoWW6SeD9ZJ55GtAAULOb_brVQS2h4L21zhnnhsQVz2xa_DT7I5N0nlG_w5fKZGM7ZJePj8zsq0MkX6m9MZRMQ7v10DmzIIXd5Nc-L06FNJ6z3WOWBcR6Yc9S4cY7H9cWkhd0wbslLDMc1yWLLtRNN6UiTISkRrYZ7S_grBLTwTlq-d-nPijeJRatNUCUtHLdzXL4KHhiIdADVDEPWM1jKryXZR3xoXNcDy9i4XljHmF8lR1lvB8pAqsS3RllyvVWcKb208tfBz5QyCpIXvps2nn33M5fCsvZYIBQ8DVFlFqi1IxwcJb-cnkV_asmmTtIDcSliTxbmMoPmN01H_T5UxZ03fiED2V)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support - to restore our country and defend our values. Can you make a donation immediately?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9ceb3cbf0b6417a8d1a0194f03f45c2&_e=6AZjz9b_w8q6qrJmeiMA3tSlD5J6bSimhoWW6SeD9ZJ55GtAAULOb_brVQS2h4L21zhnnhsQVz2xa_DT7I5N0nlG_w5fKZGM7ZJePj8zsq0MkX6m9MZRMQ7v10DmzIIXd5Nc-L06FNJ6z3WOWBcR6Yc9S4cY7H9cWkhd0wbslLDMc1yWLLtRNN6UiTISkRrYZ7S_grBLTwTlq-d-nPijeJRatNUCUtHLdzXL4KHhiIef0StaUl28J-vfMly88PSRDYSVKnO6EEmgU37ph-FlugqjsurUCwzNl1r1m9YviuvTj2keUV1qCSwITTaxhrHh8cRavWnV2J6yEyV73njMKl4wJcpytfC5RlG4TlEJlKhL-xOl-VmtU1VuXSe5xsHx)

[** DONATE TO SAVE AMERICA > **](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9ceb3cbf0b6417a8d1a0194f03f45c2&_e=6AZjz9b_w8q6qrJmeiMA3tSlD5J6bSimhoWW6SeD9ZJ55GtAAULOb_brVQS2h4L21zhnnhsQVz2xa_DT7I5N0nlG_w5fKZGM7ZJePj8zsq0MkX6m9MZRMQ7v10DmzIIXd5Nc-L06FNJ6z3WOWBcR6Yc9S4cY7H9cWkhd0wbslLDMc1yWLLtRNN6UiTISkRrYZ7S_grBLTwTlq-d-nPijeJRatNUCUtHLdzXL4KHhiIerRe6Ea84eSYaTwZSCo4HUEVsup_BYTmiXq7ZU9H74KyXiOx2z15i471upK7fF3bX58U1r2f0UtaL543eQBJaxgwqi1Pmv48POuqiEByV9KiCshS-wqwrKdiZIkLGV6zzgnm9jzSpjMvmSzcnMuXGr)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it 's too late.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9ceb3cbf0b6417a8d1a0194f03f45c2&_e=6AZjz9b_w8q6qrJmeiMA3tSlD5J6bSimhoWW6SeD9ZJ55GtAAULOb_brVQS2h4L21zhnnhsQVz2xa_DT7I5N0nlG_w5fKZGM7ZJePj8zsq0MkX6m9MZRMQ7v10DmzIIXd5Nc-L06FNJ6z3WOWBcR6Yc9S4cY7H9cWkhd0wbslLDMc1yWLLtRNN6UiTISkRrYZ7S_grBLTwTlq-d-nPijeJRatNUCUtHLdzXL4KHhiIdz8xr6Ua06ia-rQu28uTJec0K2wJ4Eq1cuRk6RRGn0YmCHOsJKLxSOjRj-UXKEuP_g59rq1K0WpT9B3Skaaj7vf-a1tyYqO4WKOeY4NDQIvY-opc90wlakDOQGhLJbyZgI9LQTD9Ceiwc42LoovEJK)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It's why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It's also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference - one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House - and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee.

We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, [**but we cannot do it alone.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9ceb3cbf0b6417a8d1a0194f03f45c2&_e=6AZjz9b_w8q6qrJmeiMA3tSlD5J6bSimhoWW6SeD9ZJ55GtAAULOb_brVQS2h4L21zhnnhsQVz2xa_DT7I5N0nlG_w5fKZGM7ZJePj8zsq0MkX6m9MZRMQ7v10DmzIIXd5Nc-L06FNJ6z3WOWBcR6Yc9S4cY7H9cWkhd0wbslLDMc1yWLLtRNN6UiTISkRrYZ7S_grBLTwTlq-d-nPijeJRatNUCUtHLdzXL4KHhiIckzGSMEKFPrRXtIk9B-xfcltat6gXUfxchOW4h2UfK-DMqH4HMNM9FxDQJrIWMBOYzrT4A_PC3VB5CL8g-9BX2bG3ud0Cz7Mw5R-uoYHNCpqXb9bsqYE7eS9kQqzM_IT1Fscunx5xzpwQQvUiX75wC)

[**If you are committed to keeping the House from the radical Democrats who are self-serving and want to turn America into a socialist country, then I need your support today.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9ceb3cbf0b6417a8d1a0194f03f45c2&_e=6AZjz9b_w8q6qrJmeiMA3tSlD5J6bSimhoWW6SeD9ZJ55GtAAULOb_brVQS2h4L21zhnnhsQVz2xa_DT7I5N0nlG_w5fKZGM7ZJePj8zsq0MkX6m9MZRMQ7v10DmzIIXd5Nc-L06FNJ6z3WOWBcR6Yc9S4cY7H9cWkhd0wbslLDMc1yWLLtRNN6UiTISkRrYZ7S_grBLTwTlq-d-nPijeJRatNUCUtHLdzXL4KHhiIcl8-JSKKc2tC0T8O_MwgPIul_O9Hbv-kHXwnbvnXm3Jc0RLKdVVPTHIvIf06EJ0ueCVA6_yFaCAKeALwcS2s37s3UelzSLtxlsTONFSoFx7nBfUbDccMfLrDS5-d5-Am-atcpobwBgsMXMuU8tQg16)

[** CHIP IN > **](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9ceb3cbf0b6417a8d1a0194f03f45c2&_e=6AZjz9b_w8q6qrJmeiMA3tSlD5J6bSimhoWW6SeD9ZJ55GtAAULOb_brVQS2h4L21zhnnhsQVz2xa_DT7I5N0nlG_w5fKZGM7ZJePj8zsq0MkX6m9MZRMQ7v10DmzIIXd5Nc-L06FNJ6z3WOWBcR6Yc9S4cY7H9cWkhd0wbslLDMc1yWLLtRNN6UiTISkRrYZ7S_grBLTwTlq-d-nPijeJRatNUCUtHLdzXL4KHhiIeDlFSrbQKZ_WNbmux6Wx9vIA4Ol9fnqEi69wDMIqCgipXovoV49V6Zs2nMxoxj5jeeoDR2-1hp2DmqD2yN5rWqPVBoqtPZb--vg7lQgVbmrU6qRyPNJC3mRbVxEn6iXSO0oFAEFYXm2pPZ0UklC83a)

The path we're on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country, Fellow American?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9ceb3cbf0b6417a8d1a0194f03f45c2&_e=6AZjz9b_w8q6qrJmeiMA3tSlD5J6bSimhoWW6SeD9ZJ55GtAAULOb_brVQS2h4L21zhnnhsQVz2xa_DT7I5N0nlG_w5fKZGM7ZJePj8zsq0MkX6m9MZRMQ7v10DmzIIXd5Nc-L06FNJ6z3WOWBcR6Yc9S4cY7H9cWkhd0wbslLDMc1yWLLtRNN6UiTISkRrYZ7S_grBLTwTlq-d-nPijeJRatNUCUtHLdzXL4KHhiIdgj_nRncFCXhRc8wgJnWYAB7UjNaGhLNxitDbImXFru7TVtml4xNBomGnKl4C2b3Isd8jZ6kjKEvmNWv1t0lM9rQeSILeYviQwmxAtJuTQNKrf5V3pvyWm2NkHCpCc-OSGGd0JaBjlgH8tbnG3GJ5g)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

clean_body: I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life. | Fellow American, The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them. Faith. Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people. Family. Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way. Freedom. It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I've devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress. America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are! Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives. This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness. We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here. Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It's why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It's also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference - one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House - and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee. We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, The path we're on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW. We MUST act, and we must do so today. Thank you for all you do, and God bless. Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

## Hezbollah Threatens Israel
In his first televised statement since Hamas' attack on October 7th, Hezbollah leader Hassan Nasrallah said that his forces are currently fighting on the Lebanon-Israel border and that the conflict [may escalate into all-out war](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGO4yAQgOGngY4IBojjguIad7n2SmtihjB3xETAxco-_Wq33vovfun7c12vyIX3-298UBiprrgNftFqjHIK7OpkDIkIyEoK5jzPRoP1IHO4mAsYb2eI9nyzyTs0OJF1kzZRk90kB9BgjdFOz955ewKnUaPzk9NbtGCF0xR51Hb6W3kfmVJ51xe101YfsoQ8xrML-0vAImAZmTKX8tUELDsdvdAY1LqAJVKivZPacXDdsahO2__G4y1gcTDDPHmV6eNWS8Gs-hPbv64SYVM1qYMjNXVgE7DIFuLz4FK4nyfh9P2B_L2U40eczwAAAP__RCBlsw) between Hezbollah and Israel. Hezbollah has been firing rockets across the border daily, but in his speech, Nasrallah stopped short of committing to anything beyond its artillery exchanges with Israel. Nasrallah said that U.S. ships sent to the Mediterranean "_will not scare us_." In Beirut, celebratory gunshots rang out as thousands gathered to listen to [Nasrallah's speech](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0D1vgzAQxvFPY7ZD9tm8DQxd2NK1I7rgI7g6cGQ7Qemnr9K56_MsP_2_LvOFgoTj9kk7j2WNMy0lPHk2BhygnV3lx5UZ2VY8mnYYjEbbYLWNTY99v9oBnaFlbbuedGf7K2HLAxIuVRhRozVGOz00rrE1Ok2aXNM5vXiLVjnNPpSY6u8YjrLxKq_45FQvca9k3Eq5Z2U_FE4Kp_M868SPwim___cSk3iF0x68FwamXBROG_9cowhtIEyeE2R6ZdhopwxxKdAB5UwPKXBSBqM13Ek4l3AEOuAtBmNAW4VTlUZ_P4NIyG2nnL7tFOQPV_5N9RsAAP__97xpOA). In Gaza, however, [many were disappointed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFugzAQQL8GNqPz2YQweOiSLV07ogs-wrUXE2ELq_36qpm7Pr3h6X1cpyuJSrq_04NDWbaJ5iIHT9Yab9BNvo1hYUZ2LQd7GkcL6Hps10B9HKM73WBGf_ORhpkdDMMwMo_E_bmVgIDOWvAw9r53HXogIN8PHubo0DUeOErZ9u5zk1RWXvR7O3jv5u3RalhLeebGvTV4afBSa-0S11yZv_6EBi8r_9w2VVqNMkXezUo5UzKJ8k4vvpAoRxNZ5eDdPEk5F0lCKRt79nAGbPcQn1VUJZ-GxsP9QaKvgvLvj98AAAD__3IeYuE) that Nasrallah did not promise more aggressive action.
## Earthquake Rocks Nepal
At least 128 people died in Nepal when [an earthquake shook](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1yszAQAJ8GOjx3px-sQsXXuPPXpmQOdJhLZEFAsSdvn3HqlDtb7My-XYcra9Zy-893iXVeB56qPmRA7GxHZrBtirMIiWklog8BgYyjdokzMor1IXg_wtn3ATzMMJ7RgDGIY6uRgAwiWAjOOnMiCwxsXW9hSoZMY0GS1nU_va9a6iJz_l4fsp-m9d7muNS6HY3519CloQtvRZ7HS71grzplaehSZOPcaUnKpRPe6_L5xR_S2X6EkTxJQmbywfV0dikhO-dDmMd2j2l7as56-L6xcLuz5t9w_XPDTwAAAP__xRFbBQ) the western part of the country. The quake was felt 500 miles away in New Delhi, India, and it had a magnitude of 5.6. In the district of Jajarkot--the epicenter of the quake--92 people [have been confirmed dead,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DGTsyAQgOFfgx0OLCuRguJr7PK1VzoY1rh3iDkkOvn3N7n66rd55v24jtfAifP9f1jJ13kbw63yQaPWEiWYEZvoZyIg05DX1jmtwHTQLB4n64yLl6nvtZ2xc71B6oCUMzYG2zfsQYHRWqFyHXamBVRBBewuqG7RgBGoKHLdSvu5ca4Lzem1HVTa27Y2yS-1PnZh_gkYBAznebaFnpXK_u4Chum5c6Z9FzBQPrhseaVcBQyZHiHJhaucXtKipFDq8v0MXyRnSlVmOmWktLB8A6XWUhkBQ1N8fJycEu_2IlDd18Dp11L_PPMTAAD__9NhYyc) and another 55 people are injured. Earthquakes are common in Nepal, a mountainous country with a vulnerable infrastructure. [In 2015](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwjAQQL_G3ojOZ5uQwQNLNlg7Wpf4IFdMnBoX1L-v6Nzx6UlPeh-neCLJsl7PdOfQLiXS3OTJ0Zid26GNTqdwYUa2moPZD4MBtB71EnDqJ4DDsAdMaMDBwSD7qZ8mIkpm1hIQ0Jq3GrzztkMHBOR872BOFq1ywElaqd1nkbUtfMk_5cm1m8td57C0tj2UPSocFY68di-5ycZJqCv1qnB8s8LxuFXJEcH4eOaNcmSqbfn6phvrGtL2kpzlse-Vg-udJP_l27-zvwEAAP__u21VCg), a 7.8 magnitude earthquake killed 9,000 and damaged a million structures.
## Major Drug Bust in Connecticut
A drug task force raided a home in Burlington, CT, and [found $8.5 million](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0D2OpDAQQOHTmMzILhf9ExBsQtabboiMXYZaGRcC02huP-qJJ3_B0_fvNb48Zy7zX79SX5OMPlR-02itRg1uxCb2iQjINdTb2_NpDbgOmqW3YAHSY0rRoPVTROsB_XR_3BJNMWHDPRhw1ho0zw471wIabzx2dzQhOnAKDUWusrf_hUtdKOUvedPeBlmb3C-1bodyfxQMCobrutoyhSClUKgczvrJFAyFrkPBkCX4rGBYzpk050yzz3o9j2UXWfW8y8Vl1rLR7itL0UnOErWvejr3D0CVohdZSW-SOZCCwVk0-EAFQ7P3cbs4Zz5ud4VmXj3nn8v6q9l3AAAA__92pW9i) worth of illegal psychedelic mushrooms stored in doggie bags. The mushrooms contained psilocybin--a Schedule 1 controlled hallucinogenic. The house's 21 year-old resident was charged with operating a drug factory and intent to sell narcotics. Psilocybin is now legal in [several states](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7Fu7CAQAL8GOk7Lgm1RULzG3b02pYVhz94Em5Mhtu7vI13a1DPSaD7u0z1w5n35Hzby7VGmEBufNGmtrEIzWZn8gwjJSPK6d04Dmg7l6kNMQ5qToYi2790cXXQxDQAAupvnINkjoNEaLLjOduaGFgIE2w0WYjJohAVK3Mpx-yy8t5Ue-VVOOm6xbDL7tbVnFeafwFHgeHGls7RfKnCsLTRSR9i_eF-qwHH7rutRyqZyuKqaX-ptCBzl4dPz4py59oOwsGyB87vR_jz-CQAA__90KFhV) (or municipalities within the states), although California Governor Gavin Newsom recently [vetoed a bill](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2uozAQRp8GOkfjH0woKLZJl223RJPxGGZlY4R9E-Xtr3LrW376pKOj8---3FGS7OtfzDy3WBakJk9etFZOGbu4PsyR2bDtedZ-mjQYO5h-mz15C-gdAXkzXJkAHmMckNBEwhh7mQ0YqzU4mAY32ItxgIBuGB1QsMZ2DjhIK-flf5G9bRzTuzz5vFDJfZq31o7a2T-duXXmhsfOr_q5PuNsQok7czvqmzYOnISqyrgKqfxVt7OUXNVRJRV6P2RXKz5lVx9EyYowSSznLqhCBCSCEUIEH9j7K0c_IUbSUVvW_TmH4yUpSfVj52DNKOlHsP2a6zsAAP__am1tuA) that would have legalized the use of psychedelic mushrooms, saying that the state needed more regulation first.

The publisher says that Meadows violated its contract by writing false information. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFvwyAUBOBfAxsRPLCpB4Yu3tK1o_UMzzENDhbgRPn3lTt3Pum7031fpyvGFB-3L9zItSVP6Ft80qSUMAL0ZHhwCxGQ5uRUPwxKgu6Ar46sUh9WDTr0vQ9aY4cD2UWilr2lxfDoQIJWSho5dKbTFzASJZrOGumDBs2MpBBbLpefHB9tpSW985PKxeeNJ7e2tlemPxmMDMa20hpTOjMGY6HbkbDF_GAw-nyUJmZsLVFlMBoYoDdWbFjuYiMM-VVFPSiI-S3mnO9iP-YU60pFnH1iwVRJUCJ_isInjNsJ8eLC_oopxdpbZuRtw_i3gLd_v_oNAAD__82La6Y))
| Flying together with: [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhDAQRL9m6UDr3TV3LlxEQnSXKlJKZLB9OOIAgXNR_j5ylDLNjEYzxdO834abS0ta76_uEWyO2-CmnJ5hUKqWmniQytsYAgWuglWtMQqJNVWzbdV1lGC01qwn9FczRfHBiPMuBhzHKllCYqVQ0GjR3JCgQyf6Ijh5JgbB4FPejuZjS2ueQ1y-t2c4mml7VIudc95P4BegHqiPY7O6gra7PJcFUH_4Is0-78D9mTxwp_hKQO3-OQJ3JKgvDNROqqQ_mvqtj-k4c20QS0fAXXEG7qrD-v0rLUs62wsI3h8uLb88-d93fgIAAP__1i5eqg) It turns out, not getting deep sleep could take years off your life, but medications aren't the answer. A groundbreaking 2023 report found that of those getting a good night's sleep, _without the use of sleeping medications,_[life expectancy was 4.7 years greater](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhDAQRL9m6UDr3TV3LlxEQnSXKlJKZLB9OOIAgXNR_j5ylDLNjEYzxdO834abS0ta76_uEWyO2-CmnJ5hUKqWmniQytsYAgWuglWtMQqJNVWzbdV1lGC01qwn9FczRfHBiPMuBhzHKllCYqVQ0GjR3JCgQyf6Ijh5JgbB4FPejuZjS2ueQ1y-t2c4mml7VIudc95P4BegHqiPY7O6gra7PJcFUH_4Is0-78D9mTxwp_hKQO3-OQJ3JKgvDNROqqQ_mvqtj-k4c20QS0fAXXEG7qrD-v0rLUs62wsI3h8uLb88-d93fgIAAP__1i5eqg) for men, and 2.4 years greater for women! Big pharma **HATES** these kinds of studies which is likely why you haven't heard about it... And unfortunately, the length of your life isn't the only thing on the line... Not getting adequate sleep has been linked with:
* Memory loss
* Mood changes
* Weakened immune system
* High blood pressure
* Weight gain
* Low sex drive
* Increased risk of chronic disease
* Loss of balance and coordination

clean_body: In his first televised statement since Hamas' attack on October 7th, Hezbollah leader Hassan Nasrallah said that his forces are currently fighting on the Lebanon-Israel border and that the conflict may escalate into all-out war between Hezbollah and Israel. The storm has been downgraded to a Category 1 hurricane, but it still poses a level of threat rarely seen in places like Bangor, Maine. | | | | | | Saturday, November 4th, 2023 ---|--- Welcome to the weekend! On this day in 1922, Howard Carter began excavating the tomb of King Tutankhamun. It had been undisturbed for 3,000 years, hidden under the shifting desert sands. ( Thanks for reading along with us this week! If you have any feedback for us, just reply to this email or mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover If you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, you can take care of that . Don't forget to check out today's sponsor, ! | Hezbollah Threatens Israel In his first televised statement since Hamas' attack on October 7th, Hezbollah leader Hassan Nasrallah said that his forces are currently fighting on the Lebanon-Israel border and that the conflict between Hezbollah and Israel. Hezbollah has been firing rockets across the border daily, but in his speech, Nasrallah stopped short of committing to anything beyond its artillery exchanges with Israel. Nasrallah said that U.S. ships sent to the Mediterranean "will not scare us." In Beirut, celebratory gunshots rang out as thousands gathered to listen to . In Gaza, however, that Nasrallah did not promise more aggressive action. Earthquake Rocks Nepal At least 128 people died in Nepal when the western part of the country. The quake was felt 500 miles away in New Delhi, India, and it had a magnitude of 5.6. In the district of Jajarkot--the epicenter of the quake--92 people and another 55 people are injured. Earthquakes are common in Nepal, a mountainous country with a vulnerable infrastructure. , a 7.8 magnitude earthquake killed 9,000 and damaged a million structures. Major Drug Bust in Connecticut A drug task force raided a home in Burlington, CT, and worth of illegal psychedelic mushrooms stored in doggie bags. The mushrooms contained psilocybin--a Schedule 1 controlled hallucinogenic. The house's 21 year-old resident was charged with operating a drug factory and intent to sell narcotics. Psilocybin is now legal in (or municipalities within the states), although California Governor Gavin Newsom recently that would have legalized the use of psychedelic mushrooms, saying that the state needed more regulation first. () ➤ Former Trump Chief of Staff Mark Meadows is being sued by his book publisher after making statements before a grand jury that contradict his published version of events surrounding the 2020 election. The publisher says that Meadows violated its contract by writing false information. () | Flying together with: It turns out, not getting deep sleep could take years off your life, but medications aren't the answer. body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=512b5938219c4843ba92e3d69c8f17a3&_e=u5mQudsUcNGHE80JA23tlFG8yWn8sVE7FSuKx6B3awiGxJ_BK-6-a18ccPlvjSSGnYjfRpLzq6laH-9WagvJK9a9ojaruaGeJvhrfh-yAGqkO40Q4S0ltV1w8L006tfXt1g8u0wKtlOAIMbm9j1kHT3fdsEm1R9D3elqdIMgZGN6qZmZyrxfT2FFvJ0JlBhBnByoQHKqWdPYEILv9KE_XC6haYfscQk-2bTQwzDoiUGnZxSWERyGf927sOCQ3eTQgtM6nj1Gdm0OyrY0A1rN-uMMqYx4R8uRenIhDRfVtp0CarlE_hwYu2EMuS4ljJKF) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=512b5938219c4843ba92e3d69c8f17a3&_e=u5mQudsUcNGHE80JA23tlFG8yWn8sVE7FSuKx6B3awiGxJ_BK-6-a18ccPlvjSSGnYjfRpLzq6laH-9WagvJK9a9ojaruaGeJvhrfh-yAGqkO40Q4S0ltV1w8L006tfXt1g8u0wKtlOAIMbm9j1kHWw-lETgxVi-6g0LtlkymEA6_VYL09bX1OMyiuimZj0fN5sUWbNTjWyPCOm7HqNu2cF5C-_TvV1cIzl1VIxlmpwkbNaZ0tNRkVuhkwAbr6riq8uP2KdVaa5eQ-ORBtLTdUTsGQV6ZYTQATkN4zOhMR7qRYX2NsuKm-8Wr-eHJss-) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=512b5938219c4843ba92e3d69c8f17a3&_e=u5mQudsUcNGHE80JA23tlFG8yWn8sVE7FSuKx6B3awiGxJ_BK-6-a18ccPlvjSSGnYjfRpLzq6laH-9WagvJK9a9ojaruaGeJvhrfh-yAGqkO40Q4S0ltV1w8L006tfXt1g8u0wKtlOAIMbm9j1kHZjxZeM821VCvOuZf-9ZhWcHfjsBjyqZ6-oMG834-hBEM5BOcu2EF3jVxKJiEa-Xm3PxVTfVK5GRLh-UX_IvoHCDBwcjeJuTHeTUc-hNsoS27ilTFQ4cWecpoSswzqYPB7vE8IR4LMdLqy-XLm93MFD2BCLQbC4s1Rt_RogAz6VL). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=512b5938219c4843ba92e3d69c8f17a3&_e=u5mQudsUcNGHE80JA23tlFG8yWn8sVE7FSuKx6B3awiGxJ_BK-6-a18ccPlvjSSGnYjfRpLzq6laH-9WagvJK9a9ojaruaGeJvhrfh-yAGqkO40Q4S0ltV1w8L006tfXt1g8u0wKtlOAIMbm9j1kHdCZSzchBA8AHRIa7ffKXxFruG2OAD8cckKTsv6RyPRtdFJxTWONPzgL0tDQkn_XHYB2nARifAlk5RtsF8yzAM1K6Ouk4Q5v34kMZyd844ohyHNJXox_yelugHjM9gCaYCGXRqIQYRAsrUF7BKsLMYKkVyyfV3-IBjE8uleYQcQU)

name: Christine Drazan
subject: FWD: Measure 110 has proven to be a full-scale failure
body:
Friend,

The feedback we have received from this is incredible and we plan on submitting these signatures to Kotek’s Task Force on November 7th. However, we need just 500 more signatures before we can submit. If you haven’t had the opportunity yet, will you sign the petition today to repeal M110? [https://secure.anedot.com/a-new-direction/8302023_kotektaskforce_saandor/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=SA-Email&utm_campaign=&utm_content=Link]

1,500 of you joined our petition against the Board of Education, and now we need your help again. M110 is the cause of so many problems in Oregon, it’s time to repeal it.

Join me and hundreds of other Oregonians in the fight for our state, for our families, and for our lives. Sign the petition before we submit it to the Task Force. [https://secure.anedot.com/a-new-direction/8302023_kotektaskforce_saandor/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=SA-Email&utm_campaign=&utm_content=Link]

Thank you,

Christine Drazan

---------- Forwarded message ---------

From: Christine Drazan <info@anewdirection-or.com>

Date: Mon, Sep 18, 2023 at 5:25 PM

Subject: Measure 110 has proven to be a full-scale failure

To: Friend <dpwillis67@gmail.com>

Friend,

Recently, Governor Kotek assembled a task force to address the issues that continue to stymie the city of Portland—of which there are many. Missing from the discussion: addiction and the impact the decriminalization of hard drugs has had on all the others issues that plague our state’s biggest city.

We are launching a petition to urge Governor Kotek and the task force to prioritize responding to overwhelming data on overdose deaths and addiction rates by repealing Measure 110. [https://secure.anedot.com/a-new-direction/8302023_kotektaskforce_saandor/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=SA-Email&utm_campaign=&utm_content=Link]This measure decriminalized the possession of hard drugs, and it has left scars not just in Portland, but the entire state. SIGN THE PETITION HERE [https://secure.anedot.com/a-new-direction/8302023_kotektaskforce_saandor/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=SA-Email&utm_campaign=&utm_content=Link]

Measure 110 has proven to be a full-scale failure, leading to record addiction rates and a surge in tragic overdoses. It's time to address this issue and work toward a solution that focuses on prevention and truly helps Oregonians get clean and stay clean. [https://secure.anedot.com/a-new-direction/8302023_kotektaskforce_saandor/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=SA-Email&utm_campaign=&utm_content=Link]

By signing this petition [https://secure.anedot.com/a-new-direction/8302023_kotektaskforce_saandor/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=SA-Email&utm_campaign=&utm_content=Link], you are making sure Kotek and the task force don’t ignore the real problem. The challenges facing Portland are significant but for the City of Roses to bloom again we must repeal Measure 110.

Thank you,

Christine Drazan
