Peter,

As much as I don’t like writing this note, I hate failing even more. And that’s what happened in October. When my team and I pulled the numbers this morning, we weren’t surprised we didn’t reach our overall October goal but were still deeply disappointed.

I get it, there are a lot of folks asking you to give money right now. But there are only a handful of campaigns that truly need the help - **mine is one of them.**

_**Jon Tester and his Democrat allies have already raised more than $15 million and already spent more than $1 million dragging me through the mud.**_

I only have one year to get my operation fully funded–practically no time at all. Jon Tester has a 17-year head start on me, plenty of wealthy Democrats on the liberal coasts to pump millions into his campaign, and a huge lead on the small-dollar front, too.

Please, **[help me out.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d0e501abf3dd4796af00b9651e978923&_e=gj82ROhHsK6SVyqQyCwcx0hPIkWpmoUBTe-bMBduUBS-xnncDBg7PMpZE61ke48pc0Z8XcLU6ff4baFOsfHFVrYQrsl5hfRN8xTGM8cE0agM1WYpN8suRYNxhgVOokKj4hIxoOr0yWlM1ZMv897CCDW50HrBk9g0m7cM932ZcV5W01FNuQqm-zJcVR3LtJE3z2RZqxE_3NqcOGAtcnKLwTl40FLOTeOuMq9lPJd8Jh3TfoioRii3ZjriKh6XyFoVPxyFdlQRLpyXUxaojdl8-BFO8L89Lqbj2SUzbppCctaClf2QABlDbeQTXl_kxc_DpPF-xEwkCy2v00oLQtZGWIoqNaxG9fuQfPAqErVZpe1NlUx32gjdEoTMWxCTyhVwTUmyCHleRSkS9zh1FbJ7YxBBgz5CVEcZhPTXBoH6luk%3D)**

Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
clean_body: We fell short of our October fundraising goal. I’m asking for you to make an emergency contribution now. | | Peter, As much as I don’t like writing this note, I hate failing even more. And that’s what happened in October. When my team and I pulled the numbers this morning, we weren’t surprised we didn’t reach our overall October goal but were still deeply disappointed. I get it, there are a lot of folks asking you to give money right now. But there are only a handful of campaigns that truly need the help - mine is one of them. Jon Tester and his Democrat allies have already raised more than $15 million and already spent more than $1 million dragging me through the mud. I only have one year to get my operation fully funded–practically no time at all. Jon Tester has a 17-year head start on me, plenty of wealthy Democrats on the liberal coasts to pump millions into his campaign, and a huge lead on the small-dollar front, too. Please, For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:

Hey Friend,

We're preparing all week. We're giving it all we've got. The next Republican presidential debate is next Wednesday, and we are counting on YOU to help us go into it with every ounce of momentum we can earn.

Ron DeSantis will not back down on that stage. We need your support now.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c120939cda88ed9657397453c4fa0b1a6ca96ecc9966c708588b85e042ead968dec673452febbbb58fc82c336bd1e34d0b7fbceadea6eee4668b5beb0cf6dd3d
Will you help us hit our goal of earning $100,000 in donations before the big night?

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c120939cda88ed9657397453c4fa0b1a6ca96ecc9966c708588b85e042ead968dec673452febbbb58fc82c336bd1e34d0b7fbceadea6eee4668b5beb0cf6dd3d
Team DeSantis

Subject: Who's taking the stage in less than a week?

Friend,

Taking the stage once again...

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c120939cda88ed9657397453c4fa0b1a6ca96ecc9966c708588b85e042ead968dec673452febbbb58fc82c336bd1e34d0b7fbceadea6eee4668b5beb0cf6dd3d

The third GOP debate is coming up on November 8th at 8 PM ET — and we will be sending over all the information you need to tune in next week.

But right now, we have one favor to ask of you.

We're looking for our strongest showing support of support before the Miami debate. Florida is DeSantis country, and we're ready to show the nation just how strong this campaign is.

Ron DeSantis is the only candidate who has the capability to:

✔︎ Stand up for your economic freedom

✔︎ Cut through the childish attacks

✔︎ Win

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c120939cda88ed967312dc1471816e92a4738b8a05bef7762f0336888eccce0c8b1dbc86dc027d78cbe6ac4133d8ec04fc54fa931a35947de7e936c65e55f271
Give a gift of support! Rush in $15 now!

We are just ONE WEEK OUT from another game-changing night, and the Governor needs to know you'll be with him every step of the way.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c120939cda88ed9657397453c4fa0b1a6ca96ecc9966c708588b85e042ead968dec673452febbbb58fc82c336bd1e34d0b7fbceadea6eee4668b5beb0cf6dd3d
Could you help us get ready for the big night?

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c120939cda88ed96fe0a8ae97a585d59112961ddd9a67c1b5d6f4cb549d037cad888e114e6cfc95f47b44f3986d388d86e4627ff1b38278b8685d095f628631c

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c120939cda88ed9621cba4b01fffae2cc6395881761a1fcf58c7e9cec14e28cdfe1ca238dbb585956a64fcb7dfe5f8c4cfddc7f44287015370bbb91c7a2172ca
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c120939cda88ed963a82acc39ef4dc2f05dd4c345fd147f8a9a607129e2f65dd9818b996bd01d2b00f1d97ef99a243bfea949d9e27d5b862f66ab49430642af8
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c120939cda88ed9657397453c4fa0b1a6ca96ecc9966c708588b85e042ead968dec673452febbbb58fc82c336bd1e34d0b7fbceadea6eee4668b5beb0cf6dd3d

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c120939cda88ed9657397453c4fa0b1a6ca96ecc9966c708588b85e042ead968dec673452febbbb58fc82c336bd1e34d0b7fbceadea6eee4668b5beb0cf6dd3d

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Praying for our country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
It's no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

|
[ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4971c036b55c4e40832edfaa53cced50&_e=1sKTqVNVPmXUg4hKxAvBz6zVHdaTS_sXZTxUC5SyvhNYZNHaj63jGEP0XyuSdBfcBpw9WoWxRqmjbZJK63KCxRGkFEy08EhkjdlmumweVtJgk2GPJUJoCF97pW-9P6l8WTDgO_S4YQ_7inf9WDMI7vNldrQPQOScroWh7bcWu_5tulnt2NasCfR1CaDR8hQVaWbNLmF9NdAibAU2wl2-7XE-tXMzxw14X19rN9BOFttZcZvwKQKHOZho5GrxPGK2pbbultDbAm4nckaZJISaauuE-OU_KBgjBB4A5KOBY0NjST9-EObjGp6PXCe-rSoZLke9yG1IGLVp4gn6vxC8jkmuIhLF2N8atMEUtLZyRTgz_y_I6O3XbFg4nAKtQ1eT)
---
[ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4971c036b55c4e40832edfaa53cced50&_e=1sKTqVNVPmXUg4hKxAvBz6zVHdaTS_sXZTxUC5SyvhNYZNHaj63jGEP0XyuSdBfcBpw9WoWxRqmjbZJK63KCxRGkFEy08EhkjdlmumweVtJgk2GPJUJoCF97pW-9P6l8WTDgO_S4YQ_7inf9WDMI7vNldrQPQOScroWh7bcWu_5tulnt2NasCfR1CaDR8hQVaWbNLmF9NdAibAU2wl2-7XE-tXMzxw14X19rN9BOFtvQvwVkpfs-nlGHaEh6vY-DQdXPsSWkHvR5DYr9ECgM7FPQBUOma-MOBy374ry-VCXXsC1Y0VTDRJqPARwFDoqujRxl__91MtlDp3YCL8ivCInzuv0MVNKWUrk5AEpLwpTmYLhRPqBS7FFYR7xQERew)

Fellow American - I know God is not done with America yet.

It's no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government.

The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic.

Like so many American households through the generations, in our house, we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

I know our country is in desperate need of prayer.

[**Today I am asking if you share my faith in God and for the future of our nations, you'll join us.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4971c036b55c4e40832edfaa53cced50&_e=1sKTqVNVPmXUg4hKxAvBz6zVHdaTS_sXZTxUC5SyvhNYZNHaj63jGEP0XyuSdBfcBpw9WoWxRqmjbZJK63KCxRGkFEy08EhkjdlmumweVtJgk2GPJUJoCF97pW-9P6l8WTDgO_S4YQ_7inf9WDMI7vNldrQPQOScroWh7bcWu_5tulnt2NasCfR1CaDR8hQVaWbNLmF9NdAibAU2wl2-7XE-tXMzxw14X19rN9BOFtspK-CA08QdlzbXpH_g4fUo9kFkLLmTvfapQ4GMZpuJiSURQHvvR6h_sDPJuUiUSQFcwKCFusjsxr2jseY6kzB1gcOKBfVEBzFPRfRBfHWkWaA-tq3xHOE6DGmgQIHSlfJXxpjHaPxyBuwp_DD9UxU-)

[**We cannot allow the radical Left to destroy the ideals our country was founded on. Please join me if you agree that we need to stand up for our Republic.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4971c036b55c4e40832edfaa53cced50&_e=1sKTqVNVPmXUg4hKxAvBz6zVHdaTS_sXZTxUC5SyvhNYZNHaj63jGEP0XyuSdBfcBpw9WoWxRqmjbZJK63KCxRGkFEy08EhkjdlmumweVtJgk2GPJUJoCF97pW-9P6l8WTDgO_S4YQ_7inf9WDMI7vNldrQPQOScroWh7bcWu_5tulnt2NasCfR1CaDR8hQVaWbNLmF9NdAibAU2wl2-7XE-tXMzxw14X19rN9BOFttxltTD-_L4shNIBtsnpTf_uqmZyrPz-5rHqRWfineUJvnpqf5HAnmQPvid7IToT4rPnVNxEbmmtUVjK288W8a8JfZ3ot29GPZWdP-djmq_8iexsi0WcTjDdbbRw6bQeBF1CrFbOesoMXgEEmEOJXJ_)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4971c036b55c4e40832edfaa53cced50&_e=1sKTqVNVPmXUg4hKxAvBz6zVHdaTS_sXZTxUC5SyvhNYZNHaj63jGEP0XyuSdBfcBpw9WoWxRqmjbZJK63KCxRGkFEy08EhkjdlmumweVtJgk2GPJUJoCF97pW-9P6l8WTDgO_S4YQ_7inf9WDMI7vNldrQPQOScroWh7bcWu_5tulnt2NasCfR1CaDR8hQVaWbNLmF9NdAibAU2wl2-7XE-tXMzxw14X19rN9BOFttBRQGqmPvakZIqfDzfWF_ijQw4qJa-ctiVmpn9xJtmnQTwA9ZiTpJGd294QyS6JDQ2ek79JBgkTDICsbRiV9YWMCkYV_iWXhBIB9ArcvhEC-muxKKzp_zazbhgVYtT4HGffOTX06kJSlLBkVSVKPTY)

God bless,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The Truth about America’s Christian heritage
body:
Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672170%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7Km24EGMpZMYFa3nJJAtnw&sysid=1)
---
Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

I’ve written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: _America Is a Christian Nation_. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves. The book is a short read, accompanied by beautiful patriotic photos that I think you’ll appreciate.
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672171%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bS4nDtZOmrkHUUOrEghrnA&sysid=1)
---
| | I would love for you to read this book and discover the truth about our nation’s Christian heritage. And as a token of our appreciation for a gift to Pathway to Victory, we’ll not only send you this book, but also a brand new CD featuring some of our nation’s most patriotic songs from First Baptist Dallas’ renowned choir and orchestra. [https://secure.ptv.org/america-is-a-christian-nation-generous-kit-2](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672172%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oMqhWUc3eLv8Myia6Eyqgg&sysid=1)

As believers, we must preserve America’s unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms. By understanding our nation’s Christian roots, we can work to bring our country back to its founding principles. At the end of my book, I provide suggestions for how to do just that.

I hope you’ll consider donating to _Pathway to Victory_ and receiving your copy of _America Is a Christian Nation_ so you can know without a doubt that the foundation of our country was solidly established in the principles of the Bible.

Gratefully,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

American Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Big tech: Your opinion needed
body:
Over the past few months, the extremism of the political Left's agenda has become clear

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0de19be6cb824ea199d9a96809f8cafd&_e=VAXU8UIJBTpK5RYrot2ijAEcIaDWzRgLNnaw9aHpAnSXIVFKq9rwJ23PfNW00EbAdwHMEKXWkzEVACBjTtZpqJVGkWUHFxNGce6TDXUX7BOY95m5iVrc96n_Uyu4AZZSykA0nLjGvz4c3ySMXBFBdwRU0YP1nnyX7DztA4CKZvYCqd2uZDQ7o_-41yMYW6GQldaewF8cItrwFkRb5oq7BxANspc-8Mr1JNDV3Q95RJLpuCbFdbjtQNhSVvfhvzrXCYT2KTwmklzUP3ShjYZ5m1C3qOS3-UypAUoCB_B4KLHxD7IeYS2c97lzpRi4HB-wlyIfUBc6y6FjsLBUdCOTzeLQnAjcWIciznOLkHH78krkIfAiMAehmrnInbB5IVWi) Dear Fellow American, Over the past few months, the extremism of the political Left's agenda has become clear through the actions of the mainstream media and Big Tech companies like X, formerly known as Twitter, and Amazon. Together, these forces are working to**suppress conservative speech and political activity** , denying First Amendment rights to their political opponents--and denying access to conservative opinion and important news stories to the American people. Conservatives (including the former President of the United States) are increasingly being "de-platformed" by companies like X. Amazon is refusing to sell books questioning the transgender revolution--it even took down an award-winning documentary video on the life of Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas! A major publishing company, Simon and Schuster, bowed to pressure and canceled plans to publish a book on the danger of Big Tech by U.S. Senator Josh Hawley. **We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America.** **That's why I am asking you to take a Hillsdale College NATIONAL SURVEY ON THE THREAT OF BIG TECH.**

## How concerned are you about Big Tech's ability to censor content, "deplatform" users, and push a false and dishonest narrative about what's happening in America today?
[Not concerned at all](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0de19be6cb824ea199d9a96809f8cafd&_e=VAXU8UIJBTpK5RYrot2ijAEcIaDWzRgLNnaw9aHpAnSXIVFKq9rwJ23PfNW00EbAdwHMEKXWkzEVACBjTtZpqJVGkWUHFxNGce6TDXUX7BOY95m5iVrc96n_Uyu4AZZSykA0nLjGvz4c3ySMXBFBdwRU0YP1nnyX7DztA4CKZvYCqd2uZDQ7o_-41yMYW6GQldaewF8cItrwFkRb5oq7BxANspc-8Mr1JNDV3Q95RJJvltZn9usCjTw538rlVL8ggksSFa_PfEWQbGjEgUmw4kLp7N4T-9E5vJaUj_DosAoodxHGCF-rsaTFswgUetN-NRLM9FE6xzPIzE9O3cDxwHPV6mOolv47-e46DN-6EBbDcPOe6ovY3YvTDhCKdosY) [Somewhat concerned](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0de19be6cb824ea199d9a96809f8cafd&_e=VAXU8UIJBTpK5RYrot2ijAEcIaDWzRgLNnaw9aHpAnSXIVFKq9rwJ23PfNW00EbAdwHMEKXWkzEVACBjTtZpqJVGkWUHFxNGce6TDXUX7BOY95m5iVrc96n_Uyu4AZZSykA0nLjGvz4c3ySMXBFBdwRU0YP1nnyX7DztA4CKZvYCqd2uZDQ7o_-41yMYW6GQldaewF8cItrwFkRb5oq7BxANspc-8Mr1JNDV3Q95RJLzpuppEm6rNrdciu960uJFG7Qgnh8C1GaHqluRFHGHPkaEC3I7BfqRqVgD6QeXHDn_n2GCdKGA2q0-0J5bInqxl9sOOa1NgO0WFFg30zdho5LlZEREL-LdjWwKFYNGmVuKrG4tltOifNiG3y37n_CD) [Very concerned](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0de19be6cb824ea199d9a96809f8cafd&_e=VAXU8UIJBTpK5RYrot2ijAEcIaDWzRgLNnaw9aHpAnSXIVFKq9rwJ23PfNW00EbAdwHMEKXWkzEVACBjTtZpqJVGkWUHFxNGce6TDXUX7BOY95m5iVrc96n_Uyu4AZZSykA0nLjGvz4c3ySMXBFBdwRU0YP1nnyX7DztA4CKZvYCqd2uZDQ7o_-41yMYW6GQldaewF8cItrwFkRb5oq7BxANspc-8Mr1JNDV3Q95RJIyRcIdXxll2_OsbvENsw8bXxOWSbLjmepgAVKRW-nMAY6ClpGYXulnPOgm3HzwAQiRO83tTGa5sVAw9q9qLn41h1YimN9T1Dwjra_vr2znnhV7nLyNzr9KIHFbm6yw3TyBoZmrvxdLTpv1Qcewl7SX) By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans on this critical issue--information that will strengthen Hillsdale's nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty...efforts we will continue to expand despite the opposition of Big Tech. Fellow American, you can complete the NATIONAL SURVEY ON THE THREAT OF BIG TECH by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-tech-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0de19be6cb824ea199d9a96809f8cafd&_e=VAXU8UIJBTpK5RYrot2ijAEcIaDWzRgLNnaw9aHpAnSXIVFKq9rwJ23PfNW00EbAdwHMEKXWkzEVACBjTtZpqJVGkWUHFxNGce6TDXUX7BOY95m5iVrc96n_Uyu4AZZSykA0nLjGvz4c3ySMXBFBdwRU0YP1nnyX7DztA4CKZvYCqd2uZDQ7o_-41yMYW6GQldaewF8cItrwFkRb5oq7BxANspc-8Mr1JNDV3Q95RJLrj8ZEO1CPQd9y0TroTuBtMc6xrKilrk4LuDodLMhRN7swcM8svlnvTzQPuiFJVR2wiHnC3ffCU9qmyocJOCv4W7uA3ohvJhna84fDybhtp4xMEiMOZFSGhh5TdsWZw8ddLoQmzpHIqVCTrkz73NBy)** In the late 1960s, radicals who scorned America and its founding principles began moving into our colleges and universities. It took them several decades to cement their dominance, but we see the fruits of their labors today: we see it in the media, and we see it in Silicon Valley. We also see it in professional sports, in corporate America--much of which is now capitulating to far-Left demands--and increasingly, we see it in K-12 education. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I always tell people there is a way to fight this threat, despite how uphill the fight may seem.** A vital part of the fight--and one in which Hillsdale College is uniquely able to lead--is to **reach** and **teach** additional millions of citizens with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty.** ** As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulation. But it also means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **NATIONAL SURVEY ON THE THREAT OF BIG TECH** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-tech-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0de19be6cb824ea199d9a96809f8cafd&_e=VAXU8UIJBTpK5RYrot2ijAEcIaDWzRgLNnaw9aHpAnSXIVFKq9rwJ23PfNW00EbAdwHMEKXWkzEVACBjTtZpqJVGkWUHFxNGce6TDXUX7BOY95m5iVrc96n_Uyu4AZZSykA0nLjGvz4c3ySMXBFBdwRU0YP1nnyX7DztA4CKZvYCqd2uZDQ7o_-41yMYW6GQldaewF8cItrwFkRb5oq7BxANspc-8Mr1JNDV3Q95RJIDIjyKaHARNhQJVQExMfk484zpF4riCRfFJNF50zrTJxjrZrkhW06ASap-mX1_vTJW0ANqRzPVK-BITVcwD0vG6ql6BvfNfVny3FRn_DYRH1cTy-xeRh61Ou_gxB7Rx-EZ9nFJznG1naP51d8Ikcmp)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I deeply appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. America is at a point where the far-Left, with the help of its media and Big Tech allies, is **openly suppressing** conservative speech and political activity, **denying** First Amendment rights to their political opponents--and **denying access** to conservative opinion and important news stories to the American people. Please help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans on this issue by completing the **NATIONAL SURVEY ON THE THREAT OF BIG TECH **using the secure link I've provided for you below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-tech-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0de19be6cb824ea199d9a96809f8cafd&_e=VAXU8UIJBTpK5RYrot2ijAEcIaDWzRgLNnaw9aHpAnSXIVFKq9rwJ23PfNW00EbAdwHMEKXWkzEVACBjTtZpqJVGkWUHFxNGce6TDXUX7BOY95m5iVrc96n_Uyu4AZZSykA0nLjGvz4c3ySMXBFBdwRU0YP1nnyX7DztA4CKZvYCqd2uZDQ7o_-41yMYW6GQldaewF8cItrwFkRb5oq7BxANspc-8Mr1JNDV3Q95RJKjIuoqC8IHiff6WpyeaK7KoUmT4AAyFbKRUnL65nHeO2CvTA36LkyMP0v_K78bNNlIqfBBawOcY8sfBwx2D7DvQZj0Lnf2woa_iMmvIJeEvpDCvYQMesaO037htTQOaD-DNNNJvXVS5oaDCMxkZ6u6)** Your answers will help strengthen our educational outreach efforts that **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty--and about the duty of each generation to defend liberty and pass it on to their children and grandchildren. |

subject: Birthday match

body:
I need your help on my birthday sending a present to my greatest mentor, teacher, and role-model.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Birthday.png]
DONATE $3.90 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrewforbob?express_lane=true&amount=3.90&refcode=express_lane_3.90]

DONATE $39 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrewforbob?express_lane=true&amount= 39&refcode=express_lane_39]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.
As I turn 39 today, I find myself thinking about the future - a future I strongly believe my dad, Bob Lorinser, can help shape for the better.
My dad has taken the brave step of running for Congress. Throughout his life, he has consistently demonstrated a deep commitment to progressive ideals I hold dear.
His passion for Medicare for All, sustainability, and economic equality are just a few of the reasons I am so proud to call him my dad. He's a fighter for the working class; my peers very close to me.
I’ve been involved in politics in Michigan for just under a decade, and I’ve never seen a more qualified principled leader run for Congress here. We must get him elected!
The Lessons of my Father >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrewforbob]
His campaign is about so much more than simply winning an election. It's about creating a more inclusive, equitable, and sustainable future for all of us.
I invite you to join me in celebrating not just another year of my life, but also my dad's bravery and tenacity in running for Congress.
In honor of my 39th birthday, would you consider making a donation to his campaign? A contribution of $3.90, $13.90, $39.00, or even $390 can make a real difference.
You'll be playing a crucial role in helping us shape a better future.
Thank you!
Best,
Andrew Lorinser

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91ebb012e51f4a2299e8f32269212410&_e=rNZVz40-S6JgGjC06uZna1-SPBYN6Pp0JwvQGQsZl1rj1bQ92G2HPBSf5jV-5iaH9LBxUje8r0bz09gGbQSsSItr76-Svq-i2gUjKpdoJwD1aoSp_S41ZQ-UVdFj1CXKY_2V3Cf8clSDX3JKy33EsvaY_J7boWBHf6tQGK_PU23qFXY_maldatRxn0QyFgeBIH2GNHVWWmha-CIfJ3YZTgtYh7V5pdzwmUjUQJ90gz-zMfAR1CRoG0aQ9zBeyd2r0eWhXUNnmh8Oc4d-zv_UzitMj85pQSwJehg5vYm6a7Q3XSHXpNbfr5Xe0S4fqBNr). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91ebb012e51f4a2299e8f32269212410&_e=rNZVz40-S6JgGjC06uZna1-SPBYN6Pp0JwvQGQsZl1rj1bQ92G2HPBSf5jV-5iaH9LBxUje8r0bz09gGbQSsSItr76-Svq-i2gUjKpdoJwD1aoSp_S41ZQ-UVdFj1CXKY_2V3Cf8clSDX3JKy33EsoU62G-zlrmYTlDXpgNPyHqzogUpx6nHQsI5ffe97lpaxmWQkID88rGrYAETFLK6T8_XWNsr99ZOE3I5EFrQJIdqlPwTcdsM6H4XBjXYCjuOUSWib1bFKDbDiwzc593X4fvn3lpPY1fwC-MXhrJZR4bjTErZM5XtN7KsMFc3nCv1) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91ebb012e51f4a2299e8f32269212410&_e=rNZVz40-S6JgGjC06uZna1-SPBYN6Pp0JwvQGQsZl1rj1bQ92G2HPBSf5jV-5iaH9LBxUje8r0bz09gGbQSsSItr76-Svq-i2gUjKpdoJwD1aoSp_S41ZQ-UVdFj1CXKY_2V3Cf8clSDX3JKy33EsorbENwq9WG9O0sgbTBoqIcWU1E_8xGnQIHDB3ho0QX0AoO7rr9t7k7Jx-_q4Kwykuo7fmQcUcXoYEUdtRo9Kt2CiW5k-azSbhnoUu9zA4vYrx7s_IkeyqlkFEyntmn6P2PZdFwHgRipUrj_yUZ83XM3ShV8eKew1ImDHII53uoI) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Conservative Intel
subject: The history of capitalism and socialism
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsHW9YpiLN

Over the last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have
provided the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions,
of political and...

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osHW9YpiLN

Dear
Friend,
Over the
last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have provided
the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions, of
political and economic freedom. In the past few years, we've seen
a growing trend among young Americans in favor of socialism and
against capitalism.

But do
they truly understand the history and outcomes of socialism and
capitalism?

This is
precisely why we put together this brand new eBook, The History
Of Socialism And Capitalism, from Hoover Institution senior
fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This
eBook consists of two papers-one from each scholar-written in
conjunction with The Human Prosperity Project on Socialism and
Free-Market Capitalism. This project provides objective and
scholarly analyses of free-market capitalism, socialism, and
hybrid systems and provides evidence on the effectiveness of the
various systems on outcomes that affect prosperity and
well-being.

I think
you will find this new eBook particularly important and timely,
given the recent interest in policies that are radical from a US
historical perspective, some of which are advocated by political
leaders.

Simply
click here to request your free copy of The History Of Socialism
And Capitalism.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: 21 species extinct
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2098163?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **_BREAKING NEWS:_ 21 endangered species now EXTINCT despite ESA protections! Tell the Fish and Wildlife service to increase funding for protecting endangered animals! >> [Sign the petition!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2098164?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** Hawaii birds were among those hit hardest. Several bird species – including the Kauai thrush and Molokai creeper – are extinct. These birds were listed as endangered before extinction, **but federal protections arrived too late** to reverse declines and save these species. This is a wakeup call, Friend. The Fish and Wildlife Service must increase its Endangered Species Act budget and resources to help save endangered animals and protect their habitats from greedy developers. [**Sign the petition to PROTECT wildlife, their habitat, and public lands. Increase funding for the Endangered Species Act! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2098165?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ***Your Signature is Missing*** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2098166?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The ESA is critical for protecting public lands and our climate – it’s not just animals. Many endangered species live in areas that need to be protected from oil and gas developers. Safeguarding the Endangered Species Act can also help protect **species’ habitats, public lands, and the people who live nearby from toxic fossil fuel pollution.**
It’s too late for these 21 species. But it’s not too late to protect animals like the **grizzly bears and gray wolves who are under threat _right now._ We need YOUR help before it is too late! [Will you tell the Fish and Wildlife Service to increase funding for the ESA?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2098167?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2098168?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Raena Garcia
Senior Fossil Fuel and Lands Campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|

Friend,

The race for President is NECK AND NECK. _**[The question is: Who will be our Party 's Vice Presidential nominee?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bbd28fb7ee1c43498bbe9a6ff51b4bc2&_e=c3hevJrlvVWdWrhMK4L6fwsBie91PZC48lI68Ul0eaYNMx1ekK6Hh7ZFMN06T_7wWYeBXnLHqEvxT7LaMouScFABNw9PxAJc6olLTsiT2FhnP7Nxnd8knzN3koHg81pao82RcDEoKucj5gHDpJHoGzGcNrLRHRF0RRpah2zHFYbthYEG3w6do-Y3-af4lqYkdlzxhh6bS3mak5mL6rQ3GV8PP4XamjJcUe4amOPdMoz641uSCVjkGokaiWYPI8KBeMIwv-9QYXPZBcXkZxFx25B0G2uOUcoU3jaE-r5jMvIPF7BnURE6mq2d9bHq7ky6c4unBalbfDzBWFrxp8pEPhesx4f3-5J-dBhhXyKF6EdnVFHU27iLONtWHXif1ISgNm3dMdALEZqmcJjpgto3nyQ6VSIOS59pZrec34er_XSVyYt2NI4p1pENOc6JyrPEEMr4tFmzSUJa28KrX80AuGmuop-ccrk0huAl8wRKXcE%3D)**_
Our country needs a Vice President who is a TRUE CONSERVATIVE ready to step in and lead at a moment's notice -- someone who is LOYAL to the President and the American people.

Selecting the right Vice President is one of the _MOST IMPORTANT DECISIONS_ that a candidate ever has to make. We want YOU to help make the decision, Friend.

**[Take part in our first-ever VICE PRESIDENT POLL to help select the Republican nominee for Vice President.>>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bbd28fb7ee1c43498bbe9a6ff51b4bc2&_e=c3hevJrlvVWdWrhMK4L6fwsBie91PZC48lI68Ul0eaYNMx1ekK6Hh7ZFMN06T_7wWYeBXnLHqEvxT7LaMouScFABNw9PxAJc6olLTsiT2FhnP7Nxnd8knzN3koHg81pao82RcDEoKucj5gHDpJHoGzGcNrLRHRF0RRpah2zHFYbthYEG3w6do-Y3-af4lqYkdlzxhh6bS3mak5mL6rQ3GV8PP4XamjJcUe4amOPdMoz641uSCVjkGokaiWYPI8KBeMIwv-9QYXPZBcXkZxFx25B0G2uOUcoU3jaE-r5jMvIPF7BnURE6mq2d9bHq7ky6c4unBalbfDzBWFrxp8pEPgKav6F3n3h_KbQD4iNiDDxEzqwD-3uCrbq_qDXK3r8dZeYTLY947YBaLK1v0hx4QSD00hzyYc-PZrLvl2bi76sKuraQsB0DazSncJGOJa8wwT1lwN73NItNSmTrk8ZZ9vQb-enQqTdtgPxwjK8ZJus%3D)**

| | | | | | | Exciting news, ...

Our friends at _Tactical USA_ have some big changes in store for their company...

Which is why they’re running a **[RARE Giveaway on their best selling “invisible” Ankle Holsters.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3644/6374453/b76acd74c84651588de62d8547a93099defbd06e/2cd86ad844a1a94d320a1cfe1860446d6f2cc282)**

Normally, these holsters cost $30...

But to clear room for new products, **[they’re giving you one today for nothing but the cost of stamps.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3644/6374453/b76acd74c84651588de62d8547a93099defbd06e/2cd86ad844a1a94d320a1cfe1860446d6f2cc282)**

You want this holster.

It’s incredibly comfortable...

Has an ambidextrous design (right or left-handed)...

It fits 99% of modern handguns...

And it’s so good at concealing firearms... ** _it’ll make even large frame pistols disappear in plain sight._**

Plus, the fact [you can get one for $0.00](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3644/6374453/b76acd74c84651588de62d8547a93099defbd06e/2cd86ad844a1a94d320a1cfe1860446d6f2cc282) is another big selling point. ;)

Like I said...

This holster is Free for you today.

You just need to act before this liquidation giveaway closes... which I’m told could be in 12 hours (or sooner, if they run out before then).

[So grab your FREE Ankle Holster now](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3644/6374453/b76acd74c84651588de62d8547a93099defbd06e/2cd86ad844a1a94d320a1cfe1860446d6f2cc282), before they’re gone.

Thank You.

name: Your America
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
Your leadership and knowledge are needed today...

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35075%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0xM636cpVXIL3%2bExx6BHqA&sysid=1)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. You are an informed citizen--I believe that wholeheartedly. You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren’t afraid to stand up for America’s founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. _**[Your leadership and knowledge are needed today ...](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35076%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6AuG%2b1qpdBhTISUGyfyaKg&sysid=1)**_

## Do you believe it is important for Americans to have basic knowledge of American history and civics, including knowledge about the Constitution?
[Yes](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35077%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=T5Oo%2beiYV9To4Sm1a1SFPw&sysid=1) [No](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35078%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z7sZvoyO5yI7wXTh9%2fk6dw&sysid=1) [Not Sure / Don't Know](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35079%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yyeG7f3PqeSPotnfxXXVQQ&sysid=1)
We need more citizens like you--_informed citizens_ --because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism. The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can’t let that happen! That’s why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our nationwide initiative--the **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS**. We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand
* WHAT the Constitution says;
* HOW it relates to current issues and events; and
* WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty.

If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed. These are young people that “educators” deliberately deceived or who just haven’t learned about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable. ** That’s because we’re seeking _1,000 people_ in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to _10,000,000 Americans_ , and this initiative starts with you--YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what’s best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education **today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email! [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35070%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HYZIxlXYxFybatFlmJj8og&sysid=1) For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c9567%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=lsSW7AD6bUiG%2fFGe7T9ejQ&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35071%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=08zMkD4su9TTNu7ynlAcpw&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35072%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OwGywvf2zQDa33PvVVfVFw&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c9567%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=lsSW7AD6bUiG%2fFGe7T9ejQ&sysid=1)

name: Ryan Zinke, US Navy SEAL ret
subject: I will not fail.

body:
Becoming a Navy SEAL was not easy, but it taught me...

|
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e586e2afa9ca4144b9dd8c8e21682b5c&_e=eMnF1uwbZv9qvsUr7cWyt9QbK3GuXPZ5x3P-z7jaJ3LH-8yoIsdLQgwAWqy8w7e16ltCfaKagVSDFbhkKhRtYQGrFYCh-w0Dc0HbselH64UY_qcSNKu6Gq_Mr2TNB5AU5E38qgrCqrADGlKol_UZM1_x61hIBtkUHlaNZb1paGol0orN6fKo93bcyxrksTzMmlYejlIw9SfcuLNEU3a8r-vHO7kq8a2icT6DREZpiY3xiC08NP4MDRm4XCIcCt4qYU3i_rFqoSKQMOVO-EjOVFOhZ2OeGOpzTOi1sQS9p_Y5Qz7xzHZvbqO5-K5EfxZNf1gzuUEL_XpshwGbjYzkzYVGVOnQNu_GSe2TB-6jQuRgIDwK3YTrs9xJpwf-sgn3frrPnyTRmZa3uh9FuAQmijqSJxl0OUzF-_Z0z5CfzCgzAqiYYyfUnI-beJchx8dTWfCEJD8UaABqlT7_lrx45Q%3D%3D)
---

Friend,

**This is retired Naval Warfare Officer Ryan Zinke.** I've dedicated my life to serving this country, first as a Navy SEAL, then as Secretary of the Interior under President Trump, and now as a member of Congress.

We have an opportunity in 2024 to save the country that I swore to lay my life down for. **Our homeland is worth defending.** We have a duty to step up and put our nation back on the right track.

_When I was at Basic Underwater Demolition/SEAL (BUD/S), where I trained to become a Navy SEAL - there 's a bell. This may seem insignificant, a simple brass ship bell; however, it represents so much more. Its distracting presence loomed over the grounds; the more brutal the training, the more the image of ringing that bell would permeate my mind._
**_The bell was your way out. Ringing it three times meant your time at BUD/S was over._**

---
| | | [DON'T RING THE BELL](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e586e2afa9ca4144b9dd8c8e21682b5c&_e=eMnF1uwbZv9qvsUr7cWyt9QbK3GuXPZ5x3P-z7jaJ3LH-8yoIsdLQgwAWqy8w7e16ltCfaKagVSDFbhkKhRtYQGrFYCh-w0Dc0HbselH64UY_qcSNKu6Gq_Mr2TNB5AU5E38qgrCqrADGlKol_UZM1_x61hIBtkUHlaNZb1paGol0orN6fKo93bcyxrksTzMmlYejlIw9SfcuLNEU3a8r-vHO7kq8a2icT6DREZpiY3xiC08NP4MDRm4XCIcCt4qYU3i_rFqoSKQMOVO-EjOVFOhZ2OeGOpzTOi1sQS9p_aYiQXYqTyIWrSrFY4BXI5H2mdScy9wi1q19hwVR4Z8iRXeEGdlj29gfk_cmpQ0VnSWAwZhekYy69SbQksK9Euls0strZDLmba4t6OaF53jzSwdiAZ0ABCAtys9zQm6YlN-Bybe2CwjB3xtFUAP8BkPlZAR1RhjBUJumc5g4U13gw%3D%3D "Generic Button")
---

It can seem so easy to give up, especially when there is an escape option dangling right in front of you. **There has never been a moment where I don't regret persevering through the trials I faced to serve this country. **

Our nation is in a similar situation. The disastrous policies of the Biden Administration have harmed our democracy and painted a target on the backs of red-blooded Americans like you and me.

---
| | | [DON'T RING THE BELL](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e586e2afa9ca4144b9dd8c8e21682b5c&_e=eMnF1uwbZv9qvsUr7cWyt9QbK3GuXPZ5x3P-z7jaJ3LH-8yoIsdLQgwAWqy8w7e16ltCfaKagVSDFbhkKhRtYQGrFYCh-w0Dc0HbselH64UY_qcSNKu6Gq_Mr2TNB5AU5E38qgrCqrADGlKol_UZM1_x61hIBtkUHlaNZb1paGol0orN6fKo93bcyxrksTzMmlYejlIw9SfcuLNEU3a8r-vHO7kq8a2icT6DREZpiY3xiC08NP4MDRm4XCIcCt4qYU3i_rFqoSKQMOVO-EjOVFOhZ2OeGOpzTOi1sQS9p_bxRZXdH-trjxz8D7O8_-ggB6-VDG2b7X-s7aA8Nslu04bxa4t7c9WOYTghziyMRSHRe2wSr1bE4Y9QGMTZ9YvFsWxWm_yBBorgnSyXUZLyTJaMwSiavpQ68yAhlHEMWTw0_nm20Zrffn4xoOhogOGDAc9fbZyXWeIbEyyhP_7KWQ%3D%3D "Generic Button")

**[I refused to give up during BUD/S, I refuse to give up on our great country, and I refuse to let Joe Biden take my seat.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e586e2afa9ca4144b9dd8c8e21682b5c&_e=eMnF1uwbZv9qvsUr7cWyt9QbK3GuXPZ5x3P-z7jaJ3LH-8yoIsdLQgwAWqy8w7e16ltCfaKagVSDFbhkKhRtYQGrFYCh-w0Dc0HbselH64UY_qcSNKu6Gq_Mr2TNB5AU5E38qgrCqrADGlKol_UZM1_x61hIBtkUHlaNZb1paGol0orN6fKo93bcyxrksTzMmlYejlIw9SfcuLNEU3a8r-vHO7kq8a2icT6DREZpiY3xiC08NP4MDRm4XCIcCt4qYU3i_rFqoSKQMOVO-EjOVFOhZ2OeGOpzTOi1sQS9p_bRQOogh3taC_a6d3bawbhNpdYoZpNGLsR74uAKKx-rwNS_17Ak3GvQbKDD4P5dVX4cCla9erl_qjZEHfIuYpPUgwqF3eQURI0JedvAUwilR2yqiAoHAKMMzNLgRcW0v00bFthZZyj9CABh96nHwpvJdKGgfkW2b-WmxBl6tpvprg%3D%3D "I refused to give up during BUD/S, I refuse to give up on our great country, and I refuse to let Joe Biden take my seat.")**

**Nothing scares Sleepy Joe and his corrupt cronies more than a patriotic Navy SEAL who dedicated his life to fighting for America, standing up to them in Congress. **

clean_body: Becoming a Navy SEAL was not easy, but it taught me... | | | | | Friend, This is retired Naval Warfare Officer Ryan Zinke. I've dedicated my life to serving this country, first as a Navy SEAL, then as Secretary of the Interior under President Trump, and now as a member of Congress. We have an opportunity in 2024 to save the country that I swore to lay my life down for. Our homeland is worth defending. We have a duty to step up and put our nation back on the right track. When I was at Basic Underwater Demolition/SEAL (BUD/S), where I trained to become a Navy SEAL - there 's a bell. This may seem insignificant, a simple brass ship bell; however, it represents so much more. Its distracting presence loomed over the grounds; the more brutal the training, the more the image of ringing that bell would permeate my mind. The bell was your way out. Ringing it three times meant your time at BUD/S was over. | | | "Generic Button" It can seem so easy to give up, especially when there is an escape option dangling right in front of you. There has never been a moment where I don't regret persevering through the trials I faced to serve this country. Our nation is in a similar situation. The disastrous policies of the Biden Administration have harmed our democracy and painted a target on the backs of red-blooded Americans like you and me. | | | "Generic Button" "I refused to give up during BUD/S, I refuse to give up on our great country, and I refuse to let Joe Biden take my seat." Nothing scares Sleepy Joe and his corrupt cronies more than a patriotic Navy SEAL who dedicated his life to fighting for America, standing up to them in Congress. | | | "Generic Button" | | | "Generic Button" | | | "Generic Button" "I’m humbly asking you to chip in anything to give our team the boost we need to make sure that we keep my seat in Congress." For God and Country, Former Secretary Ryan Zinke U.S. Navy SEAL - Retired Ryan Zinke is a U.S. Navy Veteran. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Department of Defense or the Department of the Navy. | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Big tech: Your opinion needed
body:
The Truth about America’s Christian heritage
Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b625a3890c574c1f940bc4c02cc7b33a&_e=Joc0vkn3D_JpDYT1zb6reQ0B7QQRPck8tfzgdq7k_ASRQa2y_dXL3x91GSpFtjoPnKy6dhb4cDfqXqOBxks6Pr_QJbSbYWvzOuqyZLgqDiswK9zVGbi32pDhvvG3gvQGOkMHAERE2DV4TFAKu1JooP7L-aIb3M1Iclzy0bxwgjD3I0UpEMUufHhHSSu6x1Bo6L6Z1ICCjvFNYy-RI7Hd76x4wBflicRIuAWK3UbmLO7ANPGFQhl0IgRW116tNOFjigDzyQXfe9WxSs9vWF9ENMLWyyEiPKP98VXtUUt3W3khOLtwgSWlR5v8iHje8DdNnGos6DRHNEXsWw2JR5V33xQ8vHV-uJDU0Gpo9ZXUAbEZ2w2MeE7PXCc2ZepStCpn9KLW8qk7c_OIG0_fvQjkiAzuAr_ou-nSEQpuMaly8cY%3D)
---
Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

I've written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: _America Is a Christian Nation_. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves. The book is a short read, accompanied by beautiful patriotic photos that I think you'll appreciate.
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b625a3890c574c1f940bc4c02cc7b33a&_e=Joc0vkn3D_JpDYT1zb6reQ0B7QQRPck8tfzgdq7k_ASRQa2y_dXL3x91GSpFtjoPnKy6dhb4cDfqXqOBxks6Pr_QJbSbYWvzOuqyZLgqDiswK9zVGbi32pDhvvG3gvQGOkMHAERE2DV4TFAKu1JooP7L-aIb3M1Iclzy0bxwgjD3I0UpEMUufHhHSSu6x1Bo6L6Z1ICCjvFNYy-RI7Hd76x4wBflicRIuAWK3UbmLO7ANPGFQhl0IgRW116tNOFjigDzyQXfe9WxSs9vWF9ENKkYH3K2Qw2oQUO7MKmP3u1EMfDOhXbHNcnX7HaxsZN1skKcvLyT6BNy2vTeU2N88rQngu3LYXZ56aP3xMz3kii6hb7rpeZGXPvBiGzjbfiQB5uoBR45NBKNUYy95dudQRKVBO_4qcuG4n65R4enGKU%3D)
---
| | I would love for you to read this book and discover the truth about our nation's Christian heritage. And as a token of our appreciation for a gift to Pathway to Victory, we'll not only send you this book, but also a brand new CD featuring some of our nation's most patriotic songs from First Baptist Dallas' renowned choir and orchestra. **[https://ptv.org/donate/america-is-a-christian-nation-by-dr-robert-jeffress/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b625a3890c574c1f940bc4c02cc7b33a&_e=Joc0vkn3D_JpDYT1zb6reQ0B7QQRPck8tfzgdq7k_ASRQa2y_dXL3x91GSpFtjoPnKy6dhb4cDfqXqOBxks6Pr_QJbSbYWvzOuqyZLgqDiswK9zVGbi32pDhvvG3gvQGOkMHAERE2DV4TFAKu1JooP7L-aIb3M1Iclzy0bxwgjD3I0UpEMUufHhHSSu6x1Bo6L6Z1ICCjvFNYy-RI7Hd76x4wBflicRIuAWK3UbmLO7ANPGFQhl0IgRW116tNOFjigDzyQXfe9WxSs9vWF9ENMH-BEff4tH_1DcmPBQEomQnZV0J7zv22lwLpF6TfTb-RxCMnFDq1Ytv8P3DtHcc8IcaQlNY5VutRiaOkQg4GRXwjEFjN2VF-kiA6tA5TS2NHH-nltj7yzSN4g2RI_w0V2joFCGva09hb965w9DR3W0%3D)**

Your donation will be matched dollar-for-dollar thanks to a $500,000 matching challenge that ends on July 4th.

As believers, we must preserve America's unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms. By understanding our nation's Christian roots, we can work to bring our country back to its founding principles. At the end of my book, I provide suggestions for how to do just that.

I hope you'll consider donating to _Pathway to Victory_ and receiving your copy of _America Is a Christian Nation_ so you can know without a doubt that the foundation of our country was solidly established in the principles of the Bible.

Gratefully,
Dr. Robert Jeffress

clean_body: = | Fellow activist, We are 3 days out from Election Day, and we need your help to get voters out to the polls. We are not messing around when it comes to Tuesday’s critical elections. Our team has undergone extensive training to reach voters and inform them what’s at stake (voting rights, abortion access, and protecting our very democracy) to Get Out The Vote (GOTV). And we’re going all out: Our GOTV program has already knocked on more than 11,500 doors across PA! = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = Pennsylvanians are about to head to the polls to vote for a State Supreme Court Justice, two new Superior Court judges, a new Commonwealth Court judge, and several local/municipal positions. These races are extremely critical, and we cannot afford to sit on the sidelines. Let’s do this, Team NPP | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Your input is needed
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1eba451fdba45f1b7180976039a5be2&_e=J_uNeb20ATUYxh6xYgzMaTgUDjSGfdgADYixTplW0x5o9mUxTayUvI59OJu4ITxQR_eh6Tm_N0nSK8_bRzxzEWqNqPtnWimcPkp9mu3JxEtN-u6M8sweUSWoQiJmn2_PbFAOVngolxJDIfheSEqbt_1dhZHQkHTSt2XnX-nt97teDF3j-OnHAnXkU6NPWUkWRMA7GtZrXEW7FOikoaNoVGzm3JbKiy1HELv9YuYnFt2nn_2SfL2g3S_3nGM53o4LGJ67XOuE8FpFbw_8GmYgIXyBduJh-9ZKRjOoyaxaKnUAvR7su1A0312tg8gh-vLJNVUZkzFIgsILWvxnWw28bZus8QPZ86q3MW4ygSHLBM8WRwjyycKOfsvBGrIXtymmsyC_tFXsmgZ0lP-PJsQqIzk84aJZ3wdQqjsQdPa6R_U%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1eba451fdba45f1b7180976039a5be2&_e=J_uNeb20ATUYxh6xYgzMaTgUDjSGfdgADYixTplW0x5o9mUxTayUvI59OJu4ITxQR_eh6Tm_N0nSK8_bRzxzEWqNqPtnWimcPkp9mu3JxEtN-u6M8sweUSWoQiJmn2_PbFAOVngolxJDIfheSEqbt_1dhZHQkHTSt2XnX-nt97teDF3j-OnHAnXkU6NPWUkWRMA7GtZrXEW7FOikoaNoVGzm3JbKiy1HELv9YuYnFt2nn_2SfL2g3S_3nGM53o4LGJ67XOuE8FpFbw_8GmYgIYRyZpWqhl7u5Buxsqalzr-Tdlv895t2WzBqnsqdd419sZYSVA1ph2sFfK4EJHOdJPAHiCwEn9MBXx6tAEZbhId_0XF7xwCjMjMvoHYa7-qGj9dsKeVYvai_slaM9uEH79gYREaDgcQ_oeo-T1_XQUE%3D).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1eba451fdba45f1b7180976039a5be2&_e=J_uNeb20ATUYxh6xYgzMaTgUDjSGfdgADYixTplW0x5o9mUxTayUvI59OJu4ITxQR_eh6Tm_N0nSK8_bRzxzEWqNqPtnWimcPkp9mu3JxEtN-u6M8sweUSWoQiJmn2_PbFAOVngolxJDIfheSEqbt_1dhZHQkHTSt2XnX-nt97teDF3j-OnHAnXkU6NPWUkWRMA7GtZrXEW7FOikoaNoVGzm3JbKiy1HELv9YuYnFt2nn_2SfL2g3S_3nGM53o4LGJ67XOuE8FpFbw_8GmYgIXTn8t9wxTMCGbJRIeWAo3h0pqq-46dTC6ualMemEXAiuUMR5m3WTrXZzyZ5fue5i00RgZ68BuXSCWr2FrjG88moj9Ect8TH9Diw6EkrbkpHh5_j_BokoXzF9oIrL2R27980bocoshTz5rLy_bm4390%3D) [NO](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1eba451fdba45f1b7180976039a5be2&_e=J_uNeb20ATUYxh6xYgzMaTgUDjSGfdgADYixTplW0x5o9mUxTayUvI59OJu4ITxQR_eh6Tm_N0nSK8_bRzxzEWqNqPtnWimcPkp9mu3JxEtN-u6M8sweUSWoQiJmn2_PbFAOVngolxJDIfheSEqbt_1dhZHQkHTSt2XnX-nt97teDF3j-OnHAnXkU6NPWUkWRMA7GtZrXEW7FOikoaNoVGzm3JbKiy1HELv9YuYnFt2nn_2SfL2g3S_3nGM53o4LGJ67XOuE8FpFbw_8GmYgIVgmBw6g8_9GrviHwuGB2pQ_fXCkivWSx8qetndTZbVa8X0pvyLZX6v4VIABStqbN4usSIoXVrWy5PFtApOkzkp5aRDNK1ZTJcx7YP_PYZWMKmjlUXPqBzcJogd0ThrAk1a0q8r-J9kNjXih8289czI%3D) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1eba451fdba45f1b7180976039a5be2&_e=J_uNeb20ATUYxh6xYgzMaTgUDjSGfdgADYixTplW0x5o9mUxTayUvI59OJu4ITxQR_eh6Tm_N0nSK8_bRzxzEWqNqPtnWimcPkp9mu3JxEtN-u6M8sweUSWoQiJmn2_PbFAOVngolxJDIfheSEqbt_1dhZHQkHTSt2XnX-nt97teDF3j-OnHAnXkU6NPWUkWRMA7GtZrXEW7FOikoaNoVGzm3JbKiy1HELv9YuYnFt2nn_2SfL2g3S_3nGM53o4LGJ67XOuE8FpFbw_8GmYgIUIPL03FRomvUfCBuK_7lh92fdBS_YvhBXUn7NzWTaHv9ip-rzQFAZnOha5iCMetn8m_w47rPvw5ROEb-1TAvr8-5W2GJw4c7LVoeJp0F3OUuZd4xO8217ooVHkN_jtbht-4g1FJpq0LdTSgCKXFHhc%3D)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Maria Montero
subject: Campaign Updates November 4!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MARIA MONTERO
body:
ICYMI
| | | |
---
---
| Maria's Community Champions
---
| | |
---|---
Earning the confidence and support of community members, leaders, and business people is what distinguishes Maria Montero--she reflects the people, values, and work ethic of the 7th Congressional District in Pennsylvania.

This week we are pleased to share the support of former Pennsylvania Gubernatorial Candidate Charlie Gerow. Charlie worked with Ronald Reagan during his presidency and many years thereafter. He was the vice chair of the American Conservative Union which sponsors CPAC, and is CEO of Quantum Communications who are experts in strategy, advocacy, and media. They also host monthly Conservative roundtables in Harrisburg with thought-leaders from around PA. Gerow is a nationally renown, trusted, and respected leader who has advised many successful candidates.

"I've known Maria nearly 15 years and from the beginning I was impressed by her leadership, commitment to serving the community, and strong Conservative values. I am certain Maria can handily defeat Susan Wild in November 2024 and will represent the district well. Quite frankly, it's refreshing to have a candidate who is Conservative and can win in a general election. It is clear Maria is the front-runner in this primary race. Maria is a native of the 7th Congressional District, is from private sector, and can directly communicate our Conservative message to the 55,000 registered Spanish speaking voters in the 7th District. I am proud to support Maria Montero for U.S. Congress!"
---
| |
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Come join the Education Freedom Revolution!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/greenenergy-11571334?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**An education revolution is happening across America!** In half a dozen different states, moms and dads have been given control over their child’s share of education tax dollars.

**Please join us at a lunch on Wednesday November 15 th to hear how we can make Education Freedom happen in Mississippi! **Click on the image below for details.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=36d9cab71e&e=5703353baa)
---
_Click the photo above to purchase your tickets!_
| **What does school choice look like? **Instead of the education budget being allocated by bureaucrats, as currently happens, with school choice every child gets an Education Savings Account. Into that account is paid each child's share of the public school aid budget.

**Families are free to spend that money at a school of their choice, public, private, charter or even home school. **Imagine what your family – or a family that you know – could do if they had $9,000 to $11,000 paid into their child’s Education Savings Account to allocate each year?

Many would be perfectly happy with their child’s existing education options. But every child is different, and some might decide to meet their child’s needs differently. With families free to explore different options, different ways of meeting children’s needs would emerge.

This is what families in Arkansas under Sarah Huckabee Sanders will be free to do from 2025. Families in Texas and Louisiana could soon be able to do something similar.

So why not do something similar in Mississippi? **If you would like to see Education Freedom in our state, join us! Come along to this great public event we are hosting on Wednesday November 15th.**

**Listen to Corey DeAngelis, a leading advocate for education freedom explain why we need change.** Hear from Arkansas lawmakers who made change happen. Listen to Prager U talk about the importance of teaching children civics. **We will be joined by families that have benefited from school choice explain how it has transformed their children’s lives for the better.**

There are those that suggest school choice is unconstitutional. Others claim that in rural areas there aren’t enough alternatives to make it viable. Listen to experts explain why these arguments don’t stack up.

If you would like to be part of a broad coalition for Education Freedom in our state, book your spot today!

**For me, this is THE most important issue that the Mississippi Center for Public Policy is involved with.** Education Freedom is what will further advance our state.

Please be part of this coalition for change!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=729e786e08&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=33f74dbaaa) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=33f74dbaaa).

name: American Update
subject: New York May Have To Rescue Biden’s Climate Goals As Offshore Wind Flounders
body:
And Federal Appeals Court Temporarily Pauses Trump Gag Order

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672107%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8wnAhyP%2bUm%2bZYbt%2bQqu0JA&sysid=1 New York May Have To Rescue Biden’s Climate Goals As Offshore Wind Flounders

New York and other Northeastern states may have to pick up New Jersey’s slack if President Joe Biden’s ambitious green energy goals are to be kept intact, according to Politico.

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672107%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8wnAhyP%2bUm%2bZYbt%2bQqu0JA&sysid=1

See It Here https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672107%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8wnAhyP%2bUm%2bZYbt%2bQqu0JA&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672108%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BifR5JyFgvpms8ztyHXc2A&sysid=1 Federal Appeals Court Temporarily Pauses Trump Gag Order

A federal appeals court temporarily paused the gag order against former President Donald Trump in his 2020 election case on Friday. The Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia temporarily paused the order issued Oct. 17 by District Judge Tanya Chutkan to allow time to consider Trump’s request for a longer freeze on its enforcement pending appeal.

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672108%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BifR5JyFgvpms8ztyHXc2A&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672109%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y%2fUuKLcabfijOJzf0l4%2bnA&sysid=1 ‘This Could Be Quite Significant’: Jonathan Turley Reacts To Stay On Trump Gag Order

George Washington University law professor Jonathan Turley said Friday that the gag order imposed on former President Donald Trump by a federal judge “is unconstitutional” as a federal appeals court put the order on hold.

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672109%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y%2fUuKLcabfijOJzf0l4%2bnA&sysid=1

In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3b137c968b71455f911c2d0e0602bb0e&_e=COaXXr1N5ei954_jEVcyBeJrkBrQ-gpkIfTo4yyWvU2SXMUzkkaSIMItMPuKXsGBMSZqrVQLE5yesI-GQZ0UoLwTFbhwqUePkN3RqQJfs3THhokQmlBLzexF-GePd_emlmfKazxvC6LaBNcDEs2rsZOHokgJHuccXlORX6lQTvP4jHiUAj1Y0wXVXbk7ZsN6apWlLJ2q0sD1Ykar5FUkUtZ6mZZeOtx91nEmmTvYPnhF89IAqhHKgyRMNrrspNsz34gb52SMvMk99frF5bkBgq6btwGqtlofD9m855aRhcSGCAOLes8nd6HL2Gv3_5JbMyaUGvRZFRE6pMnJZydgfWTT4Ky_SiRYGaVfJC-vynWMxCah1fr75-SJRuMJMWN-vexdlziQj0x2IC_04sQql7tWW2v6Ru2r6I3ILv44J4yzH_VSSbB3dRC9OR6HOlDcCZp3JTmPylD2DgxFdaFgDQ%3D%3D)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3b137c968b71455f911c2d0e0602bb0e&_e=COaXXr1N5ei954_jEVcyBeJrkBrQ-gpkIfTo4yyWvU2SXMUzkkaSIMItMPuKXsGBMSZqrVQLE5yesI-GQZ0UoLwTFbhwqUePkN3RqQJfs3THhokQmlBLzexF-GePd_emlmfKazxvC6LaBNcDEs2rsZOHokgJHuccXlORX6lQTvP4jHiUAj1Y0wXVXbk7ZsN6apWlLJ2q0sD1Ykar5FUkUtZ6mZZeOtx91nEmmTvYPnhF89IAqhHKgyRMNrrspNsz34gb52SMvMk99frF5bkBgq6btwGqtlofD9m855aRhcSGCAOLes8nd6HL2Gv3_5JbTgKqC7LK8MjMRg4QVFLImBMUqCqEKKa_vqfVcA5PDk2Tiy_RRD9Zn_6e6MUSphogRJNr_U3R1NVA66p5Tcu7jN3gqEiyK1_g5XByfzxekBbBxw5OXqXV8DwFwKjCIye66PqkK1oaa7D5yzGQhjPC-w%3D%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315
