name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: The Future of Hearing Aids
body:
Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids.

| [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3d857e8d189149ab9c7c723be3d907e4&_e=BrIVTkGskmFpUjot0UsUtJwxTrYirGcQ4_VYHM5eTERXBA5VRQSbdzAEwtcHdqEymjN97ZTZvxA73oyyg2sgq7WwSgPJdQ9lD9fF6iBTGnSXGsLmOn6OTTN1U4GmYocg5KhSNgM3ZKmzTPv1fcZ0eWQC6Ol4TL2gcAG-TOyaFssSQzsdrI4gsFaPWIhU1HJzolLr16kPJ6wv7xsCxsxvWc-9PGyQIUTbpIm8mQUmspdUFuJAFmxxMaz9ZvduQ-9ny-Uh_2FTpsqpKHBhiQE0VDTcCVu01-rh6muokJdfm7wbffcU9jpo7l_-eahjD__tovoyZtTponhVN997eyUDsqGg_zf619VjGSDRD5pA8cKLrKPTjsFU3hx3-fJbxtnOhRJ2cSNEdJmP2SSICcq0z_r2_nBaiFeh9zEVWhHuXRaEpeY43EZr4e1A1ReFj_KeWoLBGth2KbxjXqSFIdokxFjvpynVE3AUZ8hdrECwUWI%3D)
---
| 2 Germans are crushing the market with these powerful hearing aids
---
[ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3d857e8d189149ab9c7c723be3d907e4&_e=BrIVTkGskmFpUjot0UsUtJwxTrYirGcQ4_VYHM5eTERXBA5VRQSbdzAEwtcHdqEyho3jC6KFpr8TUQ-so_ehQ7aMKkK-X0HKGKnqGA-vPvutStVlSbc5pm2ZINQ-Dtp-QVWIIq2a3eSZjsYyaA_inrn73wLesdlLhZlDYah2FsGPTBux9pfYov7oRE_cnW3I3XqX5_inJ86h49Fyycvu7v8TIQYFWHPT5RNMKUwEwg60EWlb3r9dQ5okQdOLhVnAnfIoGL01U5t_QspqS6bDS7H39U_i5lLHAlTP-Y4C1loaGKyhTV0fKlP12SInMuc2VKoVxSLoiKRgHptN9A8ZneCITRx8uEQ3RZFH37the2I0hbDk5LMEvcO_eeKeYmDrcux0wUMJbfmzEqj6RAD8gG3DxSng1iJuERGHFUu4H7zmjvaKyKLsYf9W8z3ATE2mhpDbsmbNCFSLn2KjrTHpWpAuzD2euiRceH0Ri-V9XwM%3D)
Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius have been creating successful businesses since college. Now they lead [ hear.com](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3d857e8d189149ab9c7c723be3d907e4&_e=BrIVTkGskmFpUjot0UsUtJwxTrYirGcQ4_VYHM5eTERXBA5VRQSbdzAEwtcHdqEyho3jC6KFpr8TUQ-so_ehQ7aMKkK-X0HKGKnqGA-vPvutStVlSbc5pm2ZINQ-Dtp-QVWIIq2a3eSZjsYyaA_inrn73wLesdlLhZlDYah2FsGPTBux9pfYov7oRE_cnW3I3XqX5_inJ86h49Fyycvu7v8TIQYFWHPT5RNMKUwEwg60EWlb3r9dQ5okQdOLhVnAnfIoGL01U5t_QspqS6bDS7H39U_i5lLHAlTP-Y4C1loaGKyhTV0fKlP12SInMuc2VKoVxSLoiKRgHptN9A8ZnTEb951cS8SW0IBDEPFQWysiDMTdybDW7LtZDSGXHnoy7dMlpo0p7Yee5ntsx2a1F1JcwdC_LYN-ozqXNlVwiJ5B1eZ86kBarxRSWA8sz0jkCaibyvnyT0yxHf97eySrfNP53-X0r0ixAmAh_TDdZTU%3D), the fastest growing hearing aid company in the world. This is their story.

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they are still big and ugly. However, Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius wanted to change this perception with **a revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers** formerly from Siemens. After many years of research and development, this team of engineers came up with a game-changing hearing aid that's completely crushing the market with powerful German technology.

**The result:** A hearing device that packs cutting-edge technology in a design so small, it completely disappears inside the ear. It's called the Horizon Mini by [ hear.com](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3d857e8d189149ab9c7c723be3d907e4&_e=BrIVTkGskmFpUjot0UsUtJwxTrYirGcQ4_VYHM5eTERXBA5VRQSbdzAEwtcHdqEymjN97ZTZvxA73oyyg2sgq7WwSgPJdQ9lD9fF6iBTGnSXGsLmOn6OTTN1U4GmYocg5KhSNgM3ZKmzTPv1fcZ0eWQC6Ol4TL2gcAG-TOyaFssSQzsdrI4gsFaPWIhU1HJzolLr16kPJ6wv7xsCxsxvWc-9PGyQIUTbpIm8mQUmspdUFuJAFmxxMaz9ZvduQ-9ny-Uh_2FTpsqpKHBhiQE0VDTcCVu01-rh6muokJdfm7wbffcU9jpo7l_-eahjD__tovoyZtTponhVN997eyUDskQQ2e2daJ36QQCdfbsSGVkLWUGj6QcwIAJWMuehyfShtQYDzAl8nBQ11i3EigTu2tD1uCLGtsF_au-z7C50S2h0xm4xSfy_JyWgJQfrj7FM5Lk0LHMAm0XMudg9_JPEeh8bV8C6iKBJemIZvSGqGjQ%3D).
[ Check if you qualify ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3d857e8d189149ab9c7c723be3d907e4&_e=BrIVTkGskmFpUjot0UsUtJwxTrYirGcQ4_VYHM5eTERXBA5VRQSbdzAEwtcHdqEyho3jC6KFpr8TUQ-so_ehQ7aMKkK-X0HKGKnqGA-vPvutStVlSbc5pm2ZINQ-Dtp-QVWIIq2a3eSZjsYyaA_inrn73wLesdlLhZlDYah2FsGPTBux9pfYov7oRE_cnW3I3XqX5_inJ86h49Fyycvu7v8TIQYFWHPT5RNMKUwEwg60EWlb3r9dQ5okQdOLhVnAnfIoGL01U5t_QspqS6bDS7H39U_i5lLHAlTP-Y4C1loaGKyhTV0fKlP12SInMuc2VKoVxSLoiKRgHptN9A8Znfret6Hw5yyhak9QNXvi1JbVUjMLfC9Ax0Gguew9GdHrD3ZuCezAymfxv8Cu-YX1XkrXlLC00a7fes5zkPDlA6mKKK1OuZ9MFSZeumxCxRFNjtnLLKQAjMIfDzX4eueTq1kxhPqANppEtpKqaAFNKRk%3D)
[ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3d857e8d189149ab9c7c723be3d907e4&_e=BrIVTkGskmFpUjot0UsUtJwxTrYirGcQ4_VYHM5eTERXBA5VRQSbdzAEwtcHdqEymjN97ZTZvxA73oyyg2sgq7WwSgPJdQ9lD9fF6iBTGnSXGsLmOn6OTTN1U4GmYocg5KhSNgM3ZKmzTPv1fcZ0eWQC6Ol4TL2gcAG-TOyaFssSQzsdrI4gsFaPWIhU1HJzolLr16kPJ6wv7xsCxsxvWc-9PGyQIUTbpIm8mQUmspdUFuJAFmxxMaz9ZvduQ-9ny-Uh_2FTpsqpKHBhiQE0VDTcCVu01-rh6muokJdfm7wbffcU9jpo7l_-eahjD__tovoyZtTponhVN997eyUDsoCgvUY7205tT12JhUVCYhjUPx1jICZFhhdYXntI7COW8FuQmAQkhSVTFr3KqaH54PQQT3ruGi1hZFhvigH_Wt6e3fGB5ESJIYEQ6dMWxaj3yJBVGCKzvDuuQzkE5bKEQ5a07YZ_qByNuzZVfW7OpJ4%3D)
Horizon Mini comes with smartphone connectivity, allowing you to control the device with your iPhone or Android. In addition, this new device uses a unique algorithm that is clinically proven to deliver better than normal hearing. You will notice remarkable improvements in your ability to clearly understand speech, even in noisy environments like a busy restaurant.

Limited no-risk trials now available

It's really no surprise that this level of innovation is changing lives all over the world. People are experiencing the everyday benefits of this amazing device with [ hear.com](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3d857e8d189149ab9c7c723be3d907e4&_e=BrIVTkGskmFpUjot0UsUtJwxTrYirGcQ4_VYHM5eTERXBA5VRQSbdzAEwtcHdqEymjN97ZTZvxA73oyyg2sgq7WwSgPJdQ9lD9fF6iBTGnSXGsLmOn6OTTN1U4GmYocg5KhSNgM3ZKmzTPv1fcZ0eWQC6Ol4TL2gcAG-TOyaFssSQzsdrI4gsFaPWIhU1HJzolLr16kPJ6wv7xsCxsxvWc-9PGyQIUTbpIm8mQUmspdUFuJAFmxxMaz9ZvduQ-9ny-Uh_2FTpsqpKHBhiQE0VDTcCVu01-rh6muokJdfm7wbffcU9jpo7l_-eahjD__tovoyZtTponhVN997eyUDsoJy7G7jAxElFwEBx3vq3FAoMeolWdwqf_r7rZg-W2G6zNuxMQYo58BuO3HqvAX0RnPtI4WYnnG9V0WfF9sFFXL0Dm7nsvKpGN-0dER_Akd465QksCUOSOyEb4joEu82RyS-tJU4XLcVBMSMRq5Su3o%3D)'s **45-day no-risk trial.**
[ Check if you qualify ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3d857e8d189149ab9c7c723be3d907e4&_e=BrIVTkGskmFpUjot0UsUtJwxTrYirGcQ4_VYHM5eTERXBA5VRQSbdzAEwtcHdqEyho3jC6KFpr8TUQ-so_ehQ7aMKkK-X0HKGKnqGA-vPvutStVlSbc5pm2ZINQ-Dtp-QVWIIq2a3eSZjsYyaA_inrn73wLesdlLhZlDYah2FsGPTBux9pfYov7oRE_cnW3I3XqX5_inJ86h49Fyycvu7v8TIQYFWHPT5RNMKUwEwg60EWlb3r9dQ5okQdOLhVnAnfIoGL01U5t_QspqS6bDS7H39U_i5lLHAlTP-Y4C1loaGKyhTV0fKlP12SInMuc2VKoVxSLoiKRgHptN9A8ZnS3BmxQ9ki6FSAhMapK4vyuTwjjLCbi9jkNUafUI7sVsVgthOHrb_xrGwT4ANS_mfn52pNfjPk43X1UuZqYOCwxOdq7bZlRndcc8kmEEOhC3BaXmMOlK91EKB78mYEA-mY4REFzWJXdQ7rRJuUN-mGA%3D)

Reclaiming American Freedom

Friend,

**This is retired Naval Warfare Officer Ryan Zinke.** I've dedicated my life to serving this country, first as a Navy SEAL, then as Secretary of the Interior under President Trump, and now as a member of Congress.

We have an opportunity in 2024 to save the country that I swore to lay my life down for. **Our homeland is worth defending.** We have a duty to step up and put our nation back on the right track.

_When I was at Basic Underwater Demolition/SEAL (BUD/S), where I trained to become a Navy SEAL - there 's a bell. This may seem insignificant, a simple brass ship bell; however, it represents so much more. Its distracting presence loomed over the grounds; the more brutal the training, the more the image of ringing that bell would permeate my mind._
**_The bell was your way out. Ringing it three times meant your time at BUD/S was over._**

---
| | | [DON'T RING THE BELL](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a316a5e74ac4451faec0b24c283da41c&_e=6KjHs4hcAdEyfteAPXGYCP5nkMa-jNNiMfZEMB3QalbU1Rv3czkmLRte6MDByaLh8OydkB3nhoi8WUgjRC4M7xNrMTGSM9vBuBodAPDJpcH53WQ4vxbuyP3G0n9EJcJ4tyZkR3VCCwfZQGETFcEky1Ydux407DVC6fZ4Kf-eMBiL9YwHo82ZNp9agbW2FFqev_tCeaQP3iT6gd8uZQ6ThDhbSTDoF0tbhr6oM5ERpBw9dn281Gn9NBMtXJzeUDyu9SlIf7jXwtee5Z9DICMdEQBrgbRfFbAaf4fN6SelRjWLFx1wmlIdoFbbdGv4DiPGoWe7cFHPVsVNQEuS1CGmBxy9tqr7u3iLPom2bsFWk9TyKizNmLXhgHimzWB9_s6rssRSusR6o37hkc-7-rFpd7urPJmjcgWO58p8L21BZ7VaQeiD0MOu2kBCuBc09vnqJY8bWIOe-QZkWzaGuyaj6Q%3D%3D "Generic Button")
---

It can seem so easy to give up, especially when there is an escape option dangling right in front of you. **There has never been a moment where I don't regret persevering through the trials I faced to serve this country. **

Our nation is in a similar situation. The disastrous policies of the Biden Administration have harmed our democracy and painted a target on the backs of red-blooded Americans like you and me.

## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state—that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iHQKgIkVrNwetMPh5x4fvg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnKPikP0S9aHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2FkbWluaXN0cmF0aXZlLXN0YXRlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA3MDVOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWFkbWluaXN0cmF0aXZlc3RhdGVzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9WUVTTk9fUEEtUk9OLTIwMjMxMTA0VwNzcGNCCmVGhD1GZQDfJ6ZSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) [NO](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iHQKgIkVrNwetMPh5x4fvg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnKPikP0S9aHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2FkbWluaXN0cmF0aXZlLXN0YXRlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA3MDVOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWFkbWluaXN0cmF0aXZlc3RhdGVzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9WUVTTk9fUEEtUk9OLTIwMjMxMTA0VwNzcGNCCmVGhD1GZQDfJ6ZSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iHQKgIkVrNwetMPh5x4fvg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnKPikP0S9aHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2FkbWluaXN0cmF0aXZlLXN0YXRlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA3MDVOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWFkbWluaXN0cmF0aXZlc3RhdGVzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9WUVTTk9fUEEtUk9OLTIwMjMxMTA0VwNzcGNCCmVGhD1GZQDfJ6ZSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Ron DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=89889317b4894ef598e967e1ddc273be&_e=EBLdi6vcYl-SMAAX_lyUx0PPsi1cNZqn-Q5bNDsslwYgLXOILwzNGBZ1bnokDhb6XixxeF8pPuyxsHLWKso2QJcBZYe9q7PsQVLbNIej1DDhK66jLeFBoeBh0PiK6Aq4eLXLAH4BJQ0pkLaFo5fnexrAlQi08O6hlpvQfhBUboDK2yHGks4nvJU0XSBxR3t3dN9QyfMQ9sFLwnCgLx92zfSMXuK66GgbAoI3rSp_rbqPZ8CjI1wCv-RnVCHwbpwS6OrcJatJ1Z-v0TXHyKOoOSYZpMdQ3XNkHbvpkLHeGpMG9fDPq4NYSY5BTGcY5HhSGkSA5qJywlMY4qP2ZVTpvGA3FqujmSCNWwQdsGmnSXXZIG0SiC4zE922FZhsRmJ0cR9ertwHleYii1YgHrPPyuOOwHXFcZqevvx1ovBDecfbmJJoH9E0BQXo9E_FeBsV)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=89889317b4894ef598e967e1ddc273be&_e=EBLdi6vcYl-SMAAX_lyUx0PPsi1cNZqn-Q5bNDsslwYgLXOILwzNGBZ1bnokDhb6XixxeF8pPuyxsHLWKso2QJcBZYe9q7PsQVLbNIej1DDhK66jLeFBoeBh0PiK6Aq4eLXLAH4BJQ0pkLaFo5fnexrAlQi08O6hlpvQfhBUboDK2yHGks4nvJU0XSBxR3t3dN9QyfMQ9sFLwnCgLx92zfSMXuK66GgbAoI3rSp_rbqPZ8CjI1wCv-RnVCHwbpwS6OrcJatJ1Z-v0TXHyKOoOalWU02mN_4nk3QPpUIF1IFaEXuHC3krPl_CbsQfvBFqKKs1HWje4KgG66K3YlM6hDOtNmF1WnU0PnJCYqO17Y3S7qtIlOr4iI_0m7hrSPh4ed0ECPHHM2XrBU8t2xaKP_leR1mYYYISqcBXzbEGtfkUTp5p9d6ZlRci7Kaw531x)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Access your pre-debate video message from Ron DeSantis here: PASSWORD: RD24 Ron DeSantis Pre-Debate Tape 📹 November 8th. Miami, Florida. Ron DeSantis takes the stage for the third presidential debate. You'll know we're ready when you check out the excitement in his eyes. View your video message today! Thanks - Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. Watchdog Says

people of Gaza and the West Bank is likely to fall into the hands of
Hamas terrorists, a government watchdog warned Friday. Biden pledged
on Oct. 18 the fuel, medical supplies, food and water included in the
package will not be diverted to Hamas, which has political and
military control of Gaza.

Fellow American,

It probably comes as no surprise to you that the last ten days have been a blur. Everything transpired so quickly that my own family wasn’t even able to make it to Washington, D.C. to watch me be sworn in as the 56th Speaker of the House.

My team and I – which has grown exponentially in the last week – really have been burning the midnight oil, working around the clock to ensure the people’s House remains OPEN FOR BUSINESS.

In the past week,

1. I’ve sifted through hundreds of resumes.
2. Met with the leaders from the Pentagon, the Senate, and the executive branch.
3. Sat for interviews with Sean Hannity and Larry Kudlow, among others.
4. Met with the campaign staff at the National Republican Congressional Committee to set finance goals for the upcoming year.

I’ve got to be honest with you – with so many competing priorities, [**it’s critical to have the _best_ team by my side.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8e0d0cbaabf148a286a9b4098a96ed46&_e=G63ejta79hW6WmtK7MOtnzmaEsX2LiZbLMRsLMRM0Xr873ou16G2DQ7LTIhtC7iZwBRjOFH6RTvmPBHIWsozCfruZC5RcQ1C0VaUtR4erYJQNaDUWjuX8XlClTTx8VFg3BEaUWL-HPsjsRYZPUHEa7jN-CekfORw8jTbwmFmKkr066idapmw_Y65h-dTQ3vg9F1I8GKRxc1-bEMB7j7DV-HKFL1VAIJv2xaLrJ6LCyj18NzDSnEDILDXxtoKuy6ntXRr75EpODimrwy1p9-UeMQRJhjIIMZ_RIeRANIdrrKAisHzXB4J9Xg9GR8mExNNF4HGvOJuuXvd4klPiod-pSvQKEH6KsO3-vC2anCDaqkReW8sLOVhRGyPRAOc2IJxpRnQmuNGC0YoIqVcJD6jrg%3D%3D) I’m working to continue filling positions as fast as possible while fulfilling my duties outside of the Capitol.

You see, aside from my official duties as speaker, [**one of my new responsibilities is to be the chief fundraiser for the Republican Party.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8e0d0cbaabf148a286a9b4098a96ed46&_e=G63ejta79hW6WmtK7MOtnzmaEsX2LiZbLMRsLMRM0Xr873ou16G2DQ7LTIhtC7iZwBRjOFH6RTvmPBHIWsozCfruZC5RcQ1C0VaUtR4erYJQNaDUWjuX8XlClTTx8VFg3BEaUWL-HPsjsRYZPUHEa7jN-CekfORw8jTbwmFmKkr066idapmw_Y65h-dTQ3vg9F1I8GKRxc1-bEMB7j7DV-HKFL1VAIJv2xaLrJ6LCyj18NzDSnEDILDXxtoKuy6nvLJ1TMP7nP0s5K2LyhCNX1zkUKTKMCCk14H2xQbRR0uwZh8lHOW49kOGnol_yBd6UsEkbDaJv4cSWJSPCsuAOZNbBMw0rauX1d5OyeqAyciuOBjmwhmRsV1NXXePIjW7bPY7QWij9YS8QLFq2E0pFQ%3D%3D) That means using this platform to raise money every single day of the year, so we have the necessary funds to defend our five-seat majority in next year’s election.

[**My staff have told me that we’re just short of having raised $1 million online since I was elected speaker last week. In fact, we have just another $134,000 to raise to hit that mark – and we need to do it before tonight at 11:59 p.m.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8e0d0cbaabf148a286a9b4098a96ed46&_e=G63ejta79hW6WmtK7MOtnzmaEsX2LiZbLMRsLMRM0Xr873ou16G2DQ7LTIhtC7iZwBRjOFH6RTvmPBHIWsozCfruZC5RcQ1C0VaUtR4erYJQNaDUWjuX8XlClTTx8VFg3BEaUWL-HPsjsRYZPUHEa7jN-CekfORw8jTbwmFmKkr066idapmw_Y65h-dTQ3vg9F1I8GKRxc1-bEMB7j7DV-HKFL1VAIJv2xaLrJ6LCyj18NzDSnEDILDXxtoKuy6nGIINbqXIujqnBmPivLqFaPXllqLnufDdNobAAu_oQSmJVmZ2nL02xTTx52QFdKlMc5qb5BrjrVu8OeWWA0erY_BiPHqq5V5j7FA4DM40l56hJf_EPPm-1VEREm_82vzLWJSJCnimMRxg6jThR3HZKQ%3D%3D)

[**Our ability to raise money from grassroots conservatives like you will send a signal to Democrats that we are ready to help reelect a Republican majority in next year’s midterms.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8e0d0cbaabf148a286a9b4098a96ed46&_e=G63ejta79hW6WmtK7MOtnzmaEsX2LiZbLMRsLMRM0Xr873ou16G2DQ7LTIhtC7iZwBRjOFH6RTvmPBHIWsozCfruZC5RcQ1C0VaUtR4erYJQNaDUWjuX8XlClTTx8VFg3BEaUWL-HPsjsRYZPUHEa7jN-CekfORw8jTbwmFmKkr066idapmw_Y65h-dTQ3vg9F1I8GKRxc1-bEMB7j7DV-HKFL1VAIJv2xaLrJ6LCyj18NzDSnEDILDXxtoKuy6nrd3-RBh3xQGils5jP7SxutAHMkwCYIva3nc2XEfzxSCKj85jQw69iRqG02WWSNSAmhE9zcyiYDFN1NKXuQgyIT3-dMgprGZ13zl3u1bGFJb952Eb_PvFFxyHMA9ZFVyXPlygiAk-7L_LJceMAS2vOA%3D%3D)

If we come up short, all bets are off.

I have to get back to interviewing candidates to join my team, but I'll be checking in with my staff frequently over the next few days to see what progress we’ve made toward hitting this critical campaign goal.

Let’s get this done.

For America,

In this explosive exposure of the far-left, Senator Cruz also delivers a clear plan to defend America against the ceaseless woke assault. Cultural Marxists have taken control of the major institutions in America. They have taken over our universities and public schools, the media, Big Tech, Big Business, and of course the Democratic Party. Corporations push transgenderism and open borders lawlessness. ‘A Disconcerting Picture’: Reagan Economist Says Latest Jobs Numbers
Spell Trouble For Economy
http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdojlkbsgp7gu1u8k4mpopbkh0hrdoeeq18prn6g_rp22sh2s8i66p74shi6eoj2c9h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38ctk6oon9dtjmeqjetjjkorrbdt36kq32tbiekojf8j0c9j6f934cug62pt46mgj9djm6uprcd9ie5qb7dplk1qbccble9qjb8jl6grj8ctlkkr3fctnmmqbcsblkpq39tjlk6q32t9me5qq5dti6pqq7dblm8qj4tjlkpo7acdhmmgn4ttle8oradd36up7b99m6uprfddkuuh2bs

Former Reagan administration official Art Laffer said Friday that the
latest jobs numbers painted “a disconcerting picture,” citing downward
revisions from previous months. The economy added 150,000 jobs in
October, below the 180,000 economists expected, sending the
unemployment rate up to 3.9%; job numbers for August and September
were revised downward by a total of 101,000, part of a trend
continuing through this year.

A federal appeals court temporarily paused the gag order against
former President Donald Trump in his 2020 election case on Friday. The
Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia temporarily paused the
order issued Oct. 17 by District Judge Tanya Chutkan to allow time to
consider Trump’s request for a longer freeze on its enforcement
pending appeal. http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zek0hq5m95p2moc3hqr6ie0d7i1hhcsbonbeartg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr4cjkmkpj9ctn6ej3fddnk1q33d9me5qb7d5k6eqq9cth6ir32t9h6mjr7dd36kojacjk66qq6d5iekq34tdmemj31d1iesqjb9bmemi32sbnm9prad7lkpq39tjnk8gq48bi4bh28or4sji68pr2c9h649fg

body:

---
| |
---
| | Hey there-

Karen here! I wanted to drop you a quick reminder that today is the LAST DAY of Early Voting in Virginia. If you’re unsure of where to vote, click the button below to find your voting location!
---
| [Find Your Polling Location](https://KarenGreenhalgh.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f63f16544ed56137e0536ab&id=698ceae283&e=48b883ea87 "Find Your Polling Location")
---
| It’s important that we bank as many votes as we can BEFORE Tuesday. From the very beginning, Virginia Democrats targeted this seat as one they wanted to flip in 2023. They’ve thrown everything at me, including false accusations and dirty tricks. And it’s not over yet. **The best way to fight back in these final days is to vote early! ** Once again, today is the LAST DAY you can cast your vote early. I’m asking you to head to the polls ASAP and vote for me to be your Delegate. With your help, we’ll cross the finish line strong and secure victory on November 7!

**If you’ve already voted, call or text 10 of your friends and remind them to get out and vote before 5pm today! **
---
| [Find Your Polling Location](https://KarenGreenhalgh.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f63f16544ed56137e0536ab&id=a51c4547c3&e=48b883ea87 "Find Your Polling Location")

| Thank you!

name: Col. Mike Waltz (Ret.)
subject: Your name is missing!
body:
| | | ** So many patriots have stepped up to add their names to our donor wall.

Every day, it inspires me to see how many people support our mission, and it’s an incredible source of strength.

_But I noticed one name was missing... YOURS!_

I know you’ve been a dedicated supporter from day one, so I don’t want to miss you.

We only have a few more spots on the wall, so I’m hoping you are action to claim yours.

****[Our donor wall is incomplete with your name. Will you add yours today?](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=b3e9e7397738467db126bd8f582a5aba&_e=ROJJRyiVkEcxz2yTosbkwkUunXLpLlQ9oq1fQW6KAoKHXU0uTs0lnCWSQ-NeZj3LpCAi2sr3c_GE8UozhASq_wTMPgccpyEfbV96vJcFzUmI-oYtCOCf7YkM2q9oja8PJ34-jLSdlItPQVMlwbmywGcqVMn236KFQ37R6upLs0zdD2wRs0B3UP3ew27YsggMRBwv4KkDw3UK-SPMF_dhPBATMvqdoqmZP7qrlE0oyG6kJbBUdJGRj4arkX80PLxMZbJs_bZy9Pe5uF7XUNcxUVWz5HLLgkXjQBeHNipVp8KrHyzHYHgAY-A5mYDwEltoksY7attPThWiPAjwk6wjCYGHm1z-vpbI4mZYbEJSpG0zsTZYq_fjXqdHVAL-ZQUt)**

body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8eq069S2O_JH7x5Yy9kqLjxq7ZI0LR9mwpgHWZd0JCH7TEG4vMv_1EMNwHLVj8SYc5Fb1Dn_D28qF8JXgJpeI1PZxLsD7PsLEZ2EOA4IGhR2FCeps_-GW8MVJFdToQYyanJHhbcGYcEYPzo9prD32kIaWCHQd3Rg-VzTxhRNRiSKBfpJaVcPcwCUrkC6IAMahZeWyHl2FeGnYMfQiM7yC78mSOseAh0nuXf7kDCJQFOnnKoYJXe1jKw3qmSpdHpyM3ruzvEXpJLdR_QwbEuJ6XfsNuWejf5AlPxEMHrCfP-C3jD5uDMCsd_I_r_m60gLEghlPfyrLdHtvASw7ejSIWo/410/KKOzEnVuTJ-ay2748ReEAQ/h0/agm1aTZpFBXokQIKn5_Kstz1l1Bb6Ml3Ns_R89-OIKk)
| | Peter,

**1, 2, 3...

3 days until it's Election Day.** There are so many consequential races up and down the ballot that will determine the lives of so many communities all across the United States.

Next Tuesday, our candidates have the chance to make history, to preserve democracy, and to bolster the fight against extremism.

Next Tuesday, our candidates have the chance to make history, to preserve democracy, and to bolster the fight against extremism. | | | The impact of local elections will be felt by each and every one of us, Peter. Local elections matter, and the outcome of local elections are what will be instrumental in just three days from now. From the fate of abortion rights in Ohio to Gabe Amo's potential historic Congressional win in Rhode Island to making SURE that we don't let extremists win, the next three days will determine the fate of elections across the country. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you, The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . name: Team Reeves
subject: Today's the last day!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF BRYCE REEVES
body:
Have you voted yet?
| | |
---
| | [](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/0100018b9a8e17c5-08fee319-cba2-40bd-8665-ad21ff2681ee-000000/chBhSeR84dw7m6WExRYWvCtMFKs=346)
---
| Peter, Today is the **last day of early voting!** You read that right. I understand many peoples' hesitation with the early voting process; I'm skeptical myself. But there is a reason that Republicans like **_Governor Youngkin_** , **_Delegate Nick Freitas_** , **_Delegate Phillip Scott_** , and I are encouraging people to [cast their ballot early](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecureyourvotevirginia.com%2F/1/0100018b9a8e17c5-08fee319-cba2-40bd-8665-ad21ff2681ee-000000/PkREsp4KC6Pt0WrdZhe8qHRiw7A=346). Anything can happen on election day! You could get a flat tire, wake up to a sick kid, or get called into a last-minute shift at work. We can't afford to lose **ONE SINGLE** Republican vote this year- _that 's how much is at stake._ If you [vote early](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecureyourvotevirginia.com%2F/2/0100018b9a8e17c5-08fee319-cba2-40bd-8665-ad21ff2681ee-000000/ZH9g-8AhKZIov6pqo8yjbax6Rqc=346), and don't work on election day, that frees you up to **volunteer** and help out Republican candidates! Elections from schoolboard to State Senate are happening, and **_every single race is just as important as the next._** I implore you: If you are conservative, and you have not yet voted, **_PLEASE VOTE TODAY!_**
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| Not sure where to vote early? Governor Youngkin's team has made an _extremely convenient_ , _easy-to-use_ website, which I've gone ahead and linked below. https://secureyourvotevirginia.com/ Have questions about early voting? **Please, call my office at (540) 645-8440** and my staff would be happy to assist. I practice what I preach and **_have already cast my ballot_** , so my focus on election day will entirely surround convincing voters just how and why conservative principles will lead us into a brighter future. Thank you, and I hope to see **Republicans** flood the polls today! Yours in service,
---
| | |
---
| Bryce E. ReevesSenator17th Senatorial District of VA(540) 645-8440
---
| | [SECURE YOUR VOTE TODAY](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecureyourvotevirginia.com%2F/3/0100018b9a8e17c5-08fee319-cba2-40bd-8665-ad21ff2681ee-000000/Pp5YUtmLLrIBIwrccM6o9rCpMFo=346)

It’s go-time, Pennsylvania! Election Day 2023 is almost here, and we need all hands on deck to win. In just 3 days, we have an opportunity to put an end to the culture wars, book bans, and election conspiracy theories that Republicans are pushing into our schools and election boards. I'll be knocking on doors and talking to voters today and tomorrow. **I'm also asking everyone to do their part by supporting Neighbors United and Bucks United – they are our boots on the ground in these critical county races.** [We need your help to kick our GOTV efforts into overdrive this weekend. Will you split a donation between Neighbors United, Bucks United, and my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72773218/436370030/1170613842?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20231104_fr_tandem_cand_kw_30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTcwNzUyOC0xYTdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2jm-PlU6TfwnmIdwz5N3T61kFT_cz_NIY0T9ixMEySc=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Here's a bit more on why these races are so important:
**🎓Central Bucks School Board**
The culture wars are sadly alive and well in Bucks County schools. I testified before the school board in the spring about how they are making the lives of kids of color, LGBTQ+ kids, and anyone who does not fit into their self-righteous and hateful definition of "normal" a living hell.
Brian Fitzpatrick also just made an endorsement in this race. Another sign he's on the side of the culture wars, not Pennsylvania. Let's send a message on Tuesday by helping to elect compassionate and commonsense candidates who care about our kids, not BS culture wars!
**🗳Bucks County Commission**
Our county commission oversees one of the most important parts of our democracy – our elections. In 2020, Donald Trump sued our county 11 times to try and overturn the will of the voters. The county won all 11 times. But if Democrats Diane Marseglia and Bob Harvie don't hold the county commission this year, we risk election deniers invalidating our votes in 2024.
These races are so, SO important – I really can't say it enough. And that's why I'm asking everyone to get involved in these final days.
[So, team, can you make sure we end the culture wars in our schools and protect our freedom to vote? We've got just 3 days left to make an impact. Please chip in!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72773223/436370035/1170613842?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20231104_fr_tandem_cand_kw_30da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTcwNzUyOC0xYTdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2jm-PlU6TfwnmIdwz5N3T61kFT_cz_NIY0T9ixMEySc=)

clean_body: In just 3 days, we have an opportunity to put an end to the culture wars, book bans, and election conspiracy theories that Republicans are pushing into our schools and election boards. | = It’s go-time, Pennsylvania! Election Day 2023 is almost here, and we need all hands on deck to win. In just 3 days, we have an opportunity to put an end to the culture wars, book bans, and election conspiracy theories that Republicans are pushing into our schools and election boards. I'll be knocking on doors and talking to voters today and tomorrow. I'm also asking everyone to do their part by supporting Neighbors United and Bucks United – they are our boots on the ground in these critical county races. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = Here's a bit more on why these races are so important: 🎓Central Bucks School Board The culture wars are sadly alive and well in Bucks County schools. I testified before the school board in the spring about how they are making the lives of kids of color, LGBTQ+ kids, and anyone who does not fit into their self-righteous and hateful definition of "normal" a living hell. Brian Fitzpatrick also just made an endorsement in this race. Another sign he's on the side of the culture wars, not Pennsylvania. Let's send a message on Tuesday by helping to elect compassionate and commonsense candidates who care about our kids, not BS culture wars! 🗳Bucks County Commission Our county commission oversees one of the most important parts of our democracy – our elections. In 2020, Donald Trump sued our county 11 times to try and overturn the will of the voters. The county won all 11 times. But if Democrats Diane Marseglia and Bob Harvie don't hold the county commission this year, we risk election deniers invalidating our votes in 2024. These races are so, SO important – I really can't say it enough. And that's why I'm asking everyone to get involved in these final days. = = Thanks for being in this fight with me, \- Ashley | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. So while some have all eyes on the 2024 race, we’re also focusing on the people voting right now in more than half of states across the country. And Tuesday is the last day for folks to cast their ballots to elect leaders from city halls to the governor’s mansion. I hope you’ll take a moment to read about the local voting rights champions that Fair Fight recently endorsed in Georgia and then, if you’re able,= | = Of all the races taking place, municipal elections are some of the most important when it comes to making sure voters can make their voices heard. From access to healthcare, to tackling the climate crisis, to funding for our public schools, to ensuring equal access to the ballot box, local elections are critical to moving our communities forward. With your support, we’re equipping candidates with resources to fundraise, organize, and advocate to protect the freedom to vote for years to come. = = Thank you for everything you do, Nicole Robinson Political Director, Fair Fight | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. If you would like to receive fewer emails from us, please click . If you would like to no longer receive emails, please . | | PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT

subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.

body:
My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=62828fcac57e49d58e1f12a0efe185d3&_e=5D83QSXheWQmVCuOua0QVGylH0glSxR6dCvLnW1Gk7jKv_YFdzZ6tNcp7XNklNb-7ul5Y83n9ibgk8gC2iOq2yALSRr45t144RTRZ1f_CEUMjJEjQq1NIYQag9XFyBhe7ZozVHpbFXIbl93au9_Ws8FiruYshJVHkeLazSaR3kMW8qX3p9m7VhD1hlcL-JgDJAukgVr4IHjJas5q37--scwhKaThZTFNKvKW1SLW_RROOnbC5EB2CzPVo9XFn-EpwHBaXXWlUDWyMJwdb6dTskcjddymIlGxxdGA-iph5mcXp1mkpXGhbe1p_4aoigHYmVfhad7TkwB4UqvjykifRPtwC5OswnZ3AjFYE91CAgmSUqaB0oHntk7idNoDnt8nHu4BmVxwoR0H5UdFzJ4IPIb8yiYBzp_XvwmJId3nOoZjMK1p4CWXcnymjFDiP5IhPAHpsh6mNjmcKdGh9g_7zxboc1d_NUyjzIBVR4lMLQw%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=62828fcac57e49d58e1f12a0efe185d3&_e=5D83QSXheWQmVCuOua0QVGylH0glSxR6dCvLnW1Gk7jKv_YFdzZ6tNcp7XNklNb-7ul5Y83n9ibgk8gC2iOq2yALSRr45t144RTRZ1f_CEUMjJEjQq1NIYQag9XFyBhe7ZozVHpbFXIbl93au9_Ws8FiruYshJVHkeLazSaR3kMW8qX3p9m7VhD1hlcL-JgDJAukgVr4IHjJas5q37--scwhKaThZTFNKvKW1SLW_RROOnbC5EB2CzPVo9XFn-EpwHBaXXWlUDWyMJwdb6dTskcjddymIlGxxdGA-iph5mcXp1mkpXGhbe1p_4aoigHYAeMCiJ7p-rQGyq9f2Zc0QZ4H2MG7s2_b0jJ1Pvxab1tqa5PLYrHuPbjI2za54X7QxwsjOsNYoXDBS2AyDk_tywAXoowyVET_EYpfm4R4hXbx4TaH6JvjetO2EIANS3jQjQuQhdiuzc7aJ88zLxLAexcLLJLmHWQLelMIKxnn9Wk%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=62828fcac57e49d58e1f12a0efe185d3&_e=5D83QSXheWQmVCuOua0QVGylH0glSxR6dCvLnW1Gk7jKv_YFdzZ6tNcp7XNklNb-7ul5Y83n9ibgk8gC2iOq2yALSRr45t144RTRZ1f_CEUMjJEjQq1NIYQag9XFyBhe7ZozVHpbFXIbl93au9_Ws8FiruYshJVHkeLazSaR3kMW8qX3p9m7VhD1hlcL-JgDJAukgVr4IHjJas5q37--scwhKaThZTFNKvKW1SLW_RROOnbC5EB2CzPVo9XFn-EpwHBaXXWlUDWyMJwdb6dTskcjddymIlGxxdGA-iph5mcXp1mkpXGhbe1p_4aoigHYsgj3LwfELuvzxNKJ2Ayi3p1czVriw2z_xBfH1HREdOFULZ9_srbRPePfCz2KId5rytP8VlZHZeV_RSSLNdF4ZGfoyzODtC_GJJ8orxGhgwclz0EWuQW6c8hAorwhJLTl9MBHlX-6TxHYt8wunyMa83L8P1IKbTJwkxUEYgt7qh0%3D "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?

---
Thanks for all you do.

In liberty,
Speaker Mike Johnson

body:
We are in the final days of the race that will determine Kentucky's future. This is it, Peter.

We are in the final days of the race that will determine Kentucky's future. Soon, we'll find out whether we can continue moving our Commonwealth forward under Andy's leadership OR if we let Andy's opponent drag us backward.

With so much on the line, we can't afford to rest now. That's why we've been asking this grassroots team to power us through these final days and help us fight back against the more than $21 MILLION being spent to attack Andy. clean_body: | | | = Hey folks, It won’t surprise you that this week has been very hectic for all of us here at Defend Democracy PAC – today especially, as it’s the final day of early voting, and we’re trying to get as many folks to the polls as possible before 7pm. I don’t have as much time as I’d like to sit down and write this, so I’m just going to get straight to the point: We’re running low on resources that we need to fund get-out-the-vote efforts and provide urgent funding to candidates who need last-minute support. If everyone reading this email made a $20 contribution, we could expand our canvassing reach and make sure every eligible voter is prepared to cast their ballot either today or on Tuesday. = | | | = | | = Thank you for your tireless support. – Elaine | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. It's candidate petition season in Illinois, and as a courtesy to statewide candidates, Illinois Review is distributing candidate petition information.

In accordance with Illinois Review policy, Illinois Review does not make political endorsements and the distribution of candidate petition information should not be construed as an endorsement.

body:
# [#]2023 PRIORITIES SURVEY
Recipient: Top Grassroots Supporter
Survey Status: Not Submitted
TAKE THE SURVEY NOW → [https://go.josh4congress.com/a/prisv-2311-1]

As we continue into our last quarter of the year, we want to hear from you! We want to know what issues are most important to you and what you want to see the 118th Congress focus on.

Josh and all of us at Team Gottheimer are committed to putting Jersey Values first. Will you share what issues matter most to you?

TAKE OUR SURVEY NOW → [https://go.josh4congress.com/a/prisv-2311-1]

This survey will take you less than a minute to complete, and we need to hear from 5,000 supporters like you before the end of the week!

https://go.josh4congress.com/a/prisv-2311-1 [https://go.josh4congress.com/a/prisv-2311-1]

Thank you for your time. We look forward to reading your responses!

All of us at Team Gottheimer
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. Hi there Friend,

It's Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

_**I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. **_

I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice.

I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree.

As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values.

---

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Tomorrow is one year out from Election Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=771%2E135344%2EruKPqf)

Friend --
Tomorrow marks one year out from Election Day for our U.S. Senate race in Michigan. In that spirit, I wanted to take a moment today to share what our campaign has been up to so far, lay out the stakes of this race, and lay out a plan for defending this seat.
**_CAMPAIGNING ACROSS MICHIGAN_**
One of the things I LOVE about running for Senate is traveling the great state of Michigan. It's an opportunity to meet people face-to-face and engage them on the issues in turn. And so far, our campaign has visited 25 counties across the state.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231104-1-30&t=2&akid=771%2E135344%2EruKPqf)
Last month, I stopped by the UAW picket line to stand with workers striking for better wages and working conditions. Blue Cross Blue Shield and the Detroit casino workers have also gone on strike. It was great to see Michigan continuing to lead the way on pushing for the security of a middle class life. And just last week, UAW reached tentative agreements to win record pay increases for workers at the Big Three automakers.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231104-1-30&t=3&akid=771%2E135344%2EruKPqf)
Back in September, after a 3-year COVID hiatus, the big Labor Day parade returned to Detroit. The event was an important reminder that we are going through a once-in-a-generation moment for organized Labor. When we stand together, we can ensure that companies making record profits negotiate record contracts, particularly with workers having to stretch every dollar further.
**_ENDORSEMENTS FROM LOCAL LEADERS AND ELECTED OFFICIALS_**
**Along the way, our campaign has received endorsements from more than 100 local and elected leaders.** I am also honored to have the support of so many other leaders, including former Detroit Mayor David Bing, Congressman Jamie Raskin, State Senator Mallory McMorrow, Congresswoman Haley Stevens, Oakland County Executive Dave Coulter, State Senator Sarah Anthony, and other elected officials and local leaders from Oakland County, Wayne County, and mid-Michigan.
**_UNIONS AND ORGANIZATIONS_**
In addition to the 16 major unions that endorsed our campaign over the summer, we also earned the support of the Michigan Education Association and were able to spend some time with their members in Macomb County recently. We’ve also earned the support of EMILYs List, End Citizens United/Let America Vote, GIFFORDS PAC, VoteVets, Elect Democratic Women, and Foreign Policy for America.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231104-1-30&t=4&akid=771%2E135344%2EruKPqf)
**_THE STAKES OF THIS RACE_**
National Republicans recognize that their path to winning the White House and control of the Senate hinges on Michigan. It's why Donald Trump came to town in September to energize the Republican base and lay the groundwork for a tough Senate race in 2024. As of today, with a year left, we’ve had two serious Republican opponents enter the race: former Congressman Mike Rogers, former Detroit Police Chief James Craig, and we are hearing rumors that former Congressman Peter Meijer will also enter the race.
Given the competition, it will take a thoughtful strategy to reach voters through TV and digital ads, hire staff, and blanket the entire state with yard signs over the next year. Since I'm not accepting money from corporate PACs, that means our campaign needs to keep up a steady drumbeat through the response to emails like this one.
Here's why early investments matter: the donation you make today will allow us to be strategic and plan for the months ahead -- like reserving airtime for TV advertising, digital advertising, stocking up on yard signs, bumper stickers, and campaign literature. In the spring, TV stations open up their ad time for the fall. So the earlier we make our reservations, the better inventory we get -- aka the time slots where we’re guaranteed to get the most eyeballs.
[**Making an early contribution in honor of tomorrow being exactly a year to go is one of the best ways to make the greatest impact on this race. That’s why I would really love to earn your support:](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231104-1-30&t=5&akid=771%2E135344%2EruKPqf)**

It's an opportunity to meet people face-to-face and engage them on the issues in turn. And so far, our campaign has visited 25 counties across the state. Last month, I stopped by the UAW picket line to stand with workers striking for better wages and working conditions. Blue Cross Blue Shield and the Detroit casino workers have also gone on strike. It was great to see Michigan continuing to lead the way on pushing for the security of a middle class life. And just last week, UAW reached tentative agreements to win record pay increases for workers at the Big Three automakers. Back in September, after a 3-year COVID hiatus, the big Labor Day parade returned to Detroit. | | Why am I planning to complete 67 quarter-mile laps in the rain today? If you answered "because you are crazy," you are right. **It makes me crazy that the Democrats have to perform perfectly in the next Senate election to save the Senate from Mitch McConnell.** _Only 10 Red seats are up, and NONE are swing seats._ The Democrats have 23 seats up: One is in deep red territory (West Virginia), and SEVEN are swing seats. **We have to win SEVEN out of SEVEN swing seats to hold FIFTY seats.** That plus a Democratic Vice President will give us control of the Senate, the ability to confirm judicial and executive nominees, and a fighting chance to fund needed programs for working Americans and strong tax reform bills. And if — God forbid — Trump wins, we desperately need the Senate as a counterweight! Anything less than SEVEN victories in SEVEN swing seats and we are toast! [**If this makes you as crazy as it makes me, please send SEVEN Benjamins (or any amount!) today for The Race to Save the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72778326/436388432/-1280472423?refcode=2023-11-04-race&recurring=&amount=12&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6c42ad42-207b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzQyYWQ0Mi0yMDdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6OJb8ykULX-rGvHyMDpWzafFXyMeKtGPsRXwohwKzww=) [DONATE NOW →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72778327/436388433/-1280472423?refcode=2023-11-04-race&recurring=&amount=12&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6c42ad42-207b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzQyYWQ0Mi0yMDdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6OJb8ykULX-rGvHyMDpWzafFXyMeKtGPsRXwohwKzww=) Together we can achieve the impossible. Let's do it. _Jeff_ PS: The SEVEN swing seats are Arizona, Montana, Ohio, Nevada, Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin. clean_body: Why am I planning to complete 67 quarter-mile laps in the rain today? | | | | Why am I planning to complete 67 quarter-mile laps in the rain today? If you answered "because you are crazy," you are right. It makes me crazy that the Democrats have to perform perfectly in the next Senate election to save the Senate from Mitch McConnell. Only 10 Red seats are up, and NONE are swing seats. The Democrats have 23 seats up: One is in deep red territory (West Virginia), and SEVEN are swing seats. We have to win SEVEN out of SEVEN swing seats to hold FIFTY seats. That plus a Democratic Vice President will give us control of the Senate, the ability to confirm judicial and executive nominees, and a fighting chance to fund needed programs for working Americans and strong tax reform bills. And if — God forbid — Trump wins, we desperately need the Senate as a counterweight! Anything less than SEVEN victories in SEVEN swing seats and we are toast! = = Together we can achieve the impossible. Let's do it. Jeff PS: The SEVEN swing seats are Arizona, Montana, Ohio, Nevada, Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin. PPS: I'm running 67 laps because I just turned 67, and I'm hoping you will say: "If that out-of-shape old guy is willing to suffer that much in the rain for the cause it must be important, =" ** | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by ** Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Eric Sorensen
subject: The Speaker of the House is a homophobe. Plain and simple.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPP4UMuwuVRNqveCSx_C8Tr_WxqvRITVpicMjAc_gyJEIM3DdDCQrY-1raRGt_p4TJHZtX6Y9dNqCn77JTlF1e1AN6NtqZpBzZshWA0CI5V_8gOvstKundN0DVl688N8uh6TXFE8De9x5FLovGY7iIThgFJG0r_H9eqSEXBp0nZ0dUaCyfMIJAx8FxL1rqPnXCOn1vR8YD4LZTmGVuhPnwdqgvM9FU97_vk4ZEAqbqczdXgNWjB3y5fCSe1RYOGv9CX5qe1muNoGTXtmaFKw9B6Ub9Cz911WePvZV3rV5hWEqaSHdAryF6v_kJW2uGrXqR7TZLyyNPYgXYGf83aVGQoUEr7aIG1j8s98D-27KAI01GpMv1OQivYkUAHqNAZmzqv/410/ac1DIZzOQJaZ1f2lyLiihA/h0/fVBZ3fht8JUQOuV0Jf2qE17ABHFOkZmGK9hfFqy6Lr0)
---
Peter, I'll never forget my first taste of the ugly, mudslinging that comes along with running for office.

We had just won the primary election in IL-17, and got word that some unmarked mailers had made their way to voters’ mailboxes. They contained blatantly homophobic attacks against one "E.R.I.C" -- or an “Extreme Radical Indoctrinating Children.” I wonder who that might be? 🤔
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPNYjaSf0HiRB1luFcP1Zl2aNIzCzqH_6Od7qUbHmHLyNQYzGLktEkq6bsX9UigWukv1waClM1SeRyobtzjgpfDMul39LJrmedF1tGGJvo6yZUld5v3HNBXmLSHamiOUF0jFTBEYZFPP0VuNAY31N5dEj_v4WC96zFgOYQdX6GhUHdk-pMw-oKuHMSlAsOlDE-acLQQ-jx2mL9_P6jxRi5nSUQjqPceGyMtSya7A4wT_0h0JqctndiNlLDByX-2aIrNo0PS7SMqR3u9qKCJt1LV6KFx8XU2F5xxU0NM_JZPvRJfaFcldDqFeemV8kHPoievX4Nrd83B-4NCpDeouuQIhK6sT67HckVvS78GhdcW6XWM8l8C0B6PYD5QTz6UR8HKdp1x0dCEhmfiiZTO2mdVU70Ek5q1hMwOIAxeql1N_FmCYHeMLUB0OhJ44BmgN6hJD96aIkmReqUeUsfcp8Fyg/410/ac1DIZzOQJaZ1f2lyLiihA/h1/Ts59Ez_H7Xr3LCRxROXQY2SV7Mu4Gns_jA3FBtnudiQ)
---
I'm no stranger to homophobia, but I always imagined this type of bigotry was becoming much more rare and fringe. **Enter Mike Johnson -- the newly-elected Speaker of the House and now the third person in the presidential line of succession.**
* Johnson is on record supporting the CRIMINALIZATION of sexual acts between consenting LGBTQ+ adults.
* He defends the idea of sterilizing trans people.
* He penned an op-ed contending that the "homosexual agenda" would “destroy society” as we know it.

The sad truth is that we're seeing this type of anti-LGBTQ+ sentiment creep up more and more in recent years. And with Mike Johnson holding the gavel, extremists are more emboldened than ever to turn their bigotry into actual legislation if we don't stop them.

**[I need your help, Peter. We need to stop anti-LGBTQ extremism and restore some decency to the halls of Congress. Please chip in $5 to ensure we're equipped to keep IL-17 blue so we can retake the House. clean_body: | | Peter, I'll never forget my first taste of the ugly, mudslinging that comes along with running for office. We had just won the primary election in IL-17, and got word that some unmarked mailers had made their way to voters’ mailboxes. They contained blatantly homophobic attacks against one "E.R.I.C" -- or an “Extreme Radical Indoctrinating Children.” I wonder who that might be? 🤔 | I'm no stranger to homophobia, but I always imagined this type of bigotry was becoming much more rare and fringe. Enter Mike Johnson -- the newly-elected Speaker of the House and now the third person in the presidential line of succession. Johnson is on record supporting the CRIMINALIZATION of sexual acts between consenting LGBTQ+ adults. He defends the idea of sterilizing trans people. He penned an op-ed contending that the "homosexual agenda" would “destroy society” as we know it. The sad truth is that we're seeing this type of anti-LGBTQ+ sentiment creep up more and more in recent years. And with Mike Johnson holding the gavel, extremists are more emboldened than ever to turn their bigotry into actual legislation if we don't stop them. ** Respectfully, \- Eric | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. name: HJ at United We Dream Action
subject: I want to live without fear of being separated from my family
body:
DACA ending means I could lose my job, be separated from my son, or be forced to leave the country I call home. | | | Hi Peter, my name is HJ. I’m a UWDA member, a DACA recipient, and a mother of one. The first time I applied for DACA, I had just learned I was pregnant with my son, Alex. I wanted to protect him and provide a healthy environment for him — and DACA was the best way to do that while undocumented. DACA allowed me to provide for my son and live without the fear of arbitrary detention or deportation. **But even I know it’s not enough — for me and Alex, for hundreds of thousands of other DACA families, and millions more who don’t qualify for the program.** It’s terrifying to think that DACA is likely heading to the Supreme Court, and we don’t know what the future holds. If DACA is shut down, I might lose my job, be separated from my son, or even be forced to leave the country I call home. **Peter, that’s the harsh reality for many mothers like me as long as DACA recipients lack permanent protections — which is why United We Dream Action is leading the fight to secure a pathway to citizenship.** Alex and I will continue to show up to rallies in Washington, D.C. and around the country to meet with members of Congress and make our demands for permanent protections undeniable. We need you in this fight too, Peter. **Will you make a donation to support the millions of mothers like me who are fighting for a pathway to citizenship? **The battle for the Senate is really heating up, and we need to stay on top of public opinion if we're going to win. But James is still waiting on your answer -- and his _urgent_ interview closes at midnight!**

[**James still needs _at least_ 18 more responses from Democrats in Pennsylvania before locking in any results, so please, will you take 3 minutes and help us WIN? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231104-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231104-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&akid=12504%2E9716520%2Es6L7ix)

From: James Carville
Date: Nov 3, 2023
Subject: I need your opinion ASAP.
| | | Hey, it's James Carville and I’m gonna level with you: **This might be the most important email I’ve sent your way in a while.**

See, in my decades working in politics, **I don’t think I’ve ever seen an election with more at stake than this one.**

That's why I'm holding strategy interviews with the very best, most engaged Democrats, and I've selected _you_ to represent Pennsylvania -- but time’s running out before the interview closes, and **I don't see your response![So please click here to get started right now and take the survey:](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231104-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231104-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&akid=12504%2E9716520%2Es6L7ix)**

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231104-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231104-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&akid=12504%2E9716520%2Es6L7ix)
---

I’ll be honest: If we lose the Senate, **Mitch McConnell and his flat-out wacko candidates will grind all President Biden's progress to a halt -- and that’ll just be the beginning!**

Republicans are out there taking away a woman’s right to choose, restricting the right to vote, flat-out denying climate change... **And unless Democrats get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans are gonna control the Senate pretty soon.**

That's where you come in. I need to hear from _real voters like you_ \-- not more political insiders -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate.

**I selected you specifically, so please, will you join my interview by completing a quick survey?** **[www.dscc.org/DemocraticInterviewNovember/](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231104-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231104-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&akid=12504%2E9716520%2Es6L7ix)**

| [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231104-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231104-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&akid=12504%2E9716520%2Es6L7ix)
---

Thank you.

\- James

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=13&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231104-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231104-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&akid=12504%2E9716520%2Es6L7ix)

name: Giffords.org
subject: BREAKING: The Supreme Court is hearing a challenge against the federal bump stock ban
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Will you add your name today to call on the Supreme Court to keep the federal ban on bump stocks in place?
#

Team -
The Supreme Court just announced that it will hear a challenge to the federal ban on bump stocks. These are devices that convert semi-automatic firearms into fully automatic firearms.
[**Will you please add your name to call on the Supreme Court to keep the federal ban on bump stocks in place?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_bumpstocks_pet_nov23/?source=em231104-1-30&refcode2=6831.3935704.F1lZ3o&akid=6831%2E3935704%2EF1lZ3o)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_bumpstocks_pet_nov23/?source=em231104-1-30&refcode2=6831.3935704.F1lZ3o&akid=6831%2E3935704%2EF1lZ3o)**
Bump stocks pose a grave risk to public safety. They circumvent the federal ban on automatic weapons and were used in the 2017 Las Vegas shooting, which left 60 people dead and 867 people injured.
Classifying bump stocks as machine guns is both commonsense and constitutional. There’s good reason why fully automatic rifles are heavily regulated by the federal government. The Supreme Court should use this same reasoning to keep the ban on bump stocks intact.
[**This is important. Please add your name today to join us in calling on the Supreme Court to keep the federal ban on bump stocks in place.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_bumpstocks_pet_nov23/?source=em231104-1-30&refcode2=6831.3935704.F1lZ3o&akid=6831%2E3935704%2EF1lZ3o)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_bumpstocks_pet_nov23/?source=em231104-1-30&refcode2=6831.3935704.F1lZ3o&akid=6831%2E3935704%2EF1lZ3o)**
Thanks for speaking up. Lives are on the line.
\- The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=6831%2E3935704%2EF1lZ3o) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Why Americans don't trust the news in one photo
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72779491/436393431/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmYxMDZmZDItMjI3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=40UCX3wIMimk6RkLT2xscIIMEEKeJRjw1rfEsKRK6xw=&emci=2414c8ac-897a-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=2f106fd2-227b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=14016711)
The media coverage leading up to Donald Trump’s first election in 2016 was abysmal, Peter.
TV news channels aired countless hours of his rallies, his speeches, and even his plane idling on the tarmac. Meanwhile, even print publications uncritically parroted his wild claims and conspiracy theories, failing repeatedly to provide the context that would have made it clear such musings were untethered from reality.
**Unfortunately, it’s clear that this time around will be no different. Despite the media’s duty to inform the public, too many news organizations are already giving Trump wall-to-wall coverage in an attempt to drive profits and boost their ratings.**
[**Will you chip in $5 today to help us fight back against this kind of sensationalized, profit-driven coverage? Courier Newsroom is committed to providing reliable, in-depth reporting for audiences in ‘news deserts’ across 8 battleground states, but we can’t do it without your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72779501/436393437/-542558346?refcode=em20231104&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmYxMDZmZDItMjI3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=40UCX3wIMimk6RkLT2xscIIMEEKeJRjw1rfEsKRK6xw=)
**Just take a look at the front page of _The_ _New York Times_ when Donald Trump was arraigned in Florida earlier this year:**
[****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72779504/436393446/-542558346?refcode=em20231104&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmYxMDZmZDItMjI3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=40UCX3wIMimk6RkLT2xscIIMEEKeJRjw1rfEsKRK6xw=)
**The fact that 185 million Americans say they don’t trust the news should be a wake-up call for mainstream media organizations who continue to put ratings and profit ahead of informative coverage and our democracy.**
But rather than focusing on the 37 charges brought against Trump by the Justice Department or the widespread misinformation campaign he’s pursuing, the _Times_ chooses to center the fact that he pled not guilty, calling it a “momentous scene.”
As the presidential race ramps up, this kind of coverage is only going to help Trump in the long run — just as it did in 2016. **And that’s why we’re dedicated to doing things differently.**
At Courier Newsroom, we’re focused on providing informative, fact-based coverage of local events in 8 battleground states. We serve audiences in ‘news deserts’ that lack other reliable sources of local reporting, and our journalists pick up the national media’s slack by calling misinformation out for what it is.
[**But this work takes resources, and we rely on the generous support of people like you to help fund our efforts. So if you’re tired of the media constantly putting profits ahead of informative coverage, will you chip in $5 today and help us keep bringing the facts to communities that need it?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72779506/436393453/-542558346?refcode=em20231104&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmYxMDZmZDItMjI3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=40UCX3wIMimk6RkLT2xscIIMEEKeJRjw1rfEsKRK6xw=)
**[Chip in »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72779509/436393463/-542558346?refcode=em20231104&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmYxMDZmZDItMjI3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=40UCX3wIMimk6RkLT2xscIIMEEKeJRjw1rfEsKRK6xw=)**
Thanks for supporting us in our mission,
The Courier Newsroom Team

Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)

clean_body: The media coverage leading up to Donald Trump’s first election in 2016 was abysmal, Peter. TV news channels aired countless hours of his rallies, his speeches, and even his plane idling on the tarmac. Meanwhile, even print publications uncritically parroted his wild claims and conspiracy theories, failing repeatedly to provide the context that would have made it clear such musings were untethered from reality. Unfortunately, it’s clear that this time around will be no different. Despite the media’s duty to inform the public, too many news organizations are already giving Trump wall-to-wall coverage in an attempt to drive profits and boost their ratings. = Just take a look at the front page of The New York Times when Donald Trump was arraigned in Florida earlier this year: = The fact that 185 million Americans say they don’t trust the news should be a wake-up call for mainstream media organizations who continue to put ratings and profit ahead of informative coverage and our democracy. But rather than focusing on the 37 charges brought against Trump by the Justice Department or the widespread misinformation campaign he’s pursuing, the Times chooses to center the fact that he pled not guilty, calling it a “momentous scene.” As the presidential race ramps up, this kind of coverage is only going to help Trump in the long run — just as it did in 2016. And that’s why we’re dedicated to doing things differently. At Courier Newsroom, we’re focused on providing informative, fact-based coverage of local events in 8 battleground states. We serve audiences in ‘news deserts’ that lack other reliable sources of local reporting, and our journalists pick up the national media’s slack by calling misinformation out for what it is. = = Thanks for supporting us in our mission, The Courier Newsroom Team Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

Friend,

It’s Governor Glenn Youngkin. I’m humbly asking for your help in Virginia.

We are just days away from what I believe is a critical election in America. We have an opportunity in Virginia to prove that commonsense, conservative leadership and policies can transform a state that just two years ago was predominantly Blue.

If we win, we can shock America once again and lead the nation in a direction that prioritizes growth, opportunity and freedom. We only need to win a few competitive seats to hold the Virginia House, flip the Senate, and advance an agenda that will move Virginia toward the goal of being the best place to live, work, and raise a family.

**[But we cannot do this without your partnership!](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e99f26b0bbc047d0808930ecef4e9254&_e=ZGcHpqdoh2y2NynLgafWKFsClC4puieuV6JWpmNqvBQUATcGiEL3DlTcQ6EENZa3MAr1w0u-fOFJejbtjer5uuTN-Fovh264nr0s2lBS8hNO6blCaCdzHx8wt-kfuvQsmzsMkQnkSsNkHaNdTrltZKxn8fxzkRmxHQ7ZMAkR8qftxXQHpwPJ3lPDcTgkEdh1cD1r-IcYxukJtDN__28XQjJPfBWc793PG7v_80ndBhxEgKy_i6O5z_icMCJcHi5q7OV5iAC9kxC17tiwD05kufKJDu_SD5oW7y9L7arFoMrOgKMCngc9q6xkzT-BRSqmLG-k6qSGdwOQ5q0EEfxlkAT8_hOW-7zLPhZD-aJgReWntT_X7Q51IzppwvDwDz4A)**

clean_body: | Friend, It’s Governor Glenn Youngkin. I’m humbly asking for your help in Virginia. We are just days away from what I believe is a critical election in America. We have an opportunity in Virginia to prove that commonsense, conservative leadership and policies can transform a state that just two years ago was predominantly Blue. If we win, we can shock America once again and lead the nation in a direction that prioritizes growth, opportunity and freedom. We only need to win a few competitive seats to hold the Virginia House, flip the Senate, and advance an agenda that will move Virginia toward the goal of being the best place to live, work, and raise a family. The Democrat machine including Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, the DNC and every major, national Democrat-affiliated entity have made Virginia’s elections a priority — pouring countless millions into Virginia to spread messages of mistruth and scare tactics. That’s why I am asking committed donors like you from across the country to band together to demonstrate that good ideas, capable leaders and optimism are needed now more than ever. | I know I can count on you. Thank you for your continued support. Glenn Youngkin Contributions to Spirit of Virginia are not deductible for tax purposes as charitable contributions. | Promises Made, Promises Kept.
