[**Sign my petition calling on Postmaster General Louis DeJoy to step down!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72779653/436393731/476971873?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1242-su-nd&refcode=jtk1242-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTEwNmZkMi0yMjdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1IB74ZUhAZJL04BddHNQ42p5tA5pC_1saF5nZm36dkY=&emci=f42af4df-a879-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=39106fd2-227b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)

---
Peter, from the moment the USPS Board of Governors selected GOP megadonor and Trump supporter Louis DeJoy as postmaster general, our nation’s postal service has suffered.

In fall 2020 – a moment when, in a swell of true democracy, there was a record number of mail-in ballots – mail delivery slowed _drastically_ under DeJoy's control. In some areas, on-time mail delivery fell to 60% during the election months.

This wasn’t DeJoy’s only alarming move. He also stood in stark opposition to President Biden’s plan to help the USPS transition to all-electric vehicles in an effort to fight climate change. In fact, DeJoy went as far as launching his own plan to replace the majority of the USPS fleet with gas-powered trucks.
**But Louis DeJoy’s worst offense by _far_ ****is his treatment of USPS mail carriers.**

DeJoy is overworking mail carriers, cutting their pay, and _refusing_ to staff up after many employees have quit due to deteriorating working conditions. This has, in turn, led to the remaining workers being overworked to a dangerous and sometimes _deadly_ degree.

And with temperatures beginning to plummet as we head into winter, the vast majority of all USPS trucks don't even have an adequate heating system. While DeJoy forced overworked mail carriers to broil in the incredibly hot summer months, he is now letting them shiver through the busy holiday months ahead.
DeJoy’s harsh working conditions are putting the lives of mail carriers on the line – and it's our duty to stop him. Peter, I'm calling on 5,000 fearless fighters to join me in standing up for our USPS workers before midnight tonight, but it looks like I'm still missing _your_ name. So please, before the busy season begins:

**[Will you add your name now to my petition calling on Louis DeJoy to step down?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72779673/436393737/476971873?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1242-su-nd&refcode=jtk1242-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTEwNmZkMi0yMjdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1IB74ZUhAZJL04BddHNQ42p5tA5pC_1saF5nZm36dkY=&emci=f42af4df-a879-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=39106fd2-227b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Add my name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72779681/436393759/476971873?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1242-su-nd&refcode=jtk1242-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTEwNmZkMi0yMjdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1IB74ZUhAZJL04BddHNQ42p5tA5pC_1saF5nZm36dkY=&emci=f42af4df-a879-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=39106fd2-227b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)

clean_body: We have to do as much as we can | | | Peter, we only have one year before the 2024 elections, and we have a LOT of work to do. In 2020, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris won Georgia by just 0.23% of the votes cast, and right now, polls show that the 2024 presidential election could be just as close! In fact, some polls even show Joe Biden BEHIND Donald Trump! If Donald Trump takes the lead for good in Georgia, he’ll work to impose his far-right, extreme MAGA agenda that already failed Georgians the first time around. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Georgia is one of just a handful of states that will determine who the next president will be, and your donation will go a long way toward stopping Donald Trump from retaking the presidency. We’ve all heard Trump brag about how he killed Roe v. Wade and appointed the most conservative Supreme Court of all time. It’s clear that in a second term, Trump would go even further with his extreme MAGA agenda that would hurt millions of Americans. = Thank you, GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

Peter,

Most people know Mike Johnson as the new Speaker of the House, a constitutional law attorney, and small business owner – but to our family, he’s husband, dad, and role model.

My name is Kelly Johnson, and I’m Mike’s wife and his number one supporter. We’ve been married for 23 years now, and I have never known anyone who is more tirelessly committed to serving God, our country, and its people—or who fights as hard for our principles every single day. He was born with that servant’s heart.

Mike is respected for his courage and integrity and trusted for his wisdom and insight. He is honest, principled, smart, and unshakeable. That’s precisely what America needs in these times of unprecedented challenge.

[**I wanted you to hear a bit more about my husband Mike, from me, the person who knows him best. Would you be willing to spare a moment to watch this video I recorded for you?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0fb4a48c3be34c08b90b89705d906d78&_e=fnYyk8D_w-dsHGRXuxlwmvc3jutNYf-DKf03qj1Dt5XD7U3zBw49UJiI2mGidqzovXBaCIE6eYuojUqPWs5lKXEa-htkTiQD7R_MN_yOJX71hNuefRc6tQtuad1Y2YDAfTyJlscsarg2Z_wKKc2Kgd2lONaFbqpfY0Al6Al8y1KhEvFLOJdGF2Rsu-seBvmavEq0c9j1V-2D13kTVy3i-4nK2UcGIvfciNP7rPqdNgf1FJdRG2ugm4Spc-_cWYGwGj35aRpCylLpZEGXCTzztwjl5pcPOfC1vnTt8HNuD7-iSirpy-SMDIIeszhf59UWnwkm0HaOUyhLJRhR71wV2DmbFSiocJH5To5LruPzKol0DR13LLfUwrbzQMDf-Rgf)

Peter, we have only **THREE DAYS until Election Day, and we’re facing a critical budget shortfall. **
That’s why we just launched an **emergency Election Week Fund** to help close the gap and power more Emerge victories at the ballot box. **[But we’re counting on your support before midnight tonight to help Democratic women run and WIN!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72780410/436396006/-1013658139?amounts=10,20,100,250,500&refcode=jtk1353-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhMzE0Mzg5LTIzN2ItZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Cb4O7L4QvxNi6mTqScFIia1x2tqqDUbHhKaM2xQcVtU=)**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72780411/436396007/-1013658139?amounts=10,20,100,250,500&refcode=jtk1353-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhMzE0Mzg5LTIzN2ItZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Cb4O7L4QvxNi6mTqScFIia1x2tqqDUbHhKaM2xQcVtU=)
Peter, this election is a big deal, and we can’t afford to take it for granted. _Here’s why closing our budget gap is so important right now:_
We have **over 200 trailblazing Emerge women on the ballot, ready to build strong, women-led majorities that can protect our rights in every state.** In Kentucky, all four women running for statewide office on the November ballot are Emerge alums, including Col. Pam Stevenson, Candidate for Kentucky Attorney General. If elected, she will be the first Black woman attorney general in Kentucky. In Virginia, first-time candidate and Emerge alum Lily Franklin is running for the House of Delegates in District 41. Through hard work and dedication, she has made her highly competitive race, winnable. In New Jersey, Britnee Timberlake, current Assemblywoman for District 34 is now a candidate for the State Senate. She was mentored by the late New Jersey Lieutenant Governor Sheila Oliver who recruited Timberlake to her assembly seat when she became Lieutenant Governor herself.

We need these women and countless others to fight for us at every level of office, to push back against the far-right, and to send a strong message to MAGA Republicans ahead of the 2024 races that our democracy belongs to us!
We deserve new voices in leadership who represent _all_ our communities and put people, our rights, and our futures first. **Emerge has been building a bench of Democratic women to do exactly that, but we can’t wait until “big” election years to do it. **
That’s why we’re calling on our top supporters – including you! – to help hit our emergency goal. But here’s what we found when we checked your official supporter record:

**We MUST seize the opportunity to transform politics here and now. Because the GOP isn’t waiting until 2024 to unleash their anti-science, anti-women, and anti-voter policies. **They’re aggressively pushing their out-of-touch agenda and positioning their candidates to lock in right-wing power for years to come. We can’t let that happen, Peter, but we need your help to stop it.
**[Please, don’t pass up this opportunity to power our movement forward. Donate $10 or more to Emerge now – ahead of this crucial Election Day – to power bold Democratic women to victory in 2023 and beyond.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72780413/436396009/-1013658139?amounts=10,20,100,250,500&amount=10&refcode=jtk1353-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhMzE0Mzg5LTIzN2ItZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Cb4O7L4QvxNi6mTqScFIia1x2tqqDUbHhKaM2xQcVtU=)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, we have only THREE DAYS until Election Day, and we’re facing a critical budget shortfall. That’s why we just launched an emergency Election Week Fund to help close the gap and power more Emerge victories at the ballot box. = = Peter, this election is a big deal, and we can’t afford to take it for granted. Here’s why closing our budget gap is so important right now: We have over 200 trailblazing Emerge women on the ballot, ready to build strong, women-led majorities that can protect our rights in every state. In Kentucky, all four women running for statewide office on the November ballot are Emerge alums, including Col. Pam Stevenson, Candidate for Kentucky Attorney General. If elected, she will be the first Black woman attorney general in Kentucky. In Virginia, first-time candidate and Emerge alum Lily Franklin is running for the House of Delegates in District 41. Through hard work and dedication, she has made her highly competitive race, winnable. In New Jersey, Britnee Timberlake, current Assemblywoman for District 34 is now a candidate for the State Senate. She was mentored by the late New Jersey Lieutenant Governor Sheila Oliver who recruited Timberlake to her assembly seat when she became Lieutenant Governor herself. We need these women and countless others to fight for us at every level of office, to push back against the far-right, and to send a strong message to MAGA Republicans ahead of the 2024 races that our democracy belongs to us! We deserve new voices in leadership who represent all our communities and put people, our rights, and our futures first. Emerge has been building a bench of Democratic women to do exactly that, but we can’t wait until “big” election years to do it. That’s why we’re calling on our top supporters – including you! – to help hit our emergency goal. But here’s what we found when we checked your official supporter record: | | Official Contribution Record Supporter ID: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donated today?: PENDING Suggested donation: $10 | | = We MUST seize the opportunity to transform politics here and now. Because the GOP isn’t waiting until 2024 to unleash their anti-science, anti-women, and anti-voter policies. They’re aggressively pushing their out-of-touch agenda and positioning their candidates to lock in right-wing power for years to come. We can’t let that happen, Peter, but we need your help to stop it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately. | | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for your urgent support, Sandra Bishop Chief Development Officer, Emerge | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Hawley Official Campaign Messaging
subject: You have one (1) unread message from Josh Hawley
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0f8a72a528b24873acf8c4d6410f0b1a&_e=YsHa21w1COIqP5oFeRx9AIzbpJ4MvpyzGh6CYLVFAqw-KqFkbZdNzhkVGiVGgyw1PfRGwayDgtylVis2RM3X8fVGXjndFNkZ84ZZWin_3cKK2q6-kl3sTBE74AtPXPs0-X6l7MVFFrd1Rh6mkl5x_AMwC9qsaRGSzqp5nZiMLx8F7HQv42P_kBeek99IEWV52T9JX4eH91j0RqcLO5p0hcC1N9AaQ5xSDbA4qboeAhOrrv3uRdoTtaynWvmuXyPNi1vrqyy6nHorvh17xCmOivXbbOymmVs4hg04knYM0v7Z27zykUtKKQxiJKYy6dOc2jJHNn2GRPIuqzC_J71qDDr8WBMxcoS5BMFZFKK1qSYxWRzf990QdsLqcnc_RSB9)
---
Peter, it’s Josh Hawley.

I know you’ve been getting a lot of emails from my campaign, but I wanted to make sure I reached out personally, because this is important.

**Last month, we were short on our fundraising goal.**

I didn’t want to admit it, but it’s true.

This race is going to be close no matter which way it goes. But if we want to win, we can’t afford to have another miss like this.

**[I’m getting nervous we’ll fall behind against this month, and if we have any more misses, we’re going to have to make some seriously hard decisions. Will you pitch in now to help us get back on track?](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0f8a72a528b24873acf8c4d6410f0b1a&_e=YsHa21w1COIqP5oFeRx9AIzbpJ4MvpyzGh6CYLVFAqw-KqFkbZdNzhkVGiVGgyw1PfRGwayDgtylVis2RM3X8fVGXjndFNkZ84ZZWin_3cKK2q6-kl3sTBE74AtPXPs0-X6l7MVFFrd1Rh6mkl5x_AMwC9qsaRGSzqp5nZiMLx8F7HQv42P_kBeek99IEWV52T9JX4eH91j0RqcLO5p0hcC1N9AaQ5xSDbA4qboeAhP-na2tXZW790tV6KWQSGB-xLHUC_NaT_jokFTqw7G_q0jZX46yKf8VMRKfz8Wc-V4Nrvt8c8iXR9W__cvAxbpscHt1_dOU-fWID_RN9STMK_7Femn7i94GJIIj3YwZxtieWuWX1g-BOrdkxDOEQvOL)**

---
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0f8a72a528b24873acf8c4d6410f0b1a&_e=YsHa21w1COIqP5oFeRx9AIzbpJ4MvpyzGh6CYLVFAqw-KqFkbZdNzhkVGiVGgyw1PfRGwayDgtylVis2RM3X8fVGXjndFNkZ84ZZWin_3cKK2q6-kl3sTBE74AtPXPs0-X6l7MVFFrd1Rh6mkl5x_AMwC9qsaRGSzqp5nZiMLx8F7HQv42P_kBeek99IEWV52T9JX4eH91j0RqcLO5p0hcC1N9AaQ5xSDbA4qboeAhN6n8O-rd02VR9QKAnnRuX5dMWw1iDwJBDntwPOfF5g1SRUUyondp4WK6K8uQ0PBoO9-ShcLMIUfyCXOMoO1rcJFMvfNqaFVUFMdmVyo3MtwoonktACnjZBVNlWt3Je9X4wmG_dynFHWchZ11lbuAQH)
---
Campaigns are _expensive_.

No matter whether they’re big or small, for the U.S. Senate or the local city council, there’s a ton of moving pieces.

And in incredibly tight, high-profile races like ours, it takes a major war chest to win.

_I don’t want to have to start dipping into our reserves._

**[If we’re going to take back our Senate majority, we HAVE to hold onto this seat, and I’m counting on you. I’m BEGGING - will you pitch in and help us fuel this fight?](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0f8a72a528b24873acf8c4d6410f0b1a&_e=YsHa21w1COIqP5oFeRx9AIzbpJ4MvpyzGh6CYLVFAqw-KqFkbZdNzhkVGiVGgyw1PfRGwayDgtylVis2RM3X8fVGXjndFNkZ84ZZWin_3cKK2q6-kl3sTBE74AtPXPs0-X6l7MVFFrd1Rh6mkl5x_AMwC9qsaRGSzqp5nZiMLx8F7HQv42P_kBeek99IEWV52T9JX4eH91j0RqcLO5p0hcC1N9AaQ5xSDbA4qboeAhMi2zrghDdQNGx1TbCaJ0ckaQaOW-7ZY5CUFRV7t7XWV76YXzNk3-uf27IU_wCwr3PZTq-sNpFHep0-_yOcDlBVUjYt0V8wrHJeEy6qxOtS6OBCGE-Ct8ErFIVHHby9vBF6G8tVzHIRSCDGpcnd-tF_)**

---
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0f8a72a528b24873acf8c4d6410f0b1a&_e=YsHa21w1COIqP5oFeRx9AIzbpJ4MvpyzGh6CYLVFAqw-KqFkbZdNzhkVGiVGgyw1PfRGwayDgtylVis2RM3X8fVGXjndFNkZ84ZZWin_3cKK2q6-kl3sTBE74AtPXPs0-X6l7MVFFrd1Rh6mkl5x_AMwC9qsaRGSzqp5nZiMLx8F7HQv42P_kBeek99IEWV52T9JX4eH91j0RqcLO5p0hcC1N9AaQ5xSDbA4qboeAhOUT9LjhVpB0U2h51650IoW9yZnEFN6-hq4e-Y9LPRh0Yj6BhUSFccrr2lZFl7vvM84SagXGszylmGqbtPNnrCTAsJaJgfuAMA_7WkciVc59WnK-0zF13W9X_dOTWBUdHF0c630HrXtuRDtBmrrE_dy)

Thank you, Josh Hawley

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: This tech billionaire’s super PAC may launch campaigns to oust Rashida Tlaib and Cori Bush.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

We have more bad news, Peter:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231104-cb-rt.kg6LUM&refcode=em20231104-31678&amount=3&t=1001&akid=31678%2E1203867%2EPRKcPA ]Tweet from Brian Schwartz: “Scoop: A super PAC funded largely by tech
billionaire Reid Hoffman may launch a primary campaign against
progressives Rashida Tlaib and Cori Bush. Hoffman’s political advisor is
in touch with the PAC’s leadership about the idea.”

The aptly named Mainstream Democrats PAC, largely funded by billionaire
and LinkedIn co-founder Reid Hoffman, is considering candidates to run
against Cori and Rashida in the 2024 Democratic primary.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231104-cb-rt.kg6LUM&refcode=em20231104-31678&amount=3&t=1002&akid=31678%2E1203867%2EPRKcPA ]Help us defend them by rushing a split contribution NOW →

This is yet another in a long line of attacks against these Justice
Democrats candidates in the last week alone, all in retaliation for their
calls for a ceasefire — which a majority of Americans support.

First, right-wing extremist Marjorie Taylor Greene introduced a resolution
to formally censure Rashida in Congress.

Then, a moderate Democrat who failed to hold Ferguson police accountable
announced he’s running to unseat Cori next year.

Now, AIPAC’s super PAC is running attack ads against Rashida while this
billionaire-funded super PAC recruits candidates to challenge both of
them.

We can’t imagine Congress without the unwavering, pro-peace leadership of
Cori and Rashida, but corporate- and billionaire-backed groups are rapidly
pulling out all the stops to unseat them next year.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231104-cb-rt.kg6LUM&refcode=em20231104-31678&amount=3&t=1003&akid=31678%2E1203867%2EPRKcPA ]It took a groundswell of progressive, grassroots support to elect Cori
and Rashida in the first place — now, we must come together to defend
them! Will you split a donation of any amount to Justice Democrats, Cori,
and Rashida today to fund our efforts to re-elect them?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231104-cb-rt.kg6LUM&refcode=em20231104-31678&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=31678%2E1203867%2EPRKcPA ]Contribute $3

— Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1023&akid=31678%2E1203867%2EPRKcPA ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1024&akid=31678%2E1203867%2EPRKcPA ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231104-31678-footer&t=1025&refcode2=31678_1203867_PRKcPA&akid=31678%2E1203867%2EPRKcPA

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=31678%2E1203867%2EPRKcPA

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: the UAW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek,
The Union Way of Life is sacred, and nobody knows that better than the United Auto Workers who spent weeks striking against the Big 3 Automakers for better contracts -- **_and won._** 🎉
In recent days the UAW reached tentative agreements with Stellantis, General Motors, and Ford. If agreed to by UAW workers, these agreements would be historic. I want to say CONGRATS to these workers on a BIG victory.
I was proud to visit UAW picket lines in Michigan, in Ohio, and right here in Pennsylvania because the deal they fought for was not only a better contract for them + their families, **it also proved to all of us how strong organized labor can be when we join together.**
Unions built this nation + built the middle class, and I will always stand with workers and fight for them in Washington. 💪
**[If you’re with me and ready to continue that fight in the Senate, chip in to help fuel our people-powered campaign today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231104-1?refcode=em20231104-1-8654&refcode2=8654_434096_O6aipv&akid=8654%2E434096%2EO6aipv)** 🙏
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231104-1?amount=5&refcode=em20231104-8654&refcode2=8654_434096_O6aipv&akid=8654%2E434096%2EO6aipv)**
Solidarity forever.
💛 John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20231104-8654-footer&t=1&refcode2=8654_434096_O6aipv&akid=8654%2E434096%2EO6aipv)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8654%2E434096%2EO6aipv)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8654%2E434096%2EO6aipv)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Senate control, the House majority, and the Presidency will all be decided in just 12 short months, Peter. The outcomes will determine the future of reproductive rights, the cost of living, climate change, healthcare, education, democracy, and so much more.
And right here in Maryland, we have a BIG decision to make.
**Do we want to elect a U.S. Senator who has spent her career fighting for Maryland’s working families?**
**Or would we rather a self-funded, multi-millionaire buy his way into even _more_ power in Washington, D.C.?**
The choice is ours, Peter. And it’s ALL going to come down to voter turnout, and whether or not we decide to exercise our most basic, fundamental right to vote next November.
**That’s why we’re asking just one simple question:[Are you committed to voting in 2024? Please, click here to let us know your response right away! →](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_231104_EN_Vote2024_A0_na_U1_X1_M1?t=10&akid=631%2E52803%2EP8SUQN)**

Or would we rather a self-funded, multi-millionaire buy his way into even more power in Washington, D.C.? The choice is ours, Peter. And it’s ALL going to come down to voter turnout, and whether or not we decide to exercise our most basic, fundamental right to vote next November. That’s why we’re asking just one simple question: | | | | Thanks for the quick response! —Alsobrooks HQ | | | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Katie Porter
subject: This email is a little more fun than most
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
While I’ve called California home for much of my adult life, I was born and raised on a farm in Iowa.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=32580%2E3422442%2ES77qDe)
While I’ve called California home for much of my adult life, I was born and raised on a farm in Iowa. And in fourth grade, I chose the state of California to do a state report on. I dug it up the other day:
Finding this report got me thinking about the unique job of not just being a U.S. Senator, but of being _California’s Senator._
I’ve heard time and time again that we need a Senator who forcefully pushes the federal government to invest in **affordable housing for Californians**. We need to make sure **climate investment is coming back to California,** where we lead the way in reducing pollution and creating clean energy. And we need someone who will help the best of California policy go national—**like two years of free community college.**
I’m proud to be a Californian, it’s where I’ve chosen to raise my kids and send them to school. Now, I’m ready to continue campaigning in every part and pocket of our great state.
Onward!
Katie Porter
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231104-1?refcode=EMAN23_1_FUN_20231104_V1_F&refcode2=32580_3422442_S77qDe&akid=32580%2E3422442%2ES77qDe)
PS: If you want some early 1980’s California travel tips, here’s a look inside the report!

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAN23_1_FUN_20231104_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=32580_3422442_S77qDe&akid=32580%2E3422442%2ES77qDe)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=32580%2E3422442%2ES77qDe)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=32580%2E3422442%2ES77qDe)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Brandon Presley
subject: this race is winnable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAPTUR FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72783588/436406542/780618327?refcode=231104_bp_split_img&ms=231104_bp_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzJmNzQzZS0yYTdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l0p5gjZm5GSykVW1t4XGBFbnjgyoe-zajgy3OHNF5Qw=)** Team, it’s been one heck of a ride, and I can hardly believe we're less than **4 DAYS** out from Election Day. Let me tell you where my race stands and how you can help power my campaign to the finish line, and make sure we re-elect Marcy Kaptur next November.

A recent poll shows my race _**VIRTUALLY TIED 45% to 46%**_. And the political experts at Cook Political Report just upgraded our chances of flipping Mississippi blue! They know what we know: Tate Reeves is beatable. [**The thing is, I can’t beat him by myself. I need the support of this grassroots team. So please, will you split $10 between Marcy Kaptur and my campaign? We're both in incredibly tough races, and any amount makes a major difference in our mission to defeat GOP extremism.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72783589/436406543/780618327?refcode=231104_bp_split_b1&ms=231104_bp_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzJmNzQzZS0yYTdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l0p5gjZm5GSykVW1t4XGBFbnjgyoe-zajgy3OHNF5Qw=) **[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72783590/436406544/780618327?refcode=231104_bp_split_b1&ms=231104_bp_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzJmNzQzZS0yYTdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l0p5gjZm5GSykVW1t4XGBFbnjgyoe-zajgy3OHNF5Qw=)** Friend, the truth is we didn’t need fancy stats to know that something big is happening here in Mississippi. You can just feel the energy for real change in every corner of the state. _And I am**all in** to make real change happen._ But Tate Reeves and his allies won't go down without a fight.
* They know the polls are tied.
* They know Reeves is one of the most unpopular governors in the country.
* They know that Mississippians have had enough of his failed leadership and lies.
* **But they also know that Reeves has a HUGE fundraising advantage over our campaign.**

It’s not easy to take on a well-funded, bought-and-paid-for politician like Tate Reeves. And because he knows this race is tight, he’s been throwing the kitchen sink at us every step of the way. The GOP is gearing up to do the same to Marcy. [**Mississippi can’t afford four more years of corrupt leadership, and we can't afford two more years of a GOP majority in Congress. So, I’m asking you to step up, friend. Please, will you split a donation between Marcy Kaptur and my campaign to keep our fundraising on track? We cannot afford to fall short or show any weakness during this crucial moment.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72783591/436406545/780618327?refcode=231104_bp_split_l2&ms=231104_bp_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzJmNzQzZS0yYTdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l0p5gjZm5GSykVW1t4XGBFbnjgyoe-zajgy3OHNF5Qw=) With immense gratitude, Brandon Presley

I'm just writing to say thank you for helping me make the first month of this campaign a HUGE success. https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=588e4fa9a33b7db5b46e4e18912f606f7d021c81ec7b89d7ba19b77cd0fc43d603cc74f2d29ba60693470f8a4e289fbabab17656f0f340de Because of your support, Republicans are now one step closer to flipping Connecticut CD-05 RED. Firing an entrenched Democrat is not an easy feat, and I knew that when I signed up for this race – but I love America too much to watch people like Jahana Hayes destroy the country so many of us hold near and dear. Peter, this fighting spirit can't stop now. If we want to increase our House Majority and FIRE one of the most radical Democrats from Congress, https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=588e4fa9a33b7db5b46e4e18912f606f7d021c81ec7b89d7ba19b77cd0fc43d603cc74f2d29ba60693470f8a4e289fbabab17656f0f340de then we must hit every single goal set between now and November 2024. Hi there, friend, did you see me on MSNBC this morning?

name: Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights
subject: we need yard signs at the polls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
There are still Ohioans that are undecided on Issue 1, and will be undecided until the moment they walk into their polling place.

| **Election Day is 3 days away, and we need to make sure that we have everything we need to secure a win for abortion rights.**

**This includes placing _at least_ three yard signs at every polling place in Ohio.**

**[_We're kicking off a GOTV Yard Sign Fund of $17,000 to place our final order of yard signs by MIDNIGHT. Political leaders must stop genocide and see Palestinians as human beings too. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTv3c-ea7G3UtK03wNI0Ge-4B9C7Kf4aa9gHWEhlpzNxCFpaGznonehs9SB7EZ4J9g9Ah6GZ3qxkcEfiMJ3Sk7NgJYjUSTMc2Ce_gfd-Ih65h1sIfOW3z-N4YE17bIIIdns96u9JFqQQV-Wwf25eqvyEVVmBfm1WRgPiMTnWqSFVYV3-oMMhZqvEowlVMxRMl9amPN_UUOKIBe-DKyVgup5pg/410/FdKpXQITRWaixFRqqL9JQA/h0/m1JIDMveA70pxxZU2pT3WX9Fljtp3K4bZA4iXzi8rlA)

Friend, This week, the Israeli military bombed Gaza’s largest refugee camp multiple times. Then they bombed at least four schools sheltering displaced people from the refugee camp, according to the UN. These are clear war crimes, but the political leaders supporting this genocide must not see Palestinians as human beings. They are allowing it to happen by not calling for a ceasefire. Right now, Arab Americans and Muslim Americans feel unseen and betrayed by our own government, as Congress and President Biden’s administration refuse to acknowledge or value Palestinian lives. It's chipping away at my soul, so I can only imagine how others are feeling. Across the country, thousands of Jewish Americans are standing up and saying not in our names, but are met with cruelty. Anti-war advocates are speaking up, but are being dismissed by President Biden. This call for a ceasefire is beyond 18 members of Congress or an organization, it is a movement that keeps getting stronger. The vast majority of Americans now want a ceasefire—including 80% of Democratic voters and a clear majority of Republican voters. [**Please sign now to tell President Biden and Congress: We demand a ceasefire now! Stop the siege on Gaza, and stop funding Israel’s military as it slaughters Palestinians!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_Qo6x2qTvq3U1ZI__ehebZG9OVngjlskuvlojyxb_nvQussvNsAqS0zeWGccZygaXjXWwJ6aHNlUJpMUhEPHO-lKfPP2mCR6Bct7wRYdXEORhrXxMqPG7mkOzK9UuIvZ47fOpmrgLD2llsvAFf3SgH9BI5EvjAvta8TiBTmuXunRaoXHh2A5tQjlND6VrlgPAPo1SJx4-_KsFB4vWP4kVr4WXhve3L237pjIjVfNNAiCWMzOfs9n6lcqMTIkO5BeWFaOJENDCx4FO3HBPJN8Rp0nuZ7DC4kbqlf5HR47v9sMCCJaYmYYatc7HZBqa-B8g1A_y49OfSKLoTKYOJl26POwm15SbVgwY81uTr7EKqPmjnixvhGwpJU9OZwocEOIKkIDyYBaquPyn7A7wr2QAA-g/410/FdKpXQITRWaixFRqqL9JQA/h1/OhUQXSqQZjkM9PhtWBUzwr0CQvRRlq-q5lSCZVgt0ZI) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_Qo6x2qTvq3U1ZI__ehebZG9OVngjlskuvlojyxb_nvQussvNsAqS0zeWGccZygaXjXWwJ6aHNlUJpMUhEPHO-lKfPP2mCR6Bct7wRYdXEORhrXxMqPG7mkOzK9UuIvZ47KJ3ipa9grzd_z9n2viJP8qgwT_9LCaP7JEq5KqzC_CTu6jJ6gf2GPIoaZ4sGKikX6nR8N07Ctk98GWDs4bnbbnH4vZe3alv1zsbg0VD2GSxjl8b7GmTzc9uIuPfO7HN7ANPXpUQDZxfN4tZCXjY8PFAnKc42F_zaP1WFWJx0AuCIsAFAQ5CQ_6CUmnESOFiBjmwou94OfiAaR3HoVKRH1FYRHamYKs2atzEujvWNBAM57Zh096qFYm0OhUCBaMBLlVGgno5vFVVM5sc-8Lq8VA/410/FdKpXQITRWaixFRqqL9JQA/h2/6Rji1SjweA5GoUWsCYmMr0d-pnZMWjIiNvpaqGUhIeE)

We’re watching video after video of dead children and parents under rubble, but the President we helped elect has disputed Palestinian death tolls. The American people will remember.
To the President of the U.S.: The American people are not with you on this one. You need to join with the majority of Americans and support a ceasefire now to save as many lives as possible.

clean_body: Political leaders must stop genocide and see Palestinians as human beings too. | | | Friend, This week, the Israeli military bombed Gaza’s largest refugee camp multiple times. Then they bombed at least four schools sheltering displaced people from the refugee camp, according to the UN. These are clear war crimes, but the political leaders supporting this genocide must not see Palestinians as human beings. They are allowing it to happen by not calling for a ceasefire. Right now, Arab Americans and Muslim Americans feel unseen and betrayed by our own government, as Congress and President Biden’s administration refuse to acknowledge or value Palestinian lives. It's chipping away at my soul, so I can only imagine how others are feeling. Across the country, thousands of Jewish Americans are standing up and saying not in our names, but are met with cruelty. Anti-war advocates are speaking up, but are being dismissed by President Biden. This call for a ceasefire is beyond 18 members of Congress or an organization, it is a movement that keeps getting stronger. The vast majority of Americans now want a ceasefire—including 80% of Democratic voters and a clear majority of Republican voters. | Palestinian Americans in Michigan and across the country have lost 20 or more family members in the past few weeks of bombing. We’re watching video after video of dead children and parents under rubble, but the President we helped elect has disputed Palestinian death tolls. The American people will remember. To the President of the U.S.: The American people are not with you on this one. You need to join with the majority of Americans and support a ceasefire now to save as many lives as possible. In solidarity, Rashida P.S. If you can, please. Or . Thank you for continuing to advocate for our shared humanity. Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . Hi there Friend,

It's Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

_**I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. **_

I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice.

I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree.

As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values.

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72786871/436413062/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231104_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjIwYTU0NzUtMmQ3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JOsTYoaoSChG63j8bHeuGKU2PDg4LajZKv63uGhq38w=)

Peter, The architect of the _Dobbs_ case that overturned _Roe v. Wade_ is up for re-election this Tuesday. That’s right, we have an opportunity to kick Attorney General Lynn Fitch out of office. This is the woman who has said abortion bans “empower women” and that she was “proud” to have spearheaded the downfall of _Roe. _ Now, she’s trying to ensure law enforcement in Mississippi can track women who leave the state to receive abortion care — so they can be prosecuted when they return. clean_body: | = Peter, The architect of the Dobbs case that overturned Roe v. Wade is up for re-election this Tuesday. That’s right, we have an opportunity to kick Attorney General Lynn Fitch out of office. This is the woman who has said abortion bans “empower women” and that she was “proud” to have spearheaded the downfall of Roe. Now, she’s trying to ensure law enforcement in Mississippi can track women who leave the state to receive abortion care — so they can be prosecuted when they return. It’s dystopian, and it’s just another reason why it’s so important that we get out the vote and elect her Democratic opponent on Tuesday.**= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks! name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Ten FACTS to keep handy when Republicans attack
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
A brief list...

Friends -
👷🏼 Seven times more jobs have been created during the Biden Administration than the last three Republican presidents combined. Yes, that is true.
🛠️ 47 million out of 49 million jobs created since Ronald Reagan left office were created by Democrats.
👨👩👧👧 California has some of the strongest gun laws in the country and as a result has a 43% lower gun death rate than the rest of the U.S. according to data from the CDC.
💰 Middle class families in California pay LESS in taxes than in states like Texas, Oklahoma, and Arkansas.
👨❤️👨 Support for same-sex marriage is now at a record 71% high.
📚 They do ban books in Florida.
💙 Blue states have longer life expectancy, higher minimum wage and lower gun death rates.
⚡ ️The Biden Administration has overseen the highest margin of net energy export in American history.
😡 Republicans across the country are fanning the flames of culture wars to distract from the fact that on health, wealth, and economic outcomes they are failing.
🗳️ When Democrats go on OFFENSE, we WIN.
Gavin Newsom
* * *
**☀️ Wait wait wait! Don't go just yet. 🔥**
Far-right Republicans and the NRA will attack us and do whatever they can to stop our progress in the fight to amend the Constitution on guns.
But the good news is that the people are on our side, the facts are on our side, and if we stick together we are going to get this done and save lives. It may not happen soon, but you have to believe it will happen.
Gavin Newsom’s pledge to you is every donation made today will go right toward our fight to pass a Constitutional amendment on guns. [**If that sounds worth it to you, please contribute $20 today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-c-em-nov23?refcode=em231104-1-15&refcode2=1647_4767699_J3a6yt&akid=1647%2E4767699%2EJ3a6yt)

clean_body: A brief list... Friends - 👷🏼 Seven times more jobs have been created during the Biden Administration than the last three Republican presidents combined. Yes, that is true. 🛠️ 47 million out of 49 million jobs created since Ronald Reagan left office were created by Democrats. 👨👩👧👧 California has some of the strongest gun laws in the country and as a result has a 43% lower gun death rate than the rest of the U.S. according to data from the CDC. 💰 Middle class families in California pay LESS in taxes than in states like Texas, Oklahoma, and Arkansas. 👨❤️👨 Support for same-sex marriage is now at a record 71% high. 📚 They do ban books in Florida. 💙 Blue states have longer life expectancy, higher minimum wage and lower gun death rates. ⚡ ️The Biden Administration has overseen the highest margin of net energy export in American history. 😡 Republicans across the country are fanning the flames of culture wars to distract from the fact that on health, wealth, and economic outcomes they are failing. 🗳️ When Democrats go on OFFENSE, we WIN. Gavin Newsom ☀️ Wait wait wait! Don't go just yet. 🔥 Far-right Republicans and the NRA will attack us and do whatever they can to stop our progress in the fight to amend the Constitution on guns. But the good news is that the people are on our side, the facts are on our side, and if we stick together we are going to get this done and save lives. It may not happen soon, but you have to believe it will happen. Gavin Newsom’s pledge to you is every donation made today will go right toward our fight to pass a Constitutional amendment on guns. If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | **

name: Mark Meckler, Convention of States Action
subject: No wonder we’re $32 trillion in debt!
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I need not remind you that the federal government is 32 trillion dollars in debt. Really, that means our children and grandchildren are 32 trillion in debt — Washington has zero interest in paying off their financial obligations; they’re simply planning on passing them down to future generations.
I can imagine you’re sick of it — that’s why we need you to sign this important petition now.
| | | [ **Join the Fight TODAY!** ](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJxckc9unjAQxJ_G3EBmDQYOHNJSKlVJK_WQq7XYhpj6D8Im5OvTV6Rfq6qXPcyORvubRbdZM9960nwgAC9GRQJA2AMBWJ5f1-M7_HxK-ecv9C3_tLpHem3hIwFIt03_td5TCu3Q2Etthkz1U91K3mW6L3nXlWVdQZe99HxqUUugtaacNe3cTG031xzZPAOFkmamBwqsLGlVckZpW0hWdbrkqsIGed1wUlF3Q6d3I9FvmHYTUhH2JbP9S0pbfL9pJDDKEAt_SKuPuOGiYyGDIzBa9Mr4hcA4hV3pPT_R2vzEmHQOhI1HcsJpZQ5H2HBH4pcYw7FLTdjwTzVeWnHHv7skug3N4gkbfmPk1xAyRGFNTGLXPqEV045eCa9PIcN2Eyv-0CIe06plEpNwuP2JCz5pnwgbvLT5-TB_fV3fnrsnAlx4axRhw3_i-xfZ8K0bpiOsjyrbe7WdxloTeUMqulxIVxe_AgAA___u66T1)
---
| | Thirty-two trillion (that’s twelve zeroes) is an incomprehensible number for most Americans, but when you see how Washington manages its money, well... it’s not hard to see how they wrecked the country so badly. For example, when Biden took office, his administration immediately ended the border wall project. Ever since, even as the nation suffered a terrible border crisis, the Department of Defense has sat on 20,822 unused border wall panels. Adding insult to injury, storing the materials costs $160,000 every single month. It should be clear to you that our federal government is hopelessly broken. Holding your breath waiting for Congress to tackle the debt is useless. In fact, the more we wait for Washington to fix itself, the worse the problem gets. **[That’s why I’m urging you, right now, to sign the Convention of States petition for an Article V convention -– the only viable solution to federal overreach and reckless spending.](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJxckU-PlTAUxT9N2UHoLRRYsFARzWSM0YXb5tJ2eMX-YWjrm-enN4xPY9x0cXruyf2di2635uk2ku4tAbgYFQkAYW8IwPrtx5a_ws9PqfzwUL-U7zf3WJ-_8I4ApNuu_1rvKZV2aOypdlOhxqXtJR8KPVI-DJS2DQzFZezl0rRPtB0a7BA7RhfV9W0ne8p43_SsMCPUwCitG8pZXfeVZM2gKVfnAG87Tpra3dDpw0j0O6bDhFSFYy3seElpj687zQRmGWLls7Q6xx1XHSsZHIHZolfGrwTmJRxKH-UVrS2vGJMugbA5JyecViY7wqY7Ej_FGPIhNWHTP9V4acUd_-6S6HY0qyds-o1Rno-QIQprYhKH9gmtWA70Snh9FTLsN7Hhdy1iXjYtk1iEw_1PXPBJ-0TY5KUtc96eH_SX548vBLjw1ijCpv_E1yuy6fMwLTlsj6o4RrVfjbUm8o409XoinV38CgAA__-g2qVP)** Calling an Article V convention is about so much more than just balancing the Feds’ outrageous budget. It’s about bringing power back to the states and people and ending Washington’s runaway reign. Article V comes to us straight from our Founding Fathers and is endorsed by many well-known patriots today. But we need your help!
---
| | | [ **Sign the petition and be a part of the solution!** ](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJxckT-P1DAQxT_NpMsqGSfOpkgBG4J0OoREQUFjOfZc1sF_Itth2fv0KMeCEM0Ub56e5vdGus2al_sA3XtAvBqdABHYO0Bcvv5Y9y_4-imXH5-qn-WH1T1XxxYvgJjvG_21PlJO5KSxh9qNhR7m9qx4X9BQ876v67bBvrgOfaPnM3JqVftS6a7VHaqu7ZFR3TJ9bgszYIWsrqum5qyqzifFmp5qrhvZSd52HJrK3aWjaJT0m8zRhHwKcSnscM15S283TYCTCunkd2VpT5tcKJ1UcICTlV4bvwBOc4iaYnmT1pY3mTKVCGzasxOOtNkdsPGBxA8xhT0qAjb-U41XVjzwHy4l3SbN4oGNvzHKYwgVkrAmZRHJZ2nFHKXXwtNNqLDdxSq_k0j7vJLKYhZObn_igs_kM7DRK1teFj5evr26pwjIhbdGAxv_E9--yMbP_TjvYX3WRRz0djPWmsQ7aKrlQDq6-BUAAP__nxKkXg)

Peter, here’s the situation: Tammy’s potential megamillionaire opponent Eric Hovde has made his anti-abortion views loud and clear: Hovde is “totally opposed to abortion” and committed to passing his anti-abortion agenda at the federal level. Hovde supported overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , which sent Wisconsin back to its draconian 1849 abortion ban. He wants to take away women’s rights nationwide with his 100% pro-life anti-abortion agenda. **And if elected, make no mistake: Eric Hovde would enable Republicans to pass a national abortion ban.** We need to keep anti-abortion Eric Hovde and his extremist views far away from the U.S. Senate — which means we need your help to defeat him: **[Can you make a donation to Tammy’s campaign today to keep Wisconsin blue and protect reproductive freedom?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-nov23.TOAtRC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231104_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1465%2E35263%2EQkHgOC)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-nov23.gM21RB&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231104_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1465%2E35263%2EQkHgOC)

| | Patriot,

---
I just got word that a very sinister group of RINOs quietly produced a secret ad that __attacked__ me for being the target of Crooked Joe’s legal warfare.
---
Yes, you read that right.
---
These so-called Republicans tried to use Crooked Joe’s tyrannical abuse of power as a **_weapon_** against me.

---
I say it so often – these turncoat RINOs are no different from the Democrats. And in some ways, they’re even worse – because at least you know the Democrats are out to get you. The RINOs pretend to be your friend only to turn around and stab you in the back.
---
But here’s the best part of the story...
---
** _The RINOs tested the ad that talks about all of the many witch hunts against me and found that it made voters_** _**_support_**_** _me that much more – and so they were forced to pull the plug!_**

---
These RINOs – whose hearts are filled with rage and hatred – will never understand the appeal of our movement to Make America Great Again.

---
For years and years, the people of our country were sick and tired of sellout politicians and empty and broken promises.

---
But then, on June 16, 2015, a political outsider suddenly emerged and called out problems in BOTH parties, and vowed to take on the tyrannical Deep State that had robbed the Silent Majority of its voice in our country.

---
And to truly prove that I would do everything in my power to drain the swamp and restore power to YOU, I have even risked a LIFETIME in jail as an innocent man to see our mission through.

---
The American people respect courage. They respect someone who will put skin in the game.

---
Sadly, that’s something that these cowardly and disloyal RINOs, who would sink so low as to use such a grave injustice _against_ me, could never comprehend in a million years.

---
But we must also accept that they will keep working on other plots to try and break our movement.

---
That’s why it’s absolutely critical that we stay fully prepared against any other vicious attack that comes our way.

---

But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. clean_body: RINOs were forced to pull the plug.| | | | | Patriot, I just got word that a very sinister group of RINOs quietly produced a secret ad that attacked me for being the target of Crooked Joe’s legal warfare. Yes, you read that right. These so-called Republicans tried to use Crooked Joe’s tyrannical abuse of power as a weapon against me. I say it so often – these turncoat RINOs are no different from the Democrats. And in some ways, they’re even worse – because at least you know the Democrats are out to get you. The RINOs pretend to be your friend only to turn around and stab you in the back. But here’s the best part of the story... The RINOs tested the ad that talks about all of the many witch hunts against me and found that it made voters support me that much more – and so they were forced to pull the plug! These RINOs – whose hearts are filled with rage and hatred – will never understand the appeal of our movement to Make America Great Again. For years and years, the people of our country were sick and tired of sellout politicians and empty and broken promises. But then, on June 16, 2015, a political outsider suddenly emerged and called out problems in BOTH parties, and vowed to take on the tyrannical Deep State that had robbed the Silent Majority of its voice in our country. And to truly prove that I would do everything in my power to drain the swamp and restore power to YOU, I have even risked a LIFETIME in jail as an innocent man to see our mission through. The American people respect courage. They respect someone who will put skin in the game. Sadly, that’s something that these cowardly and disloyal RINOs, who would sink so low as to use such a grave injustice against me, could never comprehend in a million years. But we must also accept that they will keep working on other plots to try and break our movement. That’s why it’s absolutely critical that we stay fully prepared against any other vicious attack that comes our way. - | | Thank you, Donald J. name: Ron Wyden
subject: Re: $34 billion in unpaid taxes.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
|
---
| | I wanted to follow up on the email I sent last month about the success we’re already seeing from the Inflation Reduction Act’s enhanced funding for the IRS to go after wealthy tax cheats. We’re making great strides to ensure that the wealthiest pay their fair share. So it’s no surprise that one of Mike Johnson’s first actions as the new Speaker of the House was to put forth legislation that would gut the IRS’s ability to crack down on rich tax cheats and Republicans’ wealthy donors. House Republicans aren’t being shy about where they stand, and it’s not with everyday working Americans. [**I pledge to you that I'll stand strong in the Senate to oppose**** _any_****House bill that sets back our progress and makes it easier for the top 1% to exploit the system — and I'll do all I can to preserve our Senate majority and help Democrats fight to take back the House next year. Will you stand with me and chip in $3 to keep these efforts running strong?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72794970/436420632/-2044921950?refcode=2023-11-04-tax&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=9ae5f9e6-327b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWU1ZjllNi0zMjdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iBg7uwWSyfsO5-cB5QktOw584n2HNNcsvd9BI4_ihwA=) Thank you, _Ron_ Forwarded Message | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72794971/436420633/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWU1ZjllNi0zMjdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iBg7uwWSyfsO5-cB5QktOw584n2HNNcsvd9BI4_ihwA=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWU1ZjllNi0zMjdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iBg7uwWSyfsO5-cB5QktOw584n2HNNcsvd9BI4_ihwA=&emci=cba57315-797a-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=9ae5f9e6-327b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)
---
I know that for most Americans, the IRS probably isn't a topic of conversation at the dinner table every night.
But here's why you should care: for decades, Republican lawmakers have been bleeding the IRS dry of the resources it desperately needs to go after wealthy tax cheats.
The IRS is in charge of investigating and going after the super-wealthy Americans who are gaming the system to avoid paying what they owe.
But for a long time – under years of Republican budget cuts – it wasn't able to. That's all changing now, thanks to Democrats' historic _Inflation Reduction Act_ , which gave the IRS the resources it needs to go after wealthy tax cheats.
**And it's already delivering.**
Recently, I received brand new data from the IRS that I requested. And you won't believe these numbers.
_Just shy of one thousand millionaires who didn't even file taxes owe an estimated $34 BILLION in unpaid taxes._
**You read that right, it's not a typo. Thirty-four BILLION.**
This is just one example of wealthy tax cheats that the IRS can now go after and hold responsible for failing to pay what they owe.
And think about how far $34 billion could go. We could fund schools, fix roads and bridges, expand broadband to every community, reduce the deficit, and much more. Think of what we could do if every super-wealthy American paid what they owe.
I've often said that our country is a tale of two tax codes: one for working families that pay taxes out of each paycheck and one that's riddled with loopholes for the super-wealthy to get away without paying their fair share. Unfortunately, these latest numbers are just further proof that I'm right.
Democrats are working hard to make sure everyone's playing by the same rules: paying what they owe and their fair share. But we can't do it without your help.
[**We've seen what's possible with a Democratic Congress. It's crucial that we defend and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate, retake power in the House, and send progressive leaders to Washington, D.C., who will fight for working families, not the wealthy and well-connected. Chip in now to make this a reality.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72794973/436420634/-2044921950?refcode=2023-11-04-tax&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=9ae5f9e6-327b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWU1ZjllNi0zMjdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iBg7uwWSyfsO5-cB5QktOw584n2HNNcsvd9BI4_ihwA=)
Together, we can create an America where _everyone_ pays their fair share.
More soon,

clean_body: | | | I wanted to follow up on the email I sent last month about the success we’re already seeing from the Inflation Reduction Act’s enhanced funding for the IRS to go after wealthy tax cheats. We’re making great strides to ensure that the wealthiest pay their fair share. So it’s no surprise that one of Mike Johnson’s first actions as the new Speaker of the House was to put forth legislation that would gut the IRS’s ability to crack down on rich tax cheats and Republicans’ wealthy donors. House Republicans aren’t being shy about where they stand, and it’s not with everyday working Americans. = Thank you, Ron Forwarded Message | I know that for most Americans, the IRS probably isn't a topic of conversation at the dinner table every night. But here's why you should care: for decades, Republican lawmakers have been bleeding the IRS dry of the resources it desperately needs to go after wealthy tax cheats. The IRS is in charge of investigating and going after the super-wealthy Americans who are gaming the system to avoid paying what they owe. But for a long time – under years of Republican budget cuts – it wasn't able to. That's all changing now, thanks to Democrats' historic Inflation Reduction Act , which gave the IRS the resources it needs to go after wealthy tax cheats. And it's already delivering. Recently, I received brand new data from the IRS that I requested. And you won't believe these numbers. Just shy of one thousand millionaires who didn't even file taxes owe an estimated $34 BILLION in unpaid taxes. You read that right, it's not a typo. Thirty-four BILLION. This is just one example of wealthy tax cheats that the IRS can now go after and hold responsible for failing to pay what they owe. And think about how far $34 billion could go. We could fund schools, fix roads and bridges, expand broadband to every community, reduce the deficit, and much more. Think of what we could do if every super-wealthy American paid what they owe. I've often said that our country is a tale of two tax codes: one for working families that pay taxes out of each paycheck and one that's riddled with loopholes for the super-wealthy to get away without paying their fair share. Unfortunately, these latest numbers are just further proof that I'm right. Democrats are working hard to make sure everyone's playing by the same rules: paying what they owe and their fair share. But we can't do it without your help. = Together, we can create an America where everyone pays their fair share. More soon, Ron Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Pray for Peace | The Entire Middle East is 'Delicate' Right Now
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/106220/images/PJM_Logo.png]
Pray for Peace | The Entire Middle East is 'Delicate' Right Now
Friends,
Three and a half weeks ago 1400 innocent Israelis and 45 Americans were killed on October 7th. Included in this horrible act of violence was Bucks County 70 year old grandmother Carol Simantov - who was slaughtered with her son, daughter-in-law, and three grandchildren - here is a picture of Carol:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/106220/images/9k%3D.jpeg]
There is mass unrest in the Middle East, and here at home. As someone who served in combat in that region, let's all pray for peace, hope justice will prevail on the terrorists, and most importantly, let us all find a positive way forward for the good Palestinian and Israeli people - so we can find a peaceful way forward and a two-state solution.
Yesterday I had the privilege of sharing this message with Stuart Varney on Fox Business. Hoping you can share and/or let me know your thoughts on my statements in this clip. Feel free to use our handle so that we can start a productive dialogue and encourage peace and justice in the Middle East. @PatrickMurphyPA @VarneyCo
https://www.foxbusiness.com/video/6340432382112 [https://www.foxbusiness.com/video/6340432382112]
Yours in the fight,
Honorable Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Under Secretary of the Army, Former Congressman
@PatrickMurphyPA
https://www.patrickjmurphy.com/ [https://www.patrickjmurphy.com/]
https://www.facebook.com/PatrickMurphyPA [https://www.facebook.com/PatrickMurphyPA] https://twitter.com/https:/PatrickMurphyPA [https://twitter.com/https:/PatrickMurphyPA] https://instagram.com/patrickmurphypa [https://instagram.com/patrickmurphypa] https://www.linkedin.com/patrickmurphypa [https://www.linkedin.com/patrickmurphypa]

Peter, America’s reaction to the brazen attack on our ally Israel by Hamas has been glacial at best.
_But under Joe Biden, we can’t be surprised._
He’s been rolling out the red carpet for enemies and terrorists since day one. America and our allies have suffered because of it.
I’m sick and tired of Joe Biden’s weakness - but I’m not just standing by idly.
**I went on Newsmax to discuss how I’d keep America safe and terrorists at bay as your U.S. Senator, but now, I need your help to make it happen.**
**[Watch our latest interview - and after you watch, if you can, pitch in a few dollars to FIRE Joe Biden’s Democrat majority and get to work bringing back American strength!](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=be1914c5af0c424aa8bd6fb0bdcc8819&_e=EWKTCdH3_BgDxJFIIwjm3jITQ1x1kUI4O3a0TERC-zzFXwkCLeGBReHXI8sxZMyjmgVe9yAYF2VxdVWF7mehBrdmZspV2zVxlvJisQ3qVdEYNMaodHBHogLzCIZYnhXpMrXvJmWQCI2FOPGd9HSwtJkIj47hzRKe6oFXCU4izwZL6_Zsj-AYslmqMaOHKGwErQYsZwbJk1nHfndKyuzF1wsMG5qOdje4hCzGI_LRUQzfi6pVGGKL7tqHGexWavw1jtD62XMmuTSggl0MEAVHZ2zDFdTl8bT7ORV7DG7Xchopw5ZbiztOKks_ctgdSPU6NxcDJdry0DHY2ERj9o_1Pm5c1ec9rbMW1PdcqiYpvRRkJhZ-KO4W606kyXtHf6Lw)**

If we’re going to defend American citizens against terrorism, we must be proactive.

That means we can’t fall for their tricks and games like Joe Biden is doing - and we certainly can’t extend free deals to regimes like Iran’s that aid and abet terrorists around the world.

It seems like common sense; but to our so-called “Commander in Chief"," it’s completely lost.

**I know America’s enemies better than Joe Biden ever will, because I spent 25 years fighting them in the Navy as a Special Operations officer.**

I’ve seen firsthand just how much these people hate America and all that we stand for - and I’ve seen firsthand what it takes to defeat them.

**Together, America CAN defeat terrorism - but we can’t do it unless we take back the Senate with battle-tested leaders.[Learn more about our strategy - and if you can, pitch in to help us win today!](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=be1914c5af0c424aa8bd6fb0bdcc8819&_e=EWKTCdH3_BgDxJFIIwjm3jITQ1x1kUI4O3a0TERC-zzFXwkCLeGBReHXI8sxZMyjmgVe9yAYF2VxdVWF7mehBrdmZspV2zVxlvJisQ3qVdEYNMaodHBHogLzCIZYnhXpMrXvJmWQCI2FOPGd9HSwtJkIj47hzRKe6oFXCU4izwZL6_Zsj-AYslmqMaOHKGwErQYsZwbJk1nHfndKyuzF168tvXcO1nIsJlWoJuT10K4mdZCL2c4xcKkYbD-lczWDJGJb_UdtRgLTHtCJ9hLuEUmLdpsq3GM2fBXKcEj9RwNsmJELVlsbc2s0A5jdF0331e0531zmO09iwoJ9K2Fmk7bDuQzm-pkANMB1IDdcnFcd_PGwoT4dgbv-R7-K44oU)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, America’s reaction to the brazen attack on our ally Israel by Hamas has been glacial at best. But under Joe Biden, we can’t be surprised. He’s been rolling out the red carpet for enemies and terrorists since day one. America and our allies have suffered because of it. I’m sick and tired of Joe Biden’s weakness - but I’m not just standing by idly. I went on Newsmax to discuss how I’d keep America safe and terrorists at bay as your U.S. Senator, but now, I need your help to make it happen. If we’re going to defend American citizens against terrorism, we must be proactive. That means we can’t fall for their tricks and games like Joe Biden is doing - and we certainly can’t extend free deals to regimes like Iran’s that aid and abet terrorists around the world. It seems like common sense; but to our so-called “Commander in Chief"," it’s completely lost. I know America’s enemies better than Joe Biden ever will, because I spent 25 years fighting them in the Navy as a Special Operations officer. I’ve seen firsthand just how much these people hate America and all that we stand for - and I’ve seen firsthand what it takes to defeat them. Together, America CAN defeat terrorism - but we can’t do it unless we take back the Senate with battle-tested leaders. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret) | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | | Hi Peter, Jessica Morse here. I want you to be one of the first people to hear it directly from me: [**I’m running for Congress in California’s 3rd District!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72796965/436423063/-1870018989?refcode=E4669-20231103-OGListBump-SL-CandidateBio&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDM2MzVlMDUtMzQ3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZdWvTUS4O_y49syr4b6FylgiCKEZuuiISrmpO_p3Spo=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72796967/436423064/-1870018989?refcode=E4669-20231103-OGListBump-graphic-CandidateBio&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDM2MzVlMDUtMzQ3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZdWvTUS4O_y49syr4b6FylgiCKEZuuiISrmpO_p3Spo=) When I see a problem, I run towards it and will not stop until it is solved. That’s what led me to volunteer on the ground in Paradise, CA, after the Camp Fire and to my job as the Deputy Secretary for Forest and Wildland Resilience at the California Natural Resources Agency. For the last four years, I have worked on the frontline of California’s wildfire crisis, helping build a wildfire resilience program to protect communities. __But now, as first-term Congressman Kevin Kiley seeks to divide us and distract us from the issues that matter most, I know it’s time for me to step up and be a champion for the residents of our district.__ From wildfires to health care costs, to housing and traffic, Kevin Kiley would rather point a finger than step up and solve the problem. He voted against abortion rights. Plus, he’s a conspiracy theorist and election denier, and Donald Trump called Kiley a _MAGA champion_. While Kevin Kiley is a flame thrower looking for his next soundbite on Fox News, I’m a **problem-solver** who will find solutions to keep people safe and healthy and make life better for _everyone_. **Together, we can not only flip CA-03, but we can flip the House from****red********to****blue** , put divisive rhetoric and extreme policies behind us, and _finally_ get to work on the real challenges facing us. **I know how to get things done for the people of California, and I’m ready to do the same in Congress.** [**To do this, I need support from grassroots donors like you, Peter. My team and I set a goal to raise $10,000 to kick off this campaign — will you join me as a founding donor?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72796968/436423065/-1870018989?refcode=E4669-20231103-OGListBump-SL-CandidateBio&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDM2MzVlMDUtMzQ3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZdWvTUS4O_y49syr4b6FylgiCKEZuuiISrmpO_p3Spo=) | [BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72796969/436423066/-1870018989?refcode=E4669-20231103-OGListBump-SB-CandidateBio&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDM2MzVlMDUtMzQ3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZdWvTUS4O_y49syr4b6FylgiCKEZuuiISrmpO_p3Spo=)

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: I can't believe we're doing this again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc
body:
I’ll be honest, I'm not excited about rerunning the 2020 election, but that doesn’t mean we can afford to sit it out.
|
---
Friend,

Let’s face facts: It’s probably going to be Joe Biden vs. Donald Trump. Again. I’ll be honest, I'm not excited about rerunning the 2020 election, but that doesn’t mean we can afford to sit it out. Imagine the first 100 days of a second Trump term: He will pull the U.S. out of NATO. He’ll pardon the January 6 rioters. He’ll nominate Mike Flynn to be Secretary of State. And that’s the optimistic scenario. **We can’t let an anti-democratic, un-American, wannabe dictator become president again.** Here's the good news: We've done it before, and we'll do it again. It’s time to re-build the pro-democracy coalition required to keep Trump out of the White House. Political divisions are deeper than ever, so we’re going to have to work harder, because it’s going to be harder. I won't stop until we hold extremists accountable and defeat the toxic MAGA ideology driving all of the chaos we’ve seen in recent years. Our democracy is too valuable. I hope to have your support in the coming months. We cannot succeed without it. Sarah Longwell
---

Friend, I'm reaching out to get up to date feedback from House Republicans' top supporters.

body:
The truth must be hard to hear...| | | This JUST happened... name: Team Tina
subject: Extreme, harmful, dangerous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Mike Johnson is hellbent on taking away rights and liberties from the LGBTQ+ community. |
#
Team — We’ve made great progress over the last ten years to protect and expand LGBTQ+ rights and equality, but it could all be undermined by new House Speaker Mike Johnson. **That’s right — Mike Johnson holds some extreme, out-of-touch, harmful views on the LGBTQ+ community, and we have to hold the line in the U.S. Senate to defend these rights.** **[Please chip in to support Tina’s work to defend the Senate majority and protect our LGBTQ+ allies across the country from seeing their rights stripped away.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72804434/436429990/-1565639837?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20231104_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmRlYTNhMS0zODdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sCJRchC0bKqCRLYWj7am6RNGBaqzbyjOJzxPhIUN3Y0=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72804435/436429991/-1565639837?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20231104_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmRlYTNhMS0zODdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sCJRchC0bKqCRLYWj7am6RNGBaqzbyjOJzxPhIUN3Y0=)
---
Mike Johnson is hellbent on taking away rights and liberties from the LGBTQ+ community. His record shows this, no matter what he might say or do to walk back his old statements:
* He equated support of homosexuality and LGBTQ+ people to support of pedophilia.
* He opposed gay marriage and led efforts to ban same-sex marriage in Louisiana.
* And he worked with a conversion therapy organization that advocated for the criminalization of gay sex.

These positions are dangerous. At a time when LGBTQ+ hate crimes are on the rise, having a Speaker of the House who espouses these discriminatory views will only further imperil the LGBTQ+ community.
**That’s why Tina is hard at work in the U.S. Senate to pass the Equality Act to protect people in the LGBTQ+ community. That’s why she’s calling out Mike Johnson’s awful record.**
**[And that’s why she’s fighting like hell to defend the Democratic Senate Majority and flip the House from Red to Blue — because we need to protect the LGBTQ+ community from people in power like Mike Johnson. Please, chip in to support her work today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72804438/436429992/-1565639837?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20231104_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmRlYTNhMS0zODdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sCJRchC0bKqCRLYWj7am6RNGBaqzbyjOJzxPhIUN3Y0=)**

name: Colin Allred
subject: I hate doing laundry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, my wife Aly and I share the work of running our household and raising our boys evenly, but to be perfectly honest with you, my smile is forced in this picture – I hate doing laundry .
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
But here's one laundry list even I can get behind: the list of reasons we need to fire Ted Cruz:
*
Ted
Cruz
viciously
attacks
our
fundamental
rights
and
reproductive
freedoms
–
even
though
six
in
10
Texans
support
abortion
access.
*
Texans
deserve
a
leader
who
will
fight
for
them
–
rather
than
podcasting
three
times
a
week
or
running
off
to
vacation
when
he's
needed
most.
*
Ted
Cruz
has
parroted
dangerous,
far-right
conspiracy
theories
that
endanger
the
safety
and
accessibility
of
our
democracy
for
working
Texans.
Friend, Ted Cruz has a lot of dirty laundry – and I could keep going on for pages and pages.
But the bottom line is this: Texans can't afford six more years of an extremist like Ted Cruz. Not when he's proven that his loyalties lie only with the special interests and the mega donors that keep him in power.
Right now, polls show that Ted Cruz and I are neck and neck. We can send him and his dirty laundry packing for good, but it's going to take a huge outpouring of grassroots support to reach the millions of voters we need to win.
Can you split a donation of $5 or $10 right now between my campaign and Serve America to power my campaign to defeat Ted Cruz? His mega donors are pouring millions of dollars into his race, and I'm depending on grassroots supporters like you to help me keep up → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thank you for being a part of this team, friend. Let's do this.
Colin

They laughed at her. They told her to shut up. And they moved onto the next question. And we can’t just move on from these unprecedented attacks on our democracy. But 219 Republicans just handed Rep. # [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72805867/436435039/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231104_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBkOTJiZjYtM2M3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KN7tOHe_x9IbaUq040ImktXXcILF8wU0bsCHwwoyCVc=)
