Team — Every community deserves safety and peace of mind. But when guns fall into the wrong hands, it leaves our families and the people and places we love at risk for senseless violence. Attorney General Kris Mayes recently announced that she’s exploring the possibility of introducing red-flag laws to be passed in the legislature, which would allow law enforcement to remove guns from anyone they believe in a danger to our communities. [**Team — We have to ask, do you support red-flag laws in Arizona?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72805868/436435045/688407733?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231104_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBkOTJiZjYtM2M3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KN7tOHe_x9IbaUq040ImktXXcILF8wU0bsCHwwoyCVc=&emci=a9dbf4a7-867a-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=60d92bf6-3c7b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=9307116) | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72805869/436435048/688407733?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231104_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBkOTJiZjYtM2M3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KN7tOHe_x9IbaUq040ImktXXcILF8wU0bsCHwwoyCVc=&emci=a9dbf4a7-867a-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=60d92bf6-3c7b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=9307116)
---
More than 20 states across the nation have red-flag laws or extreme risk protection orders on the books. These laws are designed to ensure that firearms are in the hands of responsible gun owners, and not anyone who is seeking to harm schools and other public spaces.
Commonsense solutions like this shouldn’t be partisan, folks — we can and should all agree that people who pose a risk to our communities shouldn’t have access to deadly weapons.
[**We need your opinion — Do you support red-flag laws?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72805870/436435049/688407733?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231104_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBkOTJiZjYtM2M3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KN7tOHe_x9IbaUq040ImktXXcILF8wU0bsCHwwoyCVc=&emci=a9dbf4a7-867a-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=60d92bf6-3c7b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=9307116)

name: Team Sepi
subject: The establishment can't shake Sepi
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SEPI SHYNE FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=wrpr_hdr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=wrpr_hdr]
Friend,

All along, the political establishment has underestimated the power of our movement and we're showing them just how wrong they are.

Earlier this month, Sepi showed just how much people are yearning for a fresh voice and a unique perspective from their Congressional representative with a strong showing of support from Delegates at the California Democratic Party Pre-endorsement conference. And the convention was only step one in Sepi uniting that support.

Sepi Shyne has always been a voice for the voiceless. She has experienced firsthand the homophobia and painful bullying like so many in the queer community.

She's no stranger to feeling like an outsider. In over 20 years leading boards and organizations fighting for marriage equality, LGBTQ+ and human rights, she was often the only queer woman of color in the room.

Our campaign is about breaking barriers, and we won't let the limited political imagination of the status quo hold us back from fighting for social justice and equity in Congress.

Friend, our campaign has momentum because of supporters like you. Will you help power our movement for LGBTQ+ rights, civil rights, universal healthcare access, immigration reform, economic and racial justice, climate action, reproductive rights, and affordable housing, with a donation of $10 or more today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=231104_team_barriers_l1]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:

Contribute $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=231104_team_barriers_el1&refcode2=a6c38432-3f7b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73]

Contribute $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=231104_team_barriers_el4&refcode2=a6c38432-3f7b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73]

Together, there's nothing we can't accomplish. That's what this campaign has always been about.

Thanks for being part of this campaign.

Team Sepi
Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. >From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today.
Will you join Sepi's team and support her for Congress?

body:
Where should the next minimum wage increase happen? | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72806337/436436908/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWJhMDQ1NC0zZjdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qP1YK5g0Q6xIrcKcrlj7TUrxA1cm-B3e5K338Cx1niY=&emci=fb903f97-ca79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=4aba0454-3f7b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) | Team, **Exciting news from the Evergreen State:** Washington has just raised its minimum wage to an impressive $16.28 per hour! This is a significant step towards ensuring that workers receive fair wages, regardless of their location. However, the sad truth remains that the federal minimum wage has not seen an increase _since 2009._ At the Fairness Project, we're working tirelessly alongside voters, successfully winning 10 ballot measure campaigns in eight states and localities to raise wages to a level that workers truly need and deserve. Our commitment to ensuring workers receive a livable wage and have strong labor protections continues, but we can't do it alone. We need your input. [**Should Congress raise the federal minimum wage?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72806338/436436909/110122463?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWJhMDQ1NC0zZjdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qP1YK5g0Q6xIrcKcrlj7TUrxA1cm-B3e5K338Cx1niY=&emci=fb903f97-ca79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=4aba0454-3f7b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) [YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72806339/436436910/-1003551612?&refcode=E4800-20231103-YNMinWage-SB-Y-Other&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWJhMDQ1NC0zZjdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qP1YK5g0Q6xIrcKcrlj7TUrxA1cm-B3e5K338Cx1niY=) [NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72806340/436436911/-1003551612?&refcode=E4800-20231103-YNMinWage-SB-N-Other&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWJhMDQ1NC0zZjdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qP1YK5g0Q6xIrcKcrlj7TUrxA1cm-B3e5K338Cx1niY=) Far too many Americans are facing the daily struggle of putting food on the table or paying their bills. When politicians fail to act, citizens have been taking matters into their own hands, just as Washington and other states have done. From Nebraska to California, we've demonstrated our ability to drive the change our communities crave and deserve by participating in the democratic process. As we gear up for 2023 and 2024, we need your support to ensure that the federal minimum wage is raised. [**But we want to know what you think, team: Should Congress take immediate action to raise the federal minimum wage to a livable level?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72806341/436436912/982460512?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWJhMDQ1NC0zZjdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qP1YK5g0Q6xIrcKcrlj7TUrxA1cm-B3e5K338Cx1niY=&emci=fb903f97-ca79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=4aba0454-3f7b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72806342/436436913/982460512?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWJhMDQ1NC0zZjdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qP1YK5g0Q6xIrcKcrlj7TUrxA1cm-B3e5K338Cx1niY=&emci=fb903f97-ca79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=4aba0454-3f7b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) Thank you for standing up for workers! \- Fairness Project

clean_body: Where should the next minimum wage increase happen? | | Team, Exciting news from the Evergreen State: Washington has just raised its minimum wage to an impressive $16.28 per hour! This is a significant step towards ensuring that workers receive fair wages, regardless of their location. However, the sad truth remains that the federal minimum wage has not seen an increase since 2009. At the Fairness Project, we're working tirelessly alongside voters, successfully winning 10 ballot measure campaigns in eight states and localities to raise wages to a level that workers truly need and deserve. Our commitment to ensuring workers receive a livable wage and have strong labor protections continues, but we can't do it alone. We need your input. = = Far too many Americans are facing the daily struggle of putting food on the table or paying their bills. When politicians fail to act, citizens have been taking matters into their own hands, just as Washington and other states have done. From Nebraska to California, we've demonstrated our ability to drive the change our communities crave and deserve by participating in the democratic process. As we gear up for 2023 and 2024, we need your support to ensure that the federal minimum wage is raised. Thank you for standing up for workers! \- Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won over 30 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to the Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at the Fairness Project’s sole discretion. name: Team Engel
subject: What our fall has looked like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Peter,
We’ve had a busy (but productive!) fall... unlike Republicans in the House.
As our campaign heats up, Kirsten has been working hard to get out our message and connect with folks in the district. You can see some pictures from the last couple of months below!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act]
We celebrated the Fiesta Patrias Parade in Eloy!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act]
Kirsten joined the Malpai Borderlands Group to discuss the challenges facing ranchers, the environment, and border communities.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act]
The Sun City Oro Valley Democratic Club held their 2024 Election Kick-off. It was truly inspiring to hear from so many volunteers and candidates working together to deliver positive change for Arizona!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act]
Kirsten attended the Rockin 4 Heroes concert honoring first responders and military personnel with Gabby Giffords and Ron Barber. It was a good afternoon celebrating those who serve and keep us safe.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act]
The Pima County Democrats organized a roundtable where Kirsten heard directly from veterans about the issues they face: healthcare and benefits, their transition to civilian life, and more.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act]
Kirsten was invited by Connie DeLarge and the African American Democratic Caucus to the NAACP Tucson Branch Jazz Fundraiser!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act]
We attended a meeting with the U.S. Department of Agriculture’s Equity Commission, focused on reducing barriers to USDA programs and building a better institution. Kirsten spoke with Sec. of Ag Tom Vilsack, his wife Christie, AZ Ag Director Paul Brierley, and more.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act]
Kirsten spoke at the Southwest Carpenters Local 1912 meeting. Unions like these are building better careers, better communities, and better cities.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act]
Gracie and Zeus (and the rest of Team Engel) celebrated Halloween!
We’re a year away from Election Day, and this race will only get more competitive from here. We can expect plenty of outside spending from conservative groups trying to protect one of the most vulnerable Republican seats in the country.
Juan Ciscomani has proven that he cares more about the Republican party line than his constituents. He can try to claim he’s a moderate — but he can’t run from his voting record.
But while her opponent is busy doing whatever Washington insiders tell him to, Kirsten is out in our community, hearing directly from voters and fighting for the issues that really matter.
Our people-powered campaign will need grassroots support to take on Juan Ciscomani’s MAGA donors and PACs. That’s why we have to ask: will you donate now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act]
Thank you!
Team Engel
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_110423_CampaignUpdate_act]

name: James Carville
subject: Two things I know for certain

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: Where the Farm Bill stands now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Did you know that the Farm Bill expired in September, friends? As a district with almost 3,000 farms and some of the most fertile soil in the country, agriculture is the number one economic driver in communities throughout Central and Southern Illinois. **That’s why I’m calling for my colleagues on both sides of the aisle to work alongside me to get the Farm Bill across the finish line and renew essential programs that farmers and families in our district and across the country rely on.** If we fail to meet this moment with the urgency it deserves, we'll leave dairy farmers without the support they need, which would cause milk and other dairy product prices to skyrocket, leave young and family farmers without access to critical crop insurance, and sap funding from nutrition programs like SNAP — which helps assist families who may not have access to healthy and nutritious food. I know we’ve seen partisan games and politics define Congress, _especially over the last few weeks_ , but we must prioritize communities across our country and pass this bipartisan bill that will expand job opportunities, put food on the table, and provide our farmers with the resources they deserve. **[I need a strong team standing with me in the fight to get the 2023 Farm Bill passed without delay. Please add your name to my petition calling on Congress to pass this critical legislation now>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72806532/436437588/-1536540658?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231104_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGQzMzI0NC00MDdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EzycpIhXWrR1hy1cSiH5NPwZlWdVDTZUzlQwa2swwUI=&emci=a8d33244-407b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=add33244-407b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=13891387)** | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72806533/436437589/-1536540658?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231104_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGQzMzI0NC00MDdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EzycpIhXWrR1hy1cSiH5NPwZlWdVDTZUzlQwa2swwUI=&emci=a8d33244-407b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=add33244-407b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=13891387)

name: Gloria Johnson
subject: we don’t need to live like this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
Gun violence is tearing our nation apart.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72806536/436437594/-849459103?refcode=ea.dc5ff22b-407b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.dc5ff22b-407b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzVmZjIyYi00MDdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1o7tEiEcEwYU9cfEaBAfX-iOkiBw910Ki9HJ6qlRuBA=&emci=af9f73a8-8c7a-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=dc5ff22b-407b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)
---
**I’m sick and tired of watching communities devastated by gun violence.** I want to wake up in a world where we’re safe to go to church, safe to send our kids to school, safe to run out for groceries, and safe to go out without the fear of a mass shooting. We all deserve that — and it’s not impossible. _But some politicians want you to think that’s too much to ask for._ They want you to believe that thoughts and prayers _really are_ the only possible response and that the solutions experts and advocates propose are nothing more than fantasies. They’re not, though. We know that common sense gun safety measures work because we see their effects _everywhere else._ You know why Republicans like to play dumb when it comes to gun violence? Because they’re terrified that any progress we make could hurt the gun lobby’s bottom line and their campaign contributions could dry up. **That’s BS.** As Tennessee’s next Senator, I’ll stand tall for _people_ — not the NRA and other special interests. I am committed to curbing the gun violence epidemic. I’ll vote for measures like red flag laws and waiting periods that’ll help keep guns out of the hands of dangerous people. **_[Sign on NOW if you agree that these steps and more are essential to protecting America’s kids, families, and communities >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72806537/436437595/1918991643?refcode=ea.dc5ff22b-407b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.dc5ff22b-407b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzVmZjIyYi00MDdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1o7tEiEcEwYU9cfEaBAfX-iOkiBw910Ki9HJ6qlRuBA=&emci=af9f73a8-8c7a-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=dc5ff22b-407b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)_** | [**SIGN ON**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72806538/436437596/1918991643?refcode=ea.dc5ff22b-407b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.dc5ff22b-407b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzVmZjIyYi00MDdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1o7tEiEcEwYU9cfEaBAfX-iOkiBw910Ki9HJ6qlRuBA=&emci=af9f73a8-8c7a-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=dc5ff22b-407b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)

name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: I don’t need to tell you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
just how important Georgia will be

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72806825/436438668/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODZjZTFhYi00MjdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t0mpqqY50-2Jqs_aCvCmDXj77ONtSMvCAblAwaL6o2Q=&emci=520427be-6e7a-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=e86ce1ab-427b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | I don’t need to tell you just how important next year’s presidential election will be, Peter.

I also don’t need to tell you that Georgia will be the key to victory for Joe Biden.

We’ve seen how important it was to elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in 2020. >From appointing Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson, the first Black woman on the Supreme Court, to capping insulin costs for seniors, to creating millions of good-paying jobs across the country, Joe Biden has delivered for hardworking Georgians.

We’ve also seen that Georgia has become _**the**_ premiere swing state in the country.

In 2020, we elected Joe Biden and Kamala Harris by the closest margin in the entire country – just 0.23%! In 2021, my brother, Jon Ossoff, and I were honored to be chosen by the voters to represent Georgia in the U.S. Senate. And just one year ago, Georgians decided that my job was not done, and they sent me back for another term.

**Let’s be clear: if we win Georgia, we send Joe Biden and Kamala Harris back to the White House. If we win Georgia, we continue our march of progress.**

[**_I’m asking you right now, one year out from the 2024 elections, to split a donation of $25 or whatever you can afford between my team and the Democratic Party of Georgia so we can re-elect President Biden and continue our work to build a better future for our children.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72806826/436438669/1583625711?refcode=20231104.2_RW_11I&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODZjZTFhYi00MjdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t0mpqqY50-2Jqs_aCvCmDXj77ONtSMvCAblAwaL6o2Q=)_** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: just how important Georgia will be | | | I don’t need to tell you just how important next year’s presidential election will be, Peter. I also don’t need to tell you that Georgia will be the key to victory for Joe Biden. We’ve seen how important it was to elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in 2020. >From appointing Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson, the first Black woman on the Supreme Court, to capping insulin costs for seniors, to creating millions of good-paying jobs across the country, Joe Biden has delivered for hardworking Georgians. We’ve also seen that Georgia has become the premiere swing state in the country. In 2020, we elected Joe Biden and Kamala Harris by the closest margin in the entire country – just 0.23%! In 2021, my brother, Jon Ossoff, and I were honored to be chosen by the voters to represent Georgia in the U.S. Senate. And just one year ago, Georgians decided that my job was not done, and they sent me back for another term. Let’s be clear: if we win Georgia, we send Joe Biden and Kamala Harris back to the White House. If we win Georgia, we continue our march of progress. =** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Are you with us, Peter? Together, we will re-elect President Biden and continue our hard work for Georgians. Humbly yours, Rev. Raphael Warnock | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I’ve been told I have to raise a LOT of money
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I’m trying to send a very strong message to Democrats. I’ll need your help to make sure they get it. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=95fcd8b810c04011b1364bf1847d2caf&_t=m_AgtJ3OflLorPswm22DgKqe6YWbC_27vtmcYRrNZTugpHGUCOgun3OO1L4xxodCHWcUbVjQJ0zqmGXySHDGyB0oNzE_AWKsDpo1qQhSnhg%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=95fcd8b810c04011b1364bf1847d2caf&_t=m_AgtJ3OflLorPswm22DgKqe6YWbC_27vtmcYRrNZTugpHGUCOgun3OO1L4xxodCHWcUbVjQJ0zqmGXySHDGyB0oNzE_AWKsDpo1qQhSnhg%3D)

Peter,

It probably comes as no surprise to you that the last ten days have been a blur. Everything transpired so quickly that my own family wasn’t even able to make it to Washington, D.C. to watch me be sworn in as the 56th Speaker of the House.

My team and I – which has grown exponentially in the last week – really have been burning the midnight oil, working around the clock to ensure the people’s House remains OPEN FOR BUSINESS.

In the past week,

1. I’ve sifted through hundreds of resumes.
2. Met with the leaders from the Pentagon, the Senate, and the executive branch.
3. Sat for interviews with Sean Hannity and Larry Kudlow, among others.
4. Met with the campaign staff at the National Republican Congressional Committee to set finance goals for the upcoming year.

I’ve got to be honest with you – with so many competing priorities, [**it’s critical to have the _best_ team by my side.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=95fcd8b810c04011b1364bf1847d2caf&_e=uAarHWIpqOdJE-_IekOcT_Io5Yyj0rO0VfB0hLyf9tH1fibyzEBOR0qzFYhY7QQDk7KWYy3g9gekgM0nUaWzh5E6RqbP8E1yv_3wq1BPhqt5fCyd12oI0Tl9EBXNj1n_LMwy5TGdcaP1tsKXBTxGcc3u69LUYd4VN0IiRe1Pb4xrO-QIhC-QL68zrP6zTEUs7m320ZCTPDyWnfgNpTSPy-qekAE8B69PY9FkWjwF_517_tv3s9Vb4ptznfk7akUu5YtkHlxutdKJCeo8-ZA3K4raAOs2MdFQGswT346Jb7z0qVDuDUUvp842qCdGTr1Mvb8zQ9jxTKXRb8iPx6QQTvom3JvyqZ-ZdL4x4bX7hbT8lhm6CXJOkOkTlhQUc1xgVATC6RmaDsc9FeHNpJz6tg%3D%3D) I’m working to continue filling positions as fast as possible while fulfilling my duties outside of the Capitol.

You see, aside from my official duties as speaker, [**one of my new responsibilities is to be the chief fundraiser for the Republican Party.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=95fcd8b810c04011b1364bf1847d2caf&_e=uAarHWIpqOdJE-_IekOcT_Io5Yyj0rO0VfB0hLyf9tH1fibyzEBOR0qzFYhY7QQDk7KWYy3g9gekgM0nUaWzh5E6RqbP8E1yv_3wq1BPhqt5fCyd12oI0Tl9EBXNj1n_LMwy5TGdcaP1tsKXBTxGcc3u69LUYd4VN0IiRe1Pb4xrO-QIhC-QL68zrP6zTEUs7m320ZCTPDyWnfgNpTSPy-qekAE8B69PY9FkWjwF_517_tv3s9Vb4ptznfk7akUu1Dmce22-Kv6dkze-NbBgq1Ie9kwHPPhj_6VomGszeF-NlczqGGvRjZjE3ZSYdqSG0XF3LweCEsDwm-fYqwuQto6ko11a4CN8hhXgOpkMXCK68_Ds5HA3yiuQELZfrnYO930-oRqB9dBYDdOG_l3sWg%3D%3D) That means using this platform to raise money every single day of the year, so we have the necessary funds to defend our five-seat majority in next year’s election.

[**My staff have told me that we’re just short of having raised $1 million online since I was elected speaker last week. In fact, we have just another $134,000 to raise to hit that mark – and we need to do it before tonight at 11:59 p.m.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=95fcd8b810c04011b1364bf1847d2caf&_e=uAarHWIpqOdJE-_IekOcT_Io5Yyj0rO0VfB0hLyf9tH1fibyzEBOR0qzFYhY7QQDk7KWYy3g9gekgM0nUaWzh5E6RqbP8E1yv_3wq1BPhqt5fCyd12oI0Tl9EBXNj1n_LMwy5TGdcaP1tsKXBTxGcc3u69LUYd4VN0IiRe1Pb4xrO-QIhC-QL68zrP6zTEUs7m320ZCTPDyWnfgNpTSPy-qekAE8B69PY9FkWjwF_517_tv3s9Vb4ptznfk7akUuw4sRjgSHjlAQoMBobQntAe3azZQmNbY0kTM6ZrqYG5fHxqmTX475KGyojcicWWHPv4LXCZl5IGlk6_ikbKzcITqSJovxIQFv2QG9Q4cD_PEzT_ciB9H3Ez6xywuZr0r6WjIzggxBRBPOFLjALeXgKg%3D%3D)

[** CHIP IN $12 **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=95fcd8b810c04011b1364bf1847d2caf&_e=uAarHWIpqOdJE-_IekOcT_Io5Yyj0rO0VfB0hLyf9tH1fibyzEBOR0qzFYhY7QQDk7KWYy3g9gekgM0nUaWzh5E6RqbP8E1yv_3wq1BPhqt5fCyd12oI0Tl9EBXNj1n_LMwy5TGdcaP1tsKXBTxGcc3u69LUYd4VN0IiRe1Pb4xrO-QIhC-QL68zrP6zTEUs7m320ZCTPDyWnfgNpTSPy-qekAE8B69PY9FkWjwF_517_tv3s9Vb4ptznfk7akUuUTVBACfPeoHamzahnbtErHEFERXQ7MPxKsnTElvz6d95B7wZxxIknD2PzaVUDvQXdskt53PAaaf7zwJon-PWjse8wtFbgSXv08V5PG40fAvkFIPQS7p_fKAvZRGgHC131d3RbFpI3prH1_F6PYcmLQ%3D%3D) [** CHIP IN $25 **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=95fcd8b810c04011b1364bf1847d2caf&_e=uAarHWIpqOdJE-_IekOcT_Io5Yyj0rO0VfB0hLyf9tH1fibyzEBOR0qzFYhY7QQDk7KWYy3g9gekgM0nUaWzh5E6RqbP8E1yv_3wq1BPhqt5fCyd12oI0Tl9EBXNj1n_LMwy5TGdcaP1tsKXBTxGcc3u69LUYd4VN0IiRe1Pb4xrO-QIhC-QL68zrP6zTEUs7m320ZCTPDyWnfgNpTSPy-qekAE8B69PY9FkWjwF_517_tv3s9Vb4ptznfk7akUuLAOyzZFiJnPqaF42yB6XgLuM62zZK4ieD41nvDNm6eQe7qbSSPOMovZVNZhBDzoCP58lqMCKOq3wTIRHKUSSOJBhN2Tu_Hxa_zs5Bhi0fx96zmMJbCVOLGmwUDIc8Kc945j8-fFINu4gdo6BF_V9ng%3D%3D) [** CHIP IN $50 **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=95fcd8b810c04011b1364bf1847d2caf&_e=uAarHWIpqOdJE-_IekOcT_Io5Yyj0rO0VfB0hLyf9tH1fibyzEBOR0qzFYhY7QQDk7KWYy3g9gekgM0nUaWzh5E6RqbP8E1yv_3wq1BPhqt5fCyd12oI0Tl9EBXNj1n_LMwy5TGdcaP1tsKXBTxGcc3u69LUYd4VN0IiRe1Pb4xrO-QIhC-QL68zrP6zTEUs7m320ZCTPDyWnfgNpTSPy-qekAE8B69PY9FkWjwF_517_tv3s9Vb4ptznfk7akUup9slz7f8FrTOt1kFlF9dd0imBmgKlwTwoXJ0s2ZwXy3PV5SZUSWInbtrlvt2lMGmTJD24qTyxD59WO0awsPLcTUg_hNenSSVeW03nviTMZTwg2N3uYx6pV_FU-Ki3GvvIoNBHrH9DC5J2NuKU7NKSg%3D%3D)
[**Our ability to raise money from grassroots conservatives like you will send a signal to Democrats that we are ready to help reelect a Republican majority in next year’s midterms.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=95fcd8b810c04011b1364bf1847d2caf&_e=uAarHWIpqOdJE-_IekOcT_Io5Yyj0rO0VfB0hLyf9tH1fibyzEBOR0qzFYhY7QQDk7KWYy3g9gekgM0nUaWzh5E6RqbP8E1yv_3wq1BPhqt5fCyd12oI0Tl9EBXNj1n_LMwy5TGdcaP1tsKXBTxGcc3u69LUYd4VN0IiRe1Pb4xrO-QIhC-QL68zrP6zTEUs7m320ZCTPDyWnfgNpTSPy-qekAE8B69PY9FkWjwF_517_tv3s9Vb4ptznfk7akUuInGBR8GssvuGANWz5hNnMIGrCcVbKGLifjtTVnNcLoQIV0Am7FSulNwK-YJM9-uo1Y2dMR13xLzn1GWV_SLdDp5OgFJ6ly82MEVcjFnnum7ZMM13wvcPDlsxCA55_sE1TwkxMeBMeooFIgQry6IRwA%3D%3D)

If we come up short, all bets are off.

I have to get back to interviewing candidates to join my team, but I'll be checking in with my staff frequently over the next few days to see what progress we’ve made toward hitting this critical campaign goal.

Let’s get this done.

For America,

clean_body: I’m trying to send a very strong message to Democrats. I’ll need your help to make sure they get it. | | Peter, It probably comes as no surprise to you that the last ten days have been a blur. Everything transpired so quickly that my own family wasn’t even able to make it to Washington, D.C. to watch me be sworn in as the 56th Speaker of the House. My team and I – which has grown exponentially in the last week – really have been burning the midnight oil, working around the clock to ensure the people’s House remains OPEN FOR BUSINESS. In the past week, 1. I’ve sifted through hundreds of resumes. 2. Met with the leaders from the Pentagon, the Senate, and the executive branch. 3. Sat for interviews with Sean Hannity and Larry Kudlow, among others. 4. Met with the campaign staff at the National Republican Congressional Committee to set finance goals for the upcoming year. I’ve got to be honest with you – with so many competing priorities, I’m working to continue filling positions as fast as possible while fulfilling my duties outside of the Capitol. You see, aside from my official duties as speaker, That means using this platform to raise money every single day of the year, so we have the necessary funds to defend our five-seat majority in next year’s election. If we come up short, all bets are off. I have to get back to interviewing candidates to join my team, but I'll be checking in with my staff frequently over the next few days to see what progress we’ve made toward hitting this critical campaign goal. Let’s get this done. For America, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

Peter, We’ve known one another for a long time, so you know by now that when I ask for favors there is a reason. I’ll be straight with you: my campaign needs your immediate financial support. A lot of folks around the country don’t think that my seat is at risk, but the truth is that no one knows that for sure. You know that Democrats HATE ME. I know that Democrats HATE ME. But I bet you didn’t know that they hate me to the tune of $52,000 per day, did you? When my opponent announced his fundraising numbers for the third quarter earlier this month, it shocked me. From July 1st to September 30th, he raised more than $4.7 million from the liberal coasts that he’s going to use to smear my good name ahead of next year’s election. **[Texans know me; Americans know me.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=fe91f68ebc844297b232d7e86030f97f&_e=dd0hoTgpmOCwPH5YH2hJ8x5WWTGRThMeGH994Oz8kurVwEzpf5eAqUDqf95J9JfWyBgMlxyQxuOTk0QOL193xy7fyTBzs1A4AeQIJ5cdEyAu8GZcu7ODoHObGxDDhuSYSuL_7ApDvB5sn0TcKBFSxduSpsWpZmrWWR9QXGHH0_ACKyjkwa2EJWMs9yfUNL9kK4i3KoQITsVN1kz6ivD6yCsig7tzpurustQyig2mhrXYTA3catr3P0SKcjGG-i6Kxk0UkFWQ_jxfZQFDuQwH-WrPynKxZ-ENDBMunmu7-lyeSrfMlldtWLadLt9TLUAjDB1MEzDdo9TKfubkr2_vVDV_rZ-wTPUoTveMUfXhciSSAXu0dNi4Q6dQHfOiX4oc6qS0pCGFX6FGPimIc7RVhMiywJBVT4GXFOI0G3b80qpkfo699GNJsDUv1zw8mfGZ)** It’s no secret what I stand for. But I’ll tell you this: if Democrats are allowed to vastly outspend us on the airwaves, there is no telling what kind of twisted lies they’ll try to spin to make my supporters flip sides. **We cannot – WE WILL not allow them to win. I would read anything I could get my hands on.** Adventure books, comic books, cereal boxes, you name it. As I grew up, I read books that broadened my view of the world, challenged my ideas, and forced me to grow as a person.

I am, in part, the person I am today because of the experiences I gained while reading. I’m more empathetic, more understanding, and more willing to hear someone else’s point of view.

Which is why it terrifies me to see extreme MAGA Republicans all across the country (even in California!) pushing to ban books with just a passing mention of complicated topics or ideas that MAGA extremists find taboo.

Put plainly, team – these MAGA book bans are blatant attacks, not only on the free expression of authors and school children, but adults and society more broadly.

I’m fighting tooth-and-nail against ever increasing MAGA book bans, but we need to snuff out this bigoted movement where it starts –**with the MAGA politicians that fuel the hate and fervor of these movements.**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Can I explain something, Derek?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=4394%2E5257348%2EaRl-9i ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, can
I share a photo with you?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231104_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=4394%2E5257348%2EaRl-9i ]Adam Schiff as a child

That young guy, missing his two front teeth with a curious look in his
eye? Yup, that’s me!

And if you had told him that nowadays, I’d be running for the U.S. Senate
from the great state of California, he would no doubt be very pleased —
but genuinely shocked.

You see, growing up, I was fascinated by history and politics.

Sitting around the dinner table at night, we’d talk about the news of the
day or the history book my father was reading at the moment.

The conversation was always dynamic — my dad comes from a long line of
Democrats, and my mom from a long line of Republicans (in fact, her father
was a Republican County chairman at one point, so you can imagine the
discourse at larger family gatherings!).

Back then, Democrats and Republicans disagreed with each other about
plenty of issues, but you could disagree without being disagreeable.

What changed? Many things. How we get our information. Cable news.
Algorithms set to exploit fear and anger.

And Donald J. Trump became President. And when he became President, he
sought new and inventive ways to divide us. And used many of the old ones,
like bigotry and hate.

When I started in politics, Democrats and Republicans would work together
to get things done. They often disagreed — strongly — but they put the
best interests of the American people first and found areas where they
could agree.

But those days feel long gone now. We have seen a seismic shift in the
last few years — since a charlatan celebrity and reality TV host who
called disabled veterans “suckers” and “losers,” denigrated our immigrant
communities, and railed on about “fake news” was elected President of the
United States.

I’ve never been one to back down from the bullies — so amidst these
attacks, I did my duty and called him out and held him to account. I took
on these fights not because they were easy, but because they needed to be
done.

And for taking on those fights, I’ve become Trump’s favorite boogeyman and
enemy.

The little boy in the picture at the beginning of this email never would
have imagined bearing the brunt of attacks from a U.S. President and his
cronies in Congress and the far-right media.

But if standing up for our democracy, for our rights and freedoms, and for
our Constitution has earned me the enmity of Trump and the MAGA movement,
then that’s a badge of honor I will wear proudly every day.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231104_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1005&akid=4394%2E5257348%2EaRl-9i ]These are the fights I’m going to take on in the U.S. Senate — where
many of Trump’s chief enablers reside. Which is why Trump is doing
everything he can to stop me from winning. Please, help me keep up this
fight by pitching in
$3 or any
amount you can spare to our campaign today.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2023_abs_em.5RW9ow&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231104_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1006&akid=4394%2E5257348%2EaRl-9i ]EXPRESS DONATE
$3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2023_abs_em.5RW9ow&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231104_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1007&akid=4394%2E5257348%2EaRl-9i ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2023_abs_em.5RW9ow&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231104_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=1008&akid=4394%2E5257348%2EaRl-9i ]EXPRESS DONATE
$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2023_abs_em.5RW9ow&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231104_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1009&akid=4394%2E5257348%2EaRl-9i ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2023_abs_em.5RW9ow&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231104_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1010&akid=4394%2E5257348%2EaRl-9i ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231104_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=4394%2E5257348%2EaRl-9i ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Many of the most important fights for the future of our democracy will be
waged in the U.S. Senate in the years to come. I plan on being there, on
the front lines, just like I always have. Your help sending me there means
the world to me.

Thanks for reading this longer note about our campaign and what this all
means to me.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231104_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=4394%2E5257348%2EaRl-9i ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

The New York judge overseeing former President Donald Trump’s civil
fraud trial expanded his gag order Friday to include Trump’s
attorneys. Judge Arthur Engoron issued an order Friday barring Trump’s
attorneys from making “any public comments about court staff”
referring to “confidential communications” between him and his staff.

Federal Appeals Court Temporarily Pauses Trump Gag Order

A federal appeals court temporarily paused the gag order against
former President Donald Trump in his 2020 election case on Friday. The
Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia temporarily paused the
order issued Oct. 17 by District Judge Tanya Chutkan to allow time to
consider Trump’s request for a longer freeze on its enforcement
pending appeal.

In 2017, I joined a delegation organized by [Code Pink](https://substack.com/redirect/56838177-a633-4061-819b-438c8ce66402?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Women for Peace (which is organizing an important [march on Washington today](https://substack.com/redirect/fb0a1cec-61ea-444b-b497-58b1e2048e0c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) and [Dr. Bronner's Soaps](https://substack.com/redirect/f5f41321-1efe-4c54-81d5-4aa745735fc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to visit a series of olive orchards in the West Bank, where we met the families who have maintained them for generations.
At the time, I envisioned writing an article for [my ](https://substack.com/redirect/3115e969-b3d8-4f18-b646-f7b5f319a15a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[Truthout](https://substack.com/redirect/3115e969-b3d8-4f18-b646-f7b5f319a15a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ column](https://substack.com/redirect/3115e969-b3d8-4f18-b646-f7b5f319a15a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) after returning. My reflections, however, ended up coming out in a song. I share it today because its relevance grows hard to ignore, even though it's nearly a decade old.
Over 20,000 people read this publication. Fewer than 100 support it. Subscriptions are free, while paid subscriptions help expand my work exposing corruption.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..1fQxAPXhCWi83e4fZ0zqkhMPtpWl9QG7aeJ--PXM250?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=138560687)
### Ferguson to Jerusalem
[| Ferguson To Jerusalem by Shahid ButtarShahid Buttar
---|---](https://substack.com/redirect/3715fb13-8dbb-4b53-a4cb-39e02671db76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### Lyrics
_**Ferguson to Jerusalem**_**(2017)**
There's a Mike Brown in every town
Don't try to tell me that America was found
We've been slaughtering innocents from the very beginning
Our country spits a big game while sinning

Spitting half ass facts: "All men are created equal"
except apparently Blacks.
Folks got declared three-fifths when Whites wrote the Constitution
and ever since then even it we keep abusing.

Mass confusion on our own stated principles
leaves the empire seeming invincible:
murder with impunity if shot by a cop,
while prosecutors persecute the block nonstop.
CHORUS
From Ferguson to Jerusalem
to Washington Houston we have a problem
for housing, education not enough funds
'cause we gave the real criminals badges and guns
In Palestine folks are on the front line
A massacre, the Nakba, gave rise in time
to all the crimes that you might now find.
Three quarters of a million refugees on the run.

Exodus. Chased by guns,
peoples of the Book allegiances undone
after a thousand years of solidarity, son!
Brothers killing each other. What's the function?

Supporting leaders with no compunction
destroying everywhere every town, every junction.
Careerists, institutional corruption
from Tel Aviv all the way back to Langley.

For a millenium, Jews, Muslims: one family.
Colonial schemes, the root tragedy in history.
Across the globe authorities claim security
but peace need not be a fantasy for anybody.
CHORUS
U.S. weapons in the hands of Israelis
infect a region with imperial rabies.
Diseases driving regimes crazy,
serving a hegemon by killing babies

not just abroad but across the U.S.
Weapons used in Palestine by the IDF
end up all over the world. Where else?
To your right and left, all over U.S. streets.

Like the CIA, an enemy of peace
undermining human rights from the west to east.
A beast like all police / intelligence agencies,
feasts of death, medical emergencies.

I'm here to help you feel a little urgency
to connect seemingly separate dots internationally,
help us see how we, all humanity
shares the same interest in restraining police.

We're a family like all others
Cain & Abel, murdering our own brothers.
Police act with impunity, their druthers
abuse while claiming to protect and serve others.

Paramilitaries serving corporate bosses
communities forced to bear crosses
innocent people gunned down every day.
Dance and have fun now, but don't turn away.

Tomorrow offers crucial opportunities
to support any of the many communities
targeted by authorities around the planet.
Revolution needs to happen. Help plan it.
CHORUS
Thank you for reading & listening! Know anyone else who appreciates conscious music and poetry? Share this post with them.

---|---|---
Image at https://twitter.com/rananazzalh/status/499997861669797888
### My hopes
Recording this song gave me a way to publicly connect the dots between parallel struggles in different countries whose roots both stretch back to the militarism emanating from Washington. While oppression is easy enough to recognize, it has many faces, and the dynamics that enable them often escape attention.
I've long hoped to produce a music video for this song to enhance its utility as a teaching tool. Given the seriousness of the subject matter, I've thought of perhaps using documentary news footage rather than the particular styles apparent in my previous music videos (for _NSA vs USA_ and _Bumpin in My SUV_) seeking similar purposes as educational vehicles.
Paid subscribers can access each of those music videos, in addition to a series of four posts addressing the genocide unfolding in Gaza that I've published over the past month. They address issues including disinformation & propaganda, the painful consistency of U.S. history, and a strategy for how We the People might bring the Israeli assault to an end despite Biden's support for it...

name: Team DLCC
subject: What happens the day after Election Day at the DLCC?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
For far too long, Republicans have outraised our party, leveraging their financial advantage to rig the maps in their favor and hold onto power. | | |
---
| |
---|---
For far too long, Democrats have been underdogs in the fight for our state legislatures. Republicans have _consistently outraised_ our party, leveraging their financial advantage to rig the maps in their favor and hold onto power. **With Election Day less than THREE DAYS away, here’s why the DLCC needs you to step up: **
* Virginia Republicans want to secure a right-wing trifecta to ban abortion – if Republicans gain total control of the legislature, Virginians will be forced to live under an extreme right-wing state government.
* Gov. Youngkin’s Republican megadonors have unleashed a staggering **_$27 million_** this cycle to maintain Republican control of the House and defeat Senate Democrats.
* Polls show VA Democrats with a slim lead – but Republicans are pulling out _all the stops_ to come out on top.

[ Will you step up today with a $10 donation? Your support is the final push Democrats need to secure victories in Virginia and nationwide → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuG0DIvBkTCI0Lr6bZYKgpWF9cu_jvmU2XoLCpRVJVcrJzYoDCgIYKyofYHHDeLGydNUKzaw3UkLC-Xc7ieEjr4SoyigTGHnVsq-ozTfcFg3CDF4tGggHJaxbRYuyepH6_pGeOVYYAUgT_b1K8n6i357mwOzIOE4vlwlajPsVHeymxrdz9yZZ_YiPOISEzCldogNHI1hLZzmFUoxTu983o1mtM3V9SMSrtnOe6gO3fNnlzayGOO-2-S-a76C70nRrxqezmTWnds9r4Ko3h0Z1MIPXYbwCBy07oMfeDQq-PBf-qOLRQZqlmYe3g56769AHeIClr7BwhlxtcGdKAohsrGb_zJI9Cefb_z12fvMiVZXSwVS65SGEZeN42evj4ws62LsTs9FKNBXsBWOgaumrpZGnHYe4dRvMVF_BUayjJ1L8_Kaq1ltqbNaS6aAAfP0NkVkjhfTGNCJnhIS9ZJ2tJbBa3nfHsthq8JZd-H4Hrng/410/M0dIs_5oSWaZp6QxuOphNA/h0/SypjnLhT08gKaWbWlZ6q_xCnyBU7pNVt-JpIf8HJnQQ) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20Canepa?=
subject: [RSVP] Join David on November 15th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, FPPC# 1399463
body:
Peter, you're invited to a Pizza Party for Progress >> | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://davidcanepa.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=46c1d4af8f9db208806c0d78a&id=1fc9f399cc&e=0961f0e7e8)
---
Peter, it’s David Canepa.
Our re-election campaign for San Mateo County Supervisor is in full swing, and I need you with us for our “Pizza Party for Progress” on November 15th!
From the beginning, our movement has been about connecting with our community and working together to move us forward.
[**I can’t believe it, but our next election is only a few months away. Can I count on you to stand with us on November 15th? RSVP through the link below ⬇️**](https://davidcanepa.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=46c1d4af8f9db208806c0d78a&id=a8007cfd9b&e=0961f0e7e8)
| [RSVP](https://davidcanepa.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=46c1d4af8f9db208806c0d78a&id=b5af845d11&e=0961f0e7e8)
---
[](https://davidcanepa.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=46c1d4af8f9db208806c0d78a&id=dbc0ee8780&e=0961f0e7e8)
**Peter, this is a campaign focused on meaningfully reducing homelessness, creating new affordable housing options, and providing free community college to qualifying students.**
[**Our event on the 15th is a great opportunity for us to come together, discuss our movement, and set us on the right track before the election! RSVP here ⬇️**](https://davidcanepa.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=46c1d4af8f9db208806c0d78a&id=bba26fdc91&e=0961f0e7e8)
| [RSVP](https://davidcanepa.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=46c1d4af8f9db208806c0d78a&id=c5ea9cafb2&e=0961f0e7e8)
---
In friendship,David CanepaSan Mateo County Supervisor
| | | David Canepa is running for re-election to the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors to continue providing county residents with the resources and tools necessary to create a community that is healthy, environmentally conscious, equitable and economically prosperous.

As a fourth generation son of San Mateo County and graduate of Skyline College, David cares deeply about the residents of San Mateo County, as he has lived and worked in this community his entire life.

[](https://davidcanepa.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=46c1d4af8f9db208806c0d78a&id=2bbbb59b2f&e=0961f0e7e8)

David is a proud fourth-generation San Mateo County and lives in Daly City with his wife Ana and young son Piero.

His extensive experience in public service includes serving two terms on the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors and as mayor and councilmember on the Daly City Council.

David serves on several regional boards and commissions tasked with improving traffic congestion and its impacts on the environment including the Metropolitan Transportation Commission, SamTrans and Commute.org.

He also serves on the San Mateo Medical Center and Health Plan of San Mateo boards with a mission to improve health outcomes for all county residents.

**Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to**

**Re-elect David Canepa for San Mateo County Supervisor 2024
20 Park Road
Suite E
Burlingame, CA 94010**

---
| [SUPPORT DAVID](https://davidcanepa.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=46c1d4af8f9db208806c0d78a&id=46e1c8a4ee&e=0961f0e7e8)
---

subject: New York Judge Expands Gag Order To Include Trump’s Attorneys
body:

name: Team Pramila
subject: We need action now, not tomorrow, not next month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
There have been more mass shootings in the past five years than in any other half-decade.
#
Peter,
Gun violence is an epidemic — one that touches every community no matter the social, economic, or racial differences.
In 2023 alone, we’ve seen over 500 mass shootings. There have been more mass shootings in the past five years than in any other half-decade since they started tracking this data in 1966.1
We cannot continue to live in a world where multiple mass shootings a day is considered _normal_. **This is far from normal.**
It should not be easier to buy an assault weapon than buy tickets to a movie or a concert, Peter.
We need bold, immediate, and transformative legislation to further prevent gun violence now. **Not tomorrow, not next month, but right now.**
[**Please add your name to call on Congress to prioritize passing common sense gun laws, ban assault weapons, and ensure the future safety of communities across the United States.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/ban-assault-weapons-petition_20231104/?source=em20231104-3127&t=1&akid=3127%2E420207%2EIh9g_r)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/ban-assault-weapons-petition_20231104/?source=em20231104-3127&t=2&akid=3127%2E420207%2EIh9g_r)**
Together,
Team Pramila

Friends, Over the past week we have learned some startling new information on the crisis at our southern border.
* [Chinese social media influencers are helping immigrants cross the border illegally](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=17028a36e34a4d9784731ae845e97e88&_e=3IZLDSl6B2udnx3_9_OLxcuf2kRM50gzxqmpJaXPc7kgqMW6k4YNetD0F5-8cYcoR6ZuMGzHKDNaoXlyBut7MO5a6xsyb03es7KBkwdLGyfTS22i9-wrEt6ee-oZTtTJGLOHS9NpxSKzoefVKS4QBchXSn-nMDU42YpIf1aEtVTLEG4eMNCvTfx0xGpkU1yrQxFSKmidYbGPYPJbfr6U1S2BLiPL8diukW56i0X0CZM_epsINPUUZ7FQC2GFVSFZX2OjkDJ9VRbuuB-uXx6jEABxYfE_LaaLoqu__lWafGM%3D).

* [47 individuals with serious criminal records are trying to cross every day](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=17028a36e34a4d9784731ae845e97e88&_e=3IZLDSl6B2udnx3_9_OLxRlv_yLPEMYWXUioPO9h_6yoCsW0U0mwLpIZFqObC0FQlzp9VwqP7su_Nqrn4SpGnKZ11viE0EX1gXT0NDFNokfoRaR3TyxKzOT7hyx1pFqdv-wp4JUenBfLUqzPJVEadTjv2_bGLu1rBB0U0A3mOJ3ixiO316z2V3Ta-kJoP8oBNL7Rzz9PsEP7zAGl4RsqE55URZ8tDfSenzAwsExGDgoe3AOdAj-WaaiqK4bybeYxba7GPaiqBCtAtR1a2d1U9_twrE6VSo4ToR4W3Pf3izScX-nD8R5fJSAyUzU8wdEm).

* [A foreign national who was caught trying to build bombs](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=17028a36e34a4d9784731ae845e97e88&_e=3IZLDSl6B2udnx3_9_OLxRlv_yLPEMYWXUioPO9h_6wSc91JGsri_YTgqFiUrWFLWvd64x7hBHVl5N7floX52H_J_72UMn5P0VZwuwFIAU67IwZG6TNw0pbA5-mGDhxJ2TIml0gpRGlV7c_GaPQ7LTYxNOhFWrtRkkyfBN6fcv0IkNr-UXreZaEKK7mQxWjL5jeG93LR-ETlSKY0Poys2YIqvXGzI3W7tIOt9eLxGN3sNAw10-H3GOhUV0MoD3amyC8649H7hV5vNiYzlJPSnTrDP-tMOmd6FInYXi21x-6nre8rUQIUWz7J0w2ck3g-LxgMMfhsDB5sNxSp1witwA%3D%3D).

* [At least 169 individuals on the terrorist watch list have tried to enter this year. (That’s more than all of 2017-2020 COMBINED!)](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=17028a36e34a4d9784731ae845e97e88&_e=3IZLDSl6B2udnx3_9_OLxQcYSOX1vIhU6TUTIfRwZvvJAM-Ic6M7FfKJFXNF1F17CpIY-TWsGbtowv0x0ftT2XAJx_UuBUE-PSc4CPO4MKb9tHLEfi3Dve9p5m7p4S7qHjeHacE9N4hk2WfRcMv3m45djK1CqDF_oY2EHdoI8AL4BWJWdP4gHP6OvkNlgSUmrHzXVodKmF5xX0IjiBn3-F6cgmextSy1FPPxbnLJ0P3T_Upv0nCr0i5-1GJdXjf48sWAJIabZvIK57_cERwLMCRIRQ75Tbi6kvH8VS5d2mOFGSNicnM0pOfuGTB5Ks10)

That’s just part of the record 2.4 million encounters with illegal immigrants at the southern border this year, with 269,000 in September alone.
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=17028a36e34a4d9784731ae845e97e88&_e=3IZLDSl6B2udnx3_9_OLxdBPWeP8ahvv5MH-8LGUuNnhbCUfB7iHzgoJ5Y_kWMHmtgyJJi_jlN0Z5vaJK_DRREP2RoGPMrJ35_I3HfuquMFb2v41EvJAZdkKm2YIFiVG-OmN3t-DBT5_IPfv7K8I69J9u2Y3D3nxRiZyWBkVoq6zH6Sx9U4Daok71VY2gPZgioVb4okkpQfhJPfrB92Fkjn5P3OXaCYidmkdvmBJ5Px6RoEVZJudPIe35tcIrp3jBQ4eMy8CsMlao8mAdOL61ZvYFdLTPUuuLnyu7ogaaZoAjNR1RUpMHvPbOHjNbq-f1Vmv9kb_J7AoL9pacJ3eP-BlgAjjDWo4vNncB6J_3mXOjz02bQPskszDNnQsOYUUcvK34NhSU11tqhHPSYnYxk4cL7WBgTHfT1XKv8acv1w%3D)

Look, anyone can tell you how bad our southern border has become thanks to Joe Biden, but nobody ever seems to want to provide a plan. That’s why this week on [Fox News](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=17028a36e34a4d9784731ae845e97e88&_e=3IZLDSl6B2udnx3_9_OLxdBPWeP8ahvv5MH-8LGUuNnhbCUfB7iHzgoJ5Y_kWMHmXc5LZECisszlmZzjDL_lALLL4rQqIELKWhdjRuPJ9HCtqKn-4B6NNsBXp2lH-AOEEoEBHmyXZ4ioU2Nx9tUjFFV3HsXaumURbqMIZbQ9YzwT3flwX0PGdt6y_GR5xGlhqIlLVfF3n0dtWOLXsmjHs9q0PKPHjY0S1Qfce_HfdVEjZYQTEe-0CE1mLgewcBld) and [Newsmax](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=17028a36e34a4d9784731ae845e97e88&_e=3IZLDSl6B2udnx3_9_OLxdBPWeP8ahvv5MH-8LGUuNnhbCUfB7iHzgoJ5Y_kWMHm4SW7cIrnzHM-brIA049YuenjSmR_cPwf3gzMd1Fx7eIn3wCOTbCgw3ybW1UqgGmK8bu3LW5BNYErr_tL8U0V1VoKlvp_qT6NfIDty_nbSNiGYYcZWPPvK7WzPdBCpRd6Ucm_GCezF-zwGViit2YvsV4STc6KppogEUycIZjdMos0KEr-pW0EbNQ59jnHZdtZ) I shared my solutions to secure the border. It’s simple: [We need to reinstate the policies of President Trump](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=17028a36e34a4d9784731ae845e97e88&_e=3IZLDSl6B2udnx3_9_OLxdBPWeP8ahvv5MH-8LGUuNnhbCUfB7iHzgoJ5Y_kWMHmPpK7D3fkNPerZc7qwWfcMdsWZ2NN9WKdGMPafZZ7HPX5vZEIRcY6u5Ru0aY7pRG9qMw0A9eQKO0vQiMRfH3UwcqquQRILZwgqO9PNS0xCegpW6WRXMa0THopWDOIuWgWVvu4Fiaqz8P40oLNiRFXeA1-xWftlrDANeXJ8XmUGln6v5BNZ6_MJygSSWdLigON). That means bringing back the “Stay in Mexico” policy. Giving law enforcement the resources they need to do their jobs. And yes, building physical and technological barriers along the border. We know we can secure the border. We know the policies that work. Let’s get it done. Thank you,Mike PS — I can’t get this job done alone, which is why I’m relying on grassroots supporters like yourself to share my message with your friends and family. Thank you! name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Max=20Ukropina?=
subject: FWD: my 2️⃣ cents on the Israel aid bill
disclaimer_text: paid for by cutting funding from the IRS in Biden's Inflation Reduction Act (which does nothing to reduce inflation)
body:
Wanted to share my thoughts with you.

Hi - did you see the update Max Ukropina sent you yesterday with his thoughts on the Israel aid bill that just passed the House?

This is a huge issue. Hope you have a moment to watch his video or read the email below. (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/bf0ef0a9-11ee-489c-a57b-32f708bc5486?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Israel_Aid_113_FWD&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=4e5b81a5a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

- Team Max Ukropina

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Max Ukropina
Subject: my 2 cents on the Israel aid bill
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Hi Peter - yesterday the U.S. House, under the leadership of our new Republican Speaker Mike Johnson, passed a bipartisan, single-issue, and fully paid-for $14.2 billion bill to aid our ally Israel in their war against Hamas.

I support this commonsense legislation ... even though President Biden has recklessly threatened to veto it and Senate Democrats are threatening to kill it.

I posted a video last night explaining why. Click here to watch it. (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/bf0ef0a9-11ee-489c-a57b-32f708bc5486?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Israel_Aid_113_FWD&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=4e5b81a5a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/bf0ef0a9-11ee-489c-a57b-32f708bc5486?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Israel_Aid_113_FWD&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=4e5b81a5a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Israel is one of our oldest and most reliable allies. They absolutely have a right to defend themselves against the terrorist atrocities committed by Hamas. If they are asking for our immediate help, we should provide it to them.

However, I believe that all bills going forward must meet two conditions:
* First, it must be passed as a single-issue bill, instead of being lumped into a massive omnibus with other spending bills that no one has time to read.

* Second, it must be paid for. We cannot afford to go further into debt.

Speaker Johnson's bill accomplishes both of those things.

It only covers one issue - Israel - and it's paid for by cutting funding from the IRS in Biden's Inflation Reduction Act (which does nothing to reduce inflation).

We'll see what the Senate does. But for now, we need to change how Washington works. Single issue, budget-neutral bills like this are a good start. (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/bf0ef0a9-11ee-489c-a57b-32f708bc5486?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Israel_Aid_113_FWD&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=4e5b81a5a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

It's the kind of conservative approach I'll fight for if I'm elected to Congress to represent Orange County.

Talk soon,

Max Ukropina
https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/flipca47red_contribute?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=israel_aid_113_FWD&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=4e5b81a5a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

============================================================
** Twitter (https://twitter.com/MaxUkropina?utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=4e5b81a5a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/MaxforOC?utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=4e5b81a5a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Website (https://www.maxforoc.com/?utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=4e5b81a5a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

| | | Peter, Election Day is this Tuesday, November 7th, and wherever you live, you can help get WFP champions over the finish line in the final three days! clean_body: | | | Peter, Election Day is this Tuesday, November 7th, and wherever you live, you can help get WFP champions over the finish line in the final three days! We’re throwing down for over 750 endorsed candidates in every region of the country, and we need to make sure that voters have what they need to make their voices heard and elect leaders who will work for the many, not the few. You’re invited to join our organizers and the whole WFP community at virtual volunteer opportunities, where you can help grow our movement and elect transformative leaders to office. We challenge you to sign up for at least one of these events — but the more the better! In local elections like these, every volunteer shift can truly make the difference come Election Day. Monday, 6 PM ET/3 PM PT: On Election Eve, we’ll be reaching voters across New York City to Get Out the Vote. With an amazing champion running for Civil Court Judge and 16 trailblazing candidates for City Council on the ballot, we need all hands on deck! Tuesday, 10 AM ET/7 AM PT: As voters head to the polls Tuesday morning, we’ll be making calls to elect Nic and Kendra to the minority party seats on the Philadelphia City Council. This election has the chance to change the balance of power in Philadelphia. Tuesday, 5:30 PM ET/2:30 PM PT: We’re hitting the post-work voter rush in Cleveland to talk with residents about the participatory budgeting charter amendment that would allow them to directly propose and vote on how a portion of the city’s budget is spent. By voting YES, the people of Cleveland will deepen their democracy, build stronger communities, and create a more equitable distribution of public resources. Tuesday, 8:30 PM ET/5:30 PM PT: As polls close on the East Coast, we’re shifting our efforts to Arizona, where Regina Romero and Lane Santa Cruz — two proven progressive leaders — are running for office in Tucson. Have WFP-endorsed candidates in your area, and want to find an in-person event? Can’t make any of these events? Whenever, wherever, and however you’re able to help, we’re so grateful for everything you do to support our movement. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS! Calling for Ceasefire, Pramila Jayapal & Barbara Lee on M4A, Tuesday’s Election Guide, and more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Election Day 2023 Tuesday! | The Fight for Medicare for All |
Barbara Lee, Pramila Jayapal & Ro Khanna | CalCare w/ Ash Kalra | End
Medical Debt & Lower Drug Prices | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11202?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231104_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1011&akid=4868%2E5885482%2EsADqdl ][IMG]

As atrocities are carried out in the Middle East and far right voices grow
louder in Congress, it’s clear why progressives must unify now to grow our
ranks and work for global peace and prosperity.

On Tuesday, we must defeat rightwing extremists at the ballot box and save
abortion rights in states like Ohio and Virginia. And, we must start
working now for 2024 to take back the House and elect progressives like
Barbara Lee — the only candidate for the U.S. Senate in California to call
for a ceasefire in Israel/Palestine.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12238?t=1012&akid=4868%2E5885482%2EsADqdl ]Check out this latest LA Times article on why Barbara is the Peace
Candidate in this race compared to her opponents Katie Porter and Adam
Schiff.

Our Revolution stands with U.S. Reps. Barbara Lee, Cori Bush, Summer Lee
and our other progressive allies in Congress who are calling for an end to
the violence.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231104_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1013&akid=4868%2E5885482%2EsADqdl ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231104_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1014&akid=4868%2E5885482%2EsADqdl ][IMG]

The 2023 General Election is on Tuesday, and Our Revolution is mobilizing
voters to the polls to elect progressive champions in cities and states
nationwide!

Meet our candidates below, and be sure to get out to vote to help build
local power and build progressive majorities that can make a direct impact
in people’s lives.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12398?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231104_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1015&akid=4868%2E5885482%2EsADqdl ]Chip in to make sure we have the resources to pull off a massive voter
turnout effort ahead of Tuesday. Every donation of $5 or $10 helps power
critical groundwork, phone banks, texting, door knocks and more in these
important down-ballot elections!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231104_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1016&akid=4868%2E5885482%2EsADqdl ][IMG]

Our Revolution has been blazing a path for progressive cities in 2023,
from winning a progressive majority with Board President Megan Green in
St. Louis and helping elect Mayor Brandon Johnson in Chicago. Now we have
a chance to bolster progressive power in Pittsburgh with Sara Innamorato!

We backed Sara as she beat big money back in May to win the primary and on
Tuesday, she’ll be on the ballot to become the next Allegheny County
Executive!

If she wins, Sara will be part of a progressive trifecta in Pittsburgh
that includes Mayor Ed Gainey and U.S. Rep Summer Lee, whom she ran
alongside successfully for PA House back in 2018 with Our Revolution’s
support.

As County Exec, Sara will lead the second-largest county in Pennsylvania
and have the power to help protect abortion care, push for county-wide
housing, and address human rights violations in the county jail.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12346?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231104_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1017&akid=4868%2E5885482%2EsADqdl ]PITCH IN TO HELP MAKE PITTSBURGH OUR NEXT PROGRESSIVE CITY!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231104_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1018&akid=4868%2E5885482%2EsADqdl ][IMG]

With Our Revolution’s slate of progressives, Democrats could win back
power in Virginia — and maintain the last bastion of abortion rights in
the South.

Nadarius Clark, Rozia Henson, Adele McClure, and Joshua Cole are all vying
for key seats in the Virginia State House, while Jennifer Carroll Foy,
Stella Pekarsky, and Lashrecse Aird could win races that block a
Republican takeover of the State Senate. This is critical since Gov. Glenn
Youngkin said he would sign any abortion ban the Virginia legislature
sends to his desk.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231104_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1019&akid=4868%2E5885482%2EsADqdl ][IMG]

We aren’t overlooking any race where a progressive can pick up power to
use for the people. That’s why we’re backing Steve Descano for Fairfax
County Commonwealth Attorney and Parisa Dehghani-Tafti for Arlington
County Commonwealth Attorney.

Our Revolution is going all out with our local chapters and activists on
the ground to overcome insidious Republican power-taking and to turn out
enough voters to defend our rights.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12232?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231104_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1020&akid=4868%2E5885482%2EsADqdl ][IMG]

Abortion is on the ballot in Ohio, and we have a chance to shut down this
new rightwing playbook to attack our rights. Our Revolution has been
organizing for months to make sure Issue 1 passes, and we preserve
reproductive rights in the Buckeye State and beyond.

After the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, a small but loud group of
deep-pocketed extremists took to the states, determined to gut abortion
laws. But the resistance has been real.

Thanks to grassroots funding, armies of volunteers, and organizations like
Our Revolution, we have a real shot at enshrining a woman’s right to
abortion access in the Ohio constitution.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12232?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231104_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1021&akid=4868%2E5885482%2EsADqdl ]We have just a few days left to make sure Ohio and Virginia voters
know what’s at stake and get to the polls on Tuesday. Please donate now to
bring home a critical win for abortion rights!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231104_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1022&akid=4868%2E5885482%2EsADqdl ][IMG]

Our Revolution Twin Cities has a powerhouse slate of progressives in
Minnesota — and we are working to get out the vote to make sure each of
these champions wins re-election!

These candidates include Minneapolis City Council members Jeremiah Ellison
(Ward 5), Elliot Payne (Ward 1), and Robin Wonsley (Ward 2). And, in St.
Paul, we are backing City Council members Mitra Jalali (Ward 4) and Nelsie
Yang (Ward 6).
