As we prepare for a massive GOTV push for Tuesday’s elections, we must
also keep an eye to our work for 2024.

Our Revolution is staffing up our organizing teams around the country now
to make sure we do our part to keep Trump and the far right out of office,
win back the House, and elect progressive leaders like Barbara Lee to join
Bernie Sanders in the Senate.

Barbara is the most progressive candidate in the race for the U.S. Senate
seat in California. Not only has she been on the forefront for peace -
casting the lone vote against the War in Afghanistan - but she has been a
trailblazer for climate, education, and of course, Medicare for All.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12369?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20231104_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.S1rUfT&t=1036&akid=4868%2E5885482%2EsADqdl ][IMG]

Barbara Lee was an original cosponsor of Medicare for All and she was the
first to introduce universal single-payer healthcare in the California
Legislature.

Last week, she joined fellow U.S. Reps. Pramila Jayapal and Ro Khanna, and
CA Assemblyman Ash Kalra at Our Revolution’s [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12247?t=1037&akid=4868%2E5885482%2EsADqdl ]Healthcare for All Town
Hall, where thousands tuned in to help chart a path for healthcare justice
on every front — from ending medical debt to guaranteeing healthcare as a
human right in California and nationwide.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12370?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20231104_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.Jwp8YV&t=1038&akid=4868%2E5885482%2EsADqdl ][IMG]

Congressional Progressive Caucus Chair Pramila Jayapal emphasized the
importance of electing “more true universal healthcare champions to the
Senate just like my friend Barbara Lee.”

“She’s someone who will build the coalitions we need and do the organizing
on the inside in the Senate to get more senators to recognize what we all
know: the healthcare system is broken and we need Medicare for All,”
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12249?t=1039&akid=4868%2E5885482%2EsADqdl ]Jayapal said.

“Together, we can finally give Americans what they deserve: universal
comprehensive healthcare that prioritizes people not profits — with
everybody in and nobody out,” she added. “I’m thrilled about Barbara Lee
running and that Our Revolution is doing the organizing on the ground to
help her win.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12346?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231104_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1040&akid=4868%2E5885482%2EsADqdl ]Support Our Revolution’s organizing work to elect champions like
Barbara in 2024 to advance the fight for healthcare justice and other
progressive issue priorities!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12372?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20231104_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.zRSNJW&t=1041&akid=4868%2E5885482%2EsADqdl ][IMG]

Rep. Ro Khanna served as a campaign co-chair for Bernie Sanders’ 2020 run
for President, and now he’s chairing Barbara Lee’s campaign for Senate.

He said she’s well-positioned in the race and much-needed in the seat
because she has been a fearless trailblazer - not only on Medicare for
All, but also on foreign policy, which sets her apart from her opponents.

“She was for Medicare for All and eliminating medical debt before anyone,
and she’s been the only person who opposed the war in Afghanistan
expanding,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12251?t=1042&akid=4868%2E5885482%2EsADqdl ]Ro said.

“When I used to say that 2 months ago, you know that’s great, but now we
NEED her voice,” he said. “She’s the only person talking clearly and
loudly about the Palestinians also who are being killed in Gaza. She’s
condemned the brutal Hamas attacks, but she’s also calling to end the
cycle of violence.”

“This is the time we need a candidate who is going to caution against
another expanded war, and a candidate who’s going to stand up for Medicare
for All,” Ro stated.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12412?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20231104_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.PUrpwL&t=1043&akid=4868%2E5885482%2EsADqdl ][IMG]

California Assemblyman Ash Kalra also joined the conversation - laying out
the path passing his bill for CalCare single-payer healthcare, which was
first authored by Barbara Lee.

“The bottom line is: CalCare is how we can get the greedy insurance
companies out of our healthcare system — the same doctors, nurses,
providers, they’re just funded through one source,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12253?t=1044&akid=4868%2E5885482%2EsADqdl ]Ash explained.
“Small businesses and individuals are getting ripped off.”

“Even with the most expensive healthcare system in the world, we have
people dying and medical debt is the number one cause of bankruptcy for
families in our state,” he said. “With our movement and a senator like
Barbara Lee, we can get it done. We can’t stop, lives depend on it, so
thank you Our Revolution for being the wind behind our sails to continue
to push us.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12247?t=1045&akid=4868%2E5885482%2EsADqdl ]WATCH THE FULL TOWN HALL HERE

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12413?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20231104_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.nzyZQb&t=1046&akid=4868%2E5885482%2EsADqdl ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12256?t=1048&akid=4868%2E5885482%2EsADqdl ]World Beyond Fossil Fuels, ending backyard drilling in California, and
more.

“The Senate needs Barbara Lee,” said Rep. Pocan. “If you want to transform

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION HEADLINES: Election Day 2023 Tuesday! | The Fight for Medicare for All | Barbara Lee, Pramila Jayapal & Ro Khanna | CalCare w/ Ash Kalra | End Medical Debt & Lower Drug Prices | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] As atrocities are carried out in the Middle East and far right voices grow louder in Congress, it’s clear why progressives must unify now to grow our ranks and work for global peace and prosperity. On Tuesday, we must defeat rightwing extremists at the ballot box and save abortion rights in states like Ohio and Virginia. And, we must start working now for 2024 to take back the House and elect progressives like Barbara Lee — the only candidate for the U.S. Senate in California to call for a ceasefire in Israel/Palestine. [ ]Check out this latest LA Times article on why Barbara is the Peace Candidate in this race compared to her opponents Katie Porter and Adam Schiff. Our Revolution stands with U.S. Reps. Barbara Lee, Cori Bush, Summer Lee and our other progressive allies in Congress who are calling for an end to the violence. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] The 2023 General Election is on Tuesday, and Our Revolution is mobilizing voters to the polls to elect progressive champions in cities and states nationwide! Meet our candidates below, and be sure to get out to vote to help build local power and build progressive majorities that can make a direct impact in people’s lives. [ ]Chip in to make sure we have the resources to pull off a massive voter turnout effort ahead of Tuesday. Every donation of $5 or $10 helps power critical groundwork, phone banks, texting, door knocks and more in these important down-ballot elections! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution has been blazing a path for progressive cities in 2023, from winning a progressive majority with Board President Megan Green in St. Louis and helping elect Mayor Brandon Johnson in Chicago. Now we have a chance to bolster progressive power in Pittsburgh with Sara Innamorato! We backed Sara as she beat big money back in May to win the primary and on Tuesday, she’ll be on the ballot to become the next Allegheny County Executive! If she wins, Sara will be part of a progressive trifecta in Pittsburgh that includes Mayor Ed Gainey and U.S. Rep Summer Lee, whom she ran alongside successfully for PA House back in 2018 with Our Revolution’s support. As County Exec, Sara will lead the second-largest county in Pennsylvania and have the power to help protect abortion care, push for county-wide housing, and address human rights violations in the county jail. [ ]PITCH IN TO HELP MAKE PITTSBURGH OUR NEXT PROGRESSIVE CITY! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] With Our Revolution’s slate of progressives, Democrats could win back power in Virginia — and maintain the last bastion of abortion rights in the South. Nadarius Clark, Rozia Henson, Adele McClure, and Joshua Cole are all vying for key seats in the Virginia State House, while Jennifer Carroll Foy, Stella Pekarsky, and Lashrecse Aird could win races that block a Republican takeover of the State Senate. This is critical since Gov. Glenn Youngkin said he would sign any abortion ban the Virginia legislature sends to his desk. [ ][IMG] We aren’t overlooking any race where a progressive can pick up power to use for the people. That’s why we’re backing Steve Descano for Fairfax County Commonwealth Attorney and Parisa Dehghani-Tafti for Arlington County Commonwealth Attorney. Our Revolution is going all out with our local chapters and activists on the ground to overcome insidious Republican power-taking and to turn out enough voters to defend our rights. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Abortion is on the ballot in Ohio, and we have a chance to shut down this new rightwing playbook to attack our rights. Our Revolution has been organizing for months to make sure Issue 1 passes, and we preserve reproductive rights in the Buckeye State and beyond. After the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, a small but loud group of deep-pocketed extremists took to the states, determined to gut abortion laws. But the resistance has been real. Thanks to grassroots funding, armies of volunteers, and organizations like Our Revolution, we have a real shot at enshrining a woman’s right to abortion access in the Ohio constitution. [ ]We have just a few days left to make sure Ohio and Virginia voters know what’s at stake and get to the polls on Tuesday. Please donate now to bring home a critical win for abortion rights! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution Twin Cities has a powerhouse slate of progressives in Minnesota — and we are working to get out the vote to make sure each of these champions wins re-election! These candidates include Minneapolis City Council members Jeremiah Ellison (Ward 5), Elliot Payne (Ward 1), and Robin Wonsley (Ward 2). And, in St. Paul, we are backing City Council members Mitra Jalali (Ward 4) and Nelsie Yang (Ward 6). ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Also in Minnesota, Our Revolution members weighed in and we are endorsing an exciting slate of progressive champions to win a majority on the city council in Duluth! We’re organizing to elect these three amazing women: Miranda Pacheco and Jenna Yeakle for City Council At-Large and Wendy Durrwachter for City Council District 1. These candidates have a real shot at winning and building a strong progressive bloc of local power, and we can’t let an opportunity like this pass us by! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] As corporations broaden their dark money fundraising networks into city council and school board races, we need working-class champions ready to confront them head-on, everywhere. That’s why we’re endorsing this slate of progressive candidates in Washington! Our slate includes Leah Perkel for Vancouver City Council, Charles Adkins for Everett School Board (Position 5), Tammy Morales for Seattle City Council (District 2), Teresa Mosqueda for King County Council (District 8), Jorge Baron King for King County Council (District 4). Leah Perkel is an Our Revolution member and a former Bernie delegate. She has firsthand experience with medical debt resulting from our lousy private health insurance system, and she wants to be an agent of change to help create healthier people and communities. [ ]We have just a few days to get out the vote in each of these elections. Pitch in now to fund our voter turnout operation and support our volunteer network! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution stands with Izola Shaw in her run for Rockville City Council At-Large and Martin Mitchell who is vying for Mayor of the City of Laurel. OR Member Izola Shaw was chair of the Montgomery County Racial Equity and Social Justice Advisory Committee, helped found the County’s Racial Equity Network (MORE), and helped pass the Racial Equity and Social Justice Act. She has worked with the County Executive on public works, policing, rent stabilization, and environmental protection through the Rockville City Academy. Laurel City Councilmember Martin Mitchell was a 2020 Bernie delegate and a founding member of Maryland for Bernie Sanders. He has been a leader in the fight for rent stabilization, marijuana decriminalization, and collective bargaining for municipal employees. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution is endorsing the Ithaca Solidarity Slate in New York! Jorge DeFendini (Ward 4) and Phoebe Brown (Ward 2) are both seeking re-election to the Ithaca Common Council, and Kayla Matos is a challenger who would grow our progressive bloc on the council. These are the races that determine the direction of cities and help us build progressive power at the local level, where we can directly improve people’s lives. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Jared Evans is running for re-election to a third term on the Indianapolis City Council — and Our Revolution is proud to have his back! Jared has been a strong progressive ally in Indianapolis, fighting for higher wages, good jobs, and more for the blue-collar neighborhoods he serves in District 17. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Juan Marcano is the proud son of Puerto Rican migrants and has been a voice for working-class people representing Ward 4 on the Aurora, Colorado City Council since 2019. Now, Our Revolution is proud to endorse Juan to lead the city in a progressive direction as Mayor. We know he will champion education, affordable housing, and economic and social justice at the helm. [ ]Donate today to support our massive GOTV efforts coast to coast ahead of Tuesday’s big elections! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution is endorsing Sheila Jackson Lee for Houston Mayor, who’s running against John Whitmire — a Democratic defector who sides with radical Republicans on voter suppression and racist policing policies. U.S. Rep. Jackson Lee is a long-time member of the Congressional Progressive Caucus, and she’s a fighter for Medicare for All, the Raise the Wage Act, and the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act. As the next Mayor, she’s committed to promoting policies to expand healthcare, create good jobs, increase affordable housing, promote safe and reliable public transportation, and protect the city from climate disasters. She’s also been endorsed by SEIU Texas, the Communications Workers of America, and other key Our Revolution allies. “Sheila is taking on far-right groups, corporate lobbyists, and establishment politicians — including billionaire Trump donors, the NRA, Republican anti-abortion zealots, and knee-jerk backers of Gov. Abbott’s autocratic political agenda,” Our Revolution Board Member and former TX Agriculture Commissioner Jim Hightower said. “The fat cats are against her — but we are pushing hard for her, and there are many more of us than them. The key is turning out our voters, and we know how to do that!” Hightower added. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Greater Worcester Our Revolution is supporting Robert Billota for City Council (District 2) in Worcester, MA. Robert is running for this seat because he believes Worcester should be a place where everyone can build a prosperous future. He has served on the Worcester Human Rights Commission and is a member of the Worcester Affordable Housing Coalition. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution Ohio is proudly endorsing Andrej Rotter for Upper Arlington City Council to give back to the community he says has given him so much. Andrej and his family were political refugees from Czechoslovakia, and he is a retired scientist, teacher, and mentor. He is committed to environmental sustainability, fighting climate change, and economic security. Other progressives on the ballot in Ohio include: Michael Hardy for Cleveland City Council Adrienne Hood for Columbus City Council Jan-Michele Lemon Kearney for Cincinnati City Council Kimberly Mann for Fairview Park City Council Trevor Elkins for Newburgh Heights Mayor Genevieve Flieger for North Ridgeville City Council Marcus Bedinger for Dayton City Commission Emily Cole, Greg Betts, and Cynthia Vermillion for Hilliard City Council [ ]Donate today to Our Revolution and support the phone banking, texting, door-knocking and our grassroots organizing to GET OUT THE VOTE by Tuesday in these critical down-ballot races! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] As we prepare for a massive GOTV push for Tuesday’s elections, we must also keep an eye to our work for 2024. Our Revolution is staffing up our organizing teams around the country now to make sure we do our part to keep Trump and the far right out of office, win back the House, and elect progressive leaders like Barbara Lee to join Bernie Sanders in the Senate. Barbara is the most progressive candidate in the race for the U.S. Senate seat in California. Not only has she been on the forefront for peace - casting the lone vote against the War in Afghanistan - but she has been a trailblazer for climate, education, and of course, Medicare for All. [ ][IMG] Barbara Lee was an original cosponsor of Medicare for All and she was the first to introduce universal single-payer healthcare in the California Legislature. Last week, she joined fellow U.S. Reps. Pramila Jayapal and Ro Khanna, and CA Assemblyman Ash Kalra at Our Revolution’s [ ]Healthcare for All Town Hall, where thousands tuned in to help chart a path for healthcare justice on every front — from ending medical debt to guaranteeing healthcare as a human right in California and nationwide. [ ][IMG] Congressional Progressive Caucus Chair Pramila Jayapal emphasized the importance of electing “more true universal healthcare champions to the Senate just like my friend Barbara Lee.” “She’s someone who will build the coalitions we need and do the organizing on the inside in the Senate to get more senators to recognize what we all know: the healthcare system is broken and we need Medicare for All,” [ ]Jayapal said. “Together, we can finally give Americans what they deserve: universal comprehensive healthcare that prioritizes people not profits — with everybody in and nobody out,” she added. “I’m thrilled about Barbara Lee running and that Our Revolution is doing the organizing on the ground to help her win.” [ ]Support Our Revolution’s organizing work to elect champions like Barbara in 2024 to advance the fight for healthcare justice and other progressive issue priorities! [ ][IMG] Rep. Ro Khanna served as a campaign co-chair for Bernie Sanders’ 2020 run for President, and now he’s chairing Barbara Lee’s campaign for Senate. He said she’s well-positioned in the race and much-needed in the seat because she has been a fearless trailblazer - not only on Medicare for All, but also on foreign policy, which sets her apart from her opponents. “She was for Medicare for All and eliminating medical debt before anyone, and she’s been the only person who opposed the war in Afghanistan expanding,” [ ]Ro said. “When I used to say that 2 months ago, you know that’s great, but now we NEED her voice,” he said. “She’s the only person talking clearly and loudly about the Palestinians also who are being killed in Gaza. She’s condemned the brutal Hamas attacks, but she’s also calling to end the cycle of violence.” “This is the time we need a candidate who is going to caution against another expanded war, and a candidate who’s going to stand up for Medicare for All,” Ro stated. [ ][IMG] California Assemblyman Ash Kalra also joined the conversation - laying out the path passing his bill for CalCare single-payer healthcare, which was first authored by Barbara Lee. “The bottom line is: CalCare is how we can get the greedy insurance companies out of our healthcare system — the same doctors, nurses, providers, they’re just funded through one source,” [ ]Ash explained. “Small businesses and individuals are getting ripped off.” “Even with the most expensive healthcare system in the world, we have people dying and medical debt is the number one cause of bankruptcy for families in our state,” he said. “With our movement and a senator like Barbara Lee, we can get it done. We can’t stop, lives depend on it, so thank you Our Revolution for being the wind behind our sails to continue to push us.” [ ]WATCH THE FULL TOWN HALL HERE [ ][IMG] Barbara Lee has also joined progressive leaders like U.S. Reps. Cori Bush, Ayanna Pressley, and Mark Pocan, Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison, and others on [ ]Our Revolution Live Town Halls focusing on building a [ ]World Beyond Fossil Fuels, ending backyard drilling in California, and more. “The Senate needs Barbara Lee,” said Rep. Pocan. “If you want to transform the Senate, make it more progressive, and give Bernie a real partner in the Senate, we need to elect Barbara Lee.” [ ][IMG] Our Revolution organizers and progressive delegates will be attending the 2023 California Democratic Party State Endorsing Convention the weekend of Nov. 17th in Sacramento to show our support for Barbara Lee! We want to make sure Democratic activists and party leaders are ready to stand with Barbara and endorse the most progressive candidate in the race for the U.S. Senate seat in California! For more about Barbara and to volunteer with Our Revolution’s organizing team, please visit our [ ]Progressives for Barbara Lee website and sign up today! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] VICTORY! Congratulations to United Auto Workers who won tentative agreements with the BIG 3 this week after months of hardfought negotiations and strikes. Our Revolution members joined workers on picket lines coast to coast — from Maryland to Michigan to West Virginia and beyond. We’ve been canvassing dealerships and distributing leaflets in our community about the UAW’s Stand-Up Strike and how Ford, General Motors, and Stellantis tried to avoid settling fair contracts with 150,000 workers after making $250 Billion in profits. Strikes work, join a union! UAW has proven that when workers organize, they can win and defeat some of the most powerful corporations on earth. This is why our working class progressive movement stands with the burgeoning unionization efforts across the country. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] [ ]Barn Raiser featured Vermont Lt. Gov. Dave Zuckerman, who Our Revolution has supported in his successful runs for office over the years, in their latest issue. The piece dives into Zuckerman’s success as a Vermont Progressive Party candidate. Instead of ending up as a 3rd party “spoiler” in the general election, he has cleared the field for victorious one-on-one races against a series of Republican opponents. Zuckerman offers his thoughts on Bernie’s influence locally, book banning in other states, how to reach white working class voters, and the virtues of being a working farmer. [ ]Read more here! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Join Our Revolution Board Member and progressive rabble rouser Jim Hightower, who will discuss democratic populism and the fight for social justice and structural change in this age of political division at a Public Affairs Forum in Austin, Texas next week! The event will take place from 12:30 to 1:30pm Sunday, Nov. 12th, at the First Unitarian Universalist Church of Austin. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Folks around the country are sharing their stories of Medical Debt to raise a groundswell of demand for debt cancellation and sane healthcare policies. [ ]SHARE YOUR STORY TODAY ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] You can help elect Barbara Lee to the Senate from anywhere in the country — making calls, sharing on social media, and more. If you're in California, you can help by knocking on doors or reaching out to friends - even hosting or attending a house party! [ ]We invite you to join Our Revolution’s Progressives for Barbara Lee's organizing team. Let's make this a people-powered campaign and send Barbara Lee to the Senate. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] From boots on the ground to the halls of Congress — we are building an organized progressive movement at every level of government. If you’re already a member of Our Revolution, THANK YOU! If you’re not yet an [ ]official member, please consider signing up for a recurring monthly donation today! [ ]PLEASE SUPPORT OUR REVOLUTION ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] [ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! [ ]GIVE MONTHLY [ ]GIVE ONCE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

https://www.davidkimforca.com/

============================================================
Dear friend:

Despite being outspent 7 to 1 by the corporate-backed incumbent, I received an incredible 49% of the general election votes in 2022. My vision to win power back for the people has received amazing grassroots support, and once again I'm standing up against the corporate-backed incumbent that is complicit with the status quo. Together, we can win big in 2024 and make a difference for the betterment of our community through concrete actions – like signing the CalCare pledge.💙🗳
** Watch the video about David's healthcare pledge. (https://www.instagram.com/reel/CwD-MIepo60/?utm_source=ig_web_copy_link&igshid=MzRlODBiNWFlZA%3D%3D)

WE CAN CHANGE THINGS!💪✨
I signed the CalCare Pledge! That means that I am committed to fighting alongside the California Nurses Association for health care as a right to all Californians. CalCare is important because it will allow every Californian – regardless of race, immigration status, or income – access to comprehensive and high-quality health care. It is the solution we need to fix our broken health care system. By pledging, I vowed to advocate for CalCare both now and once I am in office. While the democratic majority in the California state legislature claims to believe in health care as a human right, nothing has been passed – with our pledges, we are holding ourselves accountable to keeping our promise to ensure action is finally taken. With my help, California can help lead the way for Medicare for All across the country.

DONATE!⚡️
We will never achieve healthcare for all, if we are governed by politicians who take money from Big Pharma. Our grassroots campaign is powered by 100% clean money, which means we will never take contributions from corporate PACs. That’s why we need your help. Please consider donating today! Every donation takes us closer to achieving our goal of making a positive difference in our community. Become a $34 monthly donor and help us sustain our movement.

Let’s unite and reclaim power for the people!

subject: Fellow Conservative, allow me to introduce myself.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_s=7fa5bac088e448d4a5d7be5f27d87c2d&_t=_BCFxmhqKHUtll9EHbt9tODVqv2rtHQFtSbEJsx4wARKyMzgOuxqA3XG_FvNmxw1fx8G6WTqQBxdR8EQjZUDpldheogFy1iZnvLl9T4-njo%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_s=7fa5bac088e448d4a5d7be5f27d87c2d&_t=_BCFxmhqKHUtll9EHbt9tODVqv2rtHQFtSbEJsx4wARKyMzgOuxqA3XG_FvNmxw1fx8G6WTqQBxdR8EQjZUDpldheogFy1iZnvLl9T4-njo%3D)

|
Hi there Friend,

It's Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

_**I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. **_

I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice.

I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree.

As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values.

---

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Plastic is invading our oceans and communities
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2098531?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **CRITICAL PLASTIC ALERT: Plastic is taking over our oceans, lands, and even our BODIES.[Take action NOW to save our planet from the plastic apocalypse! >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2098532?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** This is **URGENT** , Friend — plastic is invading our one and only Earth. >From overwhelming plastic debris in our oceanic ecosystems to microplastics in the air that we breathe, we are experiencing a _**PLASTIC APOCALYPSE.**_ Plastic is nonbiodegradable, meaning that **it does not go away.** With plastic production increasing with time, we may never escape the consequences of its pollution and production. Big Oil and Big Polluters continue to produce plastic to keep their greedy pockets full. Meanwhile, their massive plastic factories are _spewing toxic petrochemical pollution into the environment and harming nearby residents _— **who are overwhelmingly low-income communities and communities of color. ** [**_We know that environmentalists like YOU will not stand for corporate greed. If 1 out of 4 people reading this email signs the petition to demand immediate federal plastic solutions, we could cease the destruction of our planet by plastics. Act Now >>_**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2098533?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2098534?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Did you know that less than **6%** of plastics are recycled annually in the United States? That means over **94%** of plastics end up sitting in landfills and polluting our communities and oceans. This toxic debris is **contaminating water sources and oceans, seeping into our soil, and can even be found in our food supply.**
It goes beyond plastic itself, Friend — there have been countless incidents of petrochemical megacorporations disposing of plastic waste improperly, resulting in irreparable devastation. In Texas, mega-polluter Formosa Plastics**i**l** legally released BILLIONS of plastic pellets** into local waterways for years. In 2016, one of their plants in Vietnam released toxins in the sea, devastating **more than 4 MILLION Vietnamese residents** by contaminating their marine food supply and destroying their economy!
**The damages and impacts are clear Friend — if we do not hold Big Oil, Big Plastics, and their dirty polluter friends accountable, plastic could DESTROY life on Earth as we know it. [Please, take less than 60 seconds right now to sign the petition before our 11:59pm deadline TONIGHT!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2098535?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2098536?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for standing against Big Plastics,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Allred HQ [via Malamed for Congress]
subject: The odds are stacked against us.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
Friend – when Colin ran for Congress in 2018, the odds were stacked against him.

His opponent was a Republican Congressman who had held his seat for 11 terms. Colin and our team put everything we had into the campaign – **but just 48 days from the election, the polls gave Colin a 10% chance of winning, and the district was leaning Republican.**

In the last days of the campaign, Colin worked day and night to connect with Texans and earn their votes. He slowly chipped away at his opponent's lead as voters got to know him.

[By Election Day, he had a 37% chance of victory. And when the numbers finally came in, he won with 52% of the vote.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-allred-split?amount=25?source=em231104-ca-split&refcode2=563_8507_jZDoNi&akid=563%2E8507%2EjZDoNi)

[Split a donation between Zak Malamed and Colin Allred to defeat Ted Cruz →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-allred-split?amount=25?amount=25&refcode=em20231105-ca-split-el&refcode2=563_8507_jZDoNi&akid=563%2E8507%2EjZDoNi)
---

Friend, this time around we're facing an even bigger opponent: Ted Cruz. But we're starting this race with much better odds. Polls show Colin just 5 points down with 14% of voters undecided.

**What's more, Ted Cruz only won reelection by 2.6% last time.**

We have a clear path to victory, and all it's going to take is connecting with enough undecided voters. That's why Colin is on the road traveling to every corner of Texas, shaking every hand he can and listening to what voters have to say.

[_But voter outreach on this massive scale is expensive. That's why Colin's counting on grassroots supporters like you to help him do it, so please: Can you split a donation of $25 between Colin and Zak Malamed before our midnight fundraising deadline to help us reach the undecided voters we need to fire Ted Cruz? →_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-allred-split?amount=25?source=em231104-ca-split&refcode2=563_8507_jZDoNi&akid=563%2E8507%2EjZDoNi)

clean_body: Friend – when Colin ran for Congress in 2018, the odds were stacked against him. His opponent was a Republican Congressman who had held his seat for 11 terms. Colin and our team put everything we had into the campaign – but just 48 days from the election, the polls gave Colin a 10% chance of winning, and the district was leaning Republican. In the last days of the campaign, Colin worked day and night to connect with Texans and earn their votes. He slowly chipped away at his opponent's lead as voters got to know him. Friend, this time around we're facing an even bigger opponent: Ted Cruz. But we're starting this race with much better odds. Polls show Colin just 5 points down with 14% of voters undecided. What's more, Ted Cruz only won reelection by 2.6% last time. We have a clear path to victory, and all it's going to take is connecting with enough undecided voters. That's why Colin is on the road traveling to every corner of Texas, shaking every hand he can and listening to what voters have to say. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: \- Team Allred

body:

My name is Kari Lake, and I'm currently in the fight of my life trying to save the soul of America in Arizona.

No matter what happens tomorrow, I'm never going to give up. I'm in this fight for ALL OF US, I will NEVER SURRENDER.

For those that don't know me - let me set the record straight.

**_I am ANTI-open border.
I am ANTI-tyranny.
I am pro-2A.
I am pro-made in America.
I am pro-law and order.
I am pro-small government.
I am pro-parent.
I am pro-AMERICA, and I'm proud of it.
_**
If I lose, Arizona is lost.

If Arizona is lost, the country is lost.

We must preserve what we have left and FIGHT to save this state and our conservative values.

**[Can you chip in to help me?](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=25cd9e460130464babf49082132a4ad2&_e=5RoUWBXuZ67JYQ6WgjBUfW4sAgpiAuPeq6Nut0AswNQwpbZghh3dAEhE50EdPJ1llpb0eONF9dOEezEhILDwG6veilot2nUDt_ERNM2S9v2VnEOJqU20fbdum0qVyz4czMf_2eLuMpHldNB_7hGbJKg23eSZGCWqrRrVhM0wagBAZUPzmOUdZa1JFEj5PYlSXenyiJGiwls1G0o7koToneQpjK11CHRVRMBYKN6oqHhLtg7RNcs8Mf9CE25vvg8atJsSaeyy0XNvw_ye1yk07bMdfH8FXGxw4VuqLsESznvmrQp3U80nIn0oeroXP7UIJg6GmMk_3quJhmszkR23cQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: | My name is Kari Lake, and I'm currently in the fight of my life trying to save the soul of America in Arizona. No matter what happens tomorrow, I'm never going to give up. I'm in this fight for ALL OF US, I will NEVER SURRENDER. For those that don't know me - let me set the record straight. I am ANTI-open border. I am ANTI-tyranny. I am pro-2A. I am pro-made in America. I am pro-law and order. I am pro-small government. I am pro-parent. I am pro-AMERICA, and I'm proud of it. If I lose, Arizona is lost. If Arizona is lost, the country is lost. We must preserve what we have left and FIGHT to save this state and our conservative values. | Thank you, and God Bless you. begins our final GOTV push
| Team,

Tomorrow marks election week in Ohio. The week where we’ll have the opportunity to change the fate of reproductive healthcare for the Buckeye state, forever.

That means tomorrow we begin our _final_ get out the vote push.

If you, like us, believe that your reproductive healthcare should not be decided by Ohio’s corrupt GOP politicians, we hope you choose to make your voice heard with us on Tuesday and vote YES on Issue 1.

We’ll be making our way across the state these next few days to make sure that every Ohioan who wants to make their own personal healthcare decisions themselves is prepared to get to the polls and vote.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dan=20Cox?=
subject: Personal note from Valerie and me
body:
Friend, Our country is in peril but there is hope to regain election, border & budget security. Today, I need your help once again to keep America. | | | |
---
|
---
|
# Personal Note from Valerie and Dan Cox
---
| | |
---
|
### Western Maryland Has No Voice In Congress For Us. With Biden's Disastrous Actions - We Must Speak Up.
Dear friend,

I'm sitting here on a Saturday afternoon writing this to you myself with my bride Valerie. We so appreciate you and thank you from the bottom of our hearts for your past support. Earlier this year I completed my service to you in the Maryland Legislature after four years as State Delegate. It was one of the highest honors of my professional life.

**And today I am happy to report to you that this week I announced my campaign to be your next conservative Republican Congressman for Maryland's Sixth District**.

[](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=62ecf032c8&e=5bb5efcda7)

Last year, we garnered the highest GOP turnout in a gubernatorial primary in the history of Maryland Republican politics, receiving also the highest unity vote of any contested GOP governor primary (over 52%) - over 70,000 more votes than the last GOP governor received in his contested primary. This is now more than one election - it is a movement.

We saw our freedom message resonate with the largest sweep of school board positions by parents in recent history across our state, and our messaging was echoed by other GOP campaigns nationally including in states that literally took over school boards like never before in American history.

The need for justice, law and reason is stronger now than ever. And we must never forget what President Ronald Reagan said, that "if we ever forget that we are one nation under God, then we will be a nation gone under."

Our opportunity to win back the Sixth Congressional District is stronger now than ever, with our fellow Marylanders seeing the urgency for a local voice to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives. Positive change has already begun with our new Speaker Mike Johnson.

Our Republican Party is united now more than ever in the knowledge that urgent action must be taken to _protect our borders immediately_ , ensure _election security is mandated_ with in-person voting, secure ballots and voter ID in every precinct (the United States is the only representative government to not require voter ID), and restore balance to the federal budget with _reduction of the greatest national security threat we face: that of our run-a-way $30 trillion national debt_ creating massive increases with inflation for you and me at this moment.

That is why just this week I filed to be your next Congressman for Maryland's Sixth District, including Garrett, Allegany, Washington, Frederick and North Montgomery Counties. Valerie and I decided to run after much prayer and consideration. You can [watch my announcement video here](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=666781c471&e=5bb5efcda7). The primary election is May 14th (early voting May 2-9) and the general election is one year away on November 5, 2023.

It is not an easy task for our family, and running for office requires much of the one who does it. But God has given us much in this free land of our America, and so much is required if we are to keep our Republic for our children and grandchildren.

**We simply cannot do this alone**. We are up against well-funded opponents several of whom are pursuing radical agendas that will make raising a family or owning a business in the Sixth District extremely difficult. [Help us win against extreme anti-jobs, anti-family, anti-freedom policies today with your generous contribution](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=1dd9a1ba7c&e=5bb5efcda7)**[ \- click here now](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=218981de99&e=5bb5efcda7)**. Your $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1000 is urgently needed to launch our campaign.

To commemorate our hard-fought election last year, we've even brought back $1776 - to be a Founding Member of our campaign. [Donate now to help us start well](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=cbcfad6407&e=5bb5efcda7).

Valerie and I thank you from the bottom of our hearts and look forward to connecting with each of you personally on the upcoming road to Congress!

Yours for freedom and our families,

---
| [DONATE TO HELP ELECT DAN COX TO CONGRESS](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=ab66abecb1&e=5bb5efcda7 "DONATE TO HELP ELECT DAN COX TO CONGRESS")

name: Sydney (Team Debbie)
subject: I can't believe I'm typing this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
we're one year out
| | |
---
Hi friend,
It's Sydney, Debbie's finance director. I can hardly believe I'm typing this, but **Debbie's election is one year away**. I am so incredibly proud of this grassroots campaign and everything that we've accomplished so far.
**Now, the national media is saying that this could be one of the closest races in 2024, and Debbie is polling one point AHEAD.**_(And can I mention we outraised Rick Scott last quarter?! That's HUGE!) _
We've made incredible progress, but we can't afford to slow down for even a second. Rick Scott has a personal fortune of up to a _quarter of a billion dollars_ that he can dip into at ANY MOMENT to destroy our momentum. He's already dropped $3 MILLION on attack ads in the last few weeks alone.
This is going to be one of the most expensive races in the country. We'll only be able to fight back and compete with Scott's spending over the next 366 days if folks like you chip in right now. That's why we've set a **$75,000 One Year Out goal** — and I'm counting on your help to hit it before midnight tonight.
**Please, will you rush $5 or more before 11:59 p.m. tonight to ensure we have the resources to compete against (and DEFEAT) Rick Scott? Our entire Democratic Senate majority is on the line here, and Debbie can only win if we have strong, early investments. Here's a personal donation link that I made for you:[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mw_dmp_2023_email_fr/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72810693/436452668/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk271-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmE3NGY2NjQtNjI3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4gJ4COGTAXpAYF06DIxXFE15IS4FGUsQroe4SPUfNLM=)**
Thanks so much,

Sydney (Debbie's Finance Director)
|
* * *
| | | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72810694/436452669/-31037693?refcode=jtk271-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmE3NGY2NjQtNjI3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4gJ4COGTAXpAYF06DIxXFE15IS4FGUsQroe4SPUfNLM=)
---
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

clean_body: we're one year out | | | Hi friend, It's Sydney, Debbie's finance director. I can hardly believe I'm typing this, but Debbie's election is one year away. I am so incredibly proud of this grassroots campaign and everything that we've accomplished so far. Now, the national media is saying that this could be one of the closest races in 2024, and Debbie is polling one point AHEAD.(And can I mention we outraised Rick Scott last quarter?! That's HUGE!) We've made incredible progress, but we can't afford to slow down for even a second. Rick Scott has a personal fortune of up to a quarter of a billion dollars that he can dip into at ANY MOMENT to destroy our momentum. He's already dropped $3 MILLION on attack ads in the last few weeks alone. This is going to be one of the most expensive races in the country. We'll only be able to fight back and compete with Scott's spending over the next 366 days if folks like you chip in right now. That's why we've set a $75,000 One Year Out goal — and I'm counting on your help to hit it before midnight tonight. Please, will you rush $5 or more before 11:59 p.m. tonight to ensure we have the resources to compete against (and DEFEAT) Rick Scott? Our entire Democratic Senate majority is on the line here, and Debbie can only win if we have strong, early investments. Here's a personal donation link that I made for you:= Thanks so much, Sydney (Debbie's Finance Director) | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

| | In one year, we’ll have left it all on the field.

But between now and then, we have a whole lot of work to do, **_and I need you on our team to get it done._**

So I’ll ask up front: [**_Can I count on you to split a donation right now between my team and the GA Dems as we gear up for 2024?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72810707/436452741/-1468014390?refcode=20231104.3_JO_11K&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjc5NjNhZS02MjdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sWT9vzX5VmHcQ0Q0zL8lF-B5sFluYbrpH-cFIfiln7A=)

There’s a lot to do. The Georgia Dems have to hire organizers all across the state to build our grassroots organizing base. They’ve got to open offices in Savannah, Augusta, Macon, Albany, Columbus, Warner Robins, Rome, Athens, Decatur, Conyers, and every town in between!

And all of that work takes a whole lot of resources. That’s why I’m coming to you today. Over the next year, we’re going to all be working hard to re-elect President Biden. All of us will be knocking doors, talking with voters, and making sure that everyone knows exactly why we need to keep Joe in the White House.

[**_So I’m asking you to have our back. By pitching in today and splitting a donation between my team and the GA Dems, you’ll support the hard work of not just my team but the entire Democratic Party of Georgia. You’ll be helping us win the closest swing state in the country, and you’ll be directly impacting our future._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72810708/436452742/-1468014390?refcode=20231104.3_JO_11K&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjc5NjNhZS02MjdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sWT9vzX5VmHcQ0Q0zL8lF-B5sFluYbrpH-cFIfiln7A=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Katherine Clark
subject: This is your moment to help us fight extremism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
This is House Democratic Whip Katherine Clark. My team and I don’t throw around the word extreme around lightly. But since gaining the majority in the House, that’s the only way to describe the MAGA majority...
Folks —

This is House Democratic Whip Katherine Clark. My team and I don’t throw around the word extreme around lightly.

But since gaining the majority in the House, that’s the only way to describe the MAGA majority.

After nine months of chaos, and nearly a month of paralysis in the House without a Speaker, **MAGA Republicans have continued to prioritize themselves and their political ambitions rather than serving their constituents and fulfilling their responsibilities to the country.**

Their agenda prioritizes fear, division, and hate over the American people. It is dangerous and deeply unpopular. And it’s part of a national far-right movement that has become corrupted by Donald Trump and is increasingly out of touch with the values and needs of Americans and our allies around the world. **In a word — _extreme._**

We must work together to put Democrats back in the majority. **But Andrea Salinas faces an uphill battle in their reelection, and they’re one of the top targets of the extreme MAGA GOP.**

We need to work together to ensure we can fight back against the millions of dollars that Republicans will pour into this election to hold onto power.

[**Ending the chaos in Washington, flipping the House, and stopping MAGA Republicans’ extreme agenda is only possible if we re-elect Andrea Salinas. Can I count on you to support our efforts by splitting a contribution between my campaign and Andrea’s today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72810723/436452787/9977739?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.04_b1_kc_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTMwNWMzYy02MzdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iRh8Ws6TG6_OFGUaGh-EzNsiH8sABvQBbvHTmzQKuB8=)

clean_body: This is House Democratic Whip Katherine Clark. My team and I don’t throw around the word extreme around lightly. But since gaining the majority in the House, that’s the only way to describe the MAGA majority... Folks — This is House Democratic Whip Katherine Clark. My team and I don’t throw around the word extreme around lightly. But since gaining the majority in the House, that’s the only way to describe the MAGA majority. After nine months of chaos, and nearly a month of paralysis in the House without a Speaker, MAGA Republicans have continued to prioritize themselves and their political ambitions rather than serving their constituents and fulfilling their responsibilities to the country. Their agenda prioritizes fear, division, and hate over the American people. It is dangerous and deeply unpopular. And it’s part of a national far-right movement that has become corrupted by Donald Trump and is increasingly out of touch with the values and needs of Americans and our allies around the world. In a word — extreme. We must work together to put Democrats back in the majority. But Andrea Salinas faces an uphill battle in their reelection, and they’re one of the top targets of the extreme MAGA GOP. We need to work together to ensure we can fight back against the millions of dollars that Republicans will pour into this election to hold onto power. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Andrea Salinas and Katherine Clark immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Together, we can push back against the extreme GOP agenda and elect leaders like Andrea Salinas who will work tirelessly to solve real problems, not create new ones. Thanks for joining us in the fight and making a difference today. Katherine Clark = | | = Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea is fighting for Oregon, fighting for affordable quality health care, an economy that works for everyone, and clean air, land, and water. Now, Andrea's ready to show Washington what hard work can accomplish – real, meaningful change for all of us. | =

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dan=20Cox?=
subject: Personal note from Valerie and me
body:
Friend, Our country is in peril but there is hope to regain election, border & budget security. Today, I need your help once again to keep America. | | | |
---
|
---
|
# Personal Note from Valerie and Dan Cox
---
| | |
---
|
### Western Maryland Has No Voice In Congress For Us. With Biden's Disastrous Actions - We Must Speak Up.
Dear friend,

I'm sitting here on a Saturday afternoon writing this to you myself with my bride Valerie. We so appreciate you and thank you from the bottom of our hearts for your past support. Earlier this year I completed my service to you in the Maryland Legislature after four years as State Delegate. It was one of the highest honors of my professional life.

**And today I am happy to report to you that this week I announced my campaign to be your next conservative Republican Congressman for Maryland's Sixth District**.

[](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=e9f0caf19b&e=5bb5efcda7)

Last year, we garnered the highest GOP turnout in a gubernatorial primary in the history of Maryland Republican politics, receiving also the highest unity vote of any contested GOP governor primary (over 52%) - over 70,000 more votes than the last GOP governor received in his contested primary. This is now more than one election - it is a movement.

We saw our freedom message resonate with the largest sweep of school board positions by parents in recent history across our state, and our messaging was echoed by other GOP campaigns nationally including in states that literally took over school boards like never before in American history.

The need for justice, law and reason is stronger now than ever. And we must never forget what President Ronald Reagan said, that "if we ever forget that we are one nation under God, then we will be a nation gone under."

Our opportunity to win back the Sixth Congressional District is stronger now than ever, with our fellow Marylanders seeing the urgency for a local voice to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives. Positive change has already begun with our new Speaker Mike Johnson.

Our Republican Party is united now more than ever in the knowledge that urgent action must be taken to _protect our borders immediately_ , ensure _election security is mandated_ with in-person voting, secure ballots and voter ID in every precinct (the United States is the only representative government to not require voter ID), and restore balance to the federal budget with _reduction of the greatest national security threat we face: that of our run-a-way $30 trillion national debt_ creating massive increases with inflation for you and me at this moment.

That is why just this week I filed to be your next Congressman for Maryland's Sixth District, including Garrett, Allegany, Washington, Frederick and North Montgomery Counties. Valerie and I decided to run after much prayer and consideration. You can [watch my announcement video here](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=78b5570784&e=5bb5efcda7). The primary election is May 14th (early voting May 2-9) and the general election is one year away on November 5, 2024.

It is not an easy task for our family, and running for office requires much of the one who does it. But God has given us much in this free land of our America, and so much is required if we are to keep our Republic for our children and grandchildren.

**We simply cannot do this alone**. We are up against well-funded opponents several of whom are pursuing radical agendas that will make raising a family or owning a business in the Sixth District extremely difficult. [Help us win against extreme anti-jobs, anti-family, anti-freedom policies today with your generous contribution](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=01c564b4d1&e=5bb5efcda7)**[ \- click here now](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=58bcbdfc5e&e=5bb5efcda7)**. Your $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1000 is urgently needed to launch our campaign.

To commemorate our hard-fought election last year, we've even brought back $1776 - to be a Founding Member of our campaign. [Donate now to help us start well](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=2930e6f1f8&e=5bb5efcda7).

Valerie and I thank you from the bottom of our hearts and look forward to connecting with each of you personally on the upcoming road to Congress!

Yours for freedom and our families,

---
| [DONATE TO HELP ELECT DAN COX TO CONGRESS](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=856b02446f&e=5bb5efcda7 "DONATE TO HELP ELECT DAN COX TO CONGRESS")

name: Rep. Maxwell Frost
subject: I’m not afraid to say that Ron DeSantis is a fascist.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/G76VaAC-1BgcmQkQhBakHg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnKU3TP0TOaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTEwNF9lbV9mcl9iMV9kZXNhbnRpczJfZW4tcnMmYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MlhnNllvZklDYUlYT01NdTQ0SXFodmM3VG43JnJlZmNvZGUyPTJYZzZZb2ZJQ2FJWE9NTXU0NElxaHZjN1RuNyZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yWGc2WW9mSUNhSVhPTU11NDRJcWh2YzdUbjdXA3NwY0IKZUXTyEZl29zy5FIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~)

Peter – Since emailing you about Governor Ron DeSantis, I’ve had people tell me to stop using the word fascist.

But I won’t stop. **This is what’s going on, and we need to call DeSantis’ abuse of power for what it is: fascism.**

I won’t tone down my language when WEEK AFTER WEEK, communities in Florida are actively being oppressed and scapegoated for DeSantis’ own political gain. [**_But I can’t be the only one calling out DeSantis’ fascism. They’re already trying to silence me. So I need a huge surge of support behind me to prepare for whatever attacks they launch against our movement. Can you stand with me by chipping in $27 now? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/G76VaAC-1BgcmQkQhBakHg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnKU3TP0TOaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTEwNF9lbV9mcl9iMV9kZXNhbnRpczJfZW4tcnMmYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MlhnNllvZklDYUlYT01NdTQ0SXFodmM3VG43JnJlZmNvZGUyPTJYZzZZb2ZJQ2FJWE9NTXU0NElxaHZjN1RuNyZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yWGc2WW9mSUNhSVhPTU11NDRJcWh2YzdUbjdXA3NwY0IKZUXTyEZl29zy5FIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~) Peter – In just the past few months, DeSantis has doubled-down on his fascist attacks against Floridians: | ❌A new bill was passed to expand the “Don’t Say Gay” law in schools up to 12th grade, furthering far-right efforts to legislate LGBTQ+ youth out of existence,

❌He’s cracking down on his opposition with a proposed law that would require bloggers and independent journalists who write about him or other officials to register with the state or face fines,

❌** _And while this is all underway, he’s touring the country and collecting checks from GOP mega-donors to fund his Presidential campaign launch._**
---
I’m telling you this because we can’t let these fascists takeover our state. We can’t stand for it. And we can’t stay quiet.
**So Peter, that’s where you come in. If we’re going to defeat fascism in Florida, we need strength in numbers to show DeSantis and his far-right henchmen that we’re not going anywhere.**
[**_I’m urging 545 supporters to join me by chipping in with a donation before midnight. If you’re ready to help me fight against fascism, rush anything you can now >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/G76VaAC-1BgcmQkQhBakHg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnKU3TP0TOaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTEwNF9lbV9mcl9iMV9kZXNhbnRpczJfZW4tcnMmYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MlhnNllvZklDYUlYT01NdTQ0SXFodmM3VG43JnJlZmNvZGUyPTJYZzZZb2ZJQ2FJWE9NTXU0NElxaHZjN1RuNyZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yWGc2WW9mSUNhSVhPTU11NDRJcWh2YzdUbjdXA3NwY0IKZUXTyEZl29zy5FIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~)

clean_body: | ~ Peter – Since emailing you about Governor Ron DeSantis, I’ve had people tell me to stop using the word fascist. But I won’t stop. This is what’s going on, and we need to call DeSantis’ abuse of power for what it is: fascism. I won’t tone down my language when WEEK AFTER WEEK, communities in Florida are actively being oppressed and scapegoated for DeSantis’ own political gain. ~ Peter – In just the past few months, DeSantis has doubled-down on his fascist attacks against Floridians: | ❌A new bill was passed to expand the “Don’t Say Gay” law in schools up to 12th grade, furthering far-right efforts to legislate LGBTQ+ youth out of existence, ❌He’s cracking down on his opposition with a proposed law that would require bloggers and independent journalists who write about him or other officials to register with the state or face fines, ❌ And while this is all underway, he’s touring the country and collecting checks from GOP mega-donors to fund his Presidential campaign launch. I’m telling you this because we can’t let these fascists takeover our state. We can’t stand for it. And we can’t stay quiet. So Peter, that’s where you come in. If we’re going to defeat fascism in Florida, we need strength in numbers to show DeSantis and his far-right henchmen that we’re not going anywhere. ~ | | ~ ~ | ~ | Stronger together, Rep. name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: This time next year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter — imagine it’s this time next year.
Our campaign will be in the thick of GOTV. You’ll probably see Lucas every time you turn on the television. Hundreds of organizers and volunteers will be working hard to turn out voters across Missouri. **And we’ll have just _days_ until they head to the ballot box to choose their next U.S. Senator.**
I know it seems far away right now, but the reality is that your early support will absolutely impact our ability to do everything it’ll take to win this race.
If you chip in today, you’re giving us the ability to plan ahead and make strategic decisions about our organizing program, TV ad buys, staffing, and so much more.
**So what do you say, Peter?[Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can afford today so our campaign will be prepared to defeat Josh Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat this time next year?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38857?refcode=em20231104-4121&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4121%2E614464%2EmJzEa4)**

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e7ffd98ae52e4a67acc59cdf34e40a67&_e=1ONyDT6_ruqEneZaaDvUXKXbr_46tXhQHlzuBC7vsPGPY3CCWgzvh6kSfoRYCzC6SAeuprWbTHliqfrpryXbAsZ9QUF9sX0e-VSzG1JqRisn7ibJRgZh5Uwm7V03xphP88ViGLoElnoNcxHEGnofklzFdCppjaWRkObNzGiGWKVhDiB5EWhNPF86pYV3zcN2hxqc40UzWesqrODyhjZblFIvKyCNVNviTs0n3pygcZO_Fypxnq7LRc3dGJU7bWuRHluycnAIhOpB-8ZZGZxbagvmT0W9Wg-itTWcQGIW-9EXrf_l-_QzmLn64hHYZb0nTMs4_SBEa44dQTN4oQSx7sZNmDeTFNSWxiw-SaRZ2sCTI6vOk7NfNhLPZeK1GH0hUdY5vAcAHqT7sHqTQGKBDw%3D%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e7ffd98ae52e4a67acc59cdf34e40a67&_e=1ONyDT6_ruqEneZaaDvUXKXbr_46tXhQHlzuBC7vsPGPY3CCWgzvh6kSfoRYCzC6SAeuprWbTHliqfrpryXbAsZ9QUF9sX0e-VSzG1JqRisn7ibJRgZh5Uwm7V03xphP88ViGLoElnoNcxHEGnofklzFdCppjaWRkObNzGiGWKVhDiB5EWhNPF86pYV3zcN2hxqc40UzWesqrODyhjZblFIvKyCNVNviTs0n3pygcZO_Fypxnq7LRc3dGJU7bWuRqa0M5Pacug0-bvwt2iI4lTzBNNOWSJEorx47QMdyA8wT4eGy1YVAhPdjT_12yWA2GqsEjI2iWJZ6sZcG7OMaqyUBkMnXlOd-0zfmiF3L8S5Usl-KWQWln_HM9um_J6OmijVHbKavhwTqCpodtYr2zQ%3D%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e7ffd98ae52e4a67acc59cdf34e40a67&_e=1ONyDT6_ruqEneZaaDvUXKXbr_46tXhQHlzuBC7vsPGPY3CCWgzvh6kSfoRYCzC6SAeuprWbTHliqfrpryXbAsZ9QUF9sX0e-VSzG1JqRisn7ibJRgZh5Uwm7V03xphP88ViGLoElnoNcxHEGnofklzFdCppjaWRkObNzGiGWKVhDiB5EWhNPF86pYV3zcN2hxqc40UzWesqrODyhjZblFIvKyCNVNviTs0n3pygcZO_Fypxnq7LRc3dGJU7bWuRi0Rhcd50_IL_JsDGlcSv_LNTimi3n5eOZFlpqA7osxt67Bfg3aSSGwSpIG8KAhuy1i7-onCR5JoItwrNwPhZd7NVY6iwnktaoEAXXHvHcYPe2j0CgaV8H2sMmXMv_MwRg03C_79eVp7WGZFJxx5oJg%3D%3D "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?

clean_body: My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish." Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me. The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC. Politico fired off this headline: " Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson." And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports. Look: These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not really the goal... The real goal of this political ambush is two-fold: 1) smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and 2) scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats. It 's about power and money. Nothing else. That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country. If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority. So here's my final pitch to you: We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now. The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this. Let me make myself perfectly clear: I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative. "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING." That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in? Thanks for all you do. In liberty, Speaker Mike Johnson | "Speaker Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. name: Adam Frisch
subject: Fox News and Lauren Boebert attacked my family

body:
The day before the anniversary of the Supreme Court’s disastrous Dobbs decision, I woke up to Fox News and Lauren Boebert attacking my sister and my 81-year-old father.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72811196/436454563/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzRkODkzNy02NjdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zaUSyKRggmXAATG2CvTmn57mEHkRhTo3ivAExVqRoPI=&emci=783faed8-657b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=a34d8937-667b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72811197/436454564/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzRkODkzNy02NjdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zaUSyKRggmXAATG2CvTmn57mEHkRhTo3ivAExVqRoPI=&emci=783faed8-657b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=a34d8937-667b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
The day before the anniversary of the Supreme Court’s disastrous _Dobbs_ decision, I woke up to Fox News and Lauren Boebert attacking my sister and my 81-year-old father.
For decades, Dad was an OB-GYN. He delivered thousands of babies and wrote books on how to get pregnant and to navigate menopause. Dad provided women with full access to all kinds of reproductive health care, including abortions, in the years right after _Roe_ – and he has now had to watch as women’s reproductive rights are gutted in the aftermath of _Dobbs_.
Dad and his clinic faced many threats over the years. It’s no exaggeration to say that he put his own safety – and that of his family – at risk in order to protect the rights of women to make their own medical decisions.
But I’m not sure he ever expected to see a sitting member of Congress attacking him – or my sister who followed in his footsteps – in a national news outlet. **It’s disgusting. These kinds of personal attacks against my family have no place in our politics and do nothing to serve the people of Western and Southern Colorado.**
If Lauren Boebert wants to have a conversation about reproductive rights in this country, I am more than happy to have that debate. We can talk about how I support _freedom_ and _liberty_ – and how she supports big government intruding into the lives of women. We can talk about how Boebert supports a national ban on abortion – with no exceptions for rape, incest, or the life of the mother. And we can talk about how Lauren Boebert is so extreme, she even wants to ban the pill that’s been used by women for decades.
I am willing to talk all day about Lauren Boebert’s fringe view that the government should be dictating women’s medical decisions. **But what I won’t accept is Lauren Boebert and Fox News attacking my father and my sister.**
I am _incredibly_ proud of my father. He provided health care to women when they needed it during some of the happiest – and most devastating – moments of their lives. Before retirement, he would drive two hours to Planned Parenthood and help teach the next generation of health care providers, like my sister. And no one – not Fox News, and especially not Lauren Boebert – is going to stop my family from continuing to stand up for a woman’s right to choose.
**Lauren Boebert is scared. Last year, I came just 546 votes shy of defeating her and ending her political career once and for all. I’m ready to finish the job in 2024, but these are the kinds of ugly attacks that I’m already up against.**
[**Please, if you can afford to, will you give $5 or more right now to my campaign to help me finally defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024? Our race was the closest in the entire country in 2022. But I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on grassroots donors like you if I’m going to hold Boebert accountable and win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72811198/436454565/1610638071?refcode=em20231104pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=a34d8937-667b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzRkODkzNy02NjdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zaUSyKRggmXAATG2CvTmn57mEHkRhTo3ivAExVqRoPI=)

Thank you for being on this journey with me, through thick and thin.

body:
I need your help to grow our campaign.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=32598%2E3422442%2EpK2NAZ)
Derek, these are a few of my family’s succulents—a great plant for our Orange County climate!
**These plants have slowly grown more vibrant thanks to careful watering, now I need your help to _grow_ our campaign.**
****
Just like plants, keeping a campaign alive and thriving isn’t an easy task. Grassroots donors are the water, soil, and sunlight of our campaign. Seriously, I'm only in Congress because of folks like you, and grassroots support is the only way we’ll win. The proof is in the numbers: 99% of our donations are $100 or less.
